Interviews: Initial Setup
# Manually Scheduling Interviews
24 min
Copy
Ashby provides a variety of features that make it easy to schedule interviews and collect feedback on candidates. This article focuses on the manual scheduling flow, showing how to schedule an interview manually. This is an option you can use if you’ve already determined a suitable time with the candidate.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#scheduling-overview)Scheduling Overview
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#scheduling-permissions-required-to-schedule-an-int)Scheduling: Permissions required to schedule an interview
See the chart below for more information on who can schedule a candidate in for an interview, either by sending out a direct booking link, or manually scheduling interviews.  
| Access Role  | Has Access?  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  |  
| Agency User  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin (Private)  | ✅  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#start-scheduling-a-new-interview)Start scheduling a new interview
To start scheduling an interview, open the candidate profile of the candidate you want to schedule an interview for.
Navigate to More>Schedule New Interview, then click Manual Schedule.
Alternatively, you can click + New Interview _,_ Schedule Interview, then Manual Schedule.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2fd75d7586ae11a52c6375e0f996bb2b.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a4ec46fbb5a25aff01c534fb75188f16.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

You can configure your interview plans to automatically prompt your team to schedule interviews when candidates reach an active stage. More on this at [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities)﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#use-the-calendar-interface)Use the calendar interface
When scheduling interviews manually, the calendar interface is where you will set up the bulk of the schedule. On this screen you decide:
  * On which day the interview will take place (for scheduling multi-day interviews, see the FAQ below)


  * Which interviews will take place


  * Which interviewers will participate


  * The start time and duration of each interview


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6b02fd265fb666658bfdae252104befd.png)
﻿
_The image above highlights 8 key areas:_
  1. The first column represents the current schedule. It is a summary of all the events the candidate will participate in on the day of the interview.


  1. This date picker allows you to switch the day on which the interview takes place. Click the date to see the full calendar, or use the arrows to find the preferred day.


  1. Multi-Day Schedule: Checking this checkbox will allow you to jump to other dates on the calendar without automatically switching the date of the interview. This is useful if you’re scheduling multiple interview events in one go.


  1. Candidate Availability: Checking this will show the candidate’s availability if it was submitted.


  1. The See Employee Calendar dropdown allows you to preview the calendars of potential interviewers. You can filter or scroll to find the calendar you'd like to see. For onsite interviews, use See Room Calendar to view room availability.


  1. The Add Interview button allows you to add additional interviews to the same day. To schedule interviews on different days, you'll want to [schedule multi-day interviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews "schedule multi-day interviews").


  1. The interview dropdown allows you to select the interview type. The interview types you want to use here need to be pre-configured. You can choose shared interviews (Admin > Customize Interviews > Interviews) or create a custom interview in the current interview stage schedule template.


  1. These controls allows you to modify your interview panel:


  * Feedback Required ☆ - If this setting is turned off, the interviewer will not be reminded to submit feedback to complete this interview. They can still submit feedback if needed.


  * Hide/View Calendar**🗓** - allows you to display or hide the selected interviewer's calendar


  * Delete Slot 🗑 - allows you to remove an interviewer from the interview panel


  * Alt. - indicates the number of alternate interviewers as defined on the schedule template, otherwise this number will remain at zero.


  * Add interviewer slot - allows you to add an additional interviewer to the panel. Once an interviewer is added, their calendar with their availability will be displayed alongside the Current Schedule calendar.


  * Add room - allows you to specify a meeting room for onsite interviews for each interview.


Hover over the _i_ icon next to the interviewer’s name to see their daily and weekly interview limits (if set) along with any interviewer preferences set on their profile.
The _i_ icon will show in yellow if the interviewer is nearing their limits, or in red if the interviewer has met or exceeded their interview limits.
More on setting limits and preferences can be found at [Interviewers: Assigning, Rescheduling, and Setting Interviewer Limits](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewers-assigning-rescheduling-and-setting-interviewer-limits)﻿
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/13c51d0976bb360cfb37619d19f77da1.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#set-up-and-send-calendar-invites)Set up and send calendar invites
Once you've selected an interview time and picked the interview panel, you're ready to set up and send calendar invites. In this step, you can preview and edit calendar invite information for both the candidate and your interviewers, determine the invite settings and configure interview reminders and confirmation emails.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#calendar-invites-single-interview-event)Calendar Invites - Single Interview Event
On the Calendar Invites tab, you can determine whether calendar invites should be sent to the candidate and/or interviewers using the Send Candidate Invite and Send Interviewer Invite toggles. We would generally recommend sending out calendar invites when scheduling an interview.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9a06c24d3d048a0f3807c38bf6a2bb54.png)
﻿
In the Candidate Invite and Interviewer Invite sections, you can preview the calendar invites that will be sent out. To make any amendments to either invite, click the Edit option.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/939389684835d454066c53b60f9a4ed3.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#calendar-invites-multiple-interview-events)Calendar Invites - Multiple Interview Events
If you've added multiple interview events to your interview, you'll see some additional options when it comes to sending out calendar invites in the Manage Candidate Invites section. You can select from the following options:
**Send one invite per block:** The candidate will receive a separate calendar invite for interview events that are more than 30 minutes apart. If they have two interview events with a 15-minute break between the two, they will receive one calendar invite. If they have two interview events with a one-hour break in between, they will receive two calendar invites.
**Send one invite per interview:** The candidate will receive a separate calendar invite for each interview event, regardless of how far apart they are.
**Send one invite per day:** The candidate will receive a calendar event per day they have interview events. So if they have one interview event on Monday, then the other two on Tuesday, they will receive two calendar invites. If they have one interview event on Monday, one on Tuesday and one on Wednesday, they will receive three calendar invites.
If you have video conferencing (Zoom, Google Meet, Teams) set as the location for your interview, each calendar invite will have a unique meeting link. As such, the option you choose for sending out the calendar invites may impact the number of unique links generated.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/T6XU_yri0fsfpnCX86pda_jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-102650-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can also click Edit on each interview calendar invite to update the calendar invite title and description per invite, so if you have specific information relevant to only one interview event, it can be added only to the relevant invite.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/MMZwy0tN60pdXH5YV-GtP_jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-105734-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#invite-settings)Invite Settings
One the Invite Settings screen, modify the details of both invites.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/aa8f01bfed40de46727dbeba7ce70bb3.png)
﻿
  1. The Calendar dropdown menu lets you to select which calendar the calendar events will be scheduled to. This calendar will also receive a calendar invite, along with the candidate and interviewer calendars. The calendar cannot be changed on reschedule. As such, we recommend setting up a shared calendar to house these interview events to allow for easy rescheduling and so you have one calendar that you can view all scheduled interviews on. For more information, check out [What is a shared calendar?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/what-is-a-shared-calendar)﻿﻿


  1. The Location Type dropdown menu and Location field support let you add physical or remote location details. Set custom text, or select one of the integrated options. The integrated options will automatically generate a unique video conference link and include it in the invite. Current video conference integrations are:


  * Google Meet


  * Zoom


  * Microsoft Teams


  1. The Is Private toggle lets you set invites as private. When enabled, the calendar invite details (e.g. title, attendees) are hidden from others and interviewers are only marked as busy.


Finally, if you have the Coderpad, CodeSignal Interview or HackerRank integrations in place, you can also specify which events (if any) should use the integration. A unique assessment link will be generated for each event that the integration has been enabled for and will be automatically included in both candidate and interviewer invites.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/X6XcJ4BXyM6JdWSkIt__O_jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-110442-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#interview-reminders)Interview Reminders
On the Interview Reminders tab, you can configure reminders for both candidates and interviewers.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f1fbdd3f31030066503378c86c2e0e10.png)
﻿
To add an interview reminder for a candidate, click Add Candidate Reminder _._ To add a reminder in for interviewers on your panel, click Add Interviewer Reminder _._
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bcece22b8d4efc7c09719945faeb441b.png)
﻿
  1. Send: Determine the delivery method for your reminder. For candidates, reminders can only be sent via email. For interviewers, they can be sent via email or Slack if you have the integration in place.


  1. From: Determine the sender of the reminder.


  1. When: Configure how many minutes, hours or days before the interview the reminder should be sent.


  1. Using Template: Confirm your email template for the reminder here. For more on setting up email templates, check out [Email Template Creation and Management](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-template-creation-and-management)﻿.


  1. Delete: Remove this reminder for this interview.


  1. Add Candidate Reminder: Create a new reminder for this interview.


  1. Reset: Reset the reminder to your organization’s scheduling defaults﻿. More on this at [Setting Scheduling Defaults](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-scheduling-defaults)﻿.


  1. Combine Daily Reminders for Candidates?: If you’re scheduling multiple interview events across a number of days for this interview, use this option to determine how reminders should be sent to the candidate. More on this at [How do I use multi-day scheduling?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling)﻿﻿


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#candidate-confirmation-email)Candidate Confirmation Email
If you’d like to send a confirmation to the candidate for their interview, you can configure a confirmation email on the Candidate Confirmation Email tab. When manually scheduling an interview, this will default to being switched off.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8933c67c442a50c9c7230044c685898b.png)
﻿
  1. Send Candidate Confirmation Email: Toggle this on to send out the configured confirmation email when you click Schedule.


  1. Confirmation Email Template: Determine the email template that should be sent to the candidate.


  1. Preview: You can view your template here and make any adjustments to the body and subject of your confirmation email as needed.


  1. From: Use the drop-down to determine the sender of your confirmation email.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#reschedule-interviews)Reschedule Interviews
When you need to reschedule interviews, you can navigate to the current schedule through the Reschedule button on the activity (where you can click Manual Reschedule or Request More Availability).
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/ehYrE1mLvxrgYScbRLbQv_shelley-pearce-marketeer-acent-ashby-2026-02-17-at-101040-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can also click the View Schedule option beneath the interview details. You can then click the Manual Schedule button on the following Current Schedule page.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/6jujhmrR4oa8j3PSvYdOO_shelley-pearce-marketeer-acent-ashby-2026-02-17-at-101236-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If you’ve headed to Reschedule, then Manual Reschedule, you’ll be immediately taken to the calendar and interview details to make any changes.
When rescheduling, all details except for the interview calendar (or the Calendar field within Invite Settings) can be modified. The only events that will be updated are the ones directly impacted by the re-schedule. Review [Use the Calendar interface](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#use-the-calendar-interface)﻿ section above for more details.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#cancel-interviews)Cancel Interviews
When you need to cancel interviews, you can either click Actions on the scheduled interview, then select Cancel Interview… or click View Schedule _._
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e9a7d52db1eb5ecf6bdf7d71ce6b1a64.png)
﻿
When viewing the current interview schedule, you will see the option to cancel the interview.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e471ae83d33947ee15c2937a448d5bf2.png)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#how-do-i-schedule-multi-day-interviews)How do I schedule multi-day interviews?
For a full guide, check out [How do I use multi-day scheduling?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling)﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#can-i-change-interviewers-on-an-invite)Can I change interviewers on an invite?
To modify the details of an interview, visit the schedule overview as detailed in the reschedule and cancel interview sections above, and select a new interviewer in the calendar interface.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#how-do-i-see-calendar-invite-details)How do I see calendar invite details?
You can review calendar details at a glance by visiting the current activities section of the candidate profile and toggling the event using the _Details_ button In this view, you'll see the date and time of the interview, the location and the organizer.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fc827d270c387bb0ee530647ed24188e.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#how-do-i-save-time-scheduling-interviews)How do I save time scheduling interviews?
Create schedule interview activities to streamline scheduling. This will pre-populate standard activities when a candidate reaches a certain stage (e.g., application review). More on this at [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#how-do-i-request-candidate-availability)How **do I request candidate availability?**
You can read more on requesting candidate availability at [Direct Booking & Candidate Availability Links](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links)﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#will-all-invites-be-resent-if-i-reschedule-an-inte)Will **all invites be resent if I reschedule an interview?**
No. The only events that will be updated are the ones directly impacted by the re-schedule.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#can-i-reschedule-an-interview-by-moving-the-event)Can**I reschedule an interview by moving the event in Google Calendar?**
We support a two-way syncing option whereby if you move an interview event in Google Calendar to a new date and/or time, the changes will be synced and reflected in Ashby.
The calendar event would need to be moved on the account’s shared interview calendar (the calendar determined in the Communication tab of your interview) if it wasn’t scheduled via the direct booking option.
For an interview scheduled via a direct booking link, the calendar invite can be moved on the shared calendar or the meeting organiser can move the interview on their personal calendar if they don’t have access to the shared calendar.
These changes will then be synced back to Ashby and new calendar invites will be sent out. You do not need to resend the invites from Google.
If the interview is rescheduled via Google Calendar, an event will be added to the candidate’s feed showing that rescheduling happened outside of Ashby.
Please note that updates to the schedule in Ashby are dependent on Google syncing times. They should show in Ashby within a minute or so, but could take longer.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c80580323747dc44015cd051310c1483.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

﻿  

﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#can-i-reschedule-an-interview-that-i-didnt-schedul)Can I reschedule an interview that I didn't schedule?
We recommend setting up a shared interview calendar and adding anyone on your hiring team that scheduled interviews to prevent scheduling issues when team members are away. More on this at [What is a shared calendar?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/what-is-a-shared-calendar)﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#can-i-pick-a-room-from-a-meeting-room-pool-when-ma)Can I pick a room from a meeting room pool when manually scheduling interviews?
﻿  

You can, yes. When using the calendar interface to select the interview type, interviewers and date and time of the interview, click the Add Room By Pool option. You can then select the pool you’d like to choose rooms from. Once you’ve selected your chosen pool (or pools) via the drop-down menu, click Choose Meeting Room to see the rooms in your selected pool/pools. Review the meeting rooms available within your pool, then click Select Meeting Room to confirm the meeting room you’d like to add to your interview. 
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e343f4ce47b2bc4b40836589103830c1.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/24dd90ffd1d57917fa4fe0ad91d1ac62.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/091807c6de5bc7aa526fc09cec14e3fd.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#is-a-candidate-notified-if-an-interview-is-cancell)I**s a candidate notified if an interview is cancelled?**
When cancelling an interview, candidates will receive a cancelled event notification (similar to the invite notification they receive when an interview is scheduled and calendar invites are sent). This will happen both when cancelling directly from the candidate profile and when cancelling the interview as part of archiving the candidate’s job consideration.
﻿  

﻿

job-board-configuring-your-setup:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Admin & Organization Settings
Job Board Setup
# Job Board: Configuring Your Setup
18 min
Copy
Your Ashby theme is used to customize and style your Ashby job board and other landing pages. Have your company's brand assets ready, and check out the [Ashby Job Board](https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/ashby "Ashby Job Board") for an example configured job board. Check out [Routes for integrating your Ashby job board with your careers page](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/routes-for-integrating-your-ashby-job-board-with-your-careers-page)﻿ for more customizable job board options.
A high-quality careers page is one of your team's best avenues for sourcing candidates. Ashby provides a beautiful, responsive job board you can customize with your company's brand assets. You can host and link to all of your jobs here, or you can use [the Ashby API or job board embedding](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/can-we-post-our-jobs-on-our-existing-careers-page "the Ashby API or job board embedding") options to host jobs on your existing website.
In this step, you will customize your Ashby job board by adding company logos, colors, and custom messaging.
Only those with Organization Admin access will be able to amend job board theme settings.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#setup-your-job-board-theme)Setup your job board theme
﻿
To get started, navigate to Admin > Job Boards > [Theme (Job Board)](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/theme "Theme \(Job Board\)")_._ This theme page applies styling and logos to any public-facing pages Ashby generates include your job board and direct booking landing pages.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#sections)Sections
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#identity)Identity
In the Identity section, you can update your job board slug, organization name, and link to your public website.
If you change your job board slug ensure there are no spaces. We recommend using hyphens to separate words if necessary.
Amending your job board slug when jobs are already posted to external job boards (e.g LinkedIn) will cause issues with redirecting candidates until the job boards have updated the postings to match the new job board link. This can take around 24 hours to update.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/474253f1fb822ddc66f6d925e817635a.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#job-board-embedding)Job board embedding
🗣 You have the option to embed your Ashby job board in your existing careers page. To enable, follow the instructions outlined in the [Routes for integrating your Ashby job board with your careers page](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/routes-for-integrating-your-ashby-job-board-with-your-careers-page)﻿
**Example embedded job boards:**
  * ﻿[Ashby](https://www.ashbyhq.com/careers "Ashby")﻿


  * ﻿[YCombinator](https://www.ycombinator.com/careers "YCombinator")﻿


![The Ashby job board is embedded in our careers page.](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/DaD2dSbuNv4r-18wZ9yso_jobboardgif.gif)
The Ashby job board is embedded in our careers page.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#logos)Logos
Your logos will be used on all external pages. Review the recommended sizes for the best experience.
**Square**
The square logo is used on mobile Ashby pages. We recommend using a square PNG, JPG, or SVG file of at least 48 x 48 pixels.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7f25a7e4c8dd16f5f82897055c7261fd.png)
﻿
**Wordmark**
The wordmark logo is used on desktop screens. If your wordmark appears small on Ashby, reduce the border or margin. We recommend using a horizontal rectangular PNG, JPG, or SVG file at least 160 pixels high.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d0ed4da5be420c3f3b708494ece8c276.png)
﻿
﻿  

**Social Media**
The social media logo is used when you post jobs on social media sites like Twitter and LinkedIn. If you don't include a social media image, your square logo will be used instead.
We recommend using a PNG or JPG file at least 1000 pixels wide and a ratio of width to height of about 1.7 to 1 (1000 pixels wide by 588 pixels high).
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8568be6bf880633355e156d224dcadb8.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#job-board-options)Job board options
Use these options to control visual elements on the job board specifically including filters and grouping jobs.
**Brand Colors**
Your brand colors will be used on buttons and links. These will be used on all external Ashby pages including:
  * Job boards


  * Direct booking and candidate availability pages


  * Surveys and quizzes


  * Data privacy and compliance consent requests


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/96d4b95a83f3db63dc4e99cbd3046e0f.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4436efc6b6dbfa7c7fd25f24f2da0299.png)
﻿
**Custom CSS**
You have the option to upload a CSS file to customize your job board further. We have an example of a CSS file that can be downloaded [here](https://www.ashbyhq.com/job-board-embed-examples/full-job-board#css "here"). You can also implement [at-rules](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/At-rule "at-rules") for further customization.
**Show Job Filters?**
Choose to hide or display department, location, location type and employment type filters on your job board.
The filters will also show a count of job postings per department, location or employment type when the drop-down menu is opened by a candidate viewing your job board.
﻿  

![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/JfACf8wbB9vDZtOi2rFct_job-board-filters.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/-__znvAMxDL3K-1nLp4qM_department-list-open-on-job-board.png?format=webp)
﻿
**Show location address**
For more on configuring locations, check out [Set up Departments & Locations](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/set-up-departments-and-locations)﻿
You can set location street addresses to be displayed on your job postings. To display the location address across all job postings on your job board, check the Show Location Address?checkbox.
If an address has not been assigned to some of your locations, then just the location name (or candidate-facing location name) will be displayed on job postings that have been assigned that location.
﻿  

![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/PxM7Gfuy1SSlCmhFApRs4_show-location-address-checkbox.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/dzqCTfz7QiHdQdYAMvOek_address-on-a-job-posting.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
﻿  

**Group By Teams?**
Choose to group jobs by the department or the sub-team on your job board.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6ee6ec541f7a22dbb0021095180b7d39.png)
﻿
﻿  

**Show Autofill Field on Application Forms?**
Check the **Show Autofill Field on Application Forms?** checkbox to allow fields to be auto-filled from the candidate’s resume details. If enabled, an Autofill from resume option will show above the Your Details section for the candidate in the Application section of your job posting.
The candidate can click Upload File here to upload their resume and then have application fields automatically populated with details from the file uploaded.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/40c2c07ae99cbec86be171586802afeb.png)
﻿
**Override Job Postings' Back URL**
If you opt to set a URL here, this is where the back button on your job postings will direct to (instead of your ashbyhq.com job page). If you’re using the lightweight API option to post listings directly, this will ensure that users are taken back to your custom careers page. More on this at [Using the lightweight job posting API to list openings on your site.](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/using-the-lightweight-job-posting-api-to-list-openings-on-your-site)﻿﻿
﻿  

**Disable Ashby-hosted jobs page?**
If this option is enabled, you organization’s job postings will not be accessible via your [ashbyhq.com](http://ashbyhq.com "ashbyhq.com") job board. This option is for users with a custom-build job board. You can read more on this option at [Can I disable my Ashby job board?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup "Can I disable my Ashby job board?")﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#messaging)Messaging
🗣 Customize messaging on the confirmation message, email display name, and more.
**After the candidate submits application**
Customize the confirmation message the candidate sees after they submit an application.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a1168dc85638cdda60b119bd2db420b9.png)
﻿
﻿  

**No-reply address display name**
In this field, you can amend the display name that will be used as the sender name candidates will see on their application confirmation email, along with other emails sent from the Ashby no-reply address.
The display name cannot be empty and has a maximum length of 30 characters.
Note: if you want to set up a custom company address, see the [Email Sharing](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup "Email Sharing") guide for more information
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/106ad14619947ca1d26d7e0bd3173e68.png)
﻿
**Top & bottom description**
Rich text editors that support adding formatted text, code, links, and images to the top and bottom of your job board.
﻿  

![Example bottom description](https://cdn.zappy.app/d2b5c8b4884385ebe86a491d6d165654.png)
Example bottom description
﻿
﻿  

**Job post description opening & closing**
Rich text editors that support adding formatted text, code, links, and images as before and after the job descriptions on all job postings.
﻿  

![The About Ashby section is included on all job postings](https://cdn.zappy.app/f7395d563492a8d0cbaa683c31e8016f.png)
The About Ashby section is included on all job postings
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#application-spam-protection)Application spam protection
Ashby verifies submitted job application forms and attempts to detect whether a real candidate is submitting the form or if it might be a bot. This setting allows you to adjust the threshold when applications are rejected. If you receive many spam applications, you can try a more strict setting. Beware that a strict setting might cause applications from actual candidates to be rejected.
  * Strict - Only use this level as a last resort. Some candidates will experience problems submitting their applications.


  * Permissive (Recommended) - This is the recommended level. You might get spam applications once in a while.


  * Less Permissive - The chance of getting spam applications is very low. Candidates might experience problems submitting their applications from time to time.


  * No Protection - Protection is turned off. All application submissions will be accepted.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4dd09c023db0dc55993cca0eeead6ab7.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#in-what-order-are-job-postings-listed-on-my-ashby)In what order are job postings listed on my Ashby job board?
Jobs are displayed by department and in alphabetical order. For example, roles in the Customer Success department will be displayed in alphabetical order before the roles assigned to the Engineering department. You can opt to enable the [Show Job Filters](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#job-board-options)﻿ option if you have a lot of roles and would like candidates to filter postings by department, location or employment type.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#my-thumbnail-hasnt-been-updated-on-linkedin-after)My thumbnail hasn’t been updated on LinkedIn after I’ve uploaded a new file. Can I manually update it?
You can, yes. You can use LinkedIn’s Post Inspector [here](https://www.linkedin.com/post-inspector/ "here") to view when LinkedIn last updated your data and request a re-scrape.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup#can-i-add-a-tracking-pixel-to-my-job-board)Can I add a tracking pixel to my job board?
Yes! Please send your tracking pixel URL to support@ashbyhq.com. As a heads up, the tracking pixel will fire only when candidates submit an application on your job board.
﻿

<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby Analytics
Alerts & Exports
# Scheduled Dashboards
17 min
Copy
This document provides an overview of Scheduled Dashboard delivery, including set-up filtering, and finding scheduled content.
Scheduled Dashboards can be configured on the Plus, Enterprise and Legacy Plus plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#how-to-create-a-scheduled-dashboard-delivery)How to Create a Scheduled Dashboard delivery
Click on the Scheduled Delivery button in the top right corner of the dashboard, then click on Add Scheduled Delivery.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 2.43.35 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/JOkmyioo09rcOAnndGzBr_screencast2023-07-25at24335pm.gif)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

If you are viewing a dashboard that has been pinned to your Home Page, you will need to click the Edit button first in order to access the Scheduled Delivery button. Then click on Add Scheduled Delivery.
﻿  

![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 2.50.44 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/3KLbzStkfnoxDeqGuN0y8_screencast2023-07-25at25044pm.gif)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

![Screen Shot 2023-07-25 at 3.14.45 PM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/456d88e59572db305bf9132367fe4cff.png)
﻿
Once a scheduled delivery has been added to the dashboard, you can configure the following:
  1. When the dashboard should be delivered


  1. How the Scheduled Dashboard will be delivered.


  1. Who will receive the dashboard


  1. Apply any filters


  1. Select the delivery format


  1. Enter a Title (required)


  1. Add message content


  1. Determine who the sender is.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#when-the-dashboard-should-be-delivered)When the dashboard should be delivered
Select the cadence at which the dashboard should be delivered. You can choose from Day, Week, Month, or Quarter, and the day and time options are dependent upon which selection you make.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 3.23.12 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/83ICFLFJAdLYkh0fdK4V0_screencast2023-07-25at32312pm.gif)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#how-the-dashboard-should-be-delivered)How the dashboard should be delivered
Choose either Email or Slack as your delivery method. For more on the integration with Slack, check out [Slack](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/slack)﻿.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 3.26.43 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/nMxPvTLJ7jRCBUQ1BKSaS_screencast2023-07-25at32643pm.gif)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#who-will-receive-the-dashboard)Who will receive the dashboard
Choose who will receive the dashboard via Email or Slack. The table below provides an overview of to whom dashboards can be delivered by All-In-One and Analytics Ashby customers.  
| ﻿  
 | **Email (Ashby users)**  | **Email (entered manually)**  | **Slack DM**  | **Slack Channel (public & private)**  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| **All-in-One**  | ✅ (all users)  |  ✅  |  ✅  |  ✅  |  
| **Analytics**  | ✅ (with a license)  |  ❌  |  ✅  |  ❌  |  
**Email:** Select users from your organization or enter an email manually. You can use the Deliver drop-down to determine whether individual emails will be sent to multiple users, or if the dashboard should be sent out to all recipients via one email.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ce31d550a61813c0fc9fd1e9455ae8f9.png)
﻿
﻿  

**Slack:** Select a Slack user from your organization to send via DM or sent to a Slack Channel.
  * To add the Ashby application to a channel: type @ashby as a message in the channel (where you would type a message to send to the whole channel) and select Ashby APP not in channel.


  * Once the bot has been added, you will no longer see “Not in channel.”


![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/qDIv1hVYiDXJM31_XY52F_screenshot2023-11-06at83301am.png)
﻿
  * Syncing private channels may take up to 30 minutes after the Ashby app is initially added.


  * To prevent private channel names from being revealed, you must type in the exact private channel name when creating your scheduled dashboard delivery.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#apply-any-filters)Apply any filters
If your dashboard uses Dashboard Filters, configure the filter selections that should be applied at the time of delivery. (This is not required).
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 3.37.27 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/RjUHGJPHitBFUyeNCxRbS_screencast2023-07-25at33727pm.gif)
﻿
If you have a User filter in place and set this to filter by recipients (where they are applied as the "User" filter value automatically), then you will not be able to select the Group Email option in the Deliver dropdown.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#select-the-delivery-format)Select the delivery format
Select the dashboard delivery format from the options listed below:
  1. PDF: Allows you to send a PDF of the entire dashboard.


  1. CSV: Allows you to send a ZIP file of all report results in CSV format.


Please note that very wide or very high row-count tables will be truncated to match a visual snapshot of the dashboard as seen. Users will need to log in to scroll to view more data or view a drill down.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 3.39.43 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/MemzrHqDo9YFhwgwb_6M7_screencast2023-07-25at33943pm.gif)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#enter-a-title-required-and-message-body)Enter a Title (required) and message body
Enter a Title for the scheduled dashboard delivery and a message if you would like.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 3.43.50 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/GBkteGvdKuhsbJkrff7i3_screencast2023-07-25at34350pm.gif)
﻿
Click on the Send Now button to see a dashboard delivery result at any time - this is helpful for testing out a scheduled dashboard.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 3.48.07 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/INemNfx43tsEXT3utjJne_screencast2023-07-25at34807pm.gif)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#activate-the-scheduled-dashboard-delivery)Activate the Scheduled Dashboard delivery
Once you have finished with configuration, you can activate the Scheduled Dashboard by clicking the Activate button. A schedule will be locked after activation and indicate who it was configured by.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 3.53.17 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/uSgtJ-gNgfg8SWNRy_Ij5_screencast2023-07-25at35317pm.gif)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#advanced-filtering-send-dashboard-filtered-by-reci)Advanced Filtering: Send dashboard filtered by recipient
When a dashboard has a User dashboard filter on it, you have the option to filter the dashboard delivery results by each recipient. This feature allows you to configure a single schedule with many recipients, all of which will receive a uniquely filtered dashboard specific to them.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#how-to-find-scheduled-deliveries)How to Find Scheduled Deliveries
  * Navigate to Dashboards > Click Saved Dashboards > Then click into the Scheduled Dashboards folder


![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 4.27.13 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/JFO2RfneW-rs2nZ3Yla_w_screencast2023-07-25at42713pm.gif)
﻿
When viewing any dashboard, the Scheduled Delivery button will show a count of schedules created on the dashboard, including those that are not activated. Mouse over the number to see the active and inactive counts.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 4.29.01 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/jBsjAF4HyJ1vhETOfcmT-_screencast2023-07-25at42901pm.gif)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#how-to-edit-or-delete-a-scheduled-delivery)How to Edit or Delete a Scheduled Delivery
To edit a Scheduled Delivery, click the Deactivate & Edit button, make your changes, and then click the Activate button.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 4.33.16 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/kM7Xff-XKnv8soTQgBgyr_screencast2023-07-25at43316pm.gif)
﻿
To delete a Scheduled Delivery, click on the Trash icon and then click the Remove button.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-25 at 4.35.47 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/2b2mvVUsSDJJ1O6vIrFYL_screencast2023-07-25at43547pm.gif)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#can-i-have-multiple-scheduled-deliveries-for-a-das)Can I have multiple scheduled deliveries for a dashboard?
Yes; any dashboard can have multiple scheduled deliveries added or configured.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#who-can-schedule-a-dashboard)Who can schedule a dashboard?
  * For Analytics customers: Admin License holders.


  * For All-In-One customers: Any user that has dashboard editing/creation permissions.


  * For more information regarding dashboard editing/creation permissions, view [Permissions & Licenses in Analytics](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/permissions-and-licenses-in-analytics)﻿.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#how-do-i-configure-slack-delivery)How do I configure Slack delivery?
  * To set up the integration for Slack, please review our [Slack](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/slack)﻿ guide.


  * Add the Ashby bot (@mention Ashby)to the channel where you would like the dashboards delivered.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards#who-is-the-email-delivery-sent-from)Who is the email delivery sent from?
Within the Advanced section of the Scheduled Dashboards setup, you can select whether the dashboard should be sent from the generating user, or via Ashby if the dashboard is being sent out via email. If sending via Slack, the dashboard will always send from Ashby.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c8d0686590218c9d072c4895aeaac5fc.png)
﻿
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)

Surveys & Questionnaires
# Hiring Manager Experience Surveys
22 min
Copy
This document provides an introduction to Ashby’s hiring manager experience surveys feature. These surveys are designed to go to your hiring managers after a successful hire is made, with the intent of gathering feedback for the primary recruiter and recruiting process and partnership overall.
Hiring Manager Experience surveys can be configured on the Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ❌  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#introduction)Introduction
Ashby’s Hiring Manager Experience surveys enable recruiting and talent teams to incorporate customized, automated surveys and reporting into their team workflow. This feature is designed to seamlessly integrate with your recruiting workflow to solicit feedback from your hiring manager partners. We allow customizing the survey to fit your needs while providing default questions for standard recruiting process pillars (more on that below). You will have the choice of automated or manual enrollment for ongoing or one-off feedback requests as needed.
This document is organized into three primary sections:
  1. Admin management: survey setup and configuration


  1. Recruiting and hiring manager engagement: requesting and completing surveys


  1. Reporting: analyzing results with reports and dashboards


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#survey-setup-to-survey-completion)Survey Setup to Survey Completion
The below loom provides a quick summary of survey configuration, feedback request creation, and survey submission, highlighting the ease of Ashby’s fully integrated hiring manager feedback request feature.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#hiring-manager-experience-survey-setup-configurati)Hiring Manager Experience Survey Setup & Configuration
You must have Ashby admin access to configure Hiring Manager Experience surveys. To do so, navigate to Admin > Jobs & Applications, then Employee Surveys. Pictured below you can see the following:
  1. The Employee Surveys category


  1. The Hiring Manager Experience Tab


  1. A default survey which you can edit or use, along with the automation status


  1. The ability to add new surveys via the + New button


![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.01.30 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/d98dfa3be4927018a20232594fc9dc38.png)
﻿
After creating a new survey or editing the existing default, you will see a pull-out section with all survey options:
  1. The survey title, which you can edit at any time.


  1. The survey configuration tabs for the form, settings, instructions and automation options.


  1. The form definitions, questions and copy editing section.


![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.04.52 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/17fe176f9de9fbb3ad11357e37bd79ab.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#form)Form
Here you can view the default survey questions included and have the option to make adjustments and add questions as needed.
**Default Survey Questions**
The Hiring Manager Experience survey type has a set of 6 default questions which are designed to cover core pillars of recruiting feedback. These questions are optional, and other custom questions and question types can be added. However, these 6 questions are special in that they are used in our default dashboard and template reports for aggregates and averages. We recommend using at least the overall feedback question to gather a baseline score.
When adding a new question to a survey form via the Add Question option, you’ll see a menu of options.
![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.23.11 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/61a3450ea570a0ab37c2c22197f538b9.png)
﻿
The 6 default questions cover the following:
  1. Hiring Manager Experience Overall Rating: The hiring manager’s overall rating of the recruiting process.


  1. Hiring Manager Experience Net Promoter Score: The hiring manager’s NPS rating of the recruiting process.


  1. Hiring Manager Experience Scheduling Rating: The hiring manager’s rating of the interview scheduling process.


  1. Hiring Manager Experience Communication Rating: The hiring manager’s rating of the recruiter’s communication.


  1. Hiring Manager Experience Intake Rating: The hiring manager’s rating of the intake process.


  1. Hiring Manager Experience Role Understanding Rating: The hiring manager’s rating of the recruiter’s understanding of the role.


Please note that you can only add these questions to a form once. If they are already on your form, these questions will show as greyed out when adding an additional question, as shown above.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#settings)Settings
On the Settings tab, you can do the following:
  * Survey Description: Set an internal survey description (that will not be shown to respondents) and you can also determine your reminder number and cadence.


  * Number of Reminders: Determine the total number of reminders that should be sent out to your respondent.


  * Reminder Period: Determine how often the reminders should be sent.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/76cdeae8967eca05d1d13ad30faf06cf.png)
﻿
If all reminders have been sent out, then the survey will still be listed as a task on the hiring manager’s profile.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#instructions)Instructions
Here you can determine the instructions that your hiring managers will see when completing the form.
Instructions can be configured with rich text and links to any additional information you want the recipient hiring managers to review prior to submitting their scores.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e849cb9aba6a4c5ec14eb6b4f3b49abf.png)
﻿
We recommend providing at least a minimal set of instructions, as these will be presented alongside every survey request.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#automation)Automation
When survey automation is enabled Ashby will create a survey request after a hire is made. In that process, Ashby will first evaluate if any further automation filter conditions apply to ensure surveys are only created under the appropriate conditions.
If automation is enabled and conditions are met, Ashby will do the following:
  1. Identify the appropriate hiring manager: Ashby uses the hiring manager assigned to the hired Job Consideration. This can be found within the Hiring Team section of the job consideration on the candidate’s profile.


  1. Identify the primary recruiter: Ashby uses the recruiter assigned to the hired Job Consideration. This is also pulled from the Hiring Team section of the job consideration on the candidate’s profile.


  1. Sends the survey request to the hiring manager identified in step 1.


If the hiring manager is missing or the selection is ambiguous (e.g. more than one HM is assigned), a draft survey request will be created. In this case, the recruiter will be expected to review the survey request and assign a hiring manager manually.
The primary recruiter is optional but not required. If the recruiter is identified, they will be noted in the survey form request to remind the hiring manager of the specific candidate, role and recruiter for which the feedback is being requested.
_Cooldown Settings_
When setting up your automation, you’ll have the option to set Cooldown settings. Click the Survey Cooldown Settings dropdown to configure your settings:
No Survey Limits: Every time a new hire is made that meets this criteria, the survey will be sent to the hiring manager so they can provide feedback.
Hiring Manager: Any time a new hire is made, the hiring manager will be asked for feedback but will only be asked for feedback once per specified interval (for example, once per 90 days).
Hiring Manager and Recruiter: When a new hire is made, the hiring manager will be asked for their feedback but only once during the specified interval per individual recruiter they work with.
So if Brian is a hiring manager and two hires are made with Sheila as the recruiter, if the interval is set to 90 days, Brian will receive one survey to provide feedback if those hires were made within 90 days. However, if a new candidate is hired with Brian as the hiring manager and Arthur is the recruiter, Brian will receive another request for feedback if the hire is made within that 90-day interval.
﻿  

![Screenshot 2024-08-15 at 09.15.53.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/44263de2ae41a94c3a0f576776ebfe53.png)
﻿
﻿  

_Interval_ When setting your interval, you can choose from setting the interval by days, weeks, months, quarters or years.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ce64f2220567480382ee7590af56b219.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#permissions)Permissions
By default, hiring managers can see the surveys they are assigned and their own results. Hiring managers will have the option to edit their submissions if needed (more on that below). To grant access to broader visibility into survey submissions, an admin must be assigned permissions granting visibility into Hiring Manager Experience submissions. This can be done on the permissions tab per employee.
  1. Visit an employee profile and go to the Permissions tab


  1. Select the toggle permitting access to survey submissions and set it to Yes.


  1. Note, visibility of results is still limited to any team and job access roles this user may have assigned, i.e. a user can only see survey results from hiring managers for teams and jobs they have general access to.


![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.07.20 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/48a4cc5432669a8c68290a3ac9e4fea1.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#requesting-and-completing-hiring-manager-feedback)Requesting and Completing Hiring Manager Feedback Surveys
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#creating-a-survey-request)Creating a Survey Request
If survey automation is enabled, feedback requests will be created and delivered automatically as configured. Otherwise, users can request feedback in a one-off fashion by creating a Hiring Manager Experience feedback request:
  * From the candidate profile, navigate to the More menu.


  * Select Create Hiring Manager Experience Survey Request.


﻿  

![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.11.31 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/76c22adb6290a63487ccbd0905354eaf.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

A manual survey request will automatically attempt to populate the required fields based on the Hiring Team information on the Job Consideration, but the user will be given a chance to review and edit the request before creating it:
  1. Specify the survey to deliver


  1. Identify the Job Consideration (only necessary in the case of multiple JCs)


  1. Specify the hiring manager


  1. Optionally specify a primary recruiter


The default information is pulled from the Hiring Team information on the profile
![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.12.55 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/885c6934e515445fe54da6ce3ba0a64a.png)
﻿
﻿  

After an automated or manual survey request is created, it will be visible as an activity on the profile until completion. Additionally, the initial request event will be logged in the candidate’s activity feed.
﻿  

![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.14.51 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/ca7ca0375e963bd872cd90dd7ddf38bb.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#submitting-feedback-as-a-hiring-manager)Submitting Feedback as a Hiring Manager
Upon survey creation, a task will be created on the hiring manager’s Surveys section of their home page and they will be emailed a notification requesting survey completion:
  1. The Surveys tasks for the hiring manager


  1. The specific survey details for each request, identifying the recruiter they partnered with


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a923018cabb11d3e4954395bfd105b96.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/XCULvt5ouCYqg8ratRKTQ_screenshot2024-05-06at102709am.png)
﻿
When following the survey requests to complete feedback the hiring manager will be presented with an initial page that summarizes the request context:
  1. The primary recruiter they worked with will be cited here (if provided). If the recruiter isn’t provided with the survey request, then Submit Hiring Manager Feedback will be listed here, as shown below.


  1. The candidate name and job for which they were hired


  1. The survey instructions, specified in the survey configuration by the admin


﻿  

![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.17.58 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/96182bada79c7409e3e2859da0acfe2b.png)
﻿
﻿  

The hiring manager can use the Enter Feedback button or the Your Feedback tab to complete the survey questions. After submission, they will see a summary of their survey status (1) and have the option to edit their answers if needed (2).
﻿  

![Screen Shot 2024-05-06 at 10.19.26 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/3eec220fcd34b5626999e43eaceb061f.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#reporting)Reporting
Ashby provides the ability to create custom reports on all hiring manager experience survey requests. This can be done by report building on the Hiring Manager Experience Surveys reporting Subject.
From this subject you will have access to both the initial request metadata, the submission’s custom survey questions and the 6 default questions which aggregate across all custom surveys.
![Screenshot 2024-05-06 at 11.35.20 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/vSz4icJEKsbC_Y5BRpJ7k_screenshot2024-05-06at113520am.png?format=webp)
﻿
![Screenshot 2024-05-06 at 11.35.43 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/da38e2e7837f5f61dd29e4ec74236b3f.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys#template-reports-experience-feedback-dashboard)Template Reports & Experience Feedback Dashboard
_**Template Reports**_
The following reports are available in the template library for pulling data on completed and pending hiring manager experience surveys.
![The Report Builder page with Hiring Manager Experience report templates listed.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/rFQ8zzZ2vjNGyxUTzJb6o_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-05-15-at-101152-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
**HM Experience Survey Submissions:** View the details of all submitted hiring manager experience surveys. This is a custom list report of the results that can be exported as a CSV. You can also create alerts from this template.
**Currently Pending Survey Requests:** View all requested hiring manager experience surveys that have yet to be submitted. This is also a custom list report that you can export or create alerts for.
You can read more on setting up alerts at [Alerts](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/alerts)﻿
**Hiring Manager Experience Survey Volume Over Time:** View the number of hiring manager experience survey requests created over time.
**Hiring Manager Experience Summary by Recruiter:** View completed hiring manager experience survey details grouped by the attributed recruiter.
**Hiring Manager Experience Summary by Department:** View completed hiring manager experience survey details grouped by department.
**Average HM Rating Over Time:** View the average overall hiring manager experience recruiting survey ratings over time (for example, month over month - the timestamp used is the request creation date).
**HM Experience survey Completion by Department:** Shows the percentage of survey requests that were completed by department and the average time taken for the survey to be completed.
**HM Experience NPS Score:** The NPS Score of your Hiring Manager Experience surveys using the standard formula: % of promoters - % of detractors.
﻿  

_**Experience Feedback dashboard**_
You can access the built-in dashboard with Hiring Manager Experience survey data by heading to Reports > Employee Surveys and then clicking on Hiring Manager Experience.
The Surveys tab will show you the list of survey requests (along with their status) and the Dashboard tab will show you the experience feedback dashboard.
If you have not been assigned permissions to view all hiring manager experience surveys, you will only see data on the surveys assigned to you.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/de72f30b1914eef3953bad350d246b17.png)
﻿
﻿

how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Interviews & Scheduling
Interviews & Scheduling FAQs
# How do I use multi-day scheduling?
15 min
Copy
This guide covers how to schedule interviews across multiple days. If you have any interview activities with multiple interview events within them (for example an onsite), this will help schedule in interview events across a number of days if availability is limited.
Multi-day scheduling is available across Foundations, Plus, Enterprise and Legacy Plus plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ✅  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#scheduling-permissions-required-to-schedule-an-int)Scheduling: Permissions required to schedule an interview
See the chart below for more information on who can schedule a candidate in for an interview, either by sending out a direct booking link, or manually scheduling interviews. Those with Elevated Access - Hiring Manager access or above will have access to schedule an interview. For further information on access roles, check out [User Permissions](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/user-permissions)﻿﻿  
| Access Role  | Has Access?  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  |  
| Agency User  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin Private  | ✅  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#multiple-interview-events-candidate-availability)Multiple Interview Events & Candidate Availability
If you set up a schedule interview activity to include multiple interview events, you’ll see that you’ll no longer be able to send out a direct booking link to the candidate.
This is because direct booking only supports interview activities with one interview event. As such, if you’re booking an event with multiple events and want to find suitable slots, we would recommend sending out candidate availability links so the candidate can add in time slots that are best for them.
When you move a candidate to the stage with your configured interview activity with multiple interview events, you’ll see the option to draft an availability request and to request candidate availability. Click either to create a candidate availability link to send to the candidate.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/aeae43f0724c2ace1849c64e7bc4bc38.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ac911db40fa3f545d2bd9bd40d1e55d1.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#how-does-candidate-availability-work-on-the-candid)**How does candidate availability work on the candidate’s side?**
Watch the below recording to see the candidate availability process from the candidate's perspective.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#scheduling-the-interviews-over-multiple-days)Scheduling the interviews over multiple days
Once you’ve received the candidate’s availability, or determined times that work via email, you can now manually schedule the interview. Click Start Manual Schedule (or Schedule > Manual Schedule if the candidate didn’t submit availability via a link) to schedule via the calendar interface.
While selecting suitable slots on the calendar interface, check the Multi-Day Schedule checkbox. When moving to other days, the interviews will no longer be automatically moved to those dates.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/20ff80e7959652c3a16863255c058cda.png)
﻿
When multiple interviews are being scheduled, changing the date of one of the interviews will also automatically enable multi-day scheduling.
﻿  

﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#calendar-invites-and-reminder-settings)Calendar Invites and Reminder Settings
In the Communications section of your scheduling process, you can configure your calendar invite and interview reminder settings for this interview.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#candidate-calendar-invites)Candidate calendar invites
In the Manage Candidate Invites section, you can determine how the calendar invites should be sent. You can select from the following options:
**Send one invite per block:** The candidate will receive a separate calendar invite for interview events that are more than 30 minutes apart. If they have two interview events with a 15-minute break between the two, they will receive one calendar invite. If they have two interview events with a one-hour break in between, they will receive two calendar invites.
**Send one invite per interview:** The candidate will receive a separate calendar invite for each interview event, regardless of how far apart they are.
**Send one invite per day:** The candidate will receive a calendar event per day they have interview events. So if they have one interview event on Monday, then the other two on Tuesday, they will receive two calendar invites. If they have one interview event on Monday, one on Tuesday and one on Wednesday, they will receive three calendar invites.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/T6XU_yri0fsfpnCX86pda_jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-102650-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can also click Edit on each interview calendar invite to update the calendar invite title and description per invite, so if you have specific information relevant to only one interview event, it can be added only to the relevant invite.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/MMZwy0tN60pdXH5YV-GtP_jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-105734-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#interviewer-invites)Interviewer invites
Interviewers will receive a calendar invite for only the interview events they are on the panel for. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/PH_OoJivkrJm3IX1amBM__jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-41753-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Like with candidate calendar invites, you can click Edit to add specific information to the title and/or description of each calendar invite. This is helpful if you have interview-event specific information that isn't relevant across all interview events being scheduled.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/yd1XJpDluwE9nWNm5CEjP_jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-105916-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#invite-settings)Invite Settings
Within the Invite Settings section, you can confirm the calendar you'd like to schedule the interview to and determine whether the calendar invite should be set to private (so details are hidden from non-attendees).
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/63h3U7-G31ZU4HBICY6CJ_jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-104021-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can also confirm the interview's location type (for more on video conferencing, check out Conferencing Links below).
Finally, if you have the Coderpad, CodeSignal Interview or HackerRank integrations in place, you can also specify which events (if any) should use the integration. A unique assessment link will be generated for each event that the integration has been enabled for and will be automatically included in both candidate and interviewer invites.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/X6XcJ4BXyM6JdWSkIt__O_jobs-acent-ashby-2026-01-13-at-110442-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
For more on each integration, check out the guides below:
﻿[HackerRank](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hackerrank)﻿
﻿[CodeSignal](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/codesignal)﻿
﻿[CoderPad Interview](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/coderpad-interview)﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#conferencing-links)Conferencing links
Ashby will generate a unique conferencing link for each calendar invite if Zoom, Microsoft Teams or Google Meet are set as the location for the interview events. The interviewer invite’s conferencing link should match that of its corresponding external candidate calendar invite.
When an invite is rescheduled, Ashby will use existing meeting links if at all possible.
  * If a new external invite is created due to an interview event being rescheduled, a new meeting link will be generated.


  * If an external invite is deleted because an interview is rescheduled, the corresponding interviewer invite’s meeting link will be updated to match its new corresponding external invite’s conferencing link.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-use-multi-day-scheduling#interview-panel-summary-substitution-token)Interview Panel Summary substitution token
The “Interview Panel Summary” substitution token resolves as a bulleted list of interview events that includes the time, event title, and interviewers.
_When using this token in_ __emails__ _with multi-day scheduling_
  * If the full interview schedule spans a single day, the token will resolve as a bulleted list with date, time, event title, and interviewer details. Any breaks will be listed.


![Schedule spanning a single day](https://cdn.zappy.app/559d4f65303962d44ecee8a31aa7cb80.png)
﻿
Schedule spanning a single day
  * If the schedule spans multiple days, we will include the day followed by a bulleted list of the events occurring on that day.


![Schedule spanning multiple days](https://cdn.zappy.app/1e7f7ef48374a33afcbadb721c7db92d.png)
﻿
Schedule spanning multiple days
_When using this token in calendar invites with multi-day scheduling:_
Instead of displaying all events in the schedule, only the events that are included in the corresponding candidate invite will be displayed.
  * Candidate invites with interviews spanning multiple days (with the candidate receiving a single calendar invite for each event).


![image.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/ac7643db9231e12ef1f52d3295e1f339.png)
﻿
  * Candidate invites with interviews spanning multiple days (with the candidate receiving one calendar invite for all interview events).


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e412b176a7c5da2de761acc41df8c378.png)
﻿
  * Interviewer invites - each interviewer gets an invite for the day their interview is scheduled.


![image \(1\).png](https://cdn.zappy.app/899014f38591e08adc46f475261a71af.png)
﻿
﻿

Interviews & Scheduling
Interviews: Advanced Setup
# Interviewer Pools
7 min
Copy
Interviewer Pools is an admin tool to help you group and manage interviewers based on their qualifications or other attributes. If you have certain individuals who are qualified to lead certain interviews, for instance, you can assign an interview pool when setting up the interview activity to select from multiple qualified interviewers. 
Interviewer Pools can be used independently on in conjunction with [Interviewer Training ](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training)﻿, which is a part of the [Advanced Scheduling Automation Add-On](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/advanced-scheduling-automation-add-on)﻿.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-pools#permissions-access)Permissions & access
The Interviewer Pools tool is available on the Foundations, Plus, Enterprise and Legacy Plus plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ✅  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
See the table below for information on the roles that have access to create to interviewer pools.  
| Access Role  | Has Access?  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  |  
| Agency Users  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin Private  | ❌*  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  |  
*Only Organization Admins can configure interviewer pools by default. Elevated Access users can be given access to this feature if needed. More on this at [Additional User Permissions](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/additional-user-permissions)﻿ .
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-pools#interviewer-pool-setup-steps)Interviewer pool setup steps
  1. To create a pool navigate to [Interviewer Pools](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviewer-tags "Interviewer Pools") in **Admin**. Click + New in the top right corner and give the pool a name.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8d587893b94945e0b169f733e67439bf.png)
﻿
  1. On the page for the pool you just created click + Add Interviewers under the **Qualified Members** section. Search and/or select an employee from the **Employee** drop-down. Click Submit to add the employee.


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/XwfsEIEClDmvLuJxwdsIh_interviewer-pools-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-34243-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can also add employees to interview pools as **qualified members** via the **Interview Info** tab of their profile. Adding an employee directly to an interviewer pool's qualified members using this method will remove them from the pool's training path if they are currently training for that pool.
The section for **Trainees** is only for Enterprise plans with [Interviewer Training](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training)﻿ enabled, or those who have purchased the [Advanced Scheduling Automation Add-On](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/advanced-scheduling-automation-add-on)﻿ .
Congrats, you've successfully created interview pools! See [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities)﻿ for more information on adding pools to interview activities, or [Interviewer Training](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training)﻿ for how to use pools of trainees.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-pools#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-pools#are-there-limits-on-how-many-interview-pools-i-can)Are there limits on how many interview pools I can create based on my plan?
No, any plan type can create as many interviewer pools as they need. Foundations, Legacy Plus, and Plus customers without the [Advanced Scheduling Automation Add-On](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/advanced-scheduling-automation-add-on)﻿ are limited to a single interviewer pool that has a training path.

Building Custom Reports & Dash...
# Ratio Reports
8 min
Copy
This document reviews building ratio reports in Ashby.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ratio-reports#overview)Overview
Ratio reports are commonly used to show the number of applications or interviews it takes to get a certain result (ie. a hire, an offer, etc…). Ultimately, ratios allow you to compare a segment to the whole.
A ratio report is a special type of segmentation report.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ratio-reports#create-a-ratio-report)Create a Ratio Report
  1. **Build:** A ratio report is a segmentation report that is visualized as a ratio. Go to Reports and select Build, then choose Segmentation.


![Screen Cast 2022-12-05 at 9.20.50 AM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/0Npb3N1DS7wxG6qa8WWyA_screencast2022-12-05at92050am.gif)
﻿
  1. **Filters:** The filter section will determine what the whole of the ratio is. For example, if you are creating an applications to hires ratio, total applications is the whole.


  1. **Group By:** The field you should group by is the one that distinguishes the part of the whole you want to report on. If you are not able to isolate just one segment or part, you will need to [create a calculated field](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/calculated-fields)﻿.


A ratio reports on a part of a whole. The “part” that you are reporting on must be its own segment or group.
  1. **View Options:** By default, you will see a pie chart. Confirm that the group you want to report on is its own slice of the pie. Then select single number chart, select the group you are reporting on, and update the show option to **Ratio**.


![Untitled](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/_S0XDQPAbRhPjQrUpoT2p_untitled.gif)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ratio-reports#tutorial)Tutorial
This video walks through how to build a ratio report looking at how many applications it takes to get a hire (the application to hire ratio).
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ratio-reports#further-reading)Further Reading
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ratio-reports#when-to-create-a-calculated-field)When to create a Calculated Field
Before building the report, you need to ensure the segment you want to report on is defined and is one value in a grouping. For example, if you want to create a ratio report looking at number of applications it takes to get to an offer, you need to ensure that one segment of the report is the number of applications that made it to offer.
If the segment you want to report on is defined by multiple values, you will need to create a Calculated Field that will allow you to isolate the segment. For example, if you want to report on the ratio of phone screens that results in an applicant making it to onsite interview stage, the segment you need cannot be isolated by a single field.
**Common Calculated Fields for ratio reports**
  * Reached Onsite - Opportunity field: furthest stage group reached is onsite and all stages after onsite


  * Had _____ Interview - Opportunity field: ___ interview is not empty/ unassigned


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ratio-reports#example-building-a-ratio-report-with-a-calculated)Example: Building a ratio report with a Calculated Field
Here is an example of a report that requires you to build a Calculated Field. This video will walk you through how to build a report showing how many applications you need to schedule in phone interview to have an application reach offer stage.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ratio-reports#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ratio-reports#why-does-my-report-show-grouping-no-longer-exists)W**hy does my report show grouping no longer exists?**
This means that the group you have selected has nothing in it/is 0. Since that group no longer has anything in it, a ratio result is not possible.
﻿
