interviewer-training:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Interviews & Scheduling
Interviews: Advanced Schedulin...
# Interviewer Training
16 min
Copy
Interviewer Training is designed to streamline the process of training and qualifying interviewers within your organization.
  * Unlimited Interviewer Training is a part of the [Advanced Scheduling Automation Add-On](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/advanced-scheduling-automation-add-on)﻿ . 


  * This add-on is included in the **Enterprise** plan and can be purchased as an add-on for those on the **Plus** plan. 


  * The Plus plan allows one interview pool with a training path without purchasing the add-on.


  * Interviewer Training and the Advanced Scheduling Automation add-on are not available to customers on the Foundations or Legacy Plus plans. 


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#overview)Overview
Interviewer Training offers a comprehensive solution for training and managing interviewers directly in Ashby. It ensures that interviewers are well-prepared and integrates seamlessly into the interview scheduling process.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#why-should-you-use-interviewer-training)Why should you use interviewer training?
As your organization grows, managing your interviewer pool will become increasingly complex. Having an efficient system for keeping track of who is qualified to conduct a given interview will help your Talent team remain efficient over time. Interviewer Training supports:
  * Centralized Management: Easily manage and view all your interviewer pools, qualified members, and trainees from a single dashboard.


  * Structured Training: Set up structured training plans with stages to ensure interviewers are adequately prepared.


  * Flexible Scheduling: Specify the inclusion of trainees in interview schedules, allowing them to learn from fully qualified members.


  * Automated Progress Tracking: Automatically move trainees to the next step in their training after completing an interview, with optional approval stages.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#key-terminology)Key terminology
Before diving in, here is some terminology and the related definitions  
| **Term**  | **Definition**  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Interviewer Pools  | Formerly known as Interviewer Tags, a pool is a group of Ashby users that can filtered for in an interviewer slot.  |  
| Interviewer Training  | An add-on feature within Interviewer Pools, a series of one or more qualifying stages that trainees progress through by participating in interviews.  |  
| Interviewer Role  | The designation assigned to a trainee when they are scheduled for an interview based on their training stage. Current options are Shadow and Reverse Shadow. These appear as small icons next to the interviewer’s name on the candidate profile.  |  
| Qualified Member  | A user within a pool that is already trained.  |  
| Trainee  | A user within a pool that isn’t fully trained yet.  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#setting-up-for-interviewer-training)Setting up for interviewer training
In order to use the interview training feature, interviewer pools that contain your trainees must be set up first, along with the stages of your training program.
See [Interviewer Pools](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-pools)﻿ for more information on initial setup. The instructions below detail adding trainees and interview stages.
  1. Navigate to **Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > Interviewer Pools** to view all existing pools, qualified members, and trainees. 


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/5ypLBex12SnfJZ5WwYVZa_interviewer-pools-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-125228-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Select an existing interview pool, or create a new one, that you'd like to add trainees to.


A **trainee** is a person that needs to be trained before being considered qualified to lead interviews.
  1. Navigate to the pool's **Settings** tab and toggle Requires Training? on (if not on already).


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/AMW9buxBci_M9wC6AfuqR_interviewer-pools-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-40046-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. When you turn on training for the first time, you'll see new fields for training stages populate on the page. 


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/OxK1QCeeyOpnjs_x35Fk6_interviewer-pools-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-41004-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Update the fields within the stages to define your program:


  * **Interviewer Role** : Determine whether at this stage, the interview will Shadow or Reverse Shadow.


  * **Shadow** : The trainee watches and learns in the interview.


  * **Reverse Shadow** : The trainee leads the interview with supervision.


  * **Interviews Required** : Indicate how many interviews the trainee must participate in during this stage before moving forward.


  * **Require Approval Before Proceeding?** : Check this box if you would like someone to manually approve their progression to the next stage. If unchecked, trainees will automatically move forward.


  * **+ Add Stage** : If you need additional stages, click this button to add them. You can add as many as you need.


  * **Archive** : If you need to remove a stage, you can click Archive in the top right corner of the stage.


  1. Once the training stages are configured, navigate back to the **Interviews** tab to add your trainees. Under the **Trainees** section, select +Add Trainee.


  1. Add the trainee by name, identify where in the training stages they should begin (e.g. if someone has already done some shadowing, you can move them to a further stage), and update how many interviews they have completed in that stage. 


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/xpohc7eJQbxS9hJ4xVT5W_interviewer-pools-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-41832-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
﻿  

  1. Hit Submit to add them. Repeat for additional trainees.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#adding-trainees-to-interview-slots)Adding trainees to interview slots
When you want to add trainees to an interview:
  1. Navigate to the **Job > Interview Plan > Schedule Interview activity** and Modify or create a new one.


  1. Determine the interview event that you'd like to add the trainee to.


  1. On the schedule interview event, click + Add Interviewer Slot to add a qualified interviewer first. Use the dropdown to select qualified employees from a pool or a specific employee.


  1. Click + Add Interviewer Slot again to add a trainee slot. For a trainee slot, you must select a pool, and if you would like only trainees to fill that spot, set the third dropdown to **Trainees Only**.


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/1BcZqA7YSwgIajFdMkJN5_head-ux-designer-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-114214-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#scheduling-interviews-with-trainees)Scheduling interviews with trainees
When moving a candidate to a stage with an interview, the Schedule Interview activity will show both interviewer slots and trainee slots, as defined on the interview event.
If manually scheduling the interview and there is more than one trainee in the pool, you will be able to select the trainee who will participate. If using auto-scheduling or there is only one trainee, they will be assigned automatically based on availability. Trainees will be labeled with the interview pool they're in ("Bar Raiser"), and role ("(S)"), and you can hover over it to see how far they've gone in the current stage.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/IM5yi3eDLzPP99D3LQSV5_group-product-manager-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-43847-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
While it's typical, you are not required to include a qualified member on an interview with a trainee. For an interview to count towards a trainee's progress, they must be assigned to a trainee slot for the interview.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#viewing-scheduled-interviews)Viewing scheduled interviews
Once scheduled, trainees will have a tag indicating their training stage on the candidate profile.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/emH_cJWkG94-L6NeyRDhd_albertha-kuhic-schinner-group-product-manager-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-44402-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Interview participants can view their roles (e.g., reverse shadow) on the home page and within the interview briefing. This role is visible wherever relevant.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#training-stage-progression-management)Training stage progression & management
After an interview is completed, it counts toward the trainee's quota to move forward in the training stages. The interview will be credited as complete at the time the interview ends, rather than once feedback has been added or skipped by the trainee.
If a trainee declines an interview request, it will not be counted toward their progression.
You can see current progress by navigating back to the interview pool they're in and looking them up. If the training stage requires approval, it will pause for approval once all requirements are met.
Once a trainee completes all stages they’ll move into your qualified members pool.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/r-vl377AeNXHsi2kdUnUL_interviewer-pools-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-44917-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Clicking View Progress will show you a summary of the interviews they have participated in during their training program.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/abyThjgxir-a5H_NAmC0U_interviewer-pools-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-45108-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Clicking the Actions button allows you to manually manage their progress as well as their membership within the pool.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/tfEkTqQXMjk3yCOJl3tR-_interviewer-pools-acent-ashby-2026-04-02-at-45348-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  * **Update Training Progress:** Allows you to manually update the number of interviews they have completed, or move them forward or backward in stages.


  * **Move to Qualified Members:** This will bypass the rest of the training and mark them as qualified.


  * **Pause Membership:** While paused, employees cannot be assigned to interviews until they are unpaused.


  * **Remove from Pool:** If the employee no longer belongs in this group, you can remove them by selecting this option.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#what-permission-level-does-a-user-need-to-approve)What permission level does a user need to approve stage completion?
The approver must be an Organization Admin.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#can-i-pause-an-interviewers-membership-in-a-pool-o)C**an I pause an interviewer’s membership in a pool or stop them from being scheduled for any interviews?**
You can, yes! You can either pause an interviewer within a specific pool (so they can’t be booked for interviews where that pool is assigned) or globally (so they aren’t automatically scheduled for any interviews).
**Pausing an interviewer from within a pool.**
To pause an interviewer’s membership in a pool, head to Admin>Interviewing & Scheduling>[Interviewer Pools](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviewer-tags "Interviewer Pools") and click on the pool in question. Click Actions next to the interviewer in question, then click Pause Membership _._
When an interviewer is paused, a Paused tag will show beside their name in the pool.
You can also unpause the interviewer at any time by clicking on them from within the interviewer pool again, and selecting Resume Membership _._
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/358a39506fc8294a6302f52b263461a6.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9c5ed65dcdd4a70129eeddb6cf678cc8.png)
﻿
**Pausing an interviewer across all interviews** Please note that the option to pause interviewers is only available on the Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ❌  | ✅  | ✅  |  
If you'd like to pause an interviewer for all interviews (for example, if the interviewer is on vacation), navigate to their user profile within Admin > Employees and head to the Interviewer Info tab. Turn on the Pause Interviewer option - you will also have the option to add a reason for the pause that will show up when a user tries to manually schedule that interviewer. 
You can also schedule an interviewer pause. Click Set start date to determine the date and time the pause should start. Click Set end date to determine when the pause should end. If you don't opt to set an end date, the pause will continue indefinitely until it is disabled on the user's profile. 
Click Submit to confirm the pause. You can switch the pause off at any time by switching off the Pause Interviewer option.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/gP0798uYbcjzxy0QvWe0s_employees-acent-ashby-2026-01-26-at-41429-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
﻿  

![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/G3Rma6-ZjbicpSzjOWlNr_employees-acent-ashby-2026-01-26-at-41506-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#can-interviewers-be-notified-when-theyre-enrolled)C**an interviewers be notified when they’re enrolled in training and when they graduate?**
Yes! You can set these up on a global level or for individual interview pools.
To set notifications up on a global level, head to Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > Interviewer Pools, and click on the Settings tab. From here, you can use the toggles to determine whether interviewers receive a notification when they’re enrolled and/or when they graduate.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/cf3e8a3e88b5ab6268d2c228c1a486c9.png)
﻿
Once you toggle on the appropriate options, you’ll have the option of using the built-in email templates, or select your own. You’ll also have the option to preview the email.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/24b0ff3ae4a1650ef39893cf89439387.png)
﻿
**For an individual interviewer pool** you can click on the Notifications tab within the pool to toggle on the options to send email notifications when interviewers are enrolled and/or when they graduate.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ae40654367be9e2bdc8de45f5db820db.png)
﻿
Once you toggle on the appropriate options, you’ll have the option of using the built-in email templates, or select your own. You’ll also have the option to preview the email.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/24b0ff3ae4a1650ef39893cf89439387.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-training#ive-assigned-a-trainee-slot-linked-to-an-interview)I've assigned a trainee slot linked to an interviewer pool to one of my interviewer activities but there are no trainees left in the pool - what happens now?
If a trainee interviewer slot for an interviewer pool is assigned to an interview and the specified pools no longer contain any trainees (e.g. all have graduated), the trainee slot will automatically be treated as optional when scheduling using direct booking. This ensures that direct booking links continue to work even if a trainee isn't available.
﻿

# Report Catalog: Templates
59 min
Copy
This document provides an overview of the report template types you can find in Ashby’s Template Library.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#pipeline-reports)Pipeline Reports
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#candidate-pipeline)Candidate Pipeline
This report shows the Candidate Pipeline for the Corporate Usability Analyst role.
Explore the pipeline for individual jobs, while taking a look at candidate details. Active candidates by interview stage can be visualized as a list or card (kanban) view.
  * You also have the option to Hide Review Stages, Hide Lead Stages, or Group Stages on this report.


﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#pipeline-history)Pipeline History
For more detailed information regarding the Pipeline History report, visit our [Pipeline History](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/pipeline-history)﻿ document.
﻿  

![Example pipeline history for a single job, where application review is optionally shown. As the weeks progress, candidates progress through to the offer stage.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Qz0brQW0E82tqEG2LEJtU_weeklypipelinehistorycustomermanager.png?format=webp)
﻿
Example pipeline history for a single job, where application review is optionally shown. As the weeks progress, candidates progress through to the offer stage.
See your pipeline over time by interview stage group.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#conversion-rates)Conversion Rates
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#passthrough-rates-with-groupings)Passthrough Rates With Groupings
For more detailed information regarding the Pipeline History report, visit [Passthrough Report Features & FAQ](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/passthrough-report-features-and-faq)﻿
﻿  

![This report shows the passthrough rates from stage to stage, grouped by Source Type. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/BBRtU-3bYI3HfJY3k-LED_screenshot2022-12-22at84044am.png?format=webp)
﻿
See passthrough rates from stage to stage across different groups like Job or Source. Identify if certain groups are underperforming. On the report, each subgroup includes a rollup of conversion rates.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#passthrough-rates-over-time)Passthrough Rates Over Time
![This report shows the passthrough rates from stage to stage, grouped by monthly application start cohorts. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/lneKwk_sKuunNp8NeNR-L_screenshot2023-02-14at105449am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the passthrough rates from stage to stage, grouped by monthly application start cohorts.
See passthrough rates from stage to stage grouped by monthly application start cohorts to identify trends over time. By default, the report will show all applications started in the last 12 months and group them into monthly cohorts. You can choose to group cohorts by week, month, quarter, or year.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#funnel-report)Funnel Report
![This report looks at the conversion rate from stage to stage for applications whose consideration ended within the last 12 months. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/CsRYykkWmQI78tSATF3CS_screenshot2022-12-22at83820am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report looks at the conversion rate from stage to stage for applications whose consideration ended within the last 12 months.
See the historical conversions from stage to stage. Identify if you are dropping too few or too many candidates at a particular stage. By looking at the conversion rates of previously completed applications, you can get an estimate of how candidates currently in process might progress.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#candidate-flow)Candidate Flow
![This report shows the stage transitions entered by all candidates over the last two weeks. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/02UhI8KadaepTaDi_cs4d_screenshot2023-01-20at80222am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the stage transitions entered by all candidates over the last two weeks.
View the detailed flow of candidates through interview stages. This report gives you a detailed look at all stage transitions, including skipped stages, and it also lets you see the exact reasons candidates drop out of the process at different stages.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#hiring-speed)Hiring Speed
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#time-in-process)Time in Process
![This report shows the median time in process for applications who had an interview that started within the last 6 months.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/ZNx2jlEka7v4HlKbeYggJ_screenshot2022-12-22at113725am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the median time in process for applications who had an interview that started within the last 6 months.
This report shows the median time your applications have spent in each stage. It gives you a sense of how long it typically takes candidates to go through your entire interview process, and it allows you to see if any specific stages are taking particularly long to complete.
﻿
For more details on the time in process report, check out [Understanding the Time in Process Report](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/understanding-the-time-in-process-report)﻿ .
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#time-in-process-over-time)Time in Process Over Time
![This report shows the time in process for applications started in the last 6 months, grouped by monthly application start cohorts. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Izqwci11_1MxrjO_-MQM-_screenshot2023-02-14at110606am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the time in process for applications started in the last 6 months, grouped by monthly application start cohorts.
This report allows you to see how long candidates spend per interview stage, grouped by monthly application start cohorts. By default, the report will show all applications started in the last 6 months and group them into monthly cohorts. You can choose to group cohorts by week, month, quarter, or year.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#time-to-hire)Time to Hire
![This report shows the average time \(days\) it took candidates to be hired every month over the last 6 months. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Lf6AtkS2j8b5_RJtgPxAN_screenshot2022-12-23at71504am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the average time (days) it took candidates to be hired every month over the last 6 months.
Time to hire is the time from application/job consideration Started At date to the time of being marked hired, i.e. the total duration the candidate’s application is in process. The template report provides the average number of days for all hires made in the grouping selected after any filter conditions are applied.
When a candidate’s application is archived and then unarchived, the time to hire calculation is no longer made from the application start time, but the time their application was unarchived.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#time-to-offer)Time to Offer
![This report shows the average time \(days\) it took candidates to receive an offer every month over the last 6 months. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/g5fn5m6OJr7Ev9o3ZkRrU_screenshot2023-01-18at101734am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the average time (days) it took candidates to receive an offer every month over the last 6 months.
This report shows the average time it takes for a candidate to receive an offer. It is calculated from the time a candidate starts consideration to the time they enter the offer stage.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#time-to-fill-for-evergreen-roles)Time to Fill for Evergreen Roles
![Screen Shot 2023-01-06 at 7.30.57 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/ZVSnCIiXmBUBpYV97h95D_screenshot2023-01-06at73057am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows how long jobs have been open, how many hires were made against these jobs, and calculates a ratio.
This report is only available for Greenhouse users.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#time-to-fill-for-completed-openings)Time to Fill for Completed Openings
![This time to fill report shows the average number of days it took to fill openings and is grouped by the job’s department.  ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/28LX0HlySlTBofrta7MPt_screenshot2023-01-18at103202am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This time to fill report shows the average number of days it took to fill Openings﻿ and is grouped by the job’s department.
This time to fill report shows how long it takes to fill openings. Time to fill is defined as from the date the opening was opened to the opening fill date. It only considers openings that have been closed. When a Group By selection is made, the report will display the average time to fill (in days) across that grouping.
You can click on a result to be taken to a drill down report. When applying groupings to the report, this will also be preserved in the drill down report.
**Please note:** This report template will only be available if Openings are enabled on your account.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#time-to-start)Time to Start
The _Time to Start_ report displays the average time between the candidate’s _Hired At_ date and their employment start date.
For All-In-One customers, the employment start date is pulled from the start date information listed in the candidate’s offer.
For Analytics customers, this information will be pulled from a default start date field within the candidate’s offer letter.
If you have a custom field in place, or would like to switch the field that the start date information is being pulled from, this can be adjusted in the _Settings_ section of the template.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/311192a06d68e27563b82beca9422c9b.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#time-to-fill-for-completed-requisitions)Time to Fill for Completed Requisitions
This report is only available for Lever users.
![This report shows the average number of days it took to fill requisitions and is grouped by the job’s department. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/cWr6nFOWXOdRC03W7kqWo_screenshot2023-04-11at72400am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the average number of days it took to fill requisitions and is grouped by the job’s department.
This report shows how long it takes to fill requisitions, from approved or created date to close date. Only considers requisitions that have been closed.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#age-of-open-job-openings)Age of Open Job Openings
This report is available for Ashby Analytics users only.
![This report shows the average age \(days\) of open job openings, grouped by department. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/jD2sXHypVwugsl6OwhOFI_screenshot2023-01-18at104013am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the average age (days) of open job openings, grouped by department.
This report shows how long, on average, current openings have been open.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#offers)Offers
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#offer-acceptance-rate)Offer Acceptance Rate
![This report shows the overall acceptance rate over the last 12 months. ](https://cdn.zappy.app/b3448b69321333cd9ef849da3733c5fd.png)
﻿
This report shows the overall acceptance rate over the last 12 months.
This report allows you to get a simple trend of your offer acceptance rate over time. As with all reports, you can look at this data by department, location, or any other field you're interested in. This report template pulls the Offer Decided At date and whether the offer was accepted or rejected.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#offer-acceptance-rate-with-offer-numbers)Offer Acceptance Rate with Offer Numbers
![This report shows the acceptance rate, offers decided, offers accepted, and offers rejected by month between January 1, 2020 and April 30th, 2020. ](https://cdn.zappy.app/a06c0345fa773676bfa5df8d1e8bd459.png)
﻿
This report shows the acceptance rate, offers decided, offers accepted, and offers rejected by month between January 1, 2020 and April 30th, 2020.
This report allows you to look at offer volume and acceptance rate side-by-side. It's also well suited to be grouped by various fields (e.g. time, hiring manager, job, department, source, etc.).
Here is another example of this report, this time grouped by **Source Type**.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b377375a3ac71b13eed3fbe09534a6f6.png)
﻿
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#hires)Hires
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#hires-by-department-last-12-months)Hires, By Department, Last 12 Months
![This report shows the number of hires by department over the last 12 months. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/6t2inedBr2ec_T4uXahkH_screenshot2022-12-22at91016am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the number of hires by department over the last 12 months.
You can use this report to track if you're reaching your overall hiring goals by department.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#hires-by-source-last-12-months)Hires, By Source, Last 12 Months
![This report shows the number of hires by source over the last 12 months.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/lPTOubsxt7pnwGpnkhNaI_screenshot2022-12-22at113235am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the number of hires by source over the last 12 months.
This report can show you which candidate sources are contributing most to hires and how that has changed over time.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#hires-by-source-year-to-date)Hires, By Source, Year to Date
![This report shows the number of hires by source last year. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/VWSaRbGFuU-o10qmQSsfd_screenshot2023-01-20at84501am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the number of hires by source last year.
You can see which sources are yielding the most / least hires for a snapshot in time with this report.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#interviews-per-hire-ratio)Interviews per Hire Ratio
![Screen Shot 2023-01-20 at 9.10.48 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/r_JyswwvKLg7nYLjrb6Av_screenshot2023-01-20at91048am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows how many interviews your team is conducting per hire. It can be grouped by Source, Team, etc and can help track cost of hire by focusing on an often overlooked cost. It’s calculated by taking the total number of interviews divided by the number of hires made.
The total number of interviews includes interviews for candidates both hired and rejected.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#jobs)Jobs
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#open-jobs-over-time)Open Jobs Over Time
![This report shows the number of jobs that were open over the last 6 quarters, by month. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/YDMVpyC4bUHlmpZh3AezG_screenshot2023-01-20at91524am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the number of jobs that were open over the last 6 quarters, by month.
You can see how many jobs were open over time in this report.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#currently-open-jobs-by-department)Currently Open Jobs by Department
This report is titled _Open Headcount by Department_ for our customers who have enabled the Lever integration.
﻿  

![This report shows the number of currently open jobs, by department. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/3sqgPz5s3GZHk0iqL9d8k_screenshot2023-01-20at100022am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the number of currently open jobs, by department.
This report allows you to see how many jobs you are currently hiring for, grouped by department.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#interviewer-stats)Interviewer Stats
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#interview-load)Interview Load
Report on the sum total of interview time and time across all interviewers (interview participants). Can be grouped by interviewer, stage, department, week, etc. 
Only scheduled interviews will be included in this report. Feedback added without an interview will not be counted in this data.
  * When no **Group By** selection has been made:


  * **Hours (Interview Time):** aggregate hours candidates spent in interviews


  * **Hours (Sum All Interviewer Time):** aggregate hours across all interview participants


![Screen Shot 2023-03-17 at 7.07.43 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/5OBpItz9VCb6FdTt8c8Zd_screenshot2023-03-17at70743am.png?format=webp)
﻿
  * When this report is grouped by **Interviewer/Organizer:**


  * **Hours (Interview Time):** aggregate calendar hours of that particular interviewer/organizer


  * **Hours (Sum All Interviewer Time):** aggregate hours across all interview participants


![Screen Shot 2023-03-17 at 7.08.46 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/f0VNsebSBpH7EI9gdvx6Z_screenshot2023-03-17at70846am.png?format=webp)
﻿
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#interviewer-feedback-calibration)Interviewer Feedback Calibration
![This report shows the overall recommendations on feedback forms submitted within the last 6 months and is grouped by submitter.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/wUJBSPdFB_sA_hgPQoeXv_screenshot2023-01-20at104402am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the overall recommendations on feedback forms submitted within the last 6 months and is grouped by submitter.
This report shows the distribution of feedback recommendations for interviewers. Typically you want to filter this report down to e.g. only hired candidates, or interviews for a particular job at a particular stage. That way you can detect if interviewers that interviewed under similar circumstances potentially skew more positive/negative.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#feedback-completion-report)Feedback Completion Report
![Screen Shot 2023-01-20 at 10.50.28 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/kfnxGXfHWcSk_66gKtBhT_screenshot2023-01-20at105028am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows which % of feedback forms have been completed by each interviewer and how long on average it takes them to submit feedback. By default, this report will only include scorecards that have been completed.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#sourcing)Sourcing
These reports are available for Ashby’s All-in-one customers.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#sequences-sent-by-sender-last-3-months)Sequences Sent, By Sender, Last 3 Months
![This report shows the number of sequences sent by sender over the last 3 months. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/AGR9IhLOnxAVZ8rqOEKCO_screenshot2023-01-20at111752am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the number of sequences sent by sender over the last 3 months. See which sequences were sent in the last 3 months in this report.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#sequences-sent-by-reply-received-last-3-months)Sequences Sent, By Reply Received, Last 3 Months
![This report shows the number of sequences sent, by reply received, over the last 3 months. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/tB9IuKxTWfEPE3qWe25N4_screenshot2023-01-20at112731am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows the number of sequences sent, by reply received, over the last 3 months. See how many sequences were replied to in the last 3 months.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#other-reports)Other Reports
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#candidate-nps-score)Candidate NPS Score
This report is available for Ashby’s All-in-one customers.
![This report shows a company’s monthly NPS score last year. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/FQblPtdhYVQMkY5_IqSS1_screenshot2023-01-20at115415am.png?format=webp)
﻿
This report shows a company’s monthly NPS score last year. 
This report allows you to visualize your company’s NPS score over time using the standard formula: The formula is: (# of promoters/total # of submissions) - (# of detractors/total # of submissions). It will always give a score from -100 to 100.
**Promoters** are defined as candidates who have responded to the NPS question on your survey with 9 or 10.
**Detractors** are defined as candidates who have responded to the NPS question on your survey with 6 or below.
If a candidate responds to the NPS question on your survey with 7 or 8, they are considered as **Passive**.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#candidates-in-violation-of-data-retention-rules)Candidates in Violation of Data Retention Rules
This report is available for Ashby’s All-in-one customers.
![Screen Shot 2023-01-20 at 12.06.20 PM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/exdX-NibOxPtMKXSpmBiu_screenshot2023-01-20at120620pm.png?format=webp)
﻿
This is a candidate search report that lists candidates that are in violation of the organization’s data retention rules. Check out the video below for more.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#recruiting-planner)Recruiting Planner
For more detailed information regarding the Recruiting Planner, visit our [Recruiting Planner](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/recruiting-planner)﻿ guide.
![Screen Shot 2023-01-20 at 11.06.32 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/U6ZfjBkShCqr7tg4m6vE__screenshot2023-01-20at110632am.png?format=webp)
﻿
Plan your recruiting activities based on past performance.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates#im-trying-out-report-templates-and-im-not-sure-how)I'm trying out report templates and I'm not sure how the report is being put together. Help - I don't understand!
If you're starting out with some more advanced report templates and are confused as to what and how data is pulled to generate the report, if you have the [AI Report Interpretation](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation)﻿ feature enabled, each report template has a Prebuilt Report option listed under the report results. You can click this to get further information.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/43BpGXQaG1sTaBfjzxl9m_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-25455-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Further information includes how to use the report and a breakdown of the data used. You can also view Ashby's Talent Trends report from here for further information about related benchmarks where applicable.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/inrViujUeU00MpSRgbiTz_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-25538-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿

source-types-and-sources:

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Admin & Organization Settings
Organization Setup
# Source Types and Sources
12 min
Copy
This document details how to set up and use sources to track where candidates are applying from.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#overview)Overview
Sources describe where a candidate was introduced to your organization by job consideration (each application has a unique source). Ashby's default source types are Inbound, Internal, Referral, and Sourced.
You have the option to create new top-level source types or sources beneath them. Source types are helpful for grouping sources in reports. Once set up, you'll be able to link sources to candidates, custom tracking links and API Keys. You can access sources by going to Admin > Organization Setup > [Candidate Sources](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/sources "Candidate Sources").
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/43c607d91cf49cd4107247e6da1c3b0b.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#permissions-access-to-create-sources-and-source-ty)Permissions: Access to Create Sources and Source Types
See the table below for information on the roles that have access to create source types and sources.  
| Access Role  | Has Access?  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  |  
| Agency Users  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin Private  | ❌*  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  |  
*Only Organization Admins have access to this feature by default. Elevated Access users can be given access to create candidate sources and source types if needed. More on this at [Additional User Permissions](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/additional-user-permissions)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#add-source-types-and-sources)Add Source Types and Sources
To create a source type like the default Inbound and Internal types, click the purple + New Source Type button.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/aa4149c5e4adf46d17bbfa4c72d71d42.png)
﻿
To add a source, click the + New Source button.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f3b15643a0b72ada7d8e5e9966788590.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#add-and-view-sources-on-a-candidate-profile)Add and view sources on a candidate profile
You can manually add and view sources in the Attribution section in the Activities & Progress section of a candidate profile.
To add or update a source, click the field and select the source from the dropdown menu. If you can't see the one you want, start typing the source name and it will populate.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/182342ae63e85fd8a7328dc9ee5d62e0.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#add-a-source-to-a-custom-tracking-link)Add a source to a custom tracking link
You can read more on setting up custom tracking links at [Tracking the source of an application](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/tracking-the-source-of-an-application)﻿
You can add sources to custom tracking links to automatically apply a source from an external job board. Navigate to [Admin > Job Boards > Custom Tracking Links](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/custom-tracked-links "Admin > Job Boards > Custom Tracking Links"), set up a custom tracking link﻿, and include the source in the appropriate field.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d448ed58e7757871e415cab0e1246675.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#add-a-source-to-an-api-key)Add a source to an API key
You can read more on setting up API keys at [How do I generate an API key?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-generate-an-api-key)﻿
You can also add a source to an API key. Navigate to [Admin > Integrations > API Keys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/api/keys "Admin > Integrations > API Keys"), and create an API Key. Once set up, click on the key to view the details and add the source in the Default Source field.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e592722a13c01bbd4134b815ac493826.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#merging-sources)Merging Sources
Please note that merging sources cannot be undone.
If you have multiple similar sources and you would like to set these as a single source, you can merge sources. Click the Merge button, then select your From source and your To source before clicking Merge.
The From source will be merged into the To source and all candidates and job considerations with the From source applied to them will have the To source associated with them moving forward. The From source will then be archived.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ff200459fd396fdf2cf59ec9741eb223.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4c95e61d5fa4c3d2c1666506aa77f6e1.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#archiving-restoring-sources-and-source-types)Archiving & Restoring Sources and Source Types
To archive a source or source type, click on the source in question on the [Candidate Sources](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/sources "Candidate Sources") page, then click Archive _._ If you archive a source, you will no longer be able to link it to candidates, but existing assignments are preserved.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f372dedb9b072329576e3b3f8d3145b1.png)
﻿
If you’d like to restore a source or source type, click the Active filter and switch it to All.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bc0fffaaef789994e22bf615d34b36ed.png)
﻿
You will now see all sources and source types listed, including those that have been archived. Select the source or source type you’d like to restore, then click Restore _._
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/dae0f416b08187402f8f6a776e2c349e.png)
﻿
Please note that you cannot restore a source if the source type is archived. You would need to restore the source type first, then the source.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/source-types-and-sources#can-i-archive-a-source-with-a-default-tag-on-it)Ca**n I archive a source with a Default tag on it?**
The following default sources cannot be archived currently:
  * Referral


  * Referral Link


  * Applied


  * Chrome Extension


  * Recruiting Event


  * Internal Transfer


These sources also can’t be set as the From source when merging sources (as the From source is archived after the merge). Other default sources can be archived.
﻿

Offers & E-Signatures
# Offer Letter Template Formatting
9 min
Copy
This guide covers some tips and tricks to help ensure your offer letters upload and are validated smoothly. For more information on how to upload your templates and generate offer letters from them, check out [Offers and Offer Letters](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offers-and-offer-letters)﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-letter-template-formatting#offer-letter-format)Offer Letter Format
Here are some basics to bear in mind when creating your offer letter template.
  * When uploading your offer letter template, be sure that it is a .docx file.


  * There is a size limit of 8MB.


If you are uploading .docx files that have been created or edited in Microsoft Word, please ensure that any content controls are removed as this can have an impact on generated offer letters and e-signature documents.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-letter-template-formatting#use-a-single-font-throughout-your-offer-letter-tem)Use a single font throughout your Offer Letter Template
We would recommend ensuring that only one font is used throughout your offer letter. If multiple fonts are detected, this may cause issues with how the e-Signature placeholders render and you may see placeholders overlapping with signatures. For more information on e-signatures, check out our [E-Signature Offers](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers)﻿ and [E-Signature Documents](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents)﻿ guides.

Opening and amending your offer letter template in Pages can automatically change the font of some characters upon saving, which will cause the placeholder rendering issue to persist.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-letter-template-formatting#checking-your-substitution-tokens)Checking your Substitution Tokens
You can run into errors when validating your template if your substitution tokens haven’t been added in correctly.
Prior to uploading your offer letter template, try searching the document for "{{" and then "}}" and make sure the number of results match. If the number of "{{" and "}}" brackets is not the same, find the missing or incorrect brackets in the document and correct them. Then try uploading and validating the offer letter template again.
It's also helpful to search for "{{{" and "}}}", in case an extra bracket has been added by mistake!
When checking over your tokens, also be sure to check they match the tokens on the [Offer Tokens](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/offers/offer-letter-tokens "Offer Tokens") page in your Ashby account.
Adding _RAW to the end of any **numeric** or **currency** substitution token will strip formatting from the field. For example, a large number MY_FIELD might be formatted as 1,000,000, but MY_FIELD_RAW would be rendered as 1000000. This can avoid problems when using Word Tables.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-letter-template-formatting#spacing-and-conditional-tokens)Spacing and Conditional Tokens
If you’re opting to use conditional tokens (more on these at [Offer Conditional Tokens](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-and-e-signature-document-conditional-tokens)﻿), then to avoid any spacing issues, ensure that the token is added immediately after the previous sentence or paragraph.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/99eb65a01829aea7298f00a7b5f487e4.png)
﻿
﻿  

If you need to add in a space, please add it in after the opening tag of your conditional token, then add in your text.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/cbc7e29d746213007367b5c620fd4c91.png)
﻿
﻿  

In the case of having two conditional tokens back-to-back, please ensure one is listed directly after the other, as pictured.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/558f5f22ee74472c78cac2e12bbc9086.png)
﻿
﻿  

If you have line breaks that should only be added as part of the optional text when conditions are met, please ensure the line breaks are included after the opening tag and before the closing tag, rather than outside of the conditional token tags. This example shows a line break both before and after the optional text.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/07dfa01373468e61c564d02775c4441c.png)
﻿
If you have conditional tokens that will populate additional items in a numbers or bulleted list, ensure that (if needed), any line breaks and the additional information are added after the opening tag and before the closing tag.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1ae7d13911ccb1bf29fabc263f479308.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-letter-template-formatting#ensure-all-comments-on-the-offer-letter-template-a)Ensure all comments on the offer letter template are resolved prior to uploading
Prior to uploading your offer letter template, please ensure that any comments left on the offer letter template are resolved. If comments on the template document are not resolved then this can result in errors when creating an offer.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0f3fce112f12fe741177bf5ab4465dca.png)
﻿
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Surveys, Assessments & Activit...
Surveys & Questionnaires
# Diversity Surveys
13 min
Copy
You can use [Diversity Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/surveys/diversity-surveys "Diversity Surveys") to capture information from your candidates at any point in the interview process.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#diversity-surveys-overview)Diversity Surveys Overview
Ashby supports the ability to collect diversity surveys from applicants on jobs, or at any stage of the hiring process. Users can create and customize any number of surveys and configure rules for how and when to collect them from candidates. You can then analyze the results of these surveys to measure performance against your DEI goals.
See the table below for more information on the access roles that have the ability to set up surveys in Ashby and who can send out a survey.  
| Access Role  | Can Configure Surveys?  | Can Send Out Surveys to Candidates?  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Agency Users  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin (Private)  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#set-up-your-surveys)Set up your surveys
You can set up diversity surveys in the [Admin Section](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/surveys/diversity-surveys "Admin Section") of the app. Navigate to Admin > Jobs & Applications > Candidate Surveys and click the + Newbutton on the Diversity tab.
You’ll be prompted to give your new survey a title prior to being able to add questions to your diversity survey. Click Add Question and select a question type to build out your survey. You can select the following field types:
  * Short Answer


  * Long Unformatted Answer


  * Phone


  * Email


  * Multiple Choice


  * Checkboxes


  * Date


  * Yes/No


  * Number


  * Other Location


  * URL


﻿  

![Screen Shot 2022-02-18 at 12.35.28 PM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/1f0474810fc37666ad80f9149f219487.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f76abecc676dad9cc96c133798babe96.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#share-your-surveys)Share your surveys
Diversity surveys can be shared in three different ways:
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#collecting-on-the-application-tab-of-each-job)**Collecting on the application tab of each job**
You can set up a filter to describe which jobs pages a survey should be collected on. When you set this up, the survey will be shown alongside the application form when an applicant applies on your jobs pages.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/86ef54d0a8e9e61b85eee6621e49665c.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#directly-requesting-surveys)**Directly Requesting Surveys**
You can directly request a survey from the candidate profile by doing the following:
  * On the candidate profile, click the More dropdown


  * Select Create a Diversity Survey Request


  * You will be asked to choose which survey to send and which application it should be associated with.


  * Create the survey request using the Create button, or optionally also schedule an email with a link to the survey using the Create and Email button.


﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#setting-up-automation-rules)Setting up automation rules
You can set up automation rules so that you don’t need to directly request surveys from candidates manually. 
Instead, you can set up a series of conditions that trigger automatically sending a survey to a candidate.
Our article on [Utilizing Stage Groups](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/utilizing-stage-groups)﻿ walks through the different fields you can select to customize the automation.
To set up automation for your diversity survey:
  * Create a new draft configuration of automation rules by clicking Create a Draft Configuration


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c08cabbaad30e6d25f4e5687adb5e490.png)
﻿
  * Specify your conditions by clicking + Add Field to Match, choosing fields and then creating filters based on those


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/07404f68d2beddc73231492c636e8d80.png)
﻿
  * Select an email template from the Email Template dropdown that will be used to send out your survey


  * Configure any email delay using the Delay dropdown


  * Specify a sender email address


  * Activate the configuration


  * Toggle on the Enable Survey Automation toggle once the draft has been activated


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c08cabbaad30e6d25f4e5687adb5e490.png)
﻿
The conditions of each rule will get checked whenever a candidate changes stages. Ashby will find the first rule that matches and a survey will be created and an email with a link to the survey will be scheduled.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#report-on-your-results)Report on your results
Custom Reports can be configured on the Legacy Plus, Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
You can report on the questions in a diversity survey in our standard reports. The fields will be available for grouping under Job Consideration > Diversity Survey.
![Screen Shot 2022-02-18 at 12.57.48 PM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/39db06066939411f296d4c86fbebb382.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#how-do-i-view-pending-surveys)How do I view pending surveys?
_Viewing pending surveys_
You can view any pending survey requests on the candidate profile under Current Activities. From here you can email the survey again or delete the request.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e5b1c8a58cbd36dce5f41b77c6592039.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#what-does-the-survey-look-like-to-the-candidate)What does the survey look like to the candidate?
When a candidate follows the link in a survey request email, they’ll be brought to a page where they can fill in the survey.
![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/AYsAKZuvOlfjlTRF8_gha_screenshot2022-02-18at125625pm.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#when-are-a-surveys-automation-conditions-evaluated)When are a survey’s automation conditions evaluated?
The conditions in survey delivery automation settings are evaluated during stage transition events. This means a candidate will need to be moved forward to the next or archived in order for a survey to be sent.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#where-can-i-access-diversity-survey-responses)W**here can I access diversity survey responses?**
Diversity survey responses can only be viewed in aggregate through our reporting functionality. We put measures in place to prevent reporting from being able to pinpoint a candidate (e.g. drill downs are disabled). If a candidate fills out a diversity survey, neither the activity or their responses show on their candidate profile.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#are-surveys-anonymous)Are surveys anonymous?
Yes; by default, diversity survey responses are anonymous.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/diversity-surveys#can-i-limit-who-can-edit-dei-reports)Can I limit who can edit DEI reports?
You can, yes! To get started, switch on the Restrict editing DEI reports feature in Admin>Data Management>Reporting Permissions [here](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/reporting-permissions "here").
When the setting is enabled, users without the access to edit or create DEI reports will not be able to choose DEI fields as Fields to Show or Group By fields. Saved reports containing those fields will still be visible, but the reports will not be editable.
Once enabled, you will then also be able to determine who can edit these reports in each user’s profile on the [Employees](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/users "Employees") page.
When in a user’s profile, you will see the option to allow them to create and update DEI reports on the Permissions tab.
Admins with can create and update DEI Reports permission can grant or revoke the permission for others. The permission is automatically granted to the admin user who turns on the Restrict Editing DEI Reports setting.
Please note that this does not impact the visibility of diversity data in shared reports. Those with Organization Admin access or Elevated Access - Admin Private access can view diversity data in reports.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/520bf20de3bee0955f431730bebcbb65.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0e612b021989099319736879bacee65c.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c5997275294b11c1c85fc70a56a97949.png)
﻿
﻿

how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-looku:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Billing & Plans
# How do I purchase additional email lookups, AI credits or texting credits in-app?
8 min
Copy
You can now purchase email look-ups, AI credits and texting credits from within Ashby if you are a billing admin on your Ashby account.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app#overview)Overview
If you’d like to purchase additional email lookups, navigate to Admin > Sourcing > Email Lookups _._ When viewing your remaining lookups, click Purchase Additional to start the process of buying more lookups.
Alternatively, you can also navigate directly to Admin > Organization Setup > Billing to purchase lookups, AI credits and texting credits under the Subscriptions tab.
You can either purchase additional email lookups as a one-off or an additional amount recurring each month. AI and texting credits can only be purchased as a recurring additional amount in-app currently.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d9faaf503869852dbfc2a9c7b5acd230.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app#one-off-email-lookups)One-off Email Lookups
You can purchase additional email lookups in batches of 300. The additional lookups will expire after 30 days.
To make a one-off purchase, select the One Off option in the Purchase Additional Email Lookups section. One-off purchases must be paid for immediately, and, as such, require that you have a payment method on file. If there is no payment method, you will be prompted to add one before you can proceed.
Once you click Add a payment method, you be taken to Stripe to either add in your payment card details or link to an account. Once your payment details have been added, you can then proceed to determine the number of lookups you’d like to process. Click Purchase for…, then Confirm to complete your purchase.
Please allow up to ten seconds for your purchase to be completed and for your email lookups to be updated in the Current Email Lookups section. You will receive an invoice via email confirming the purchase.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3d0df11dafb900c774eaee6c2d8a6265.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app#recurring-lookups)Recurring Lookups
If you’d like to have these additional lookups added each month, then select theRecurring option within the Purchase Additional Email Lookups section. You will then be able to determine the number of email lookups you’d like to purchase.
We can only support in-app purchases of recurring email lookups that expire monthly. If you would like to set up email lookups that expire annually, please reach out to contracts@ashbyhq.com.
Email lookups can be purchased in batches of 300 but with recurring lookups, you will also be shown a preview of the recurring costs. In the example pictured, the account is on an annual plan.
There are two costs associated with recurring lookups: firstly, the recurring cost that'll be attached to future invoices. This takes the monthly cost of the email lookups and scales it to the customers billing cycle. In this example, $100/month on an annual cycle means they're adding $1,200 to the subscription.
The second cost is an immediate prorated charge for email lookups for the rest of the current billing cycle. The $1,200 for the additional email lookups is multiplied by the fraction of the current billing cycle that's remaining. It is prorated to the day, so in the above example where the user is one day into the billing cycle, we'll charge $1200 multiplied by (364/365 days), which comes out to be $1,196.71.
After clicking Purchase, you can then click Confirm to complete the transaction. You will receive an invoice via email confirming the purchase.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c17403df6579b13f1e93ae0ecd629196.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app#purchasing-additional-ai-credits)Purchasing additional AI credits
For more information on how AI credits are used, check out [AI-Assisted Application Review](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-assisted-application-review)﻿, [Candidate Fraud Detection Overview & Admin Settings](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-fraud-detection-overview-and-admin-settings)﻿, [AI Talent Rediscovery](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-talent-rediscovery)﻿ and [AI Credits](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits)﻿. More information on adding AI credits can be found below.
In the AI Credits section of Billing, both the credits used and credits remaining will be listed. Click Add More to start the process of purchasing more credits.
Using the Number of AI Credits dropdown, please select the number of additional AI credits you’d like to add to your account. If you are on the Plus or Enterprise plans, you can purchase AI credits in increments of 5000. If you are on the monthly Foundations plan, you can buy AI Credits in 1000 credit increments.
The cost added to future invoices and the immediate charge will be listed underneath the Number of AI Credits field for you to review. Click Purchase to confirm the purchase.
For reference, the account pictured is on a monthly plan, so a recurring purchase of an additional 5000 credits a month would add $500 to each monthly invoice moving forward.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9f0e1193b8d9d1e12857edf8609cd15f.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app#purchasing-additional-texting-credits)Purchasing additional texting credits
For more on candidate texting, please check out [Candidate Texting](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting)﻿. 
In the Texting Credits section of Billing, both the credits used and credits remaining will be listed. Click Add More to start the process of purchasing more credits. You can purchase texting credits in increments of 1000.
Using the Number of Texting Credits dropdown, please select the number of additional AI credits you’d like to add to your account.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f89e8a4e2b14801287695d0e65cd0821.png)
﻿
The cost added to future invoices and the immediate charge will be listed underneath the Number of Texting Credits field for you to review. Click Purchase to confirm the purchase.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9a235c1cc4ff72c29534b94c44c3ff20.png)
﻿
For reference, the account pictured is on a monthly plan, so a recurring purchase of an additional 1000 credits a month would add $90 to each monthly invoice moving forward.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/992393b93078a30651150c3b8d351f3a.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app#ive-purchased-email-lookups-by-mistakeive-purchase)I’ve purchased email lookups by mistake/I’ve purchased more email lookups than I intended to - what should I do?
﻿  

﻿  

Please reach out to support@ashbyhq.com for assistance with this.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app#how-are-email-lookups-deducted-is-it-per-email-or)H**ow are email lookups deducted? Is it per email or per lookup?**
Credits are used per lookup. For example, if you try to check the same candidate three times, it will use 3 credits if emails are successfully returned each time, but if you check once and we return 2 emails in that one lookup attempt, we charge you one credit.
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Getting Started: User Guides
# Getting Started for Interviewers
10 min
Copy
﻿
Welcome to Ashby! This guide covers the most common ways interviewers use Ashby — interviewing and referring candidates.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#log-in-to-ashby)Log in to Ashby
To sign in, head to [https://app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com/ "https://app.ashbyhq.com"). Ashby supports Google sign-in, Microsoft 365 sign-in, and magic links. If your company has SSO set up with Ashby, use this option to log in. More on signing in can be found at [Signing in to Ashby](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/signing-in-to-ashby)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#configure-your-personal-settings)Configure your personal settings
A key first step is configuring your personal settings in Ashby. In [Personal Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/personal-info "Personal Settings"), you can do the following:
  * Set your personal info, including your job title, user avatar, timezone, and social links


  * Set your notification settings — determine the activities you should be notified about and where you want to be notified


  * Set up personal email templates


  * Set up OAuth if needed (confirm with your admin if this needs to be completed as part of your Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 setup)


For a full walkthrough, check out [Updating Personal Settings](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/updating-personal-settings)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#navigate-ashby)Navigate Ashby
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#home-page)Home page
If you only interview candidates in the pipeline and have no other interaction with candidates, you likely have Limited Access in Ashby.
To get started, log in to Ashby at [https://app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com/ "https://app.ashbyhq.com") using one of the login options. You should already have an account set up. Once logged in, you land on your home page, where you can access interview briefings and tasks. For a full breakdown of the home page, check out [Home Page](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/home-page)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#add-and-track-referrals)Add and track referrals
To submit referrals:
  1. Locate the **Referrals** section on the right side of the [Home](https://app.ashbyhq.com/home/upcoming "Home") page.


  1. Click + Referral.


  * Creating a direct referral? Click Add Direct Referral, then complete the referral form with the candidate details.


  * Creating a referral link? Click Create Referral Link and give your referral link a title. You can then opt to link to a specific job posting using the Link to specific job posting? checkbox and selecting a job posting from the dropdown.


Our full guide on referrals can be found at [Referrals and Referral Links](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/referrals-and-referral-links)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#interviewing-with-ashby)Interviewing with Ashby
As an interviewer, you receive interviewer-only calendar invites that contain links to interview briefings. These briefings contain the schedule, instructions on how to conduct the interview, information about the candidate, a place for you to enter your feedback, and feedback from other interviewers on the panel.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#reviewing-interview-briefings-on-desktop)Reviewing interview briefings on desktop
When you click on one of your upcoming interviews, Ashby takes you to the interview briefing page. The interview briefing page includes all information about the candidate and the interview you are scheduled for. You also receive a link to the interview briefing in your calendar invite for the interview.
At the top of the interview briefing there are a list of oval "pills" that show key context and statuses—such as the associated job, which you can click to open the candidate pipeline if you have access, and recording-related updates when applicable.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/6q77OwaoTk4UUyFU5kMV__interview-briefing-polly-pocket-acent-ashby-2026-05-05-at-114935-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
There are several tabs within the interview briefing that contain different information:
  * On the **Overview** tab, you can review the date and time, the room (if applicable), the hiring team, and the interviewers


  * On the **Briefing** tab, you can review the interview instructions and a candidate summary including the candidate source, custom fields, work experience, and education


  * On the **Resume** tab, if available, you can review the PDF version of the candidate's resume


  * On the **Job Posting** tab, you can view the job posting that the candidate applied to


  * The **Recording** tab shows only when [AI Notetaker](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker)﻿ is being used and a recording is in progress, completed, or removed. Here you can see meeting recordings and AI notes if using AI Notetaker.


  * On the **Your Feedback** tab, you can complete the scorecard for the candidate


  * On the **All Feedback** tab, you can review the feedback from other interviews after you've submitted your own


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#reviewing-interview-briefings-on-mobile)Reviewing interview briefings on mobile
If you open Ashby on a mobile device, you see your mobile home page, which also shows all upcoming interviews and overdue scorecards and links to each interview briefing.
You can also open any link to the interview briefing (e.g., on your calendar invite or in an email notification) from a mobile device.
Just as in the desktop version, you can learn about upcoming interviews and submit feedback when they are completed.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/073c414f0cd3f467a10047fd1ad37bfc.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#completing-feedback-forms)Completing feedback forms
After an interview, you need to complete a feedback form for the candidate. You can find and complete the interview's feedback form on the **Your Feedback** tab of the interview briefing.
For more on conducting interviews and leaving feedback, check out the [Conducting Interviews with Ashby](https://academy.ashbyhq.com/course/interviewing-in-ashby "Conducting Interviews with Ashby") course in Ashby Academy!
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#faqs)FAQs
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers#my-profile-picture-has-synced-over-from-google-wor)My profile picture has synced over from Google Workspace but it's very pixelated. Why?
Images synced over from Google Workspace do not have a high enough resolution. We recommend uploading your avatar within [Personal Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/personal-info "Personal Settings") to fix this.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3bd9ae2c6b84fa648351e2310d15c63c.png)
﻿
﻿
