Interviews: Initial Setup
# Feedback Forms and Interviews
22 min
Copy
In this guide, you'll learn how to create feedback forms and interview templates. By default, the templates you create will be available to all jobs. When you update these templates, all jobs linked to them will also be updated.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#whats-the-difference-between-feedback-forms-and-in)What’s the difference between feedback forms and interviews?  
| **Template Type**  | **Description**  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Feedback forms  | A standalone form where you capture interviewer ratings or scores for a candidate. These are accessible as a part of an interview template and by clicking More>Submit Feedback Without Interview on a candidate profile.  |  
| Interviews  | A set of interviewer instructions AND where you assign the feedback form where you capture interviewer ratings of a candidate. These are accessible when scheduling one-off meetings with candidates and are also used as a part of the Schedule Interview activity. This is essentially where you can determine a briefing and the form that interviewers complete.  |  
In Ashby, you have the option to set up re-useable templates in Admin and one-off objects on a per-job basis. We recommend creating templates, as this will make updating many jobs at once easy in the future.
The best practice is to set up standalone feedback forms within Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > [Feedback Forms](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/feedback-forms "Feedback Forms") and link them to interviews in Admin > Interviews & Scheduling >[ Shared [Interviews](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviews "Interviews")﻿](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviews " Shared "). That way, when you update the feedback form, any associated interviews are updated as well.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#permissions-setting-up-shared-interviews-feedback)Permissions: Setting up shared interviews & feedback forms
See the table below for information on the roles that have access to set up and edit shared interviews and feedback forms.  
| Access Role  | Has Access?  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  |  
| Agency Users  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ❌*  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin Private  | ❌*  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  |  
*Only Organization Admins can configure shared interviews and feedback forms by default. Elevated Access users can be given access to edit shared interviews and feedback forms if needed. More on this at [Additional User Permissions](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/additional-user-permissions)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#shared-feedback-forms)Shared Feedback Forms
☝ If you want to reuse the same feedback form across multiple interviews, you can create [shared feedback forms](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#shared-feedback-forms)﻿. Shared feedback forms are standalone pre-configured questionnaires for application reviewers and interviewers to fill out to rate a candidate.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#create-a-shared-feedback-form)Create a shared feedback form
**To set up a feedback form:**
  1. Navigate to Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > [Feedback Forms](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/feedback-forms "Feedback Forms").


  1. Click New _,_ then enter a title for your form.


  1. You can add sections to your form if you’d like to add structure to a form with a lot of questions (for example, a section per skill being tested).


  1. You can then add fields to the feedback form by clicking Add Question. The following fields are supported: 


  * Short Answer


  * Long Formattable Answer


  * Phone


  * Email


  * Multiple Choice


  * Checkboxes


  * Date


  * Yes/No


  * Number


  * Score


  * Location


  * Currency (an amount and a currency code).


You’ll also be able to set the fields on the feedback form as Required (so an interviewer must complete the field when adding feedback), or Private (so only those with Organization Admin access or Elevated Access - Admin Private access will be able to see those fields when viewing or completing feedback). Private fields can be added for information like salary expectations.
You’ll also have the option to link the field to a candidate custom field (more on this at [Form Field Connectors](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/form-field-connectors)﻿). If needed, you can also duplicate or delete the question from the form.
If the feedback form order needs to be amended, click Reorder and then click and drag the questions and sections into place.
Changes to feedback forms will be saved automatically.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a1d614e5e7033b2e29446ff5f0eff923.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fb7f4f8d44f44a0e758dcdbdaffd576b.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7589d04caae1f05d45571b9653081e99.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8b022dfeaaef44fca872ebbba913c27e.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/565cf3d56ac237e50524256c044c3fe7.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#best-practices-when-designing-feedback-forms-for-u)Best practices when designing feedback forms for use with AI features
Your organization may use Ashby's AI features, such as [AI Notetaker](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker)﻿ , to improve the objectivity and efficiency of generating feedback post-interview. We recommend the below ways to optimize your feedback forms for use with AI features:
  * **Phrase questions clearly:** The AI uses the question as a guide for the summary.


  * **Include context:** Use the question description to provide instructions on what to include, how to format the answer, or what specific evidence to look for.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7c6956e4eb4b073a3c4e4f990c862729.png)
﻿
Providing this context upfront ensures AI answers are relevant and saves time by capturing the data your team finds most valuable for hiring decisions.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#use-shared-feedback-forms)Use shared feedback forms
Feedback forms can be linked to an interview, and used ad-hoc on a candidate profile.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#linking-a-feedback-form-to-an-interview)**Linking a feedback form to an interview**
﻿
To link a feedback form to an interview template, head to Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > Shared Interviews and click on the interview you’d like to link this feedback form to on the Feedback Form tab. Click Change Link to switch out the feedback form for the newly created one.
If you used a custom feedback form for that interview previously, you’ll see the option to Delete & Link to Shared.
When you link a feedback form to an interview, that form will appear on the interview briefing for any interviewer participating in that interview on the Your Feedback tab.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5476ff5b7ff5702d0fa2a074b717d72f.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b3235665c09be626670a305be57611a8.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fe278a1d23fae574dd61d537263a2633.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#using-a-feedback-form-on-a-candidates-profile)**Using a feedback form on a candidate’s profile**
If you'd like to submit feedback without it being associated to an interview scheduled through Ashby, navigate to the candidate’s profile, then click More and Submit Feedback to fill out a feedback form.
You can also click More and Request Feedback without Scheduling to ask another user to add in feedback for the candidate without scheduling an interview.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4f5c7c7a251bdf1c78999c0963fc7627.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#shared-interviews)Shared interviews
﻿[Shared Interviews](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviews "Shared Interviews") allow you to set up interviews that can be used across multiple jobs and stages, while custom interviews can only be set up and used for a specific job on a specific stage. You can create new shared interview types in Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > [Shared [Interviews](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviews "Interviews")﻿](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviews "Shared "), then reuse them across jobs.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#create-a-shared-interview)Create a shared interview
**To set up a shared interview:**
  1. Navigate to Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > [Shared [Interviews](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviews "Interviews").](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviews "Shared ")﻿


  1. Click Add..., then enter a title and click Create.


  1. In the Overview tab, you can set the following:


  1. Internal Title: Set an internal title for your interview here. Only those scheduling and interviewing can see this interview title.


  1. Candidate-facing Title: Set a title that the candidate sees on their candidate invite and when scheduling.


  1. Groups: Set up groups to sort your interviews into categories.


  1. Is Feedback Requested?: Determine if interviewers will be requested to leave feedback. **Please note, this setting applies to all interviewers assigned to the interview**.


  1. Is Feedback Required?: Determine whether feedback is required or optional for this interview type. If feedback is set as required, interviewers will receive reminders via email automatically to provide feedback. You can adjust interviewer reminder settings in Admin > Organization Setup > [Interviewer Notifications](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/notifications/ "Interviewer Notifications").


  1. In the Instructions tab, add information for your interviewers like specific interview questions and any additional details they'll need while interviewing. Instructions here will show in the Briefing section of the interview, so any further briefing details for this specific interview type should be added here.


  1. In the Feedback Form tab, create a custom feedback form or link to an existing feedback form you've already configured.


﻿

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#link-an-interview-to-a-job)Link an interview to a job
You can link an interview and a feedback form to a job using a Schedule Interview activity. Learn more about schedule interview activity setup at [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities)﻿﻿
﻿  

**To link an interview to a job:**
  1. Navigate to Jobs > [Admin](https://app.ashbyhq.com/jobs/all "Admin").


  1. Select a job, then click Interview Plans on the left menu of the job.


  1. Scroll to the interview plan stage you’d like to add the interview to and click + Activity to [stage name], then + Add Activity _._


  1. Click Schedule Interview to create the initial activity.


  1. To link your shared interview to your activity, click + Shared Interview on the Schedule tab and select one of your interviews. You can then also assign interviewers and meeting rooms to the activity as needed.

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#use-shared-interviews-for-one-off-scheduling)Use shared interviews for one-off scheduling
More on manually scheduling candidates can be found at [Manually Scheduling Interviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews)﻿
Scheduling one-off interviews on the candidate’s profile
An interview can be used to schedule one-off interviews on a candidate's profile. Click + New Interview on the candidate’s profile, then choose whether to schedule manually or generate a direct booking link for a candidate. 
_Direct Booking Link_
When creating a one-off direct booking link, you can select the interview type via the Interview drop-down menu. 
﻿  

_Manual Schedule_
When manually scheduling the candidate, click Add Interview on the calendar interface to determine the interview type.

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#how-can-i-delete-the-record-of-a-feedback-form-fro)How can I delete the record of a feedback form from the candidate profile?
To delete a feedback form, you will click More at the bottom of the feedback form submission and, select Delete from Ashby, then click Yes.
![Screen Cast 2023-07-06 at 8.47.57 AM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SBfMggUU3OueD2WTBVygJ_screencast2023-07-06at84757am.gif)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#who-can-delete-a-submitted-feedback-form)Who can delete a submitted feedback form?
Only Organization Admins and the user who submitted a feedback form can delete a feedback form from the candidate's feed (if they have access to it).
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#what-happens-when-i-archive-a-feedback-form)What happens when I archive a feedback form?
Archiving a feedback form does not immediately remove it everywhere. The impact depends on how and where the form is being used.
**Existing scheduled interviews**
Feedback forms shown on interview briefings are tied to the interview settings, not the form’s active status.
If an interview is not updated to use a new, active feedback form, the archived form will continue to appear on the interview briefing and can still be completed. If the interview’s feedback form is changed to a different active form, the interview briefing will update and the archived form will no longer appear for the interview. 
**Reporting**
Archived feedback forms cannot be reported on. If a report references a question from an archived feedback form, the report will show an error. Archived feedback form questions are no longer available as reportable fields. 
**How can I keep reporting on this data?**
If you need to continue reporting on responses after archiving a feedback form, you can use [Form Field Connectors](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/form-field-connectors)﻿ to link feedback responses to a candidate custom field. This allows future reports to reference the custom field instead of the archived feedback form.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#can-i-delete-the-default-feedback-form)Can I delete the default feedback form?
No. You can archive other feedback forms by heading to Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > Feedback Forms but the default feedback form can only be amended. It cannot be archived.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#can-i-edit-my-feedback-on-a-feedback-form-after-su)Can I edit my feedback on a feedback form after submitting it?
If the interview is in the past, you can click on the Past Interviews button in the Interviews section of the home page to view all interviews that have already taken place. Once you’ve submitted your feedback, you can go back and make any adjustments to your comments by heading back into the interview in question and navigating to the Your Feedback tab. From there, you can click Edit Feedback to update your feedback.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ca7f0c07875f738f66674f711dc4d162.png)
﻿
If you have access to the candidate profile, you can also scroll to the interview in question on the candidate’s feed, then click More and Edit for the feedback in question.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1ff04cefd09dd13a26b3795b6581ced0.png)
﻿
If you edit feedback, the edits will directly update the feedback form fields. We do not offer versions of feedback, only the latest version of the feedback will be shown.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#can-i-remove-the-overall-recommendation-field-from)Can I remove the Overall Recommendation field from my feedback form?
Currently the Overall Recommendation field is included by default and cannot be removed from a feedback form. This is because the score added to this field is used for reporting and for interview feedback summaries.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#where-do-i-set-the-duration-of-the-interview)W**here do I set the duration of the interview?**
The interview duration is set when creating a schedule interview activity, when creating a direct booking link, or when manually scheduling an interview.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#can-i-export-feedback-form-templates)C**an I export feedback form templates?**
While exporting candidate feedback is possible (more on this at [How do I export candidate data?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-export-candidate-data)﻿), it’s not currently possible to export feedback form templates.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#can-i-add-multiple-feedback-forms-to-an-interview)C**an I add multiple feedback forms to an interview type?**
No, only one feedback form can be assigned to an interview.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#can-i-fill-out-a-feedback-form-on-behalf-of-an-int)Can I fill out a feedback form on behalf of an interviewer?
If you have Elevated Access - Admin, Elevated Access - Admin Private, or Organization Admin access, navigate to the Feedback tab within the feed on the candidate’s profile.
If there are any feedback forms that are yet to be completed, you can click the Write Feedback button to complete the feedback form on the interviewer’s behalf.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b45c923f6f577fe009df5b3e8f62fd19.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#do-i-have-to-assign-a-feedback-form-to-an-intervie)D**o I have to assign a feedback form to an interview?**
﻿  

Yes, a feedback form has to be linked to an interview if Is Feedback Requested is set to Yes on the Overview tab of the interview type.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#what-happens-when-i-change-the-question-type-on-a)W**hat happens when I change the question type on a feedback form question?**
If you switch the question field type on a feedback form, then this can impact reporting. For example, if you switch a checkbox or multiple choice question field to a short answer field, then reporting on the checkboxes selected within previously completed feedback forms will no longer be available. As such, we recommend making minimal changes to question fields once you’ve finished creating and start using feedback forms for interviews. 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#an-interviewer-cant-see-all-sections-of-the-feedba)An interviewer can't see all sections of the feedback form but I can - what's happening?
It may be that some questions on the feedback form have been set to _Private_. Navigate to either the shared feedback form at Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > [Feedback Forms](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/feedback-forms "Feedback Forms") or to the schedule interview activity within the job's interview plan if the form is a custom feedback form.
Confirm whether the interviewer should be able to add information to this field on the feedback form and uncheck the Private checkbox if this was marked as private by mistake.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7f104746efdba5154d82e0afd26e1948.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews#how-do-i-add-a-feedback-form-to-a-group-or-categor)H**ow do I add a feedback form to a group or category on the Feedback Forms****page?**
Once you’ve created your feedback form head back to the full list of feedback forms at Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > Feedback Forms, then click on the three dots beside the Uncategorized tag. Click Add to Group, then select the group you’d like to add your feedback form to.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e0a4812231d9a30d676f6288a1ef3872.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿

# Email Sharing
13 min
Copy
Learn how to share your user email with other users, how to send an email on behalf of other users and set up a custom no-reply email address.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#sharing-your-email-address-with-other-ashby-users)Sharing your email address with other Ashby Users
Ashby supports sharing your company email with other users to allow them to send emails on your behalf. To share your email with another Ashby user:
  * Navigate to Personal Settings > Email Sharing


  * Click + Add in the Can access your email address section


  * Search for and select the user you’d like to allow to send emails on your behalf


  * Confirm the display or sender name used when emails are sent from your email address


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/86fea1e4e2a09ffdb2e2dc0aa52c132e.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fd4b98ad5ec135949af265ea7b77d8b7.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#requesting-access-to-send-emails-as-other-ashby-us)Requesting access to send emails as other Ashby Users
**Please note:** the user must have permissions to send emails to candidates in order for their email to be shared and used for sending emails
To request access to another Ashby user’s email, navigate to [Personal Settings > Email Sharing](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/email-sharing "Personal Settings > Email Sharing"), and select the employee you’d like to request access from using the Request access from employee dropdown.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/995a9e11ad4aafcb54a5a8d0a04ef13d.png)
﻿
The user receiving the request will get an email notification informing them of the request. They can use the link in the email to navigate to Email Sharing with their personal settings to confirm or reject the access request.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/21daf8dfa50c26dd5f4e52b6de178cd5.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#removing-email-access-and-canceling-email-sharing)Removing email access and canceling email sharing requests
To remove access to your email or cancel pending requests, click the trash can icon to the right of the user tile.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/44af0e9f370aceec6ce753f6e0f3df6d.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#setting-up-a-google-shared-email-alias-and-setting)Setting up a Google shared email alias (and setting it as a company no-reply address)
Please note these are the shared email alias instructions for users with the Google Workspace integration in place. For more information on enabling user aliases in Microsoft, please check out [Microsoft 365](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/microsoft-365#email-aliases)﻿.
If you are sending over 1,000 no-reply emails a day and would like to use a branded email for this, please check out [Email Domain Setup](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup)﻿.
Ashby also supports sending emails on behalf of an alternate email address, by integrating with [Gmail’s Send As feature](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/22370?hl=en "Gmail’s Send As feature"). First, you’ll set up a Send As address in Gmail, then you’ll share that address with your team on the [Shared Email Aliases](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/shared-email-aliases "Shared Email Aliases") page in Ashby Admin (Organization Admin access is required for this). You’ll also have the option to Unshare and Edit the alias’ display name and default status. Please note that no-reply/default shared email aliases﻿ cannot be used when sending sequences.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9dac0370b5bc747a26aab2b2cbbb1900.png)
﻿
We highly recommend setting this shared email alias using a service account (e.g., hiring@yourcompanyname.com) to ensure continuity of access when the team changes.
If you set a shared email alias as a default, this will be used in place of the no-reply@ashbyhq.com email address. You can un-share the email address or turn off the Default option to use no-reply@ashbyhq.com again if needed.
﻿  

Gmail’s Send As feature supports two options for the alternate address:
  * New or Existing Email Addresses 


  1. Ask your Google Workspace administrator to create a new email address that you’d like to Send As and provide you with the password to the newly created account.


  1. Log into the new account and [set up email forwarding](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/10957?hl=en "set up email forwarding") to your main email address.


  1. From here, you’ll need to request [Send As permission](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/22370 "Send As permission") to the newly created address


  * New or Existing Google Groups 


  1. Create a new Google Group that you’d like to Send As.


  1. Using your primary account, join the Google Group.


  1. From here, you’ll need to request [Send As permission](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/22370 "Send As permission") to the newly created Google Group. Note: If you run into an issue where you aren’t receiving a Verification Email after requesting Send As permission from a Google Group, see the FAQ at the bottom of this document.


_Gmail Send As configuration recommendations_
  * Entering a value into the Name field that will represent the formatted name in emails you send from this address.


![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SQbERHIxi9mApRnREPUms_screenshot2020-07-28at30646pm.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/IVC9xCX-NBQ4wWH35TYap_screenshot2020-07-28at30757pm.png?format=webp)
﻿
  * After setting up the Send As permissions, the new address will appear in Ashby on the [Shared Email Aliases](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/shared-email-aliases "Shared Email Aliases") page in Admin.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#using-aliases-in-ashby)Using aliases in Ashby
Once email sharing is configured, you’ll see a From dropdown option to select an alternate email address when you’re sending an email or sequence in Ashby. Use the drop-down to select the email address you’d like to send the email from.
![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Rh-8GCG0wttflGS2XkVtA_screenshot2020-07-27at30439pm.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#faq)FAQ 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#im-trying-to-send-as-a-google-group-but-im-not-rec)I’m trying to Send As a Google Group, but I’m not receiving my Verification Email after requesting Send As permission.
Your Google Group may not allow posting from emails outside your domain. You may need to update the Group to allow Post permissions from Anyone on the web to allow verification emails to come through. Only Group Owners can update these settings.
If you cannot see a setting to enable Anyone on the web to post to your group, you will need to update your Google Workspace admin settings to allow group owners to pick this setting. For that read Google’s help doc [here](https://support.google.com/a/answer/9441643?hl=en#:~:text=Under "here"). The resulting setting in the admin console should look like this:
![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/XnCt8qVta_z02Mo3npbiK_screenshot2024-07-17at104228am.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/2fXz8vZ1cQuCdAQDRF72P_screenshot2020-11-26at105352am.png?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#emails-arent-sending-from-our-shared-email-alias-a)E**mails aren’t sending from our shared email alias anymore - why?**
This usually means the person that setup the shared email alias is no longer an active Ashby user. You can fix this by resharing the email alias with your team from [here in Admin](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/shared-email-aliases "here in Admin"). We recommend setting this shared alias up from a service account to prevent issues in the future.
You can amend your display name for emails send from the Ashby no-reply email address on the No-Reply Address Display Name field in the Messaging section of Admin > Job Boards > [Theme (Job Board)](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/theme "Theme \(Job Board\)").
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/901c4f84e0f3cb2520de57ce0c91d72b.png)
﻿
The display name cannot be empty and has a maximum length of 30 characters.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#can-i-determine-a-default-sender-when-creating-an)Can I determine a default sender when creating an email template?
No, the sender would be determined at the time of drafting up the email from the template, or when setting up automation for emails.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#do-i-need-access-to-the-alias-inbox-to-set-up-a-no)D**o I need access to the alias inbox to set up a no-reply alias?**
Yes, alias inbox access is required to set up a no-reply alias in Ashby.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#will-the-user-be-notified-if-i-accept-or-reject-th)Will the user be notified if I accept or reject their request to send emails on my behalf?
Yes, the user will receive an email notification informing them of the outcome.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#ive-set-up-an-alias-and-new-threads-are-being-crea)I**’ve set up an alias and new threads are being created in Gmail from emails sent using the alias via Ashby - what’s going on?**
This can happen if a user is replying to a candidate in Ashby using a Google group alias when they aren’t a member of that Google group. Ensure that all users using the alias have been given access to the Google group to ensure all replies stay in one thread.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#when-would-i-use-an-alias-or-no-reply-email)When would I use an alias or no-reply email?
Aliases or no-reply emails can be set as the sender for emails that you don’t want to use your personal company email address for. For example, you could use an alias or no-reply email when sending an email as part of an auto-reject﻿ configuration (more on this at [Auto-Reject Applications](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/auto-reject-applications)﻿) or when sending an emailing confirming that you’ve received the candidate’s application (more on this in [Emails](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-template-creation-and-management)﻿).
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#i-send-a-large-volume-of-no-reply-emails-each-day)I **send a large volume of no-reply emails each day, can I still use a branded email address?**
This is possible if an email domain is configured within Ashby. If you are sending more than 1,000 no-reply or automated emails a day and would prefer to use a branded email address, please check out our [Email Domain Setup](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup)﻿ guide.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#can-i-change-the-display-name-listed-for-my-shared)Can I change the display name listed for my shared email address?
Yes. If you’ve shared your email address with other users in Ashby, you can make amendments to the name displayed by navigating to Personal Settings > [Email Sharing](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/email-sharing "Email Sharing").
Adjust the name in the Display Name field as needed and it should be automatically saved.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7fbab3c6e6965866f91ad5d0875c9905.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-sharing#when-and-where-is-a-no-reply-usually-used-or-used)When and where is a no-reply usually used or used by default in Ashby?
The following tools in Ashby can be configured to or automatically use the default no-reply email address (either no-reply@ashbyhq.com or the default you configure):  
| Tool  | Description  | Notes  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Application confirmation email  | An automated email sent to the candidate if they submit an application via your job board. This will always use the default no-reply email.  | More on configuring this at [Email Template Creation and Management](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-template-creation-and-management#application-confirmation-template)﻿  |  
| Referral confirmation email  | An automated email sent to the referred candidate once they've been referred.   | More on configuring this at [Email Template Creation and Management](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-template-creation-and-management#referral-confirmation-template)﻿  |  
| Auto-Reject emails  | An email sent to the candidate if they've been rejected by auto-reject rules you've configured on job postings. These can be scheduled so they aren't sent immediately on archiving.  | More on this at [Auto-Reject Applications](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/auto-reject-applications)﻿  |  
| Survey automation  | Configure automation to send an email to the candidate containing a link to to a survey or questionnaire.  | Used by default if another email isn’t selected in the automation configuration. More on survey automation options at [Surveys & Questionnaires](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/Rlbg-surveys-and-questionnaires)﻿  |  
| Newsletter  | Send out newsletters to your talent pools to keep them updated.  | More on configuring newsletters at [Newsletters](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/newsletters)﻿  |  
| Event confirmation emails  | If a lead signs up to attend a hiring event, an email confirmation is sent out to them.  | For more on setting up events, check out [Events](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events)﻿﻿  |  
| Initial consent and consent extension requests  | If you have automation configured as part of your consent rules, an email will be sent out to a candidate for their consent or a consent extension.  | Want to know more about configuring consent rules and automation? Check out [Data Privacy and Compliance](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/data-privacy-and-compliance#1pBi2)﻿  |  
| Bulk application review  | Rejection emails can be sent from a no-reply email within the bulk application review view.  | Read more at [Application Review](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/application-review)﻿.  |  
| Interview confirmation emails  | An email sent to the candidate at the point an interview is scheduled (if configured).  | For more on configuring interview activities, check out [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities#dPsRF)﻿  |  
| Candidate activity automations  | If an automated activity is configured to send an email to the candidate, then this can be sent from a no-reply email.  | More information can be found at [Automated Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/automated-activities)﻿  |  
| Alerts and scheduled dashboard notifications  | When alert or scheduled dashboard notifications are sent, these are sent from a no-reply email.   | For further info, check out [Alerts](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/alerts)﻿ and [Scheduled Dashboards](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards)﻿.  |  
| Sending an email to the candidate from their profile  | You can opt to use a no-reply email when reaching out to the candidate via the Email option on the candidate profile.  | Further information can be found at [Candidate Profile](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-profile)﻿.  |  
﻿  

﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI Content Assistant
8 min
Copy
You can opt-in to use the AI content assistant to help you draft content for job descriptions, email templates, sequence emails, and one off emails.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-content-assistant#enabling-the-ai-content-assistant)Enabling the AI content assistant
To enable the AI notetaker in your Ashby account:
  * Navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > Opt-In Features.


  * If you’ve yet to opt-in to AI features using the Enable AI Features option, you will need to opt-in to then enable the AI Notetaker tool.


  * Check the AI Content Assistant checkbox


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/831ae28399bc94e12370d47386d683e4.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-content-assistant#accessing-and-using-the-ai-content-assistant)Accessing and using the AI content assistant
You can use the AI content assistant to generate content for the Description section of your job posting and to generate content for emails and sequences.
_Accessing the AI content assistant to generate description content for a job posting_
Navigate to the Job Postings tab of your job, then click on New Draft to create a new job posting, or click on an existing job posting if you’d like to make amendments instead.
On the Description tab, navigate to the Description field and click Write with AI in the toolbar. This will open up the content assistant.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/709daea5c4f056d35f4642e5f096a0c9.png)
﻿
_Accessing the AI content assistant to generate email content for an email template_
Head to Admin > Organization Setup > Email Templates and either click New Template to create a new email template or select an existing template to amend.
In the toolbar under the Body section of the template, click Write with AI to access the AI content assistant.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5ba1f8eeeeb89fe8ab5ca8437c017fa5.png)
﻿
_Accessing the AI content assistant to generate email content for a one-off email_
When on the candidate’s profile, click Email to create an email activity for the candidate. In the toolbar under the Body section of the email, click Write with AI to access the AI content assistant.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/650dd73c360246d970593d21209d3b9a.png)
﻿
_Accessing the AI content assistant to generate email content for a sequence stage_
Select a sequence template within Sourcing > Sequences or click New to create a new sequence. When editing or creating the sequence template, click the Write with AI option in the toolbar underneath the Body section of the sequence stage to access the AI content assistant.
Please note that the AI content assistant can only generate content within each stage of your sequence. It’s not currently possible to generate an entire sequence using the AI content assistant.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/18ddc9afab9a8963d132a16ee48876e4.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-content-assistant#generating-content-using-the-ai-content-assistant)Generating content using the AI content assistant
Type your prompt in the Ask a new question… field to then generate your content.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bcf20b7a6494bfa760c059d8aaac22e4.png)
﻿
Once your content has been generated, review it fully. If you’re happy to use that content moving forward, click Looks good. Insert into text box.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ed20d216b2183d072083daf9a301b164.png)
﻿
Alternatively, you can also ask another question. If you’d like to give feedback on the generated content, click Give Feedback. You’ll be able to provide a rating (positive or negative) and also add comments.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bcf20b7a6494bfa760c059d8aaac22e4.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-content-assistant#refining-existing-content)Refining existing content
If you have existing content and would like to refine it using the AI content assistant, this is also possible wherever there is a rich text editor.
To refine content using the AI content assistant, highlight the content you’d like to refine, then click the Refine option that will pop up. From here, you can select from the following options:
  * Fix spelling and grammar


  * Improve writing


  * Make professional


  * Make casual


  * Make friendly


  * Make longer


  * Make shorter


  * Bulletize


  * If you can’t find a suitable option on this list, you can add your own custom prompt in the Ask AI to edit or generate field


Once you select an option, the AI content assistant will then generate a suggestion. Once generated, you can opt to accept the suggestion and add it to your email, sequence or job description, or you can discard it. You also have the option to regenerate the content or refine it further.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fdec2122140344f42d324a599aecb68e.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-content-assistant#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-content-assistant#can-substitution-tokens-be-added-into-email-templa)Can substitution tokens be added into email templates using the AI content assistant?
They can, yes. For example, if you wanted to create an email template that included the candidate’s name, include that in your prompt and the appropriate substitution token would then be included within the generated suggestion.
_﻿  
_
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)

# What do the card colors mean on the Candidate Pipeline report?
2 min
Copy
This document walks through the card colors you will see on the Candidate Pipeline report and their meaning.
![This report shows the Candidate Pipeline for the Corporate Usability Analyst role. ](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/dhou7fea-VEDfR1FSKkXj_screenshot2022-12-23at72359am.png?format=webp)
﻿
The below table shows the Candidate Pipeline for the Corporate Usability Analyst role.
When visualizing the Candidate Pipeline via the card (kanban) view, the colors on each card are based on either time or activity.
If there are structured activities (interviews, take home assignments, etc) in the active stage, the card colors mean the following:  
| **Card Color**  | **Activity**  | **Examples**  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| **Green**  | Up to date  | Scheduled  |  
| **Yellow**  | Waiting on candidate to submit availability, accept offer, interview needs scheduling, etc  | Needs Scheduling, Booking Link Sent, Submitted Availability, Waiting on Offer Acceptance  |  
| **Red**  | Hiring team needs to take action  | Needs Decision, Waiting on Feedback  |  
If there are no structured activities for that specific stage, the card will say In Stage Since, and the card colors mean in the following:  
| **Card Color**  | **Time**  |  
| --- | --- |  
| **Green**  | In stage <2 days  |  
| **Yellow**  | In stage 2-5 days  |  
| **Red**  | In stage 5+ days  |  
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby Analytics
Getting Started with Analytics
# Calculated Fields
9 min
Copy
This document reviews the Calculated Fields feature and the two different types of fields you can create. If you are looking to create fields to house custom information for a candidate, job, project or offer, please check out [Custom Fields](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/custom-fields)﻿.
Calculated Fields are available on the Plus, Enterprise and Legacy plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/calculated-fields#introduction)Introduction
Calculated Fields are an advanced feature that allow you to remap ATS data for reporting purposes. For example, you can take all sources from your ATS and group them into a custom set of buckets.
When you create a new Calculated Field, you will give it a custom name and define the new field values. Once created, you can refer to that calculated field in all Ashby reporting for filtering and grouping.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/calculated-fields#create-a-calculated-field)Create a Calculated Field
  1. Navigate to Admin > Data Mapping > Calculated Fields


![Screen Cast 2022-11-28 at 1.51.46 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/OHwJyG3fU1aUUN0IX5X0t_screencast2022-11-28at15146pm.gif)
﻿
  1. Click New in the upper right-hand corner. You can then select the Object Type on which you’d like your new field to exist, add a title, and select the Calculated Field Type.


  1. When creating a new Calculated Field you will have the choice of two types of field: Filter Bucket Field: create multiple buckets and a filter for each bucket that defines which objects will be put into the bucket Grouping Field: group values by selecting values that belong in a specific group


![Screen Cast 2022-11-28 at 1.57.32 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Q6JpKK4jTSQI-vPuAfSKx_screencast2022-11-28at15732pm.gif)
﻿
  1. Add new buckets with custom names. The names you select here will be the field values you can select or group by in reporting.


![Screen Cast 2022-11-28 at 2.11.45 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/IW0q5yFUDmFZafImPh9Fl_screencast2022-11-28at21145pm.gif)
﻿
  1. Select each bucket’s field values. The Other bucket will contain all values that don't fall into any of the previous buckets and can't be edited.


![Screen Cast 2022-11-28 at 2.15.14 PM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/_1L5V5MD5mrPbjrf0F4kq_screencast2022-11-28at21514pm.gif)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/calculated-fields#grouping-fields)Grouping Fields
Grouping fields allow you to define a set of buckets with custom values, and then map all existing values from your ATS field of choice into the new categorization. A classic example is taking a list of departments and mapping them into your organizations unique functional divisions.
![Calculated grouping fields are useful for mapping a known set of fixed values into a new set of custom buckets.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/jLg6r_5hezQSMmF-2Petr_calculatedfields-groupingfields.png?format=webp)
﻿
Calculated grouping fields are useful for mapping a known set of fixed values into a new set of custom buckets.
The video below provides a quick introduction to calculated grouping fields:
﻿
Please note that grouping calculated fields can only be done by fields of the following type:
  * A field that allows you to select multiple values from a finite set of selectable values


  * A field that prompts you to select one value from a finite set of values


  * A field that involves you selecting all/any that apply


You can find more information on field types and the icons representing field types in our [Icon Glossary](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/icon-glossary)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/calculated-fields#filter-bucket-fields)Filter Bucket Fields
Sometimes you do not have a fixed set of values that easily map into new categories but rather a dynamic set of complex logic that defines whether or not a value should fall into one category or another. In such a situation, you will want to define the conditions of what should fall into a bucket, and we provide this via filter bucket fields.
An example might be categorization all Jobs with “Senior” or “Director” in their titles to a “Leadership” bucket, and all Jobs with “New Grad” into a “New Grad” bucket to easily collate a large and diverse set of Jobs into broad categories.
![Filter fields take a unique filter condition as a definition for each bucket to automate categorization.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/83k6SmkbS3gzcjKKSY_qS_calcfield-filterbucketfield.png?format=webp)
﻿
Filter fields take a unique filter condition as a definition for each bucket to automate categorization.
The following short video reviews creating filter bucket fields:
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/calculated-fields#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/calculated-fields#can-i-create-buckets-for-my-calculated-fields-that)Can I create buckets for my calculated fields that filter based on other calculated fields?
You can, yes! When clicking + Add Field to Match to configure the criteria for your bucket, you can select other calculated fields and their buckets to filter with. This is helpful for creating sophisticated logical combinations and customizations. 
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/dbc4381eae94901221b66c1621b5743a.png)
﻿
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)

Organization Setup
# How do I generate an API key?
6 min
Copy
This guide will cover how to generate and manage API keys on the [API Keys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/api/keys "API Keys") page in admin. Visit the [Ashby API Documentation](https://developers.ashbyhq.com "Ashby API Documentation") to learn how you can use your API keys.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-generate-an-api-key#api-keys-overview)API keys overview
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-generate-an-api-key#create-new-keys)Create new keys
To create an API key, head to Admin>Integrations>[API Keys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/api/keys "API Keys").
Click + New to open the API key setup wizard. You’ll be asked to name your key and have the option to select your Integration Partner _._
Next, you’ll be asked to select your endpoint permissions. By default, the key will have no permissions.
You can use the checkboxes to allow access to each module and determine whether read or write access should be provided to that module. You can hover over the _i_ icon beside each module to view the endpoints that can be accessed.
You will also have the option to allow access to your confidential jobs.
Once you’ve chosen your scopes, click Save and Continue. You’ll then be able to copy your API key on the final step.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/926e86fe5c40b305939d71108b16260b.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c43b300da80155d91827b47591060b63.png)
﻿
Please note you will not be able to copy your key again after closing out the setup wizard. If you forget or misplace a key, you will need to generate a new one.
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-generate-an-api-key#view-key-details)View key details
Once a key is generated, you can click it to review the details including who created it, the date and time it was added, and the last time it was used.
You can click Configure API Key Permissions to adjust access.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bd45896f1a0777e2569cec74eee9f7a2.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-generate-an-api-key#disable-keys)Disable keys
To disable a key, click on the key name, then click the Disable button. This can not be undone.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/54ef303f8eeb64e93f95b1d8583da826.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-generate-an-api-key#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-generate-an-api-key#can-i-copy-a-key-again-after-closing-the-setup-wiz)Can I copy a key again after closing the setup wizard?
You won't be able to view or copy keys after closing the setup wizard, so please be sure to copy before closing. We'll remind you before you close a window if the key is not on your clipboard.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-generate-an-api-key#what-is-the-api-rate-limit)W**hat is the API rate limit?**
The API rate limit is 1000 requests per minute per API key.
﻿

# How do I change the archive reason on an archived job consideration?
3 min
Copy
If you’ve already archived a candidate but would like to change the archive reasons﻿ listed on their job consideration, complete the following steps:
  * Navigate to the candidate’s profile and to the job consideration in question


  * On the Activities & Progress tab of their profile, locate the Interview Progress section


  * Click on the archive reason listed underneath the Archive stage of their interview progress


  * Select the correct reason from the list of existing archive reasons - your changes should be saved automatically


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ab2000110c12054bfe8887d0f29630f3.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-change-the-archive-reason-on-an-archived-job-consideration#where-do-i-set-up-a-new-archive-reason)**Where do I set up a new archive reason?**
You can add and/or edit archive reasons by heading to Admin > Jobs & Applications > [Archive Reasons](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/candidate-archive-reasons "Archive Reasons"). Click + New to add a new archive reason, or click on an existing archive reason to make any edits.
If creating a new archive reason, you will need to specify a reason and reason type for reporting purposes.
For more information on best practices for configuring archive reasons, check out [Best Practices: Managing & Analyzing Archive Reasons](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/best-practices-managing-and-analyzing-archive-reasons)﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b2eab6ffb6670154b513fcaf98f84e4a.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-change-the-archive-reason-on-an-archived-job-consideration#can-i-change-archive-reasons-on-archived-job-consi)**Can I change archive reasons on archived job considerations in bulk?**
You can, yes. To change archive reasons in bulk:
  * Navigate to the Candidate Pipeline section of your job


  * Select the Archived stage and use the checkboxes to select the candidate job considerations you’d like to update


  * Click Change Archive Reason


  * Select the new archive reason from the New Archive Reason dropdown


  * Click Start Change Archive Reason on X Records


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9399107c40a0b70fd3eeb99f968f5f17.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b5ae9e368695c2f787974da010069f11.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿

# Getting Started for Sourcers
13 min
Copy
Welcome to Ashby! We couldn't be more excited to help you get started. This guide will cover the most common ways sourcers use Ashby.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#log-in-to-ashby)Log In to Ashby
To sign in, head to [https://app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com/ "https://app.ashbyhq.com"). Ashby uses Google sign-in, Microsoft 365 sign-in and magic links. If your company has SSO set up with Ashby, please use this option to log in. More on signing in can be found at [Signing in to Ashby](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/signing-in-to-ashby)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#configure-your-personal-settings)Configure your personal settings
A key first step is configuring your personal settings in Ashby. In [Personal Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/personal-info "Personal Settings"), you can do the following:
  * Set your personal info, including your job title, user avatar, timezone and social links


  * Set your notification settings - determine the activities you should be notified about and where you'd like to be notified


  * Set up personal email templates


  * Set up OAuth if needed (please confirm with your admin if this needs to be completed as part of your Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 setup)


For a full walkthrough, please check out [Updating Personal Settings](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/updating-personal-settings)﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#navigate-ashby)Navigate Ashby
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#home-page)Home Page
If you will only be interviewing candidates in the pipeline and won't have any other interaction with candidates, then you'll likely have Limited Access in Ashby. 
To get started, log in to Ashby at [https://app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com/ "https://app.ashbyhq.com") using one of the login options. You should already have an account set up. Once logged in, you'll land on your home page, where you'll be able to access interview briefings and tasks. For a full breakdown of the home page, please check out [Home Page](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/home-page)﻿
**Add and track referrals**
To submit referrals﻿:
  * Head to the Referrals section of the [Home](https://app.ashbyhq.com/home/upcoming "Home") page


  * Click + Referral


  * Creating a direct referral? Click Add Direct Referral then complete the referral form with the candidate details.


  * Creating a referral link? Click Create Referral Link and give your referral link a title. You can then opt to link to a specific job posting using the Link to specific job posting? checkbox and selecting a job posting from the dropdown


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/26278f4b47c38aac31f08c40ab4ba5c3.png)
﻿
﻿  

Our full guide on referrals can be found at [Referrals and Referral Links](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/referrals-and-referral-links)﻿﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#candidate-profile)Candidate Profile
Depending on the permissions you are given, you may have access to view candidate profiles and take action on job considerations. For further information on navigating a candidate profile, check out [Candidate Profile](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-profile)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#candidate-pipeline)Candidate Pipeline
The Pipeline Overviewprovides you a view of candidates across all positions you have access to and allows you to quickly jump between them. 
For more on the pipeline view, check out [Candidate Pipeline](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-pipeline)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#jobs-dashboard-view)Jobs - Dashboard View
The Job Dashboard at Jobs > [Dashboard](https://app.ashbyhq.com/jobs/pipelines "Dashboard") is a high-level overview of the active jobs you follow, have a role on, and have access to. You can also access the Admin page and Job Board from this page. We recommend bookmarking this page to quickly see all of your active jobs in one place.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7b273a2cee774b2dd7e373ee143c5799.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#common-ashby-areas-for-sourcers)Common Ashby Areas for Sourcers
This section will walk you through the key activities you'll complete as a Sourcer including creating and sending outbound email sequences, sourcing candidates from LinkedIn with the [Chrome Extension](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/chrome-extension)﻿, and bulk importing leads via email or CSV file. We also support integrating with other sourcing platforms; find the full list in the [Integrations Marketplace](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/integrations/marketplace "Integrations Marketplace") (you will need Organization Admin access to view the integrations marketplace).
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#create-and-send-outbound-sequences)Create and send outbound sequences
**You can create a send outbound email with features like:**
  * **Sending emails on behalf of other users** - you can request access to other team members’ email addresses, and send sequences as them for a more personal touch.


  * **Linking sequences to jobs** - you can link sequences to jobs to enable enrolling leads in both in one step.


  * **Auto-advancing and archiving** - leads will advance through lead stages based on your email communication. If they never follow up you can use job-sequence linking to automatically archive their consideration.


  * **Custom tokens** - we support default and custom tokens including a default personalization token that can be embedded in the sequence. Capture a few notes while reviewing a person’s profile, then send them an email that’s already unique to them!


For more on configuring and sending sequences, check out [Sequences](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sequences)﻿ and [Sequences: InMail and Connection Request Stages](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sequences-inmail-and-connection-request-stages)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#use-the-ashby-chrome-extension)Use the Ashby Chrome Extension
**You can quickly source candidates from LinkedIn with options to:**
  * **Create lead profiles with one click** - visit a person’s profile, open the extension and click Add to Ashby to create a profile that captures email communication, applications, and more in one place.


  * **Add leads to jobs,** projects﻿**, and** sequences﻿ - you can add a person to a job or to a relevant talent pool if you’d like to get in touch with them later.


  * **Mention team members in notes to prompt them to review** - you can create notes and tasks for team members by @mentioning them.


  * **Add tags, schedule follow-ups, and more!**


For more on the Ashby Chrome extension, check out [Chrome Extension](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/chrome-extension)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#create-talent-pools-with-projects)Create talent pools with projects
**Keep track of leads in** projects﻿**, and take the following bulk actions:**
  * **Emails and** sequences﻿ - keep leads warm by messaging them using one-off emails or enrolling them in sequences.


  * **Enroll in jobs** - When you’re ready, add them to jobs.


Check out [Projects](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects)﻿ for a more detailed overview on project setup
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#bulk-import-lists-of-candidates-required-organizat)Bulk import lists of candidates (required Organization Admin access)
Import many candidates at once with the following options:
  * **Email import** - attach up to 10 resumes at a time to an email and send it to a job-specific address to create candidate profiles.


  * **CSV import** - upload any number of candidates in a CSV file.


For more on importing data, check out [Bulk Import Options](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/bulk-import-options)﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers#my-profile-picture-has-synced-over-from-google-wor)My profile picture has synced over from Google Workspace but it’s very pixelated. Why?
Images synced over from Google Workspace do not have a high enough resolution. As such, we’d recommend users upload their avatar within [Personal Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/personal-info "Personal Settings") to fix this.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3bd9ae2c6b84fa648351e2310d15c63c.png)
﻿
﻿

# Getting Started for Recruiters
15 min
Copy
Welcome to Ashby! We couldn't be more excited to help you get started using Ashby as a recruiter. This guide assumes your team’s Ashby account has been setup using the [Ashby Admin Onboarding](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-admin-onboarding)﻿ guide, and will cover how to navigate Ashby and use the most commonly used features for recruiters.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#log-in-to-ashby)Log In to Ashby
To sign in, head to [https://app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com/ "https://app.ashbyhq.com"). Ashby uses Google sign-in, Microsoft 365 sign-in and magic links. If your company has SSO set up with Ashby, please use this option to log in. More on signing in can be found at [Signing in to Ashby](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/signing-in-to-ashby)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#configure-your-personal-settings)Configure your personal settings
A key first step is configuring your personal settings in Ashby. In [Personal Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/personal-info "Personal Settings"), you can do the following:
  * Set your personal info, including your job title, user avatar, timezone and social links


  * Set your notification settings - determine the activities you should be notified about and where you'd like to be notified


  * Set up personal email templates


  * Set up OAuth if needed (please confirm with your admin if this needs to be completed as part of your Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 setup)


For a full walkthrough, please check out [Updating Personal Settings](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/updating-personal-settings)﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#navigate-ashby)Navigate Ashby
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#home-page)Home Page
If you will only be interviewing candidates in the pipeline and won't have any other interaction with candidates, then you'll likely have Limited Access in Ashby. 
To get started, log in to Ashby at [https://app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com/ "https://app.ashbyhq.com") using one of the login options. You should already have an account set up. Once logged in, you'll land on your home page, where you'll be able to access interview briefings and tasks. For a full breakdown of the home page, please check out [Home Page](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/home-page)﻿
**Add and track referrals**
To submit referrals﻿:
  * Head to the Referrals section of the [Home](https://app.ashbyhq.com/home/upcoming "Home") page


  * Click + Referral


  * Creating a direct referral? Click Add Direct Referral then complete the referral form with the candidate details.


  * Creating a referral link? Click Create Referral Link and give your referral link a title. You can then opt to link to a specific job posting using the Link to specific job posting? checkbox and selecting a job posting from the dropdown


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/26278f4b47c38aac31f08c40ab4ba5c3.png)
﻿
﻿  

Our full guide on referrals can be found at [Referrals and Referral Links](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/referrals-and-referral-links)﻿﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#candidate-profile)Candidate Profile
Depending on the permissions you are given, you may have access to view candidate profiles and take action on job considerations. For further information on navigating a candidate profile, check out [Candidate Profile](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-profile)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#candidate-pipeline)Candidate Pipeline
The Pipeline Overviewprovides you a view of candidates across all positions you have access to and allows you to quickly jump between them. 
For more on the pipeline view, check out [Candidate Pipeline](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-pipeline)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#jobs-dashboard-view)Jobs - Dashboard View
The Job Dashboard at Jobs > [Dashboard](https://app.ashbyhq.com/jobs/pipelines "Dashboard") is a high-level overview of the active jobs you follow, have a role on, and have access to. You can also access the Admin page and Job Board from this page. We recommend bookmarking this page to quickly see all of your active jobs in one place.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7b273a2cee774b2dd7e373ee143c5799.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#navigate-admin)Navigate Admin
If you have Organization Admin access, this section covers the settings you can customize in the Admin section of Ashby.
Many of the features you use in Ashby can be customized in Admin. This quick tour covers:
  1. Where you can adjust user permissions (on the [Employees](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/users "Employees") page).


  1. Customizing the interview process including [interview plans](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interview-plans "interview plans"), [interviews](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/interviews "interviews"), and [feedback forms.](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/feedback-forms "feedback forms.")﻿


  1. Customize more settings including [archive reasons](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/candidate-archive-reasons "archive reasons"), [email templates](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/email-templates "email templates"), and [custom fields.](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/custom-fields "custom fields.")﻿


  1. Bulk import candidates using [email or CSV import.](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/bulk-import-options)﻿﻿


﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#common-use-cases)Common Use Cases
This section will walk you through the key activities you'll complete as a recruiter from opening and posting jobs to adding candidates to your HRIS.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#opening-and-posting-jobs)Opening and posting jobs
To create a job, navigate to [Jobs→Admin](https://app.ashbyhq.com/jobs/all "Jobs→Admin"), then click the Create a Job button and follow the steps in the job creation wizard. At this point, you can open the job right away — or configure it further. In the Settings section, there are further configuration options on four tabs.
When you're ready to open the job, click the _Job Status_ button and selectMark as Open. An open job isn't automatically posted to your Ashby job board or any third-party job boards but you will be able to add candidates to the pipeline.
When you're ready to post the job to your job board, you can set up a job posting on the Job Postings tab. You can create as many postings as you'd like for a job. Once published, the posting will show up on your Ashby job board (e.g., jobs.asbhyhq.com/ashby).
For a full guide on creating a job and job postings, check out [Creating & Posting Jobs](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/l-NcIsZrB9ztdr4U3idZr)﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#advancing-and-archiving-candidates)Advancing and Archiving Candidates
💡 More about advancing and archiving candidates in [Application Review](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/application-review)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#scheduling-interviews)Scheduling Interviews
With Ashby, you can schedule interviews manually, or create a structured interview process that automates the details of finding times and creating calendar invites. 
For the full details of setting up and scheduling interviews, check out [Scheduling & Interviews: An Introduction](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduling-and-interviews-an-introduction)﻿ to view the options available.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#generating-offers-and-offer-letters)Generating offers and offer letters
When a candidate moves to the Offer stage in the candidate pipeline, an offer activity will be generated in the Activities section of their candidate profile. Click Create Offer to complete the Offer Details form. The form data will be used to populate substitution fields in the Offer Letter PDF that is generated. 
You can also send out e-signature requests (sent via DropBox Sign) and create offer letter templates to help structure your processes further. 
For a full guide, check out [Offers and Offer Letters](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offers-and-offer-letters)﻿ and [E-Signature Offers](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers)﻿﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#add-candidates-to-your-hris)Add Candidates to your HRIS
When a candidate accepts an offer, you see an option to push hired candidates to your HRIS system. Clicking the button that appears will create a new Employee in the system, including the latest Offer data.
All HRIS integration options can be found in the [Integrations Marketplace](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/integrations/marketplace "Integrations Marketplace").
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters#my-profile-picture-has-synced-over-from-google-wor)My profile picture has synced over from Google Workspace but it’s very pixelated. Why?
Images synced over from Google Workspace do not have a high enough resolution. As such, we’d recommend users upload their avatar within [Personal Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/personal-info "Personal Settings") to fix this.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3bd9ae2c6b84fa648351e2310d15c63c.png)
﻿
﻿

ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI Tokens in Outreach Emails
7 min
Copy
You can opt-in to use these in the [Opt-In Features](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/early-access "Opt-In Features") section of Admin.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails#ai-token-overview)AI token overview
Our AI tokens enhance your sourcing outreach emails by injecting an AI powered token that contextualizes and generates copy using your job posting and the candidate's resume.
New to sequences? Check out our [Sequences](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sequences)﻿ guide to get started.
To enable the AI email token feature, head to Admin > Organization Setup > Opt-In Features. You will need to opt-in to use AI features in order to enable the Email Tokens option.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2791f1c9ae3f943ca19fef243221076b.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails#adding-the-ai-token)Adding the AI token
When creating or editing a [Sequence](https://app.ashbyhq.com/sourcing/sequence-templates "Sequence"), click on the T icon on the email toolbar to access substitution tokens. From there, search for the AI Generated Sourcing Outreach token and add it to the body of your email.
The AI token is context-aware of its placement within the email body. As such, the token will take into account the preceding text and personalize accordingly if added within a sentence. It can also be used for a standalone paragraph within an email.
﻿
Link your email sequence to a job to ensure the AI token factors in the associated job description in its text generation. There’s more on this at [Sequences](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sequences)﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails#drafting-outreach-with-the-ai-token)Drafting outreach with the AI Token
Once you’ve added the token to your sequence, text will be automatically generated when enrolling the lead or candidate in a sequence. The AI token will also automatically generate text for sequences drafted within the Chrome extension. Once the text has been generated, you will then be presented with the following three options:
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/54fc50b18ce901df1f4aa031eab5437e.png)
﻿
  1. Click the checkmark to approve the suggestion.


  1. Click the grey icon to request another suggestion. It can take a few seconds for a new suggestion to be generated.


  1. Click the trash can icon to remove the token and suggestion.


You will need to approve the suggestion (using the checkmark icon) or remove the token (using the trash can icon) before the sequence can be started.
After accepting the suggestion, you will have the option to edit the email body in the sequence before sending it.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails#i-have-an-ai-token-in-my-sequence-and-im-unable-to)I have an AI token in my sequence and I’m unable to start the sequence - why?
Suggestions from the AI token will need to be approved or removed before a sequence can be started. Be sure to check all stages and all recipients for suggestions that need action taken on them. Each recipient and stage of the sequence will display whether action is required. The Start X Sequences button will also be greyed out if action needs to be taken.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/53d3474b0fadd6a5c2f84f314288f33d.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails#if-i-use-ai-tokens-in-my-sequence-is-this-counted)If I use AI tokens in my sequence, is this counted against my credits for the AI-Assisted Application Review tool?
No, using AI tokens in sequences will not take up credits for the AI-Assisted Application Review tool.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails#can-i-add-an-ai-generated-feedback-summary-token-t)Can I add an AI-Generated Feedback Summary token to an email template?
You can - you can read more about this token at [AI-Generated Feedback Summaries](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries)﻿.
﻿
