# Exporting Reports and Dashboards
9 min
Copy
This guide gives an overview of the various report and dashboard export options.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#overview)Overview
Ashby supports exporting both reports and dashboards. Depending on the report type, different export formats may be available. Some reports support only a PDF export if there is a bespoke graphical format or table summary, and some support raw data export in the CSV format. Dashboards exports are available as PDF and CSV files.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#report-export)Report export
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#export-reports-directly-from-a-dashboard)Export reports directly from a dashboard
When viewing any report from a dashboard, you can click the three dots in the top-right corner of the report, then Go To Report to view the report and export it. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/p-BAY0pocsl8HKR_85O7S_ashby-example-sourcing-activity-acent-ashby-2026-05-14-at-92322-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
An Export option shows in the top-right corner of the report, underneath the More button.
![Screenshot showing the Export option in the top-right corner of a report, underneath the More button.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/7u1OSCXCJQTTnmt82lpxu_report-export-option.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#exporting-a-visual-report)Exporting a visual report
If your report is a visual report (bar chart, pie chart, etc.), you can export it in PNG, SVG, and PDF formats. You can also include or remove the title from the export and determine the size prior to exporting. Click Export to export the report with your configured settings.
![Setting the export file type for the report](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/_dnKTciQXesmLw8IWcKvc_export-visual-report-options.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can change the format of the report in the **Visualization** section of the report. This updates the export.
![A screenshot of the visualization section of a report.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/9bkkTEDochs-dz9IsqTti_pipeline-history-last-3-months-report-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-100847-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#export-raw-data-as-a-csv)Export raw data as a CSV
If you are exporting a table report that isn't a passthrough report, clicking the Export button when viewing the report exports it in CSV format. No pop-up appears to configure further settings.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#export-passthrough-reports)Export passthrough reports
Passthrough reports involve a customized visualization that is available for PDF export only. The CSV export includes the raw data that goes into the passthrough calculation, but given the complexity of the report configuration options, the exact passthrough report results do not easily fit into a CSV format.
When you click Export on a passthrough report, the PDF exports immediately. As with custom list reports, there are no export setting options.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#exports-not-currently-supported)Exports not currently supported
Two report types do not currently support convenient export:
  * ﻿[Candidate pipeline](https://app.ashbyhq.com/reports/explore/pipeline "Candidate pipeline") template report


  * ﻿[Candidate list](https://app.ashbyhq.com/candidate-searches/new "Candidate list") report


Both of these reports involve custom visual displays in table formats that do not lend themselves to convenient export formats. The same underlying information can be generated through custom lists or other report types.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#automated-delivery-of-reports)Automated delivery of reports
If you would like to have report results automatically delivered via Slack or email, check out our [Alerts](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/alerts)﻿ feature.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#dashboard-export)Dashboard export
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#export-a-dashboard-as-a-pdf-a-csv-or-both)Export a dashboard as a PDF, a CSV, or both
To export your dashboard:
  1. Navigate to the dashboard you'd like to export within **Dashboards > Saved Dashboards**.


If you are accessing the dashboard from a pin on your home page, click the Edit button on the dashboard to be taken to the dashboard view that allows you to export.
![The route to navigate to a dashboard from a pin on the home page.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/MN1ygrrRYJS9CsDzO_WVy_active-jobs-candidates-and-offers-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-94459-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If you have View Only access to the dashboard, click Go To Dashboard instead.
  1. Click More, then Export.


![More, then Export on a dashboard](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/E7z5s5iHV_xXZ0tGLAvmX_exporting-a-dashboard.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Determine whether you'd like to export the dashboard as a PDF, CSV, or download both.


  1. Click Export.


![A screenshot showing the popover where the export file type is selected for a dashboard.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Out1BJwi0xY009jFt6EV5-20260514-081816.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/exporting-reports-and-dashboards#limitations-of-a-dashboard-pdf-export-truncated-re)Limitations of a dashboard PDF export: truncated report results
The dashboard PDF export is a visual snapshot of displayed results. This means that some information may be truncated. For example, Candidate Pipeline or Custom List reports often have very lengthy sets of information. Only the data visible in the dashboard's report tile will be included in the dashboard PDF export.

Surveys & Questionnaires
# Candidate Experience Surveys
20 min
Copy
You can use [Candidate Experience Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/surveys/candidate-experience "Candidate Experience Surveys") to capture feedback from your candidates at any point in the interview process. Candidate Experience Surveys support standard survey question types and NPS Rating and Linear Rating question types.
Candidate Experience Surveys can be configured on all plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ✅  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#candidate-experience-surveys-overview)Candidate Experience Surveys Overview
Ashby supports the ability to send candidate experience surveys to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Users can create and customize any number of surveys and configure rules for how and when to collect them from candidates. You can then analyze the results of these surveys to make your recruitment process more effective.
See the table below for more information on the access roles that have the ability to set up surveys in Ashby and who can send out a survey to a candidate.  
| Access Role  | Can Configure Surveys?  | Can Send Out Surveys to Candidates?  | Can view candidate survey responses on the candidate profile?  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Agency Users  | ❌  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ❌  | ✅  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ❌  | ✅  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin Private  | ❌  | ✅  | ✅  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#set-up-your-survey)Set up your survey
You can set up candidate experience surveys in Admin > Jobs & Applications > Candidate Surveys. Click + New on the Candidate Experience tab to create a new survey.
![You can create new surveys and edit their questions in the Admin Section of the app.  You can also configure Automation Settings to set up rules to automatically schedule emails with links to the surveys.](https://cdn.zappy.app/ccd6e9847f9b1a9b20d901140bd66528.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#add-questions-to-your-survey)**Add questions to your survey**
Candidate experience surveys can be configured to have many of the standard question types (e.g. short answer, multiple-choice, etc.), but also include a couple of new types:
  * NPS Rating: A survey can have only one NPS Rating question. This is a question on the standard NPS scale from 0 to 10. Toggle for more details.


  * Scores of 9 or 10 are considered promoters


  * Scores of 7 or 8 are considered passive


  * Scores of 6 or below are considered detractors


![An NPS Rating question.  You can edit the question and the labels on the rating scale.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/dUKLzSB-4LirtSCW26R2k_screenshot2022-01-28at92323am.png?format=webp)
﻿
  * An NPS Rating question. You can edit the question and the labels on the rating scale.


  * Linear Rating: A survey can have any number of Linear Rating questions. This is also a question on a 0 to 10 scale, but you cannot benchmark them across different candidate experience surveys. Toggle for more details.


  * You can use these to ask more detailed rating-type questions of your candidates


![Use a Linear Rating question to ask additional rating scale type questions on your surveys.  You can edit the question and the labels on the scale.](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/-mYB2KobEh7jrAP0BrpC3_screenshot2022-01-28at92749am.png)
﻿
  * Use a _Linear Rating_ question to ask additional rating scale type questions on your surveys. You can edit the question and the labels on the scale.


**Configure your survey submission mode**
Go to the Settings section on any Candidate Experience Survey to update the Survey Submission Mode
There are 4 different survey submission modes:
  1. Do Not Allow Anonymous Submission - All submissions will be tied to the Candidate and visible on the Candidate Profile.


  1. Allow Anonymous Submission - The candidate can opt into an anonymous submission:


  1. When you Allow Anonymous Submission, candidates will see a final question at the end of the survey allowing them to choose whether to submit feedback anonymously or not.


  1. Enforce Anonymous Submission - All submissions will be anonymous


![Go to the Settings section on any Candidate Experience Survey to update the Survey Submission Mode](https://cdn.zappy.app/b7e2170bb6b8df7a6907a2b00a201861.png)
﻿
Candidate experience surveys can be set to be submitted anonymously on the Settings tab of a survey. Anonymized surveys can be viewed by visiting [Reports>Candidate Experience Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/surveys/candidate-experience/responses "Reports>Candidate Experience Surveys"). Submissions that aren’t anonymized can be viewed both on the Candidate Experience Surveys page and on the Candidate Profile on the Forms tab.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#send-your-survey)Send your survey
Candidate experience surveys can be sent in two different ways
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#by-directly-requesting-surveys-from-the-candidate)By directly requesting surveys from the candidate profile
You can directly request a survey by doing the following:
  * On the candidate profile, click the More dropdown 


  * Select Create a Candidate Experience Survey Request


  * You will be asked to choose which survey to send and which application it should be associated with. 


  * Create the survey request using the Create button, or optionally also schedule an email with a link to the survey using the Create and Email button.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/34a2bbbc223628f353e86a5aaf054a26.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/385fcd9bbad3a29f37f8375b13f0ee9d.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#by-setting-up-automation-rules-to-schedule-sending)By setting up automation rules to schedule sending the survey to a candidate when certain conditions are met. 
You can setup automation rules so that you don’t need to directly request surveys from candidates manually. Instead, you can set up a series of conditions that trigger an email with a survey link to be drafted up, scheduled and sent to a candidate.
You can setup automation rules for a survey within theAutomation section of the candidate experience survey in question.
Our article on [Utilizing Stage Groups](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/utilizing-stage-groups)﻿ walks through the different fields you can select to customize the automation.
To set up automation for your candidate experience survey:
  * Create a new draft configuration of automation rules by clicking Create a Draft Configuration


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/80d0a63c482becfd8c4ba69eb04b583b.png)
﻿
  * Specify your conditions by clicking + Add Field to Match, choosing fields and then creating filters based on those


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c63edf4b0c3bd65545d9f559a35058f1.png)
﻿
  * Select an email template from the Email Template dropdown that will be used to send out your survey


  * Configure any email delay using the Delay dropdown


  * Specify a sender email address


  * Activate the configuration


  * Toggle on the Enable Survey Automation toggle once the draft has been activated


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7903fa33ba5f85fac160c8f8507b6af3.png)
﻿
The conditions of each rule will get checked whenever a candidate changes stages. Ashby will find the first rule that matches and a survey will be created and an email with a link to the survey will be scheduled.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#example-rules-for-survey-automation)Example rules for survey automation
Below is an example rule. This rule would only schedule a survey request when a candidate is hired or archived and only if they reached the Onsite stage.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/54e6a05b2da081b2a6a0e0ea14d241bf.png)
﻿
Below is another example - This automation will send a survey when a candidate is archived or hired as long as they have passed through the Recruiter Screen stage and have completed an interview loop.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/49f5580b8f9278abd2e5c13aea4b2ec7.png)
﻿
Here a specific stage name has been selected - if you have a grouped interview plan (more on this at [What is a grouped interview plan?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/what-is-a-grouped-interview-plan)﻿), you can also select the Job’s Considerations Passed Through Stage Group filter to select a group instead.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#view-your-results)View your results
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#viewing-individual-results)Viewing individual results
You can view individual survey results on the Forms tab on the candidate profile. Only Organization Admins or users with Elevated Access - Admin Private permissions will be able to see individual answers to the survey.
![Screen Shot 2022-01-28 at 10.37.58 AM.png](https://cdn.zappy.app/62ebd2bd7119c463b3d82fedeefe2ff4.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#view-all-survey-results)View all survey results
Navigate to [Reports > Candidate Experience Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/surveys/candidate-experience/responses "Reports > Candidate Experience Surveys") to view survey results across candidates.
![All responses can be found here regardless of Survey Submission Mode.  You can review surveys as they come in and save custom filters to simplify reviewing key responses.](https://cdn.zappy.app/07f224145a38b2059b223833f83f696f.png)
﻿
All responses can be found here regardless of Survey Submission Mode. You can review surveys as they come in and save custom filters to simplify reviewing key responses.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#reporting-and-analysis)Reporting and analysis
You can report on the questions in a candidate experience survey in our standard reports. When building your report in Reports, the fields will be available with the Job Consideration subject under Candidate Experience Survey.
![Screen Shot 2022-01-28 at 10.41.03 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/oYy6_x0DqI29Y3I2MdWHb_screenshot2022-01-28at104103am.png?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#candidate-nps-score-report)Candidate NPS Score Report
Additionally, there is an available template report that will allow you to visualize your company’s NPS score over time using the standard formula. The formula is:
% of promoters - % of detractors
and will always give a score from -100 to 100.
![You can find a prebuilt report template called Candidate NPS Score.  It displays the NPS Score according to the standard formula: % of promoters - % of detractors, giving a score from -100 to 100.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/eEeUNE24cKWjK4-P89-dB_screenshot2022-01-28at104252am.png?format=webp)
﻿
You can find a prebuilt report template called Candidate NPS Score. It displays the NPS Score according to the standard formula: % of promoters - % of detractors, giving a score from -100 to 100.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#useful-workflows-recipes)Useful Workflows & Recipes
Below are some useful workflows with candidate experience surveys:
![We recommend starting with a simple automation rule for sending out Candidate Experience surveys.  This rule ensures that you send emails to candidates who had at least reached an Onsite Stage Group before being Archived or Hired.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/nym2pFAMLVFXVpEhVlQof_screenshot2022-04-08at42530pm.png?format=webp)
﻿
We recommend starting with a simple automation rule for sending out Candidate Experience surveys. This rule ensures that you send emails to candidates who had at least reached an Onsite stage group before being Archived or Hired.
![To get a better understanding of how applicants feel about your recruitment process, create a Custom List Report on Job Considerations to show the applicants that were detractors based on their candidate experience survey submissions.  You can even setup an alert to ensure you know about any bad experiences and can click through the table results to see each Candidate’s individual responses.](https://cdn.zappy.app/407af3382cf1bbf04bded2e94e0ec115.png)
﻿
To get a better understanding of how applicants feel about your recruitment process, create a [custom list report](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/custom-reports#custom-list)﻿ on Job Considerations to show the applicants that were detractors based on their candidate experience survey submissions. You can even setup an [alert](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/alerts)﻿ to ensure you know about any bad experiences and can click through the table results to see each Candidate’s individual responses.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#how-do-i-view-pending-surveys)How do I view pending surveys?
You can view any pending survey requests on the candidate profile under Current Activities. From here you can email the survey again or delete the request.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3d10f96e91a9a0f18751261b50df85f6.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#what-does-the-survey-look-like-to-the-candidate)What does the survey look like to the candidate?
When a candidate follows the link in a survey request email, they’ll be brought to a page where they can fill in the survey. This survey will use the same brand elements as the Direct Booking Landing page. These are configured on the Theme page in Admin (see [Set up your job board theme ](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup)﻿)
![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/_Xq2rfVPuaa6B2WG6uGve_screenshot2022-01-28at103618am.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#how-do-i-view-all-candidate-experience-surveys-in)How do I view all Candidate Experience Surveys in one place?
Navigate to [Reports > Candidate Experience Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/surveys/candidate-experience/responses "Reports > Candidate Experience Surveys") to view surveys across candidates
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#when-are-a-surveys-automation-conditions-evaluated)W**hen are a survey’s automation conditions evaluated?**
The conditions in survey delivery automation settings are evaluated during stage transition events. This means a candidate will need to be moved forward to the next stage or archived in order for a survey to be sent.
The survey will be sent out to the candidate when it is first established they meet the criteria. If they move to the next stage and also meet the criteria when they progress, the survey will not be sent out again.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#who-can-view-candidate-experience-survey-responses)Who can view Candidate Experience Survey responses?
Organization Admins or Elevated Access users with an Admin Private role can view Candidate Experience Survey responses.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys#what-happens-to-the-survey-automation-if-you-archi)What happens to the survey automation if you archive someone, and then unarchive them for the same job consideration?
In this case, the survey will still be sent out to the candidate. You can opt to manually delete the survey request from the candidate’s profile if needed.
﻿

ai-notetaker-security-faq:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI Notetaker: Security FAQ
7 min
Copy
This guide contains frequently asked questions concerning the AI Notetaker and security and compliance.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#what-ai-models-are-used-to-support-ai-features)W**hat AI Models are used to support AI features?**
We currently use OpenAI (via OpenAI’s API) and Anthropic (via AWS Bedrock).
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#is-ashbys-ai-notetaker-compliant-with-the-gdpr)I**s Ashby’s AI Notetaker compliant with the GDPR?**
Yes. Ashby ensures that its processing of the personal data of EU and UK residents is fully compliant with all applicable data protection laws, including the GDPR.
In particular, Ashby enters into data processing agreements with customers processing the personal data of EU and UK residents that incorporates the standard contractual clauses (SCCs) adopted by the European Commission pursuant to its Implementing Decision (EU) 2021/914 of 4 June 2021, including all modules governing controller-to-processor transfers of personal data. Further, Ashby has completed a Data Transfer Impact Assessment (DTIA) that assesses the laws and practices of the US that could impinge on the effectiveness of the SCCs as a transfer tool, consistent with the _Schrems II_ ruling by the Court of Justice of the European Union.
Ashby is certified, and maintains its certification, pursuant to the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (DPF), the UK extension to the EU-U.S. DPF, and the Swiss-U.S. DPF. All transfers of personal data from the EU, UK or Switzerland are made pursuant to the DPF or the SCCs.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#will-we-need-to-update-our-privacy-policy-or-notif)W**ill we need to update our privacy policy or notify candidates explicitly that AI is being used during interviews?**
Customers should consult with their legal and privacy teams to determine their privacy policy, disclosure policy, and consent policy.
Customers should consider in particular their obligations to disclose that interviews are being recorded, obtain applicable consents (e.g., “two-party” consent requirements in the United States), and honor opt-outs. In the EU, if candidates interact with an AI assistant, deployers may have transparency obligations under the EU AI Act. Ashby provides in-product consent messaging and logging to support these customer obligations.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#where-are-video-audio-recordings-and-transcripts-s)W**here are video / audio recordings and transcripts stored? Are they stored on your servers, third-party providers, or another infrastructure?**
Recordings and meeting transcripts are stored on Ashby’s servers in the United States. Recordings are also stored with a third party service provider (that creates the original recording and transcript) for a short period of time so that Ashby has an opportunity to transfers files to its own servers after they are created. These files are deleted from the third party service provider within 7 days.
For more details on our storage practices, please refer to our [Trust Center](https://trust.ashbyhq.com/ "Trust Center"), which includes a list of Ashby subprocessors.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#is-there-an-option-to-automatically-delete-recordi)I**s there an option to automatically delete recordings after a certain period? Can we configure data retention policies ourselves?**
Yes. Data retention settings for recordings can be configured directly within the application to conform to your organization's data retention requirements. Customers with the AI Notetaker Add-on will be able to customize their data retention period for recordings. Customers should obtain their own legal advice to determine what data retention period should be used.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#who-has-access-to-the-recordings-and-transcription)W**ho has access to the recordings and transcriptions?**
By default, interviewers will be able to access their own recordings and transcripts for meetings in which they were scheduled to be a participant.
In order to access recordings and transcripts in which a user was not a participant, the user would be required to have one of the following permissions:
1. Access to the “Can See Meeting Recordings” permission stripe within the specific scope for a meeting (e.g., a specific Job, Department, or Location). OR 2. The “Admin Private” access role, which includes access to the “Can See Meeting Recordings” permission stripe.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#can-ashby-staff-or-third-party-vendors-view-record)C**an Ashby staff or third-party vendors view recordings or transcripts?**
Only Ashby staff that need access to provide support for and maintain AI Notetaker have access to recordings or transcripts.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#has-ashby-conducted-a-data-protection-impact-asses)H**as Ashby conducted a Data Protection Impact Assessment for this feature?**
Yes, however Ashby does not share DPIAs externally.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#is-there-a-security-whitepaper-or-dpa-addendum-spe)I**s there a security whitepaper or DPA addendum specifically covering AI Notetaker?**
Ashby’s DPA covers AI Notetaker’s recordings of interviews and preparation of related transcripts and summaries.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#can-recordings-be-deleted-upon-request)C**an recordings be deleted upon request?**
Yes. The option to delete a specific recording will be available to Admin users within Ashby soon. In the interim, you can email support@ashbyhq.com with any data deletion requests. After verifying that the requester has adequate permissions, Ashby will execute the deletion on your behalf.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#do-you-share-recordings-with-candidates-upon-reque)D**o you share recordings with candidates upon request?**
Ashby acts as a service provider/processor for its customers and does not proactively share candidate data with the candidate. If a data subject contacts Ashby directly, we refer them to the data controller.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#does-the-ai-notetaker-meet-iso-27001-soc-2-type-ii)D**oes the AI notetaker meet ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, and other audit standards?**
Ashby is audited annually in accordance with SOC2 Type II standards. The latest reports, along with any bridge letters, can be accessed via the [Trust Center](https://trust.ashbyhq.com/ "Trust Center").
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker-security-faq#how-does-ashby-comply-with-the-eu-ai-act-and-other)H**ow does Ashby comply with the EU AI Act and other AI-specific laws?**
_EU AI Act:_ While the EU AI Act classifies as “high risk” AI systems intended to be used for recruitment purposes (including to analyze and filter job applications and to evaluate candidates), AI Notetaker falls within certain exceptions, including AI systems “intended to perform a narrow procedural task” or “intended to perform a preparatory task.” Ashby will comply with the EU AI Act requirements that apply to all AI tools deployed in the EU market, including transparency and accountability requirements.
_State/local laws:_ Certain U.S. laws, such as the NYC Local Law 144, may apply if the customer uses AI outputs to evaluate candidates or substantially assist hiring decisions. These laws may trigger annual bias audit, public notices and candidate disclosure obligations for the customer. AI Notetaker does not trigger such obligations when used purely for recording/transcription/summarization, but customers must assess how their own use may implicate such laws.
﻿  

﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Offers & E-Signatures
# Offer Approvals
12 min
Copy
In this guide, you'll learn about managing offer approvals through Ashby. For more details on all approval options, check out [Approvals](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/approvals)﻿
Approvals can be set up on the Plus, Enterprise and Legacy Plus plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#offer-approvals-overview)Offer Approvals Overview
An approval process consists of a sequence of one or more approval steps, each of which must be completed before an offer can be created and sent to a candidate. Each approval step consists of one or more stakeholders who must approve the terms of the offer before moving on to the next step in the process.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#permissions-approval-creation-and-approving)Permissions: Approval Creation and Approving
See the table below for information on the permissions required to configure approvals and to be an approver.  
| Access Role  | Can configure an approval?  | Can make one-off edits to an approval process (if enabled)?  | Can be set as an approver?  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Agency Users  | ❌  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ❌  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ❌  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin Private  | ❌  | ✅  | ✅  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
💡
When an approval request is sent, the user can approve or reject the request from their email. They do not need to have a specific access role or level of permissions to approve or reject the approval request via email or via Slack. They will need to have at least Elevated Access to the role in question to be able to view the candidate’s profile prior to approving.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#create-an-approval-process)Create an Approval Process
To create an Approval Process, navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > [Approvals](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/approvals/offer "Approvals"). Click + New in the top right corner of the page to begin configuring.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4cd086d54b801cb9d1cfcb0d36bc0e62.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#approval-process-options)Approval Process Options
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/171a78e09364cd9efa3300202514d663.png)
﻿
This screenshot highlights the 5 configuration options for setting up an approval process:
  1. Active Offer Approval Processes - List of activated processes. If multiple processes have a scope that would apply to an offer, the one highest on this list will be used. You can drag and drop each process to re-prioritize as needed.


  1. Process Title - Here you can give the process a descriptive title.


  1. Scope - You can filter which offers this process applies to by matching against fields on the associated "job consideration". If an offer has multiple applicable processes, the process higher in the process list will be used. Click + Add Field to Match to add an additional filter to your scope.


  1. Steps - Here you can configure how many steps this process should have and which individuals should be included as approvers in each step.


  1. Stakeholder Options - Here you can configure how many of the approvers in a step are required to approve to advance to the next step.


  1. Create - Enable your process once configured


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#using-approvals)Using Approvals
Once approvals are activated, they will be applied to new offers. To use approvals, first, create the offer on the candidate’s profile. Fill out the offer details, then click Submit to confirm.
Next, review the approval process to confirm the correct approvers are list, then click Submit Request. The approvers will receive a notification prompting them to approve the offer. Once they submit their response, the process will move on to the next approver. Once all steps have been completed, an e-signature request and offer letter can be sent out to the candidate.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8907345efc067e7138a6809fd3f9bac3.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/dffd1700b69b81b7eb3c2a2aceb72ea8.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fabdf01fb7d71f46dec8eddfe475f470.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#what-types-of-notifications-can-the-reviewer-recei)What types of notifications can the reviewer receive?
Email and Slack. They will also see an approval task on their Home page when logging in.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#how-many-processes-can-i-have)How many processes can I have?
You can create unique approval processes which take effect under certain conditions. As only one approval process will apply to each offer, the order of processes in the list determines the priority with which these processes will take effect. You can optionally configure a default fallback process that runs when no other process applies.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#is-it-possible-to-set-the-hiring-manager-on-the-hi)Is it possible to set the ‘Hiring Manager’ on the hiring team of a job as an approver instead of selecting a specific person?
It is! You can now select a pool of users as approvers based on their role on the job. You can pick from pulling an approver from the Job Consideration’s Recruiters, Recruiting Coordinators, Sourcers and/or Hiring Managers.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/cfb3a9a7c0183b8e93399bc35cc76195.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#does-a-user-need-specific-permissions-to-provide-a)Does a user need specific permissions to provide approval?
When an approval request is sent, the user can approve or reject the request from their email. They do not need to have a specific access role or level of permissions to approve or reject the approval request via email or via Slack. They will need to have at least Elevated Access to the role in question to be able to view the candidate’s profile prior to approving.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#can-i-send-a-reminder-to-a-stakeholder-about-appro)Can I send a reminder to a stakeholder about approving an offer?
You can manually send out a reminder, yes! To do this, click View Offer on the candidate’s profile to view the offer details and approval process steps.
A Send Reminders option will show next to the step where approval is still needed, along with the stakeholder or stakeholders who have yet to approve. Click Send Reminders.
From here, you can determine the stakeholder/s that should receive the reminder and add in an additional message to go alongside the original approval request information if needed. Click Send Reminder to X Approvers to send out the reminder.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4e498c34803a424e42a4df041ba69786.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0e0c203b3491acc45adeb15a855ced8d.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b73db65534803edde70ee3821e21364d.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#can-a-user-be-ccd-in-to-receive-approval-notificat)Can a user be cc’d in to receive approval notifications?
Currently, only those involved in the approval process will be send notifications about the approval flow.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#if-an-admin-forces-through-an-approval-does-the-ap)If an admin forces through an approval, does the approver receive a notification?
The approver will not receive a notification but if they try to then click Approve they'll see that the approval already occurred and action is no longer needed.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#can-i-set-an-approval-chain-via-the-api)Can I set an approval chain via the API?
The enterprise offer approval API tool is only available on the Enterprise plan When creating an approval, you have the option to set it to be managed via the API.
To create an approval within Ashby, head to [Admin>Organization Setup>Approvals ](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/approvals/offer "Admin>Organization Setup>Approvals ")and click + New.
From now on, when an offer is created and submitted, a Waiting for external process message will show in the offer overview. This means that Ashby is waiting for an approval chain to be submitted via an API call.
Toggle on the Managed by the API? option in the Steps section. You can opt to set up criteria within the scope section if only offers who meet a certain criteria should be managed via the API.
This option is currently only available for offers.
Once the approval chain has been received, the approval steps will be added to the offer.
To pull data via the API to update the approval chain, you can use the approvalDefinition.update request. More on this [here](https://developers.ashbyhq.com/reference/approvaldefinitionupdate "here").
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7b2e0bb42c2e16d5024e9199c6fa2f32.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3636ea11a353dc3843f740533aa3f1b1.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/aef4fc68138f7fd88619dcf10b7957d8.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/79ee634485cdfa55f0cd9871157c0440.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#will-incomplete-or-blank-offer-fields-be-included)Will incomplete or blank offer fields be included in the email sent to an approver?
The offer approval email will only include fields that have been filled in, including offer custom fields.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#why-isnt-the-hired-stage-appearing-in-the-dropdown)Why isn’t the ‘Hired’ stage appearing in the dropdown when I click on ‘Change Stage’?
The Hired stage will not appear in the Change Stage dropdown if there are active Offer Approvals set up in the [Admin > Approvals > Offers section](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/approvals/offer "Admin > Approvals > Offers section"). You will need to complete the offer process by clicking the Offer Accepted option within the offer’s settings; once that has been done, the candidate’s stage will automatically change to Hired.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-approvals#why-am-i-seeing-the-message-approval-gap-detected)W**hy am I seeing the message “Approval gap detected! Not all Offers are protected by approval processes”?**
You’re seeing this message because all of your existing offer approvals have scopes applied. Scopes are rules that determine which offers need approval based on specific conditions (for example, salary amount, department, or location). If an offer doesn’t meet any of these conditions, it won’t be sent through an approval process, creating a gap. Ashby recommends creating a general (catch-all) approval process without scopes. This ensures that: 
  * All offers are protected by at least one approval process.


  * Scoped approval processes will still apply when their conditions are met.


  * Offers that don’t meet any scope conditions will fall back to the general approval process.


﻿

ai-report-interpretation:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI Report Interpretation
11 min
Copy
When drawing up a report, you may want to generate a summary of the results to assist with interpreting your data. If you're generating advanced reports, the AI report interpretation tool can help with comprehending the report you've built.
The AI report interpretation tool is available on the Foundations, Legacy Plus, Plus and Enterprise plans.  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ✅  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#overview)Overview
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#enabling-the-ai-report-interpretation-tool)Enabling the AI report interpretation tool
If you'd like to enable the AI report intepretation tool: 
  * Navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > [Opt-In Features](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/early-access "Opt-In Features").


  * Enable the Report Interpreter option


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/DsScMKWsV0Ccs62cYdlWo_opt-in-features-acent-ashby-2026-01-30-at-110121-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#using-the-ai-report-interpretation-tool-when-viewi)Using the AI report interpretation tool when viewing a report
Once you have the report interpretation tool enabled, when you navigate to a report or create a new report, you will see an additional Interpretation option.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/k0QqtVB6JcZa_WUexeoJj_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-22446-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Click Interpretation, then Explain Report to generate the report summary.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/r2GvK6HXBN_OVf2WhKyq7_count-over-time-every-week-job-considerations-report-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-23448-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Please note that the AI report intepretation tool will appear differently on reports using the old report builder view. When viewing report results in the old report view, click the sparkle icon to access the AI report interpreter. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/wOFDeU-eEOmqvYo9ckfgo_krishna-dm-ashby-slack-2026-01-29-at-22919-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
The summary and insights will appear on a pop-up on the right-hand side of the screen.
The AI report interpretation tool will then provide a summary of the report and some insights. The summary can help you confirm the report is configured correctly and the insights will help you interpret your results. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/JxY9H1tNn-4vMToc8smS2_count-over-time-every-week-job-considerations-report-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-23701-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can use the arrows to the right of each insight to open it for further information. The insight will also refer back to specific results to explain the interpretation. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/vhsM6D8g7WFiQRXRwDDzY_count-over-time-every-week-job-considerations-report-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-24434-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If you make adjustments to your report (for example, adding or removing a filter), then the report will show as out of sync.In these cases, we would also recommend regenerating the summary and insights. Click Regenerate if you'd like to run the AI report interpretation tool again. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/z71R0FiyK6vx_B5WMJJSo_count-over-time-every-week-job-considerations-report-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-23844-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#generating-report-titles-and-notes-with-ai)Generating report titles and notes with AI
Please note that the AI Report Interpretation tool must be enabled if you'd like to generate report titles and notes with AI.
You can also use Ashby's AI Report Interpretation tool to generate your report titles and a descriptive note to your report. When building a report, click on the pencil icon to edit your report title. From there, click the AI Autofillsparkles icon to generate a report title based on the report type, filters applied and the fields set to be shown.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/oBBUqjtpBNNOBBeQkeJ8R_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-114105-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If you'd like to re-generate the report title, click the pencil icon to edit the title, then click the AI Autofillsparkles icon again.
If you're looking to add a descriptive note to your report, click the Note tab, then Add Note. From here, you'll have the option to add your own note but you can click AI Autofill on the note toolbar to generate an AI suggestion.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/DsmVmD6Dz0iCUaYnwS98a_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-114037-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can click Insert the suggestion to add it to your report. Don't want to include the Ai suggestion? Click Discard instead.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/OG1UFuNAQ3tIGbQtGtwuY_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-114913-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If you are using the old report builder view, the option to generate a title using AI will be displayed as a sparkle icon beside the original report name. The option to add a note via AI Autofill will show up when you click in the Note field.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/iPkG65ViL1bZ8Pc9x7dui_new-segmentation-report-acent-ashby-2026-01-30-at-35504-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#what-kind-of-reports-can-i-use-the-ai-report-inter)What kind of reports can I use the AI report interpretation tool with?
The Interpretation option will show on all report types other than Candidate Pipeline and Candidate Search reports. It's available for reports built from templates and custom reports.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#im-trying-out-report-templates-and-im-not-sure-how)I'm trying out report templates and I'm not sure how the report is being put together. Help - I don't understand!
If you're starting out with some more advanced report templates and are confused as to what and how data is pulled to generate the report, each report template has a Prebuilt Report option listed under the report results. You can click this to get further information.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/43BpGXQaG1sTaBfjzxl9m_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-25455-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Further information includes how to use the report and a breakdown of the data used. You can also view Ashby's Talent Trends report from here for further information about related benchmarks where applicable.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/inrViujUeU00MpSRgbiTz_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-27-at-25538-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#can-i-use-the-ai-report-interpretation-tool-while)Can I use the AI report interpretation tool while viewing the report in a dashboard?
You can! While viewing the report in a dashboard, click the sparkle icon for the report in question. This is the Explain Report option that activates the AI report interpretation tool.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/2b58BvtoY4KvFDVTRW0AC_zight-2026-01-27-at-150052.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
The summary will then be generated in a pop up on the right-hand side of the screen.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation#does-the-ai-report-interpreter-use-ai-credits)Does the AI report interpreter use AI credits?
No, the report interpretation tool does not use AI credits.
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI Credits
12 min
Copy
AI Credits are included across all Ashby All-in-One plans. While most AI features in Ashby are free to use without limitation, the ones that can run on a large volume of data (e.g. each inbound application) consume AI credits.
Features that consume AI Credits are: [AI-Assisted Application Review](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-assisted-application-review)﻿[Candidate Fraud Detection Overview & Admin Settings](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-fraud-detection-overview-and-admin-settings)﻿ and [AI Talent Rediscovery](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-talent-rediscovery)﻿.
For tips on managing your AI credits, see [Best Practices for Managing AI Credits](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/best-practices-for-managing-ai-credits)﻿ .
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#included-ai-credits)Included AI Credits
Every Ashby All-In-One plan includes some amount of AI credits at no additional cost.
Below are the included allotments of AI credits in each plan, as well as pricing for purchasing additional credits.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#ai-credits-included-in-ashby-all-in-one-plans)AI credits included in Ashby All In One plans
_﻿  
_  
| **Foundations AI credits**  | **Legacy Plus AI credits**  | **Plus AI credits**  | **Enterprise AI credits**  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| 1,500/mo. Or 18,000 per year account wide  | 1,500/mo. Or 18,000 per year account wide  | 2,500/yr, per paid seat  | 12,500/yr, per paid seat  |  
### **﻿  
**
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#additional-ai-credits-available-for-purchase)**Additional AI credits available for purchase**
See [How do I purchase additional email lookups, AI credits or texting credits in-app?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-purchase-additional-email-lookups-ai-credits-or-texting-credits-in-app)﻿ to learn how to purchase more AI credits.
  * Additional AI credits available for purchase for annual / multi-year subscriptions:


  * +5,000 for $500/yr


  * Additional AI credits available for purchase for month-to-month Foundations subscriptions:


  * +1,000 for $100/mo


#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#bundling-with-ai-credits)Bundling with AI credits
Ashby offers additional bundled AI credits when purchasing additional AI features.
Customers who purchase:
  * Advanced Scheduling Automation Add-On


  * AI Notetaker


will receive additional AI credits as part of a bundle.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#foundations-legacy-plus-bundle)Foundations & Legacy Plus bundle 
  * +18,000 credits/yr per account when purchasing the AI notetaker bundle 


Foundations & Legacy Plus customers cannot purchase the advanced scheduling automation add-on.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#plus-bundle)Plus bundle
  * +10,000 AI credits/seat/yr when purchasing the AI Notetaker bundle


  * +10,000 AI credits/seat/yr when purchasing the Advanced Scheduling Automation bundle


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#enterprise-bundle)Enterprise bundle
  * +10,000 AI credits/seat/yr when purchasing the AI Notetaker bundle


As of September 25th 2025 Enterprise customers have a new, higher, baseline of 12,500 AI credits/seat/yr. See the table below for details.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#bundle-ai-credit-allotment-table)Bundle AI credit allotment table
Below is what your total included AI credit allotment looks like depending on the bundles you purchase:  
| ﻿  
 | **Foundations**  | **Legacy Plus**  | **Plus**  | **Enterprise**  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| **Baseline AI Credits**  | 1,500/mo. Or 18,000 per year account wide  | 1,500/mo. Or 18,000 per year account wide  | 2,500/yr, per paid seat  | 12,500/yr, per paid seat  |  
| **w/ Only AI Notetaker**  | 3,000/mo. Or 36,000 per year account wide  | 3,000/mo. Or 36,000 per year account wide  | 12,500/yr, per paid seat  | 22,500/yr, per paid seat  |  
| **w/ Only Advanced Scheduling Automation**  | 1,500/mo. Or 18,000 per year account wide*  | 1,500/mo. Or 18,000 per year account wide  | 12,500/yr, per paid seat  |  12,500/yr, per paid seat**  _(Adv. Scheduling included)_  |  
| **w/ Both AI Notetaker and Advanced Scheduling Automation**  | 3,000/mo. Or 36,000 per year account wide*  | 3,000/mo. Or 36,000 per year account wide  | 22,500/yr, per paid seat  |  22,500/yr, per paid seat**  _(Adv. Scheduling included)_  |  
  * **Foundations** and **Legacy Plus** cannot purchase the [Advanced Scheduling Automation Add-On](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/advanced-scheduling-automation-add-on)﻿ .


  * *Advanced Scheduling is included in **Enterprise**.


#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#how-many-ai-credits-do-i-need)How many AI credits do I need?
We recommend estimating your needs by multiplying your historical applicants-per-role by your planned number of hires for the year.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#will-i-be-warned-if-i-am-close-to-using-my-credits)Will I be warned if I am close to using my credits?
Yes. Ashby provides an in-app warning when you reach 80% usage.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#do-unused-credits-roll-over)Do unused credits roll over?
Credits are tied to your contract period and do not roll over to the next contract year.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#where-can-i-view-my-remaining-credits)Where can I view my remaining credits?
Navigate to **Admin > Organization Setup > Billing** to view your balance and purchase more.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-credits#i-already-have-the-advanced-scheduling-automation)I **already have the Advanced Scheduling Automation add-on - will I get the additional credits added to my account?**
Yes. Your AI credit allotment will be adjusted per the above limits proactively. No further action will be needed.

e-signature-offers:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Offers & E-Signatures
# E-Signature Offers
18 min
Copy
This guide covers the e-signature feature in detail, check out the [Offers and Offer Letters](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offers-and-offer-letters)﻿ guide for the full feature overview.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#e-signature-offer-overview)E-Signature Offer overview
﻿
Applying E-signature request templates is not shown in this video, but are available. See [Creating and Managing E-Signature Request Templates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/creating-and-managing-e-signature-request-templates)﻿ for setup instructions, or the [Send E-Signature Offer to a Candidate](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#send-an-e-signature-offer-to-a-candidate)﻿ section below for how to use them.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#permissions-offers-and-offer-letters)Permissions: Offers and offer letters
See the table below for information on the access roles that can create offer letter templates and generate offers for candidates in the Offer stage.  
| Access Role  | Can create offer letter templates?  | Can create offers for candidates in the Offer stage?  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Agency Users  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin Private  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#create-an-offer-letter-with-e-signature-tokens)Create an offer letter with e-signature tokens
The first step in activating E-Signature is adding the related tokens to your .docx offer letter template. Navigate to [Offer Letter Tokens](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/offers/offer-letter-tokens "Offer Letter Tokens") and locate the candidate and company signature tokens. Click on a token to copy it to your clipboard, then paste it in the appropriate area of your .docx template. The candidate and company tokens are required to activate the e-signature feature.
Once the template is configured with tokens, head to the [Offer Letter Templates](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/offers/offer-letter-templates "Offer Letter Templates") page, click New, enter a title, and upload the file. Next, click the refresh button 🔄, and the form will be validated for any errors. You'll be notified if anything in the form needs to be updated.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5c8212e4b65cf476bcdc477ac189ecb7.png)
﻿
The following default tokens are available for e-signature offer letters:
{{CANDIDATE_E_SIGNATURE}}
{{CANDIDATE_E_SIGNATURE_DATE}}
{{CANDIDATE_E_SIGNATURE_INITIALS}}
{{CANDIDATE_CHECKBOX}}
{{COMPANY_E_SIGNATURE}}
{{COMPANY_E_SIGNATURE_DATE}}
{{COMPANY_E_SIGNATURE_INITIALS}}
Candidate or Company signature tokens must be accompanied by the date token.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#adding-text-input-fields-to-your-e-signature-offer)Adding text input fields to your e-signature offer letter
E-signature text input tokens can be used for e-signature offer letters generated via Dropbox Sign or Docusign.
If you'd like to add text fields into your offer letters so the candidate or the company signatory can fill out additional information within the offer itself, you can also add in the following tokens:
  * {{CANDIDATE_TEXT_INPUT}} This text input field will provide the candidate a field to add in additional text.


  * {{COMPANY_TEXT_INPUT}} This text input field will provide the company signatory a field to add in additional text.


When clicking the token in the **Offer Letter Tokens** tab, you'll be prompted to select the field size, either by selecting a preset size or by setting the width and number of lines. You can also check the Required checkbox to require the signer to complete the field as part of the signing process.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Vdblf0p9HKE999LinHV6L_offers-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-91815-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Once you've determined the text input field size and settings, click the token generated to copy it. You can then paste this token into your offer letter. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/BU8cdsM2wJWApPF-KIfDO_offers-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-92749-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
We recommend placing this token in it's own line within your offer letter template to prevent layout issues. Here's an example of how the token should be placed and how it will look when an e-signature offer letter has been generated.
![An offer letter template with a company input text token added on a new line.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Jkh5u64P68HUKY6HYK675_e-signature-text-input-tokens-restricted-early-access-slab-2026-01-29-at-93834-am.jpg?format=webp)
An offer letter template with a company input text token added on a new line.
﻿
![How the company signatory will see the text input field at the point of signing the e-signature offer.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/tjlA_m5-wrGagUHpnHLlJ_e-signature-text-input-tokens-restricted-early-access-slab-2026-01-29-at-93802-am.jpg?format=webp)
How the company signatory will see the text input field at the point of signing the e-signature offer.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#send-an-e-signature-offer-to-a-candidate)Send an e-signature offer to a candidate
Once your offer letter template is valid and complete, you're ready to create offers for candidates. Follow the steps below to successfully create and share an e-signature offer.
  1. To send an e-signature offer to a candidate, navigate to the candidate's profile and move them to the **Offer** stage. This will generate an offer activity in the **Activities & Progress** timeline. 


  1. On the **New Offer** activity, click Create Offer and then fill out the **Offer Details** form.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5cb2946f4f1d86a6688173e0b44a6e90.png)
﻿
  1. Once the form is filled out, click View Offer on the **Offer Created** activity, then Generate Offer Letter. 


  1. Select an e-signature offer letter from the **Templates** dropdown to generate the offer letter. 


If you do not have an e-signature offer letter templates, you'll need to go back and create them. See [Create an Offer Letter with E-Signature Tokens](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#create-an-offer-letter-with-e-signature-tokens)﻿ above for more info.
  1. Once the offer letter has been generated, then click Send Offer E-Signature (you may need to refresh the page). 


  1. Fill in the e-signature request details:


  * **Title:** This will become the subject of the email to the candidate.


  * **Message:** This will appear in the body text of the email. 


  * **Company signatory:** The internal team member required to sign.


  * **Signing order:** Determine who signs first, or whether anyone can sign at any time.


  * **Expiration:** Select a specific date, or set to never expire.


  * **CC:** Any additional individuals you would like to receive the email.


Alternatively, you can apply an e-signature request template which will fill in these details automatically if your organization has built them. 
![Shows the Send Offer E-signature request pane with an e-signature request template applied, which automatically filled in all the details.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/H9D0blHtLDvQBcOsGrFBN_carolina-zulauf-backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-03-12-at-42732-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
See [Creating and Managing E-Signature Request Templates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/creating-and-managing-e-signature-request-templates)﻿ for more information on creating e-signature request templates.
  1. You will either have the option to preview the email before sending by clicking Preview at the bottom of the pane, or send a self-test to your email by clicking Self-Test if the preview option in your [Offer Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/offers/settings "Offer Settings") is not enabled).


  1. When ready, hit Send and the request will be sent to the candidate!


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#e-signature-preview-editor)E-signature preview editor
The preview editor can be enabled under E-Signature Settings in Admin [here](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/offers/settings "here"). When enabled, the signature request can be previewed in a document editor, before sending the request to the candidate. This allows you to add special document inputs for the signer to fill out, which may not be offered in Ashby’s templates.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#offer-sent-via-dropbox-sign-or-docusign)Offer sent via Dropbox Sign or Docusign
Offers are sent via Dropbox Sign. Ashby's Dropbox Sign integration works automatically, you will not need a Dropbox Sign plan to use it. 
If you have the Docusign integration in place, offers can also be sent via Docusign. You can read more on this integration at [Docusign](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/docusign)﻿. 
The candidate will be able to start the signing process via a notification from either Dropbox Sign or Docusign.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c1e98dd6173f8cf1676c26be067c0014.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#e-signature-status-and-reminders)E-Signature status and reminders
Once an offer is sent, you'll be able to review the e-signature status by clicking View Offer on the offer activity. From there, in the Offer E-Signature section, you can also send out reminders where needed.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f20f49a59158d2615765d45482e1b33a.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#edit-offer)Edit offer
If you edit an offer the e-signature request will be invalidated, and you'll need to regenerate the offer letter and resend the e-signature request.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2ffb6d843fdac4b1a4a82455a226debc.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#review-signed-offer)Review signed offer
Once an offer is signed, you'll have the option to review the offer by clicking View Offer on the activity (now showing as Offer Accepted). You can click Signed Offer to view the signed offer letter.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5ef12dd4b56990fefe2872f4d876c2fb.png)
﻿
If you have multiple signed offer documents as part of an offer packet (more on this at [Adding Multiple Documents to an E-signature Offer](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/adding-multiple-documents-to-an-e-signature-offer)﻿), then you’ll also see a _Download Signed Files_ button. Click this to either download a ZIP file containing all signed files, or to select a specific file from the offer packet to download.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0e9c59b244c5c85cde447bfa781c0943.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#why-do-my-e-signature-placeholders-show-in-the-gen)Why do my e-signature placeholders show in the generated document?
This can happen when more than one font is used in the document template. Check out [Offer Letter Template Formatting](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offer-letter-template-formatting)﻿ for more troubleshooting tips
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#can-i-set-my-e-signature-request-to-expire)Can I set my e-signature request to expire?
You can, yes! After creating your offer, you’ll see the Automatically Expire Request option in the following menu after clicking Send Offer E-Signature Request.
Use the drop-down menu to select At Date & Time if you’d like the request to expire - you’ll then be able to specify the expiration date and time.
Keep this set to Never if you don’t want the request to expire.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SQdmxQkLJVnuBVvbggt0j_image.png?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#what-notifications-are-received-when-e-signature-r)What notifications are received when e-signature requests are sent?
The user that initiated the E-Signature Offer request will receive notifications when signatories view and sign their Offer letter, as well as when all parties have signed the Offer letter. Each signatory will get a notification after signing the offer letter, providing them with their signed copy.
If you’ve set a signing order for the E-Signature request, the signer(s) waiting for the other party to sign first will get a “heads up” that an E-signature request is heading their way but not yet ready for their signature.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#what-email-address-do-e-signature-requests-come-fr)What email address do e-signature requests come from?
E-Signature requests will be sent from noreply@mail.hellosign.com.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#why-do-you-recommend-that-we-add-the-dropbox-sign)Why do you recommend that we add the Dropbox Sign domain to an allowlist?
In general, for external emails to candidates, Dropbox Sign's domain is highly trusted and it’s rare that those emails get sent to spam. We've had a couple of instances where internal signature requests for company signatories were getting blocked so in order to prevent that, Dropbox Sign recommends adding the email to an allowlist. More about this can be found in their docs [here](https://faq.hellosign.com/hc/en-us/articles/206454577-Why-am-I-not-receiving-email-notifications#:~:text=It%27s%20possible%20your%20e%2Dmail,contact%20our%20support%20team%20here "here").
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers#can-i-create-custom-tokens-for-e-signature-documen)Can I create custom tokens for e-signature documents?
You can generate custom tokens for candidate, job and offer custom fields, yes. For more information on setting these up, check out [Custom Fields](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/custom-fields)﻿ . These allow you to pull information from custom fields into your e-signature templates.
You custom field tokens for e-signature documents will be listed in the Custom Field Tokens section of E-Signature Document Tokens within the E-Signature Documents section of Admin.
﻿
