<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Surveys, Assessments & Activit...
Assessments
# Take-home Activities
36 min
Copy
Take Home activities are one of several [Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/activities)﻿ supported in Ashby. They allow you to configure an assessment for a candidate and either send out a self-submission link, or upload the candidates submission to Ashby for review.
Take-home activities are available on the Foundations, Legacy Plus, Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ✅  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
Users with access to edit jobs can configure take-home activities. By default, those with Elevated Access - Admin, Elevated Access - Admin Private and Organization Admin access have this permission stripe. 
Permissions may have been amended for access roles in your account. For more on this, check out [Manage Access Roles](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manage-access-roles)﻿.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#take-home-overview)Take-home overview
If your interview process involves candidates completing a take-home project or assignment (for example, a case study), the Take Home activity will allow you to define the details of the assignment including reviewer and candidate instructions, who the assigned reviewer is, and how the candidate should submit their assignment. We would recommend setting up at least one email template to use for take-home assignments.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#set-up-a-take-home-activity)Set up a take-home activity
A take-home activity can be added to the corresponding stage of a job’s interview plan. See below for step-by-step setup instructions.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#create-a-shared-take-home-activity)Create a shared take-home activity
If you’d like to use a take-home across multiple interview plan stages and jobs, then you can do this in Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > [Take-home Assignments](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/take-home-assignments "Take-home Assignments").
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Pqge4wb9tngCwIOUcmZf5_take-home-assignments-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-15218-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Click + New, then add a title. You will then be able to amend the take-home settings:
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/vxHuIPfg0m1sYloNlMyFQ_shared-take-home-setup.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#overview)**Overview**
**Title (internal):** Set an internal title for your take-home assignment
**Candidate-facing title:** Set a candidate-facing title for your assignment
**Groups:** These are used to organize your take-home assignments so you can filter for them as needed. Click + Add to create a new group.
**Feedback Requested:** If this is set to 'No' then feedback will not be requested for any reviewers. 
**Feedback required by default:** Reviewers will be required to leave feedback for the take-home assessment.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#notes-for-reviewers)Notes for Reviewers
Here you can add a reviewer-facing note. Include any key skills the assessment is testing for, plus any helpful information for those assessing the candidate here.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#assignment)Assignment
Add the candidate-facing assignment information here.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#feedback-form)Feedback Form
Here you can assign the feedback form that reviewers will complete when submitting feedback on the assessment. For more on configuring feedback forms, check out [Feedback Forms and Interviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#add-the-take-home-activity-to-your-interview-plan)Add the take-home activity to your interview plan
To add your take-home assessment to an interview stage:
  1. Navigate to your job, then to the Interview Plan tab.


  1. Scroll to the stage you’d like to add your take-home activity to and click the Add Activity To option.


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/C4YMTQsWvqVu8pA43L2v7_backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-20620-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Click + Add Activity.


  1. Select Take-home.


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/nhwZBz16IcYCm77kVFecE_backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-20735-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Create a new take-home or add a shared take-home that you’ve already configured.


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/sbRj1LX37sewTh6auvNmc_set-up-a-take-home-assignment.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#assign-one-or-more-reviewers)Assign one or more reviewers
You can assign your reviewers by clicking the Add Reviewer button. You can then select the reviewers using the drop-down options.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/rfNUl_xIiYke8YYSzjeMA_adding-a-reviewer.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Much like interviewers on a schedule interview activity, you can add multiple reviewers to one slot to create a round-robin, or add multiple reviewer slots, so multiple people review an assignment.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#promoting-a-custom-take-home-activity-to-shared)Promoting a custom take-home activity to shared
To turn an existing take-home assignment into a shared take-home assignment, head to the Interview Plan section of your job, then click into the take-home activity. From there, click on the title of the take-home activity within the Take-Home Configuration section.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/7BNoWPIHevY1T1hXIlVTT_backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-21345-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
From here, you’ll have the Promote to Shared option. Click this to switch the take-home over to a shared take-home assignment that can be used across multiple stages and jobs. If you’d like to switch out the assignment to a shared one you’ve already configured, click Delete & Link to Shared to replace the existing assignment.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/53o6ujY5iMm8HDhqR8G6t_coding-take-home-interview-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-21422-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#setting-up-email-templates)Setting up Email Templates
Now that you’ve configured the Take Home activity, you can configure an [Email Template](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities "Email Template") to streamline sending instructions to the candidate.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#email-template-for-self-submission-recommended)Email template for self-submission (recommended)
With self-submission, you’ll embed the Take Home Submission Link token in the email template.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/09rvwInE5W7MHvn9Ful50_take-home-email-template.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If you create an email template with a self-submission link, this template can be specified in the Communications tab of your take-home activity. Then when the activity is generated on the candidate profile, you can quickly generate an email and send it out using the specified template.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Jd3QRufgapGgJw4COGYCU_take-home-assessment-email-template.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
The email template must have a Take Home Submission Link substitution token in the template in order for it to show in the Email Template dropdown. If your email template isn’t listed, please ensure that this substitution token is added. More on these at [Substitution Tokens](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities "Substitution Tokens").
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#email-template-with-attachment)Email template with attachment
You can also opt to attach a document directly to an email template if you’d prefer to send the details out to the candidate via that route. The candidate will then send over their submission directly via email (referred to as direct submission).
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#collect-candidate-submissions)Collect Candidate Submissions
The take-home assessment activity will automatically populate in the Current Activities section of the candidate profile once they're moved to that stage in your interview plan. The two options for capturing candidate submissions are self-submission and direct submission.
Self-submission sends feedback directly to reviewers once the candidate submits it, while direct submission gives admins more control by having them complete the upload themselves.
When clicking Collect Submission on the take-home activity on the candidate’s profile, you’ll get the option to send the submission out via email (for self-submission), or submit the assignment directly on behalf of the candidate (for direct submission).
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/1WAyc7fP7sCwvZlgG05LM_thomas-smith-backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-23420-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#self-submission-recommended)Self-submission (recommended)
With self-submission, the candidate will access the assignment through the Take Home Submission link. The candidate will use the linked landing page to review the assignment details and submit their responses as notes and/or file attachments. Once submitted, the reviewer will automatically be notified to review the assignment. Candidates can only submit via this portal once per assignment.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/2K9ETxbtxtJB7JP1tF5qG_example-submission-page.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#direct-submission)Direct submission
With direct submission, you’ll gather the details from the candidate via email and upload their responses to the take-home activity on their candidate profile.
Once the submission is uploaded, the reviewer will be prompted to review the candidate’s submission.
Email sync doesn’t currently support file attachments, so take-home files sent via email will need to be retrieved from the email in your inbox.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#automation-for-take-home-assessments)Automation for Take-home assessments
Take-home assessments created in Ashby can now also be automated.
﻿
On the interview plan for the role in question, click + Add Activity in the stage you’d like to add the take home assessment to, then select the Take-home option.
When setting up your take-home, you can opt to select an email from your email templates to be sent out as part of the automation on the Communication tab.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/GDzV04jrqomQuDSollZI8_take-home-assessment-email-template.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
On the Automation tab, you can then check the Automate on Stage Entry? checkbox, then select the user that the take-home email should be sent on behalf of.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Xe5rSgUXJgbgZYgq4AGl7_backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-23608-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
When a candidate is moved to the stage that your automation has been added to, you’ll see a note that the automated activity is being started. You will also have the option to undo this.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/AOIIRxr1pYq60CAQzHilC_automation-starting-activity.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Please note that this automation route cannot be used to schedule the take-home activity email. The email will be sent when the candidate is moved to the stage the take-home activity is assigned to.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#resetting-a-take-home-assignment-link)Resetting a take-home assignment link
You can reset the take-home candidate submission link if the candidate runs into any issues with uploading. Click the three dots on the take-home activity on the candidate’s profile. From here click the Reset the submission link option. This will remove any already provided answers and files from the activity.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/-CULtmqfopwZGN7xVzE-r_thomas-smith-backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-43046-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
This option is only available for take-homes that both require and request reviewer feedback. If feedback isn’t set as requested or required within the take-home settings, then the activity will no longer show on the candidate’s profile once the assignment has been submitted.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7af87f642f4816b183c03e84b63f2a35.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#notify-and-collect-feedback-from-reviewers)Notify and Collect Feedback from Reviewers
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#reviewer-notifications)Reviewer Notifications
When a submission is complete, reviewers will be notified via email or Slack that they have a take-home that is ready to be reviewed.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/hA1seIRmFC11jeU0Dl_en_email-notification-of-take-home.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#take-home-assignment-briefing)Take-home assignment briefing
Reviewers will receive a take-home assignment briefing that is similar to an interview briefing, but contains a tab to download the candidate’s submission.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/o1m6bvyYb8gIIoObi8e82_take-home-activities-archbee-document-2026-04-20-at-25039-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#faq)FAQ 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#why-didnt-my-automated-take-home-activity-send)W**hy didn’t my automated take-home activity send?**
Automated take-home activities require the Assignment section in the take-home settings to be filled out.
This field is required for candidates to self-submit their work. If the Assignment section is blank when a candidate is moved into the stage that triggers the automation, the take-home email will fail to send.
To resolve this:
  1. Go to your take-home settings, either via the activity on the interview plan of the job in question or by heading to Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > [T[ake-Home Assignments](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/take-home-assignments "ake-Home Assignments")﻿](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/take-home-assignments "https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/interview/take-home-assignments") if you're amending a shared take-home.


  1. Add text to the field on the **Assignment** tab


  1. Re-trigger the automation or manually send the take-home if needed


Once the Assignment section is completed, the automation should send successfully moving forward.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#can-i-make-take-home-assignments-anonymous-for-my)Can I make take-home assignments anonymous for my reviewers?
In Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > [Take-home Assignment Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/take-home-assignments "Take-home Assignment Settings") you can check a box to set take-homes to anonymous. When checked, reviewers will see a pseudonym instead of the candidate’s name. Please note that this is an account-wide setting.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/db83b498c288710cbf693de8d3c2f55a.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#im-getting-an-error-missing-value-for-take-home-su)I'm getting an error: Missing Value for: Take Home Submission Link. Why?
You may see this error when trying to email out a take-home with a Take Home Submission Link substitution token (more about these at [Substitution Tokens](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/substitution-tokens)﻿).
Take-homes must have an assignment and reviewers configured before they can be sent out (reviewers can be changed at any point, but must be present).
If you use an email template with a Take Home Submission Link token, and you email a candidate via the normal Email button, this can result in a missing link error in your email template. We would recommend using the Collect Submission button on the take-home activity on the candidate’s profile instead.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/1WAyc7fP7sCwvZlgG05LM_thomas-smith-backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-23420-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#how-do-i-change-the-reviewers-on-a-take-home-assig)How**do I change the reviewers on a take-home assignment?**
When you click Collect Submission and then either Send via Email or Submit Directly on the activity generated for the take-home, the reviewers will be listed on the pop-ups that follow. This pop-up will also show up if you click the three dots on the activity and copy the self-submission link.
You can click on the trash can icon beside a reviewer to remove them from this particular assignment, and click Add Reviewer Slot to add additional reviewers.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Iu4b6oK6ZK0oZhBCKygYy_send-take-home-assigment-page.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If the candidate has already submitted, click the three dots to the right of the View Submission button and select Edit. From here you can replace the submission or change the reviewers.
If all reviewers have already submitted their feedback, or feedback has been skipped, the activity will be marked as complete and reviewers can't be edited for the assignment moving forward. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/v7_JnMrFjwDtYYAOtfzRQ_thomas-smith-backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-25804-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#can-i-copy-an-existing-activity-from-an-interview)Can I copy an existing activity from an interview plan stage on one job to an interview plan stage on another?
You can. When you are on a job’s interview plan and click Add Activity To… on an interview plan stage you’ll see the option to add a new activity and a Copy Activities option.
Click Copy Activities, then select the job, interview plan, interview stage you’d like to copy activities from. Choose the activities you’d like to copy. The selected activities will be copied into the original stage you chose.
﻿
Once an activity is copied over, if the activity uses a shared interview type or feedback form (more on those at [What are ‘Shared’ Interviews, Application Forms, and Feedback Forms?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/what-are-shared-interviews-application-forms-and-feedback-forms)﻿ ), then those will be reference in the copy. Any custom interview types or feedback forms will be copied over and can be amended without impacting the original activity that was copied.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#who-receives-notifications-when-the-take-home-assi)Who receives notifications when the take-home assignment is submitted?
Only the reviewers will be notified by default when a candidate submits their take-home assignment.
If additional users need to be notified, you could opt to create a custom list report and configure an alert (more on these at [Alerts](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/alerts)﻿) to send out notifications immediately when additional records are added to the report.
In your custom list report, you could opt to set up filters to only pull job considerations in your take-home stage (or stage group) and with the activity status Waiting on Feedback. This will ensure that only candidates awaiting feedback in your take-home stages will be listed in the report.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/96a5987fdaaa3d9bad5e88a2abac4537.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#can-i-allow-interviewers-who-arent-reviewing-the-t)Can I allow interviewers who aren’t reviewing the take-home access to view the candidate’s submission?
If you’d like other interviewers to view a take-home submission, you can add the interviewers as reviewers on the take-home but not set feedback to be required. To do this:
  1. Navigate to your job from the Jobs > Jobs page.


  1. Head to the Interview Plan tab of your job.


  1. Click on the take-home activity within your interview plan.


  1. On the Take-Home tab, click on the name of the assignment you have configured. This is shown beneath Take-home Configuration and above the reviewers assigned to the assessment.


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/FF7xHJYnK9Np5nFKjRdVv_backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-31657-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Set Is Feedback Required by Default? to No.


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/vhJ95-sMr8K5nlyUTLkH9_coding-take-home-interview-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-31811-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Add additional reviewers using the Add Reviewer button, then assign the reviewers to the reviewer slots.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#can-i-schedule-a-take-home-activity-email)Can I schedule a take-home activity email?
As the [Automated Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/automated-activities)﻿ option will trigger activities to run once the candidate has landed in the stage the activity is in, we would recommend instead opting to schedule the email manually for the candidate instead.
Within the candidate’s profile, click Collect Submission on the take-home submission activity. Click Send via Email and confirm the take-home assignment details and reviewers. 
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/17ec87cc8d1ec6cc3712e7be8e48c320.png)
﻿
Click Draft Email to pull up a draft to send the assignment out to the candidate.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/VZk44AXj-gVLaWAme-0Lv_draft-email-option-for-take-home-assignment.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
When drafting your email, use the Send dropdown to amend when the email will be sent out to the candidate. The email can be sent immediately, at a specific time on a specific day, or after a certain amount of time has passed. Once you’ve drafted up your email, click Schedule.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/i3JMiZek_KcHc8gFxfkzA_thomas-smith-backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-32344-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You’ll then see a record of the scheduled email under Current Activities on the candidate’s profile up until the email is sent. You’ll then be able to view the email sent to the candidate in the Emails section of the feed on the candidate profile.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#how-do-i-edit-the-take-home-assignment-information)How do I edit the take-home assignment information on the interview activity?
If you need to make edits to the take-home information, head to the Interview Plan section of your job, then click on the take-home activity within your interview plan.
To edit the assignment information, click on the take-home title underneath Take-home Configuration on the Take-home tab of the activity. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/JUWXEGTD6wEjaOhP1QN-__backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-04-20-at-32713-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
You can use the tabs to edit the following:
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/htoZHEGyxYWwVWKih8VzJ_editing-a-take-home.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
**Overview:** Amend the internal and external assessment title and set whether feedback is requested or required.
**Notes for Reviewers:** Any information reviewers may need when completing feedback for the submission.
**Assignment:** The information provided to the candidate about the take-home.
**Feedback Form:** The form reviewers should complete.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#can-i-create-a-one-off-or-ad-hoc-take-home-assignm)Can I create a one-off or ad-hoc take-home assignment for a specific candidate?
Take-home activities must be set up as activities within the interview plan. There currently isn’t a route to add ad-hoc take-home assignments from a candidate’s profile.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#is-it-possible-to-amend-or-remove-the-notes-field)I**s it possible to amend or remove the Notes field on the self-submission page of the assignment?**
No, the Notes field is currently a fixed field on the self-submission page.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/take-home-activities#can-i-configure-auto-reject-rules-for-take-home-as)C**an I configure auto-reject rules for take-home assignments?**
No, this isn’t currently possible. Auto-reject rules are configured for the application process. More on this at [Auto-Reject Applications](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/auto-reject-applications)﻿.

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# How does the free trial work with the AI Notetaker?
4 min
Copy
For more on the AI notetaker tool, check out [AI Notetaker](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker)﻿.
The AI Notetaker can only be used for interviews scheduled via Ashby. 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-does-the-free-trial-work-with-the-ai-notetaker#ai-notetaker-free-trial)AI notetaker free trial
With the free trial of the AI notetaker, you can record up to 500 meetings for free. There is no time limit, the free trial will expire once all 500 meeting recordings have been used up. Please note that during the free trial, your recording retention period is limited to be set to up to 14 days. One you hit your retention period set in the Recording Data Retention settings, the recordings will become inaccessible.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-does-the-free-trial-work-with-the-ai-notetaker#purchasing-the-add-on)Purchasing the add-on
After using 500 meeting recordings, customers will need to purchase the AI Notetaker Add-on to continue using AI Notetaker. To purchase the add-on, please follow the appropriate instructions based on your plan:
  * Foundations and Headcount-based Legacy Plus: Navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > Billing _._ Under AI Notetaker Interviews click Upgrade.


  * Review the billing summary provided (including the recurring cost and the prorated immediate cost), then click Purchase to continue with the upgrade.


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e5049152f1cc30156e62a53c328b835a.png)
﻿
  * Plus and Enterprise: Please reach out to your sales executive for further information


On purchasing the add-on, you can record as many meetings as you like. You can also customize the retention time to suit your organization’s requirements.
Please note that the add-on is organization-wide and can be enabled for any and all users added to your account, including those with Limited Access.
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)

Ashby Admin Onboarding
# Ashby Admin Onboarding
12 min
Copy
﻿
We're excited to welcome you to Ashby and help you hit your hiring goals! This article covers the key setup areas to get you started, along with more advanced options we recommend configuring early to optimize your experience. Each guide this article links to opens in a new tab, so you won't lose your place.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-admin-onboarding#set-up-your-company-theme-and-explore-integrations)Set up your company theme and explore integrations
This section covers the basic technical setup to get things working and takes less than 20 minutes.
  * Set up your integration with either [Google Workspace](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/google-workspace)﻿ or [Microsoft 365](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/microsoft-365)﻿ so you and your team can use all of Ashby's features.


  * ﻿[Job Board: Configuring Your Setup](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-board-configuring-your-setup)﻿﻿  



  * Set up the [Zoom](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/zoom)﻿ (if your team uses Zoom)


Looking to integrate with other software? Check out the [Integrations Marketplace](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/integrations/marketplace "Integrations Marketplace") and our [Integrations](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/integrations)﻿ for further information.
**Note:** Most integrations must be set up by an Admin user of the partner's platform. Some job board integrations, such as [Wellfound (formerly AngelList Talent)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/wellfound-formerly-angellist-talent)﻿, must be set up on the partner's end.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-admin-onboarding#set-up-your-first-job)Set up your first job
In this section, you'll set up a job and test the workflows for adding candidates to Ashby. This section takes five to 10 minutes — we recommend having a job description ready.
  * ﻿[Set up Departments & Locations](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/set-up-departments-and-locations)﻿ to assign to your jobs


  * Create [Interview Plans](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interview-plans)﻿ to establish clear stages within each job's pipeline


  * Open and post your first [Creating & Opening Jobs](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/creating-and-opening-jobs)﻿﻿


  * ﻿[Create test candidates and test out the workflow](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/create-test-candidates-and-test-out-the-workflow)﻿﻿  



**Note:** The [Indeed](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/indeed)﻿ integration is enabled by default. Disable it while you're setting up your jobs to ensure test postings aren't listed.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-admin-onboarding#create-reusable-templates-in-admin)Create reusable templates in Admin
You can create reusable templates for various objects, including one-off emails, sequences, interviews, and feedback forms. We highly recommend getting at least some of these templates in place to save time in the long run, although you can revisit this later.
  * Configure [Interview Plans](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interview-plans)﻿ to build out the pipelines that candidates go through as part of your interview process.


  * Create shared [Feedback Forms and Interviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews)﻿ that can be used across multiple jobs and interview activities.


  * Create shared [Application Forms](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/application-forms)﻿ to assign to your job postings.


  * Add [Email Template Creation and Management](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-template-creation-and-management)﻿ to speed up and standardize candidate communications.


  * Create [Job Templates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-templates)﻿ to configure job settings, interview plans, and job posting information in advance.


  * Review [Setting Scheduling Defaults](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-scheduling-defaults)﻿ to determine the defaults that apply across your interviews.


﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-admin-onboarding#set-up-scheduling-and-enhance-your-job-with-activi)Set up scheduling and enhance your job with activities
At this point, you're ready to use all basic Ashby features! Ashby also supports further streamlining your process by adding interview scheduling and other [Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/activities)﻿ to each stage. Once added, these activities automatically populate on your candidates' profiles when they move into a stage, so you know exactly what to do next.
  * ﻿[Scheduling & Interviews: An Introduction](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduling-and-interviews-an-introduction)﻿﻿  



Choose a scheduling workflow:
  * ﻿[Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities)﻿﻿  



  * ﻿[Direct Booking & Candidate Availability Links](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links)﻿﻿  



  * ﻿[Manually Scheduling Interviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews)﻿﻿  



Review and enable other activity options:
  * ﻿[Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/activities)﻿﻿  



**Note:** Once you've customized your job with activities, you can turn it into a [job template](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/job-templates)﻿ to reuse whenever you open a new job.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-admin-onboarding#set-up-your-teams-permissions)Set up your team's permissions
With the basic setup complete, it's time to configure your team's permissions!
  * ﻿[User Permissions](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/user-permissions)﻿﻿  



  * Want to set up additional access roles or automations? Check out [Permissions Automation](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/permissions-automation)﻿ and [Manage Access Roles](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manage-access-roles)﻿.


We recommend leaving most users with limited access, as they can get the information they need about the candidates they interview from the interview briefing.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-admin-onboarding#onboard-your-team)Onboard your team
Onboarding your team is easy! Share our Getting Started Guides with your hiring team via email or Slack (Ashby does not currently send automated new user emails). These guides instruct them on how to log in and start using Ashby within 10 minutes.
  * ﻿[Getting Started for Hiring Managers](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-hiring-managers)﻿﻿  



  * ﻿[Getting Started for Interviewers](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-interviewers)﻿﻿  



  * ﻿[Getting Started for Recruiters](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiters)﻿﻿  



  * ﻿[Getting Started for Recruiting Coordinators](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators)﻿﻿  



  * ﻿[Getting Started for Sourcers](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-sourcers)﻿﻿  



﻿
With your current setup, you're ready for hiring excellence! Check out more of our resources to further enhance your team's experience. Happy hiring!
Curious about more advanced setup? Check out [Advanced Setup](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/advanced-setup)﻿.
﻿

ai-generated-feedback-summaries:

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI-Generated Feedback Summaries
6 min
Copy
You can now generate an AI-powered summary of all the feedback for a given job consideration on a candidate’s profile. The summary will take into account all feedback left for the job consideration.
You can opt-in to use AI features in the [Early Access](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/early-access "Early Access") section of Admin.
AI-Generated feedback summaries can be generated on the Foundations, Legacy Plus Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ✅  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries#overview)Overview
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries#where-can-i-see-or-generate-a-feedback-summary)Where can I see or generate a feedback summary?
You can generate and view feedback summaries in three places:
  * Your debrief briefings On the All Feedback tab. 


  * Any interview briefings (depending on your feedback settings, your interviewers may not be able to see all points on the summary without submitting their feedback or at all, more on this at [Visibility Options](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries "Visibility Options")) 


  * On the candidate’s profile: Click on the Feedback tab of the feed to view the feedback summary.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d4ec911d93c5be5c4e3d4f494a806c42.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7dcba1e16499933e5eb32cc2888861b4.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/32d4b287c64107b6ac5ca66c8c6c131a.png)
﻿
﻿  

If you opt to regenerate a feedback summary in one of these places, it will replace the summary in all three areas.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries#how-do-i-generate-a-feedback-summary)How do I generate a feedback summary?
To generate a feedback summary, head to the candidate’s profile, an interview briefing or a debrief briefing. Click on the Feedback tab of their feed if on the candidate profile, or the All Feedback tab of the interview or debrief. Click the Generate with AI button to create your feedback summary for this candidate’s job consideration.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5555c1ce84111bcf673d967a3a350aac.png)
﻿
Once the feedback summary has been generated, you can hit Regenerate to generate the summary again if needed.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/74ceacec7f0bc81babf922eb83a880c8.png)
﻿
You can click Show All Citations to view the original feedback the summary points were generated from.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/01d6b0fe6639afe3ea6079853d965b86.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries#can-i-delete-a-generated-feedback-summary)Can I delete a generated feedback summary?
This isn’t currently possible - you can regenerate a summary to update it but not remove it completely.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries#who-can-regenerate-a-summary)Who can regenerate a summary?
Any user with access to view the candidate’s profile can regenerate the feedback summary.
﻿

reporting-errors-and-resolutions:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/reporting-errors-and-resolutions -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby Analytics
Getting Started with Analytics
# Reporting Errors & Resolutions
6 min
Copy
This document reviews different types of errors you may encounter when using Ashby, what they mean, and how to resolve them.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/reporting-errors-and-resolutions#general-help-and-support)General help and support
If you ever encounter an error screen of any type, you are welcome and encouraged to reach out to support@ashbyhq.com or your dedicated Ashby team. The below information is an additional aid to resolving any errors on your own should you encounter them.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/reporting-errors-and-resolutions#ashby-error-types)Ashby error types
When an issue occurs and the underlying reason is identified we will prompt you with the a notification regarding the cause and a link to the resolution documentation here. If no cause is determined a general error will be presented with a prompt to reach out to **support@ashbyhq.com**.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/reporting-errors-and-resolutions#general-error)General error
![Screen Shot 2022-06-02 at 11.16.59 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/KkHs-6U8uSVrMKDNkijmM_screenshot2022-06-02at111659am.png?format=webp)
﻿
A general error is any error not attributed to an identifiable standard error type. In this case the error may be due to any number of reasons and it is best treated as a case to investigate closely.
**Reason:** not determined, can occur for reporting or other parts of the application.
**Resolution:** reach out to support@ashbyhq.com at your soonest convenience.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/reporting-errors-and-resolutions#privacy-restriction)Privacy restriction
![error-privacyrestriction-cropped.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/gJ1wZ7uYCTW5G4fozBTEp_error-privacyrestriction-cropped.png?format=webp)
﻿
When creating reports that reference diversity or EEOC survey information, it is not permitted to include personally identifiable information (PII) in the same report (e.g. you cannot report on candidate name and their EEOC response, but only EEOC responses in aggregate).
**Reason:** sensitive PII cannot be used in combination with sensitive survey responses.
**Resolution:** remove either PII fields or sensitive survey response fields.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/reporting-errors-and-resolutions#missing-field)Missing field
![error-missingfield-cropped.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Eyum2j_R_E44AiKd5MeLs_error-missingfield-cropped.png?format=webp)
﻿
When reports reference custom fields it’s possible those fields get deleted within the ATS, leaving a reference to a field which no longer exists.
**Reason:** a report references a field in filtering or grouping which no longer exists.
**Resolution:** remove the field(s) which no longer exist (usually deleted custom fields), or reach out to support@ashbyhq.com for assistance.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/reporting-errors-and-resolutions#report-too-large)Report too large
![error-reporttoolarge-cropped.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/yV3ZQsWxb1A-LwcrivFQl_error-reporttoolarge-cropped.png?format=webp)
﻿
Custom list reports can be created with little or no filters, sometimes resulting in extremely large result sets (e.g. tens of thousands of candidates). To prevent performance impact, we limit reports that exceed a result size threshold.
**Reason:** a report attempts to serve results that exceed a data size limit.
**Resolution:** adjust the report filters or group by’s to restrict the total data returned. Typically a more restrictive time filter (e.g. application start or last activity at) is sufficient.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/reporting-errors-and-resolutions#report-timeout)Report timeout
![error-timeout-cropped-wide.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/lka-MYT1UJNb_fqsJFhZL_error-timeout-cropped-wide.png?format=webp)
﻿
Some reports involve exceedingly complex filters, calculated fields, and groupings. In some cases the report’s underlying query may exceed the permissible query time and a timeout error will occur.
**Reason:** a complex report query exceeds a 90-second time.
**Resolution:** review your report filter conditions and consider either limiting the total data involved by way of filtering to a smaller timeframe, or reach out to Ashby for assistance from our reporting and analytics experts.

# Report Catalog - Essentials
18 min
Copy
This catalog focuses mostly on essential reports, if you want to explore more advanced reports take a look at our [Report Catalog - Advanced](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-advanced)﻿ guide.
This document provides an overview of various types of reports you can run in Ashby. We use this document during implementation, to pick your initial set of reports, and it is also a great reference for expanding your reports over time.
All reports are grouped into high level categories. Template reports can be found in [Report Catalog: Templates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates)﻿
Note, that with Ashby's flexible report builders, we can build any other kind of report you'd like, that is not shown here. If you're interested in that and have trouble building the report yourself, contact your Ashby point person!
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#before-you-get-started)Before you Get Started
As you read through the report catalog, keep in mind that all of the following reports can be filtered and grouped by any field and can be reported on for any timeframe you'd like.
We have some general recommendations on how to filter the reports:
  * Most companies tend to break up their hiring process into a few major areas (e.g. business and product & engineering). This is helpful since these different types of roles can have a vastly different recruiting process. When using any of the reports below, you most likely should run them separately for each of these major areas.


  * If you are hiring across different locations with very different local labor markets or recruiting processes, you will likely want to further separate your reports by location / region


  * For each of the reports below, filtering and/or grouping by Source, Department, Hiring Manager, etc. will allow you to compare relative performance between different parts of your team and different channels.


#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#conversion-rate-reports)Conversion Rate Reports
Conversion reports allow you to find inefficiencies in your hiring funnel. Are there parts of your funnel in which too many or too few candidates are moving to the next stage? You can answer these questions with the reports below.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#conversion-rates-from-a-particular-stage-over-time)Conversion Rates from a particular stage over time
To spot trends in conversion rates over time, you can focus on a particular stage and take a look at how many candidates pass through that stage.
There are a few variations of this report, but one popular one is to look at onsite interviews and their outcome over time.
![Document image](https://static.slab.com/prod/uploads/l73blu9g/posts/images/4rYa1sLmA934SJVl-KBgalSI.png)
﻿
This report shows which percentage of onsite interviews that occurred each week ended up hired, rejected by you, rejected by the candidate or are still active. This kind of report lets you quickly spot if your conversion rate is changing from your historical average.
﻿
This video uses the Application field Outcome but Archive Reason Type is also popular.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#activity-reports)Activity Reports
Activity reports help you report on the volume of your activities. E.g. how many hires are you making? How many new candidates are you getting into interview process? How many interviews are you scheduling across different stages?
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#new-applications-by-source)New Applications by Source
See how the volume of new applications by source is changing over time. This report can give you a sense if new initiatives are performing as expected (e.g. if you just started sourcing for a new role).
Please note that depending on your ATS, you will either see Job Considerations or Applications when selecting your subject for this report.
![Document image](https://static.slab.com/prod/uploads/l73blu9g/posts/images/DjsBtb3CAGdWpWr4gsuiAFD_.png)
﻿
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#interviews-by-stage-over-time)Interviews by Stage Over Time
This is another way to look at if you are getting enough candidate volume to reach your hiring goals. Based on the conversion reports you will know how many interviews you need at specific stages in the funnel to make one hire. This report will show you if you're trending towards reaching that goal or not.
![Document image](https://static.slab.com/prod/uploads/l73blu9g/posts/images/AqweDBfDkIvmOvNXAv_HNPO1.png)
﻿
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#alert-on-hires-without-necessary-fields-alerts)Alert on Hires without Necessary Fields ([Alerts](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/alerts)﻿)
This example demonstrates how to setup a custom list report with an alert on recent hires missing required fields, such as Recruiter, Source or an associated Hiring Manager.
﻿
These types and similar reports can be added to a data quality dashboard to combine reports, alerts and dashboards in one suite.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#offer-reports)Offer Reports
Offer reports show you how well you're doing at closing candidates that made it all the way through your interview process.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#offer-acceptance-rate)Offer Acceptance Rate
You can also report an overall offer acceptance rate as a single number. By using a segmentation report, you can group all offer decisions by their outcome. This report has the option to present results as a single percentage.
![Document image](https://static.slab.com/prod/uploads/l73blu9g/posts/images/Wmk0jlTc19OOMBmOB5d6iYCO.png)
﻿
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#currently-pending-offers)Currently Pending Offers
You can use Ashby not only for historical data, but also for keeping track of current activities, e.g. how many offers are currently pending. The most simple version of this report is simply a tile on a dashboard that shows the total amount of pending offers (again, filtered by any field you want). As always in Ashby, you can then click into the number to see the underlying candidates.
![Document image](https://static.slab.com/prod/uploads/l73blu9g/posts/images/GdOEGPr5W3t6_F44hP0nq53V.png)
﻿
﻿
Alternatively you can show pending offers in aggregate. For example, below, all pending offers by department.
![Document image](https://static.slab.com/prod/uploads/l73blu9g/posts/images/Kur4kzes52VSJWBGdJq7gU46.png)
﻿
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#current-pipeline-reports)Current Pipeline Reports
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#current-pipeline-with-aggregate-numbers)Current Pipeline with Aggregate Numbers
This type of report can give you a high level overview of where active candidates are currently in process, showing the jobs they are interviewing for and the stage they are currently in.
![Document image](https://static.slab.com/prod/uploads/l73blu9g/posts/images/lnIeu1cn95v8MRfGyTDuZ1OP.png)
﻿
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#referrals)Referrals
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials#referral-leaderboard)Referral Leaderboard
Shows all referrals submitted in a specific timeframe, grouped by referrer.
![Document image](https://static.slab.com/prod/uploads/l73blu9g/posts/images/UEEWV9tS39vkW4MxlO9IyXYx.png)
﻿
You can group this report further, to show the outcome of each referral as well. Another common use is to group by department.
﻿
﻿

# Requested permissions for the Chrome Extension, Slack and other Integrations
8 min
Copy
In this guide, we'll walk through the permissions requested for other integrations in Ashby, including the chrome extension, Slack, marketplace integrations and out developer API.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/requested-permissions-for-the-chrome-extension-slack-and-other-integrations#ashbys-chrome-extension-privileges)Ashby’s Chrome Extension Privileges
See [Chrome Extension](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/chrome-extension)﻿ for more details about this feature.
The Ashby Chrome Extension requests the following permissions for candidate sourcing:
  * **Read and change data on specific sites:**


  * LinkedIn: Adds Ashby indicators to LinkedIn search pages but makes no other changes.


  * GitHub: Displays matching candidates or pulls potential matches but does not modify data.


  * Gmail: Reads email addresses in threads to cross-reference candidates but does not modify emails.


  * Ashby App: Ensures the extension works seamlessly with Ashby (e.g., adding candidates, enrolling sequences).


  * **Read your browsing history:**


  * Detects page changes to automatically activate the extension. Without this, users must open Ashby manually.


  * **Modify the data you copy and paste:**


  * Allows copying candidate details displayed in the extension.


  * **Manage downloads:**


  * Adds candidates to Ashby when a resume PDF is downloaded from LinkedIn.


  * **Read and change your data:**


  * Enables rendering of the extension UI within LinkedIn, GitHub, and Gmail.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/requested-permissions-for-the-chrome-extension-slack-and-other-integrations#ashbys-integration-for-slack)Ashby's Integration for Slack
For more on setting up the integration for Slack, check out [Slack](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/slack)﻿.
Ashby's integration for Slack allows your Talent team to receive recruiting alerts, automate interview workflows, and manage hiring conversations inside Slack. Ashby requests broad permissions at install time, even if only a subset is used. This is because of how Slack scopes work. This section outlines the permissions requested and why we ask for them.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/requested-permissions-for-the-chrome-extension-slack-and-other-integrations#why-ashby-requests-elevated-slack-scopes)Why Ashby requests elevated Slack scopes
Slack groups multiple actions (e.g., posting and joining channels) under single permission categories, which means:
  * Even if Ashby only posts alerts, it must also request scopes that allow managing channels or uploading files.


  * Slack apps cannot selectively request parts of a scope, all bundled capabilities must be accepted together.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/requested-permissions-for-the-chrome-extension-slack-and-other-integrations#scopes-ashby-needs-to-work-correctly)Scopes Ashby needs to work correctly:
The Ashby integration accesses the following scopes:  
| Scope  | Description  |  
| --- | --- |  
| channels:read  | View basic information about public channels in a workspace  |  
| channels:manage  | Manage public channels that your Slack app has been added to and create new ones. Enables Ashby to automatically create candidate-specific channels, add interviewers, and archive channels post-hire. This is only triggered if auto-channel workflows are enabled.  |  
| chat:write  | Post messages in approved channels & conversations  |  
| chat:write.public  | Send messages to channels Ashby Bot isn't a member of. Allows Ashby to deliver alerts (e.g., new applicants, interview updates) to channels without requiring admins to manually invite the bot.  |  
| files:write  | Upload attachments. Used to deliver resumes, prep docs, or scorecards via Slack, along with scheduled dashboards. Ashby does not delete files unless explicitly instructed; this capability is included because Slack groups file actions under one scope.  |  
| groups:read  | View basic information about private channels that Ashby Bot has been added to  |  
| groups:write  | Manage private channels that Ashby Bot has been added to and create new ones. Enables Ashby to automatically create candidate-specific channels, add interviewers, and archive channels post-hire. This is only triggered if auto-channel workflows are enabled  |  
| im:read  | View basic information about direct messages Ashby Bot has been added to  |  
| im:write  | Start direct messages with people  |  
| users:read  | View people in a workspace  |  
| users:read.email  | View email addresses of people in a workspace  |  
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/requested-permissions-for-the-chrome-extension-slack-and-other-integrations#how-permissions-are-used)How permissions are used:
Ashby only uses these permissions in line with the workflows your team enables in Ashby. If you're not using Slack alerts or auto-channel creation, those actions will not be performed.
However, Slack requires all permissions to be accepted up front during installation, regardless of whether they’re actively used.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/requested-permissions-for-the-chrome-extension-slack-and-other-integrations#ashby-post-hire-integrations)Ashby Post-Hire Integrations
Ashby integrates with HRIS systems (e.g., [Hi Bob](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hi-bob)﻿ , [Workday](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/workday)﻿) to:
  * Mark hired candidates as employees.


  * Create employee records in the HRIS.


  * Support post-hire workflows like tracking requisitions (e.g., in Workday).


Ashby uses HRIS API keys to submit and query relevant records. The specific access needed depends on your HRIS. Refer to Ashby’s knowledge base for detailed integration requirements.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/requested-permissions-for-the-chrome-extension-slack-and-other-integrations#marketplace-integrations)Marketplace Integrations
Ashby offers:
  * First-party integrations developed by Ashby (e.g., [Zoom](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/zoom)﻿ ).


  * Third-party integrations developed by partners (e.g. [Levels.fyi](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/levelsfyi)﻿).


For third-party integrations, please contact the vendor directly for security, access, or privacy-related questions.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/requested-permissions-for-the-chrome-extension-slack-and-other-integrations#ashby-developer-api)Ashby Developer API
Ashby provides a Developer API for customers, accessed via API keys:
  * Access Control: Keys are generated by users with the "Organization Admin" role and shown only at creation.


  * Management: Keys can be individually deactivated.


  * Permissions: Keys can be scoped to specific endpoints to limit access for integrations or partners.


﻿[For full details, visit Ashby Developer API documentation.](https://developers.ashbyhq.com/reference/introduction "For full details, visit Ashby Developer API documentation.")﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Candidates
# How do I merge duplicate candidate profiles?
11 min
Copy
This guide covers how duplicates are detected and how merging candidate profiles works in Ashby. Creating duplicate candidates is automatically prevented in most cases, but when duplicates do exist, you can merge them manually.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#how-duplicate-detection-works-in-ashby)How duplicate detection works in Ashby
Duplicates are matched based on name, email address, and social links.
Ashby matches duplicates based on three candidate criteria:
  * Name


  * Email Address(es)


  * Social links (LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter).


Please notethat duplicates are flagged for users added to your Employeespage in Admin but are not displayed for users added as part of an agency.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#how-to-merge-candidate-profiles)How to merge candidate profiles
When a duplicate candidate profile is detected in Ashby, a Duplicate Candidate button will show on both candidate profiles, to the left of the options to Follow Up, Email, Change Stage, Archive and More at the top of the profile.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c9592353a137c9597078de22423e6ba3.png)
﻿
You can click the Duplicate Candidate button to view the potential profile matches that have been flagged and take action accordingly. Any differences between the candidate profiles will be highlighted - you will also have the option to view candidate resumes. You can click the possible duplicate candidate’s name to open their profile in a new tab if you’d like to make further checks. If more than one duplicate is detected, you can use the Previous and Next arrows to move between candidate profiles.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/381eb8803281e9f8f3282dd0b462056b.png)
﻿
You have two options to take action on the duplicate warning:
  1. Not a Duplicate: Confirm that this profile is not a duplicate to remove the Duplicate Candidate message and not merge the profiles.


  1. Merge Profiles: Merge the two candidate profiles together. On clicking Merge Profiles, you will be able to see a preview of the merged candidate information prior to confirming. Confirm the merge by clicking Merge. Please note that this action is irreversible.


The candidate you took the merge action on (listed under This Candidate on the Possible Duplicate Candidate screen) will be the profile that retains its candidate ID after merging. 
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8927128f1cb911f33f26027ba4f19a9b.png)
﻿
If there is more than one duplicate, the duplicate profile won’t immediately be removed when action is taken. When looking at additional duplicates, you can click the Previous arrow to see the merged/marked as distinct candidate. Action buttons will be disabled for profiles you’ve already taken action on.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#what-if-a-candidate-is-considered-for-a-job-on-bot)What if a candidate is considered for a job on both of their profiles?
If both profiles that are merged have job considerations, all job considerations will remain intact on the merged profile. For example, if the candidate has been considered for the same role on both profiles, when the two profiles are merged, there will be two job considerations on the one candidate profile for your records.
If two job considerations are listed on the candidate profile and you’d like them to only be considered for the role once, archive the job consideration you don’t plan to move forward with.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6a37b9445bb71fed04d5280d0c9c26a9.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#does-the-chrome-extension-pick-up-on-existing-prof)Does the Chrome Extension pick up on existing profiles in Ashby?
Yes. When the Chrome extension is opened on a LinkedIn profile, a match is searched for based on the LinkedIn URL.
If a match exists, that person’s profile and existing job considerations are displayed to the users so they can add data to the existing profile as opposed to creating a new one.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/793a5cab40cf08e47f0bebb12d77cf77.png)
﻿
If no match is found, a new profile can be added. Once a profile is added, it will be checked across all three criteria. If a duplicate is found at that point, a duplicate warning will appear, and the two profiles can be merged.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/cc8647304dfb417ace1045eca3dc9e25.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#which-users-can-merge-profiles)Which users can merge profiles?
Any users that have access to edit both profiles that are to be merged can do so. For more information on which access levels can edit candidate profiles, check out [User Permissions](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/user-permissions)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#is-it-possible-to-unmerge-profiles)Is it possible to unmerge profiles?
It is not currently possible to automatically un-merge profiles, but most data from the second profile can be found on the Summary tab of the merged profile in the Other sections.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8347a656cdd7ea29e10d74e7419f6ed4.png)
﻿
To manually un-merge profiles, you must create a new, separate candidate profile and then copy and paste the second candidate’s details into the newly created profile, and/or upload any of the second candidate’s files/resume. You can then remove the second candidate’s details and files from the original profile to avoid further confusion.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#what-happens-if-a-candidate-applies-for-the-same-j)W**hat happens if a candidate applies for the same job twice?**
If a candidate applies for a role again using the same information when they already have an active job consideration, only one job consideration will show on their profile. An additional job consideration will not be created.
Both application forms can be seen in the Forms section of the feed on the candidate’s profile.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a10261628c57e8afdfc979d0f7a86668.png)
﻿
If you regularly see candidates applying for the same role multiple times, check out our guide on [Application Limits](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/application-limits)﻿. If the candidate applies with different information, then an additional candidate profile will be created but may be flagged as a duplicate.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#what-happens-if-a-candidate-was-sourced-and-add-to)What happens if a candidate was sourced and add to a job as a lead, then applied for the same job themselves?
In this case, the candidate continue to have just one job consideration on their profile for the role but would be moved to the Application Review stage.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#how-do-custom-fields-work-with-merged-candidates)How do custom fields work with merged candidates?
When merging candidates, the custom fields associated with the job considerations associated with the original candidate profile and the merged duplicate will be preserved post-merge. The custom fields associated with the primary candidate profile (under the Candidate view) will not be updated by the duplicate candidate profile as part of the merge.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#if-duplicate-candidates-have-different-data-retent)If duplicate candidates have different data retention dates, what happens when they are merged?
The primary profile's retention dates (the profile listed under This Candidate when merging profiles, more on this [above](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-merge-duplicate-candidate-profiles#how-to-merge-candidate-profiles)﻿) will be kept on the merged profile. If you have sent any consent emails to a candidate prior to merging and the candidate provides consent via a link sent out, then the Consent Retention Data will be updated.
﻿  

﻿

Billing & Plans
# Sales Tax FAQ
7 min
Copy
Effective as of 12/1/2024, Ashby will begin collecting Sales Tax across all customers and jurisdictions in the U.S. where required.
This guide covers commonly asked questions but if your question isn’t covered here, please reach out to billings@ashbyhq.com.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#why-do-i-see-the-message-access-denied-when-trying)**Why do I see the message “Access Denied” when trying to access Billing Settings?**
If you see a message that your billing settings are managed outside of Ashby, please reach out to support@ashbyhq.com to make changes.
If you see this message when trying to access your [Billing Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/billing/settings "Billing Settings"), it means you have not been assigned Billing access within Ashby. You can reach out to your internal Billing contact to update your billing information.
![Ashby 2024-10-29 at 11.25.38 AM.jpg](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/2TatbpNJQdQyGfj8eqUqo_e2e70dcb-8e03-47dd-a205-81c7d4718ad6.png?format=webp)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#why-is-there-sales-tax-on-my-invoice)Why is there Sales Tax on my invoice?
Sales tax on Software as a Service (SaaS) varies based on the state or country’s tax laws. Many jurisdictions have changed their tax regulations to classify SaaS as a taxable service. To comply with these laws, we are required to charge sales tax where applicable.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#why-are-you-charging-sales-tax-now-but-werent-befo)Why are you charging sales tax now but weren’t before?
As our company has expanded, we now have nexus in additional jurisdictions. Consequently, sales tax will be applied to more invoices.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#i-dont-have-to-pay-tax-on-other-saas-tools-that-i)I don’t have to pay tax on other SaaS tools that I have. Why are you charging me but they aren’t?
Different companies may have different tax obligations based on their business locations and economic nexus. We are required to collect sales tax in certain jurisdictions due to our presence there.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#my-headquarters-moved-from-x-to-y-how-does-this-af)**My headquarters moved from X to Y. How does this affect my sales tax?**
First, the difference in sales tax laws between jurisdictions X and Y could affect both the applicable tax rates and the taxability of SaaS services.
Second, your sales tax obligation could change based on if the invoicing company has a presence in location Y. If the company has no presence in Y then they would not collect sales tax on your behalf. However, you would be required to report and pay use tax on your own (if applicable).
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#what-happens-if-i-dont-pay-the-sales-tax)**What happens if I don’t pay the sales tax?**
If you don’t pay sales tax we will require an exemption certificate to keep on file. Otherwise, we are legally required to collect and report sales tax on your behalf. Outstanding balances on your invoice may lead to disruptions in your service.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#am-i-responsible-for-sales-tax-on-prior-invoices)**Am I responsible for sales tax on prior invoices?**
We will not go back and apply or collect sales tax on prior invoices. However, you are likely obligated to pay use tax on those invoices to your local taxing authority.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#what-if-i-am-exempt-from-sales-tax)**What if I am exempt from sales tax?**
If your business qualifies for tax exemption, please send a valid exemption certificate for your state or country to billings@ashbyhq.com. Upon verification, we will remove sales tax from your invoices.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sales-tax-faq#what-if-my-address-is-wrong)**What if my address is wrong?**
  * Navigate to Admin > Organization Setup


  * Navigate to Billing


  * Navigate to Settings


  * Note: you must be a Billing User to access these settings**.** If you believe you should be added as a Billing User to manage your company’s billing settings, please reach out to your existing Billing User or to billings@ashbyhq.com to be added.


  * Under Billing Information, review your company’s billing information and address. To add or update, click Edit in Stripe _._


  * You will be taken to a Stripe-hosted billing page. Click Update information _._


  * Update your billing address and information and click Save _._
