Please review the table below to view the number of texts included in your plan.  
| Plan  | Foundations*  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Included Texts  | 1000/month  | 2000/seat/year  | 3000/seat/year  |  
| Additional Texts  | $0.09/text, sold in batches of 1000  | $0.09/text, sold in batches of 1000  | $0.09/text, sold in batches of 1000  |  
*Includes both Foundations and Legacy Plus plans.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#candidate-texting-overview)Candidate Texting Overview
﻿
This guide covers all the features currently supported in Candidate Texting, including:
  * Two-way SMS messages via a shared company SMS number


  * Candidate Texting Templates that support replacement tokens.


  * Schedule template automation, including linking a direct booking text and sending a text upon stage entry.


  * Built-in compliance management to help prevent any issues with your messages being flagged as spam.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#texting-access)Texting Access
Texting currently requires setup support, please contact your CSM or Support to enable it for your account.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#enable-candidate-texting)Enable candidate texting
To enable texting:
  * Navigate to [Admin > Organization Setup > Candidate Texting](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/candidate-texting "Admin > Organization Setup > Candidate Texting")﻿


  * Toggle on Enable Candidate Texting


  * Input your privacy policy (required)


  * Select your default organization phone number, either by selecting a country code, then selecting a number from the list provided, or by clicking Advanced Phone Number Search if you have some specifications around the phone number you’d like to use. 


  * If you do opt to use the Advanced Phone Number Search option, you will be able to specify a country, an area code and also include preferences like what the phone number should start with, end with or contain.


  * Once you’ve added your specifications, click Search Phone Numbers. This will pull up a list of around 30 options. Click Buy beside the option you’d like to go with, or Load More if you’d like to load other options meeting your preferences. Please note that not all area codes or number combinations may be available.


  * Once a number is selected, it isn’t possible to access this option again.


  * Once you have determined a phone number, add your privacy policy in the Company Privacy Policy field. This is required information.


  * Optionally, you can also add in an email address to receive notifications on candidate texting in the Notification Email field.


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0f8729a577933bef45c5bf2cfcf0486b.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2a67fc4226b6a688cf0b3586a1328dbb.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6064f784d9f5d7536d44c013ddd51b00.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8177ce7847c79b49a3b20046122e8d13.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/92806d79470e4219f81b0e47dddfe7b7.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#manage-permissions)Manage permissions
Texting is supported for Elevated Access and Organization Admin users.
To grant access to users:
  * Navigate to [Employees](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/users "Employees")﻿


  * Choose an employee and visit their Permissions tab


  * Set Has Candidate Texting Access to Yes


  * If the user has Elevated Access permissions, optionally scroll to Additional User Permissions and check Create or Edit Text Messaging Templates


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d20f5b5ad715d299d8ba2a192907815b.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/600913a94efe39f0accd7cee13632903.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#manage-notifications)Manage notifications
Texting notifications appear on a user’s home page and can be configured to send via email and/or Slack.
There are two types of Notifications:
  * Home page notifications appear on the Texts tab of the Tasks menu. These tasks can be resolved by replying or clicking the ellipses to resolve.


  * Subscription-based notifications can be enabled in a [user’s personal settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/notifications "user’s personal settings") and will be sent to any user who texts a candidate, is a hiring team member, or follows a job.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7fb8770b0d4302376a8982c04289b03d.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bda99cc0e124251ba373757e9ffca402.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#create-candidate-texting-templates)Create candidate texting templates
Templates help to create a consistent candidate experience and keep things moving fast
Your team can create Organization and Personal Texting Templates:
  * To set up Organization templates, navigate to [Admin>Candidate Texting Templates](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/candidate-texting-templates "Admin>Candidate Texting Templates").


  * Click New to create a new template. Add in a Title to refer to internally and the body of your text message.


  * Click the T icon to access substitution tokens to pre-fill candidate, job consideration, job and sender information.


  * To set up Personal templates, navigate to [Personal Settings>Candidate Texting Templates](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/candidate-texting-templates "Personal Settings>Candidate Texting Templates").


  * Click New to create a new template. Add in a Title to refer to internally and the body of your text message.


  * Click the T icon to access substitution tokens to pre-fill candidate, job consideration, job and sender information.


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6db211eae3198017886bef511ebbc7cc.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#gather-consent-from-candidates-and-leads)Gather consent from candidates and leads
As a best practice, you should always gather and log consent before texting a candidate. Ashby supports gathering it via application forms, via text message, and manually logging consent gathered a different way.
Gathering consent via the application form
  * When texting is enabled, phone number fields will include a consent request for candidates.


  * They can opt in or out at that point. If they don’t respond, the first message Ashby sends will be a request for consent via text.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4c4290e6a8b16e7118cb26d0e4c2f829.png)
﻿
Gathering consent via text message
  * When a lead/candidate hasn’t provided consent, and you attempt to text, they’ll first receive a message to opt-in to receive further messages.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1053206c0b4738b193f3da8b587f2980.png)
﻿
Editing a person’s consent on their candidate profile
  * Consent status can be manually overridden on the Summary tab of the candidate’s profile. You can update the candidate's status if you’ve gathered consent outside of Ashby and want to send a text immediately.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e0fea259a6ac37abfaaf3e38aeb0b136.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#consent-best-practices)Consent best practices
We’ve built consent best practices into the texting feature, including automatically preventing texting people who have opted out of communication, gathering consent from inbound candidates, and clearly identifying your company to the candidate.
  * Ensure your content is relevant to your hiring use case. A part of 10dlc registration is sharing specifically how you will use texting. The default use case is registered and specifically outlines contacting your existing candidates about jobs they’ve applied to and leads about jobs and related hiring events you’d like to share more information with them about. Stick to these use cases to remain compliant.


  * Ensure recipients have provided express consent before texting them about roles. Ashby handles this automatically when consent hasn’t been registered for a candidate. If you override the provided consent, ensure you’re able to provide more details upon request


  * Honor opt-outs. If a candidate’s consent status is Consent Not Given do not attempt to text them again to get permission.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#send-a-text-to-a-candidate)Send a text to a candidate
We currently support sending one-off messages and setting up automation.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#from-the-candidates-profile)From the candidate's profile
Texts can be sent from the Texts tab within the Feed section of the candidate profile. The user can select the number to send messages to, use templates, and/or manually type their message to their candidate.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/06c6cbf3ee78954302c6c7f00a9405e2.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#via-a-scheduling-automation)Via a scheduling automation
Texts can be sent automatically when a candidate enters a corresponding stage by setting up Automate on Stage Entry? on the Automation tab of a schedule interview activity template.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2529c039ca2409b39840141a84dba497.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#set-up-schedule-template-automation)Set up schedule template automation
Automations help streamline your candidate texting workflows. For more information on automation in general, please check out [Automated Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/automated-activities)﻿
We currently support three schedule template automations:
  * Linking a direct booking texting template to a schedule template as part of a schedule interview activity


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f3932445475c41f28489c6b7bbb02e24.png)
﻿
  * Sending a text when a candidate enters a stage


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/046f9e14c8511d6fb7eacd02e8659a0d.png)
﻿
  * Sending an interview reminder as a text message.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f8ef33219f89bb0832d9255bf9dd39e6.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#is-there-an-inbox-view-where-i-can-see-all-the-tex)Is there an inbox view where I can see all the texts across the team?
Not yet, please reach out to support@ashbyhq.com to submit a feature request!
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#what-happens-if-a-candidate-opts-out-of-receiving)What happens if a candidate opts out of receiving texts?
Subsequent attempts to send the candidate texts will automatically be blocked. This does not impact email communication.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#ive-specified-a-phone-number-to-send-out-texts-but)I've specified a phone number to send out texts but want to change it. How do I do this?
﻿  

﻿  

Reach out to support@ashbyhq.com for help with this. 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#can-i-respond-to-candidate-text-messages-via-slack)Can I respond to candidate text messages via Slack?
You can, yes! Once you receive a notification about a new SMS in Slack, you can click Reply on an SMS notification in Slack, type out your response and then click Send Reply to send a response text to the candidate without logging into Ashby.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/06e0dbf331789847598abef6cfcdbc32.png)
﻿
For more on configuring the integration for Slack, check out [Slack](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/slack)﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#included-additional-texts-faq)Included & Additional Texts FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#im-a-plus-plan-customer-how-many-included-texts-do)I’m a Plus plan customer. How many included texts do I get as part of my plan?
Plus plan customers get 2000 texts per seat annually. For example, if your plan includes 100 seats, your team will have access to 200,000 texts per year. If you need more, you can purchase additional texts in batches of 1000.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#what-if-i-purchase-more-seats-as-part-of-my-contra)What if I purchase more seats as part of my contract on a seat-based plan?
Purchasing more seats adds the corresponding number of texts on a prorated basis. So, if you purchase one seat six months into a one-year Plus plan contract, you’ll get 2000 x .5 = 1000 additional texts for the remainder of your contract.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#will-you-warn-me-if-im-close-to-using-up-all-of-my)Will you warn me if I’m close to using up all of my credits?
We will email you to warn you when you have used up 80%, 95%, or 100% of your credits.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#if-i-dont-use-all-my-credits-do-they-roll-over-to)If I don’t use all my credits, do they roll over to the next period?
Texts are tied to a contract period. Unused texts don’t roll over to the next contract year*.
  * *texts are granted yearly for customers on annual or multi-year agreements;


  * *texts are granted monthly for customers on monthly agreements


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#how-long-do-i-have-to-use-additional-purchased-cre)How long do I have to use additional purchased credits?
For monthly plans, you have 30 days from the purchase date to use additional credits.
For annual plans, you have until the end of the current year of your subscription term. Additional batches of texts are co-termed based on your contract term. This way you have one contract with Ashby with one renewal date.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#how-are-credits-deducted)How are credits deducted?
A credit is used for each text message sent from your team’s Ashby account. Inbound messages are not deducted from your allocation. If a long message is sent and is split into multiple messages to the candidate, each message will use a credit.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#what-happens-if-i-run-out-of-credits)What happens if I run out of credits?
We won’t bill you more than you’ve already paid. We will pause the ability to send texts and re-enable them at renewal or if additional texts are purchased. You can purchase additional texts as needed. For annual plans, reach out to your Contract Manager. For month-to-month plans reach out to Support.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#for-seat-based-plans-are-texts-tied-to-individuals)For seat-based plans, are texts tied to individuals?
Texts are allocated based on the number of seats for Plus and Enterprise plans and tied to an organization, not an individual. So, if you have 50 seats on a Plus plan, you can use 50 x 2000 credits = 100,000 credits across any team members.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/EQo_-candidate-texting#does-this-feature-support-international-messaging)Does this feature support international messaging?
SMS is only currently available for customers based in the USA and Canada. Only US and Canada-based candidates can be contacted via the SMS option currently.
﻿

# Understanding Interview Stage Transitions
5 min
Copy
This document aims to review the details of the Interview Stage Transition subject and provides some common reporting examples.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/understanding-interview-stage-transitions#what-is-an-interview-stage-transition)What is an interview stage transition?
When building reports in Ashby one of the subjects available is Interview Stage Transitions.
![Screen Cast 2022-12-16 at 8.22.41 AM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/7AHqNiwGeknNNfEXA9rAN_screencast2022-12-16at82241am.gif)
﻿
When a candidate’s application moves from stage to stage, we record the transition record: which stage are they leaving, which stage are they entering, at what time did they enter the stage and what time did they leave the stage. You can see the available fields for filtering and grouping below.
![Interview Stage Transition fields available for filtering. ](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/rVoccLziy-3DfnSEaZ8Ww_screenshot2022-12-16at82400am.png)
Interview Stage Transition fields available for filtering.
﻿
![Interview Stage Transition fields available for grouping. ](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/kJTv5PjtWhY--3cwWffSZ_screenshot2022-12-16at82423am.png)
Interview Stage Transition fields available for grouping.
﻿
If you have Grouped Interview Stages enabled (see [Utilizing Stage Groups](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/utilizing-stage-groups)﻿ for more), you can filter and group by the stage groups, but otherwise selection around timing, origins and destinations, and duration spent in a given stage are available for reporting.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/understanding-interview-stage-transitions#examining-interview-stage-transition-details)Examining interview stage transition details
When you open any candidate profile in Ashby, you will see the interview stage progress. This gives details around the stage, the timing of the stage, scheduled interviews, and feedback. The stage progress summarized in the profile view is one way to view the interview stage transition details you can report on.
![Screen Shot 2022-12-16 at 8.31.57 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/HRr_WHXVzdW_k_Sn82VRi_screenshot2022-12-16at83157am.png?format=webp)
﻿
If we wanted to build a [custom list report](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/custom-reports#custom-list)﻿ for this candidate, we could pull up the records of individual stage transitions. Note in this report that each row and time stamp corresponds to the profile view transitions above; though in this case, we are looking at the stage groups the individual stages have been mapped into.
![Screen Shot 2022-12-16 at 8.31.57 AM.png](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/HRr_WHXVzdW_k_Sn82VRi_screenshot2022-12-16at83157am.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/understanding-interview-stage-transitions#example-stage-outcomes-over-time)Example: stage outcomes over time
A common reporting need is to examine the outcome of activity from a specific stage group of interest. In this example, we report on the outcome of the recruiter screen stage group over time.
The pattern here is to use Entered At field with the From Stage Group, which results in examining the destination (the next stage, rejection, or being hired) at the time of the decision.
![In this Count Over Time report, we have excluded all applications still in the recruiter screen stage with a NOT filter condition. This ensure we examine only candidates that have entered and exited the stage of interest.](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/JAW8skHTqz4I98gLOl5QR_screencast2022-12-16at84026am.gif)
﻿
In this Count Over Time report, we have excluded all applications still in the recruiter screen stage with a NOT filter condition. This ensure we examine only candidates that have entered and exited the stage of interest.

Offers & E-Signatures
# How do I create offers retrospectively for reporting purposes?
4 min
Copy
This guide covers creating offers for reporting purposes - if you have moved candidates to the Hired stage previously but would like to report on the offers generated in Ashby, this guide will cover the best route to generate those offers.
For more information on updating existing offers, please check out [How do I backdate offers in order to preserve reporting data?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-backdate-offers-in-order-to-preserve-reporting-data)﻿﻿
## ﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-create-offers-retrospectively-for-reporting-purposes#can-i-report-on-offers-if-a-candidate-has-been-mov)Can I report on offers if a candidate has been moved to the Hired stage and the offer was generated and sent outside of Ashby?
We would always recommend creating an offer within Ashby for your records, even if you are sending offer letters and e-signature requests outside of Ashby. If you move a candidate to Hired without generating an offer on the candidate’s profile, we will not have offer details to pull from for your reports.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-create-offers-retrospectively-for-reporting-purposes#how-do-i-create-an-offer-on-a-candidate-that-is-al)How do I create an offer on a candidate that is already in the Hired stage?
To generate an offer, the candidate would first need to be moved back to the Offer stage within the pipeline.
Please note that moving the candidate back to the Offer stage will result in the Consideration Ended At date and the Hired At on the job consideration being updated. Moving the candidate back to the Offer stage will not impact passthrough rate reporting.
To move the candidate back to the Hired stage, click Change Stage while on their candidate profile and select Offer.
Once the candidate has been moved back to the Offer stage, you’ll be prompted to generate an offer for them:
  * Click Create Offer to get started.


  * Complete the offer details, then click Submit.


  * Once the offer has been created, you can click Set Response, then select Accepted to mark the offer as accepted by the candidate. The candidate will then be moved back to the Hired stage.


  * To update the response date, click Update Response again to adjust the response date. This will then ensure that the Hired At date is accurate for your reporting.


﻿

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-create-offers-retrospectively-for-reporting-purposes#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-create-offers-retrospectively-for-reporting-purposes#i-see-a-duplicate-offer-stage-on-the-candidates-in)I see a duplicate Offer stage on the candidate’s interview progress - can I remove the duplicate stage?
When moving the candidate back-and-forth between Offer and Hired stages, you will see duplicates in the Interview Progress section on their profile.
If you’d like to remove the duplicate stages, click the pencil icon beside Interview Progress. You can then remove any duplicate stages by clicking on the trash can icons beside the duplicate stages.
Click Done Editing once you’ve removed the duplicate stages.

Surveys & Questionnaires
# Example Survey Questions
5 min
Copy
A catalog of example questions for the different types of surveys we support.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/example-survey-questions#candidate-experience-surveys)Candidate Experience Surveys
Here are example questions to help build out your candidate experience survey.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/example-survey-questions#linear-rating-question-examples)**Linear Rating Question Examples**
  * The recruiting team’s communications were prompt throughout the interview process.


  * The recruiting team set clear and accurate expectations of the interview process.


  * My interviewers were knowledgeable, professional, and well prepared.


  * I fully understand the role and its responsibilities after the interview process.


  * How satisfied were you with your overall interviewing experience with [Company]?


  * How likely are you to recommend [Company] interview process?


  * How would you rate your overall satisfaction with the [Company] hiring process?


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/example-survey-questions#open-text-question)**Open Text Question**
  * What did you enjoy about our hiring process?


  * What do you think would make our hiring process better?


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/example-survey-questions#multiple-choice)**Multiple Choice**
  * In general, how prepared were the interviewers during your time with them?


  * Very prepared


  * Somewhat prepared


  * Neither prepared or unprepared


  * Somewhat prepared


  * Not prepared


  * In general, how satisfied were you with your recruiter?


  * How clearly did your recruiter describe the position?


  * How clearly did your recruiter describe the interview process?


  * How well did your recruiter answer your questions?


  * How well did your recruiter prepare you for your interviews?


  * Overall, how satisfied were you with the entire recruiting experience at our organization?


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/example-survey-questions#yesno-questions)**Yes/No Questions**
  * Did the interviewers leave you enough time to ask questions during your interview?


  * Do you feel like you met with a diverse panel of interviewers?


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/example-survey-questions#diversity-surveys)Diversity Surveys
These are some example questions we've seen customers implement via our Diversity Survey functionality.
  * Which of the following best describes your current gender identity?


  * Which of the following best describes your race? Choose all that apply


  * Which of the following best describes your sexual orientation?


  * Is English the first language you learned?


  * Are you a person living with disability?


  * Are you a parent or caretaker of children?


  * Do you consider yourself a first generation college graduate?


  * Have you ever served on active duty in the U.S. Armed Forces?

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Getting Started: User Guides
# Getting Started for Recruiting Coordinators
13 min
Copy
Welcome to Ashby! We couldn't be more excited to help you get started. This guide will cover the most common ways recruiting coordinators use Ashby.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#log-in-to-ashby)Log In to Ashby
To sign in, head to [https://app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com/ "https://app.ashbyhq.com"). Ashby uses Google sign-in, Microsoft 365 sign-in and magic links. If your company has SSO set up with Ashby, please use this option to log in. More on signing in can be found at [Signing in to Ashby](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/signing-in-to-ashby)﻿.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#configure-your-personal-settings)Configure your personal settings
A key first step is configuring your personal settings in Ashby. In [Personal Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/personal-info "Personal Settings"), you can do the following:
  * Set your personal info, including your job title, user avatar, timezone and social links


  * Set your notification settings - determine the activities you should be notified about and where you'd like to be notified


  * Set up personal email templates


  * Set up OAuth if needed (please confirm with your admin if this needs to be completed as part of your Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 setup)


For a full walkthrough, please check out [Updating Personal Settings](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/updating-personal-settings)﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#navigate-ashby)Navigate Ashby
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#home-page)Home Page
If you will only be interviewing candidates in the pipeline and won't have any other interaction with candidates, then you'll likely have Limited Access in Ashby. 
To get started, log in to Ashby at [https://app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com/ "https://app.ashbyhq.com") using one of the login options. You should already have an account set up. Once logged in, you'll land on your home page, where you'll be able to access interview briefings and tasks. For a full breakdown of the home page, please check out [Home Page](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/home-page)﻿
**Add and track referrals**
To submit referrals﻿:
  * Head to the Referrals section of the [Home](https://app.ashbyhq.com/home/upcoming "Home") page


  * Click + Referral


  * Creating a direct referral? Click Add Direct Referral then complete the referral form with the candidate details.


  * Creating a referral link? Click Create Referral Link and give your referral link a title. You can then opt to link to a specific job posting using the Link to specific job posting? checkbox and selecting a job posting from the dropdown


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/26278f4b47c38aac31f08c40ab4ba5c3.png)
﻿
﻿  

Our full guide on referrals can be found at [Referrals and Referral Links](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/referrals-and-referral-links)﻿﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#candidate-profile)Candidate Profile
Depending on the permissions you are given, you may have access to view candidate profiles and take action on job considerations. For further information on navigating a candidate profile, check out [Candidate Profile](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-profile)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#candidate-pipeline)Candidate Pipeline
The Pipeline Overviewprovides you a view of candidates across all positions you have access to and allows you to quickly jump between them. 
For more on the pipeline view, check out [Candidate Pipeline](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-pipeline)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#jobs-dashboard-view)Jobs - Dashboard View
The Job Dashboard at Jobs > [Dashboard](https://app.ashbyhq.com/jobs/pipelines "Dashboard") is a high-level overview of the active jobs you follow, have a role on, and have access to. You can also access the Admin page and Job Board from this page. We recommend bookmarking this page to quickly see all of your active jobs in one place.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7b273a2cee774b2dd7e373ee143c5799.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#common-ashby-areas-for-sourcers)Common Ashby Areas for Sourcers
This section will walk you through the key activities you'll complete as a recruiting coordinator, including opening and posting jobs, scheduling interviews, generating offer letters, and adding candidates to your HRIS
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#opening-and-posting-jobs)Opening and Posting Jobs
To create a job, navigate to [Jobs→Admin](https://app.ashbyhq.com/jobs/all "Jobs→Admin"), then click the Create a Job button and follow the steps in the job creation wizard. At this point, you can open the job right away — or configure it further. In the Settings section, there are further configuration options on four tabs.
When you're ready to open the job, click the _Job Status_ button and selectMark as Open. An open job isn't automatically posted to your Ashby job board or any third-party job boards but you will be able to add candidates to the pipeline.
When you're ready to post the job to your job board, you can set up a job posting on the Job Postings tab. You can create as many postings as you'd like for a job. Once published, the posting will show up on your Ashby job board (e.g., jobs.asbhyhq.com/ashby).
For a full guide on creating a job and job postings, check out [Creating & Posting Jobs](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/l-NcIsZrB9ztdr4U3idZr)﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#scheduling-interviews)Scheduling Interviews
With Ashby, you can schedule interviews manually, or create a structured interview process that automates the details of finding times and creating calendar invites. 
For the full details of setting up and scheduling interviews, check out [Scheduling & Interviews: An Introduction](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduling-and-interviews-an-introduction)﻿ to view the options available.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#generating-offers-and-offer-letters)Generating offers and offer letters
When a candidate moves to the Offer stage in the candidate pipeline, an offer activity will be generated in the Activities section of their candidate profile. Click Create Offer to complete the Offer Details form. The form data will be used to populate substitution fields in the Offer Letter PDF that is generated. 
You can also send out e-signature requests (sent via DropBox Sign) and create offer letter templates to help structure your processes further. 
For a full guide, check out [Offers and Offer Letters](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/offers-and-offer-letters)﻿ and [E-Signature Offers](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers)﻿﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#add-candidates-to-your-hris)Add Candidates to your HRIS
When a candidate accepts an offer, you see an option to push hired candidates to your HRIS system. Clicking the button that appears will create a new Employee in the system, including the latest Offer data.
All HRIS integration options can be found in the [Integrations Marketplace](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/integrations/marketplace "Integrations Marketplace").
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/getting-started-for-recruiting-coordinators#my-profile-picture-has-synced-over-from-google-wor)My profile picture has synced over from Google Workspace but it’s very pixelated. Why?
Images synced over from Google Workspace do not have a high enough resolution. As such, we’d recommend users upload their avatar within [Personal Settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/personal-info "Personal Settings") to fix this.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3bd9ae2c6b84fa648351e2310d15c63c.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby Analytics
Getting Started with Analytics
# Navigating Ashby Analytics
17 min
Copy
This guide provides an overview of Ashby Analytics. Learning some of the key concepts of Ashby Analytics will help you quickly build your own reports and visualizations and get previously hidden insights about your recruiting efforts.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#a-quick-tour-of-ashby)A Quick Tour of Ashby
This section starts with a quick introduction of Ashby Analytics. If you want to instead learn how to build reports, jump ahead to [Ashby Analytics: Key Reporting Concepts](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-analytics-key-reporting-concepts)﻿.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#key-areas-of-ashby-analytics)Key Areas of Ashby Analytics
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#home-page)Home page
This is the page you will land on when logging into Ashby. For Analytics users, this will be blank at first.
You can click the + icon to add dashboards and reports so you can easily access them when you log in.
Every user’s home page is unique, so they can each pin the reports they find most useful to their own home page.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/22018fae3cdf185c3f8010066af27cb5.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#candidates)Candidates
**Search**
Here you can view a list of your candidates and create and save searches. Use filters to determine your criteria, then click Save to add this as a saved candidate search in your account.
You can use the Advanced toggle to switch between basic filters and advanced filters. Basic filters provide the most commonly used filters, while Advanced filters give you more filtering options to choose from.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/81d09948afa8b7f330a0d1cd640588e0.png)
﻿
﻿  

**Saved Searches**
Here you can view all saved candidate search reports. You can choose from searches you yourself have created and saved (under Mine), or searches that have been set up by other users in your organization. Please note, if other users have set their searches as private and you are not on the access list for the search, you will not see the saved search listed. More on this at [Confidential Reporting & Content Access Control](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/confidential-reporting-and-content-access-control)﻿﻿
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c9b4763b82017fae4fe4b9c82fa9d00b.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#jobs)Jobs
View and filter your jobs and job pipelines here.
You can click into a job to get more specific data on the stages candidates are in and access the pre-built job dashboard for the role.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6275e9053c1975d61766a19b00a9c2a5.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#reports)Reports
**Templates**
Here you can create reports from a template. For more on the templates available, please check out [Report Catalog: Templates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-templates)﻿.
For more on the templated alerts, check out the [Alerts Library](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/alerts-library)﻿.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/67fd26191e3757bcca3d06a3ed9806d5.png)
﻿
﻿  

**Build**
Where you can build reports from scratch. You can select from the following report options: Segmentation, Count Over Time, Candidate List and Custom List. You can read more on creating custom reports at [Custom Reports](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/custom-reports)﻿.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c148d40cdcd9a65d22a2eb655c8cbaf7.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

**Saved Reports**
Where you can access all reports that have been saved. These are split into the following categories:
Mine: Reports that you have created.
Private: Reports that are set as private but that you are on the access list for.
Organization: Reports that have been created by other users in the organization that can be accessed by all users.
You can also access saved reports of a specific type from this list (for example, view all Candidate Searches, Count Over Time or Time in Process reports)
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/010bfe8f6274847b9006058d48cef443.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#dashboards)Dashboards
**Create Dashboards**
Here you can start building a dashboard to display your reports. For more on creating dashboards, check out [Building Your First Dashboard](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/building-your-first-dashboard)﻿﻿
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/22bc80faad07275b23840ae5234c5342.png)
﻿
**Saved Dashboards**
Access all saved dashboards that you have built and have access to here. You can view your own dashboards, private dashboards you have access to, organization-wide dashboard, scheduled dashboards and archived dashboards.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a01e22770500d7bdf3f3b3e3a15b0eea.png)
﻿
﻿  

**Core Dashboards**
Some pre-built dashboards are available so you can access commonly requested metrics quickly. More on the available reports and dashboards at [Core Dashboards](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/core-dashboards)﻿.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c38576f996e3f6f1736964de5fdec05d.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#admin)Admin
In Admin, you can adjust account settings, including adding and amending employee access in Employees, viewing and adjusting your billing settings in Billing, create a grouped interview plan in Grouped Interview Plan and more. Please check out the key concepts and FAQ below for more specific information on areas of Admin.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#saving-reports-dashboards)Saving Reports & Dashboards
This video will show you how to save a report and add it to a dashboard.
﻿
Once you’ve build your report, click Save to add it to your Saved Reports. A saved report can be added to dashboards and accessed by other users in your organization (pending the access control settings on the report).
When saving, you can give your report a title and determine whether access control is on (so only you and users you specify can access the report) or off (the report can be viewed by anyone in your organization). Click Save to confirm your settings and save the report.
Please note that users accessing the report can only see data relating to the departments, locations and jobs that they have access to.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/585d12d322e4f450a5f6e13f03319f92.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/567171c8d8e66d595ca6947acea6ae29.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#adding-the-report-to-a-dashboard)Adding the report to a dashboard
Once you’ve created a dashboard by hovering over Dashboards and clicking Create Dashboard, you can click + Add Item, then Report to add your report to your dashboard
Select a saved report to add it to your dashboard.
You can use the bottom-right arrow in the corner of your report to click and drag to resize the report tile on your dashboard. Click and drag anywhere else on the report to move it to a different area on your dashboard. Make sure to hit Save if you make changes that you’d like to keep.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/083d52ab6d60f751912f6cc69593b4af.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d07fba7eac854c3c8cdd937e2f85ef65.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4584aa3487d4196765d853d2b7f674dc.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#using-dashboard-filters)Using Dashboard Filters
This video shows how add filters that filter an entire Dashboard at once.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#adding-a-filter-to-a-dashboard)**Adding a filter to a dashboard**
When on your dashboard, click Add Item, then Filter to add a filter of your choice.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a713a8571254eb6d729c62f53101785c.png)
﻿
You can use the search bar to find a specific filter, or scroll through the list to find the filter you’re looking for.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/15e41a18faef00a68cdb2bcb3dfa4e9e.png)
﻿
Once you’ve selected your filter, you will see a Not Connected Yet message. This means you need to connect your filter up to the reports that you’d like to filter down further in order for the filter to work.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/66038974591be4f850adf92b352e8243.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/navigating-ashby-analytics#connecting-a-dashboard-filter-to-a-report)Connecting a dashboard filter to a report
To connect a filter to a report, click on the filter icon on the report tile.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/279a1980dab19aa937db1422f5475a9c.png)
﻿
From here, specify the field that you’d like to connect the filter to (for example, if you’re filtering per job on your dashboard, look for the Job Consideration > Job field.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e96014724861a3420e89f1d40c50f16b.png)
﻿
Once you’ve determined your field to filter by, you can close out the wizard. You’ll now see the filter icon indicator on the report is showing in green. The dashboard filter will now apply to your report when amended.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/68b697c7161a099ef51b33998ea63dee.png)
﻿
If you’d like to require users to select a value before seeing results across the dashboard, you can check the Require Value? checkbox beside the filter.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/df687024c095c76b21216627fe5d18a6.png)
﻿
﻿

ai-notetaker:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI Notetaker
56 min
Copy
Ashby’s native AI notetaker frees up hiring teams to focus on evaluating candidates by automatically capturing detailed, structured notes during interviews. This speeds up your time-to-feedback and gives rich candidate context to help your team align quickly and make faster, more confident hiring decisions.
You can opt-in to use AI features in the Opt-In Features section of Admin.
A free trial option is available for the AI notetaker. This free trial is available across the Foundations, Plus, Enterprise and Legacy Plus plans. For more on this, check out [How does the free trial work with the AI Notetaker?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-does-the-free-trial-work-with-the-ai-notetaker)﻿﻿
The AI Notetaker can only be used for interviews scheduled via Ashby. 
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#overview)Overview
**What features are included with the AI notetaker add-on?**
  * Automatically record and transcribe your meetings (interviews and debriefs)


  * Generated interview summary notes and insights


  * AI-assistance for drafting feedback submissions


  * Interview-specific AI chat assistant


  * Granular candidate consent, opt-out, data retention options


  * Connects meeting data with emails, feedback, notes and more


#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#enabling-and-ai-notetaker-setup)Enabling and AI notetaker setup
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#enabling-the-ai-notetaker)Enabling the AI notetaker
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#opt-in-to-using-the-ai-notetaker)Opt-In to using the AI notetaker
To enable the AI notetaker in your Ashby account:
  * Navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > Opt-In Features _._


  * If you’ve yet to opt-in to AI features using the Enable AI Features option, you will need to opt-in to then enable the AI Notetaker tool.


  * Toggle on the AI Notetaker option. 


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/U0vJsnbSxDDHFpI9X2qq2_opt-in-features-acent-ashby-2026-01-15-at-94802-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
When you toggle on the AI Notetaker option, this will open up the setup wizard. Initially, the wizard will ask who the AI Notetaker should be enabled for. Here you can choose between the following options:
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/DL7BsoQJAJ7bBpKmCLHZx_opt-in-features-acent-ashby-2026-01-14-at-105741-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
**Enable for all interviewers:** Everyone in your organization will be able to record interviews once you enable the tool.
**Select individual interviewers:** Specify the users who should have the AI notetaker enabled for them before enabling the tool. If you click this, you will then see a list of users in your Ashby account and determine who should have access. Once you've determined your preferred settings, click Enable to confirm.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#default-setting-for-interviewers)Default Setting for Interviewers
You can adjust your default AI notetaker settings for interviewers across your organization by heading to Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > AI Notetaker.
Use the Default AI Notetaker Setting for Interviewers dropdown to determine whether the AI notetaker will be off or on for interviewers by default (this will automatically apply to any new users added to your organization):
  * Select Disabled by default for the AI notetaker to be off for all interviewers unless enabled for specific users in the table below (or in their profile in Admin > Employees).


  * Select Enabled for all interviewers by default for the AI notetaker to be on for all interviewers unless disabled for specific users in the grid below (or in their profile in Admin > Employees).


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Z-g_8WsPx3bb2-8q-WanE_ai-notetaker-acent-ashby-2026-01-14-at-103347-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Depending on your default setting, you can use the Enable for All Interviewers or Disable for All Interviewers button on the grid showing each user and their AI Notetaker access setting if you'd like to remove any individual settings that override the organization's default and ensure everyone has the default setting applied.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/rVWojulFkKOD8SNIyPwr9_ai-notetaker-acent-ashby-2026-01-14-at-104148-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If you opt to switch the option selected in the Default AI Notetaker Setting for Interviewerssetting, then you will also have the option to revert any individual overrides to the new default.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/G7ih_ff--qsMu5sZiL3g4_ai-notetaker-acent-ashby-2026-01-14-at-103856-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#enabling-or-disabling-the-ai-notetaker-for-specifi)Enabling or disabling the AI notetaker for specific users via the employee's page
Along with the grid underneath your AI Notetaker default settings, you can individually override each user's AI notetaker settings from within their user profile.
To enable the AI notetaker on a user’s profile:
  * Navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > Employees.


  * Select the user in question and navigate to the Interviewer Info tab.


  * Switch on the Enable AI Notetaker? option.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f329d72cd42f8783c4ec5405deeddabb.png)
﻿
If one interviewer on a panel has the AI notetaker enabled and the AI notetaker is enabled on the interview or meeting activity at the point of scheduling, then the entire panel will be recorded.
If you have a panel of four different interviews but one interviewer in one interview event has the AI notetaker enabled, all events will be recorded. We’re looking to add more granular controls in the future.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#interview-locations-and-the-ai-notetaker)Interview locations and the AI notetaker
The AI notetaker supports Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. Each platform will provide slightly different experiences. Interviews with the Phone Call or Custom locations will not be recorded.
AI notetaker does not currently support MS Teams on GCC High or Zoom Gov.
When scheduling an interview, the AI notetaker will generally be scheduled to join meetings up to a minute prior to the scheduled started time to ensure it is available at the beginning and to prevent any delays in starting your meeting. It will appear in it’s own cell within your meeting.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#zoom)Zoom
AI notetaker will not work if you have end-to-end encryption turned on in your Zoom Admin
  * If there is no waiting room, AI notetaker will join the zoom call automatically at the time of the scheduled interview start.


  * If you have a waiting room, AI notetaker will enter the waiting room when the host starts the meeting. Make sure to admit the AI Notetaker so it can join the interview.


  * The recording indicator within Zoom will not be on when AI notetaker is present, unless you are also recording the meeting using Zoom’s native recording feature.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#google-meet)Google Meet
It’s important that Host Management is turned off within your Google Meet settings so that all meeting participants are considered to be co-hosts, and have the ability to admit the AI notetaker into the call.
  * AI Notetaker will join a meeting in the waiting room and must be admitted into the meeting by a host to begin recording. 


  * They will then be listed as a contributor within the call.


Google has introduced a separate section in the waiting room for meeting bots like AI Notetaker. The AI Notetaker may be added to a "with potential risks" queue, where the default action will be set to Deny. This is a general Google change applied to all bots and does not reflect any new risk specific to Ashby. For more information on the change, check out Google's Workspace Updates blog [here](https://workspaceupdates.googleblog.com/2026/02/safeguarded-guest-admit-flow-in-google-meet.html "here").
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/BSQA14YgDoMPkskruDyCK_ashby-notetaker-queue.png?format=webp)
﻿
Click the three dots to the right of Deny and select Admit Entry to allow the AI Notetaker to join the interview and start recording.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/k9CPEXLLF2vpkDkmNq-q4_ashby-notetaker-admit.png?format=webp)
﻿
  * AI Notetaker can only wait in the waiting room for 10 minutes before being removed from the meeting. This is a rule for all Google Meet meetings and cannot be changed. A host must join within the first 10 minutes to admit the notetaker into the meeting, or the meeting will not be recorded.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#microsoft-teams)Microsoft Teams
  * AI Notetaker will join a meeting in the waiting room and must be admitted into the meeting by a host to begin recording.


  * AI Notetaker can only wait in the waiting room for 30 minutes before being removed from the meeting. This is a rule for all MS Teams meetings and cannot be changed. A host must join within the first 30 minutes to admit the notetaker into the meeting, or the meeting will not be recorded.


#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#scheduling-and-interviewing-with-the-ai-notetaker)Scheduling and interviewing with the AI notetaker
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#enabling-in-scheduling-defaults)Enabling in Scheduling Defaults
If you’d like the AI notetaker to be enabled by default across all interviews, you can enable it within your scheduling defaults﻿ at Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > Scheduling Defaults.
  * On the Communications tab within Scheduling Defaults, enable the AI Notetaker option


  * Select the recording mode from the following options: 


  * **Speaker view:** Only video of the active speaker will be captured. The recording will switch between active speakers automatically with the flow of the conversation. This is the default setting.


  * **Gallery view:** All participants will be recorded in a grid layout.


  * **Audio only:** Only audio will be captured. Video will appear as a black screen.


Both speaker and gallery view will also capture any screen sharing during the recorded interview.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e04cf8b1a9dcf5bccdf92029f2d35c3c.png)
﻿
![An example of a gallery view recording.](https://cdn.zappy.app/df44e23b6aca0efe3e8fd7260c85c03b.png)
An example of a gallery view recording.
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#enabling-in-interview-activity-templates)Enabling in Interview Activity Templates
For more on creating schedule interview activities, check out [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities)﻿.
To add the AI notetaker to your schedule interview activity:
  * Navigate to Jobs > Jobs and select the job


  * Head to the Interview Plan section of the role and click on the schedule interview activity to be amended.


  * Navigate to the Communication tab


  * In the AI Notetaker section, enable the AI notetaker and select your recording option.


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3c3112c118824f9a913846c80d10dae9.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#manual-scheduling)**Manual Scheduling**
When manually scheduling an interview, you can configure the AI notetaker to join the meeting on the Communications tab.
This also allows you to specify whether the AI notetaker will be enabled for a specific interview.
  * Click on the AI Notetaker section of the _Communications_ tab


  * Enable AI Notetaker


  * Determine the recording mode.


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/50211fd26873c8a3733a5ed9d604c872.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#viewing-and-editing-the-recording-status-on-the-ca)Viewing and editing the recording status on the candidate profile
You can view whether an upcoming interview will be or is being recorded on the interview event on the candidate’s profile. An icon will show on the interview activity.
If you’d like to set a specific interview to be recorded, or set it to not be recorded if it is due to be recorded, click _Actions_ and:
  * Select Record this interview to record the interview


  * Select Cancel Planned Recording to cancel the recording of the interview


When enabling or disabling recording on an already scheduled interview, if calendar invites have already been sent, then updated calendar invites will be sent to the candidate and participants.
This is to ensure that recording disclosure messaging is appropriately added or removed from the invites to ensure that all participants are aware.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1755173cb5c5143f8aeb30475a29799b.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/547220f4628dae51bba129e8d7b33068.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1a314470f7b2d91e3b3fdcf76a0ad550.png)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#consent-management-and-data-retention)Consent management and data retention
Candidates will be able to opt-out of recordings on their own. They can do this by clicking the link included with disclosure messaging in calendar invites and confirmation emails. On the following page, they can click Opt out to update their status.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7ea23bdbc8a55cce3ae70ebe2dbed090.png)
﻿
Once a candidate opts out, any scheduled recordings will be canceled and automatically disabled for any future interviews. Any existing calendar invites for upcoming scheduled interviews will be updated to remove recording disclosure messaging (and optionally include a message specifically for candidates who have opted out).
If a candidate has opted out, they’ll be able to use the same page to opt back in.
Recording consent can be found in the Summary section of the candidate’s profile. If you’ve received communication from the candidate confirming that they’d like their status changed, you can click the pencil icon to manually update the status on their profile.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0c68de6ba027bb41f48121142310a599.png)
﻿
If recording consent is updated, an event will be added in the candidate’s feed on their profile for easy reference too.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fc4c84d9c568fc634116ffde71ef05a0.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#disclosure-messaging)Disclosure Messaging
Custom recording disclosure messaging can be automatically included in your meeting calendar invites, confirmation emails and more. This messaging can be customized in Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > AI Notetaker under the Consent Management tab to be used across the organization.
This can help determine a clear set of message to use across all email templates and calendar invites. It's also useful in cases where you don’t want individual users making any adjustments to the messaging (e.g. because it was approved to be included in an exact way by legal). 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/X4niONtx-rBx4u7IsUTPJ_ai-notetaker-acent-ashby-2026-01-14-at-100956-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
**Candidate Disclosure:** The message here will be automatically appended to candidate calendar invites and confirmation emails when a scheduled interview is set to be recorded. This can be used as a reminder but also to inform the candidate as to how the recording will be used. You can include the Candidate Consent Management Link substitution token which will allow the candidate to amend their consent settings on their Consent Management page as needed.
**Opted-out Candidate Disclosure:** This message will replace the message in the Candidate Disclosure field when the candidate has opted-out of recording. This can help to reassure candidates that their preference is respected and will not impact their candidacy. You can also include the Candidate Consent Management Link substitution token which will allow the candidate to amend their consent settings on their Consent Management page as needed. If you would prefer to not to append a message in this case, this field can be left blank.
**Interviewer Disclosure:** This message is added to interviewer calendar invites so they know that the interview will be recorded. You can also use this space to let interviewers know how interview recordings will be use internally.
**Consent Page Disclosure:** If a candidate navigates to their Consent Management page (via the link provided by the Candidate Consent Management Link substitution token), this is the message that will be displayed there. You can use this field to add information on how your company handles interview recordings, add FAQs, or include a link to resources like your organization's privacy policy.
If you'd like to switch back to the defaults for the above recording disclosure fields, open this to copy and paste the default messaging. Make sure to add the appropriate substitution tokens in where specified.
**Candidate Disclosure:** To keep your interview experience seamless and distraction-free, we use an AI Notetaker to record and transcribe our interviews. This helps interviewers focus fully on the conversation and ensures your responses are captured accurately. The recording will only be used internally for evaluation. If you would prefer not to be recorded, you can opt out using the link below. Opting out will not impact your candidacy in any way. [insert Candidate Consent Management Link substitution token here]
**Opted-out Candidate Disclosure:** This interview will **not be recorded** because you've opted out. You can update your recording preferences at any time here: [insert Candidate Consent Management Link substitution token here]
**Interviewer Disclosure:** This interview will be recorded using Ashby’s AI Notetaker to capture a transcript and structured notes. Recordings are used internally to improve evaluation consistency and reduce manual note-taking.
**Consent Page Disclosure: About Interview Recording**
To keep your interview experience seamless and distraction-free, we use an AI Notetaker to record and transcribe our interviews. This helps interviewers focus fully on the conversation and ensures your responses are captured accurately. The recording will only be used internally for evaluation. If you would prefer not to be recorded, you can opt out on this page. Opting out will not impact your candidacy in any way.
Want to include a consent management link in either or both disclosure message options? Click the T icon in the toolbar of one or both of the candidate disclosure fields and select the Candidate Consent Management Link substitution token to include it. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/rA-643EBeAuGxJ2WOtN9Q_email-templates-acent-ashby-2026-01-14-at-100654-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
If you’d like to have this message included in Interview Confirmation Emails, you will need to include the Candidate Recording Disclosure Message substitution token in your email template. This token will only include the disclosure message if the scheduled interview is set to be recorded. When an interview is not set to be recorded, the token will automatically be left blank so there is no need to manually update your email template for each interview. 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#data-retention)Data Retention
Customers who purchase the AI notetaker Add-on will be able to customize their data retention policy for recordings to any length of time.
This rule will control the retention of recording media only (e.g audio and video). Transcripts will not be impacted by this rule.
To set a data retention rule, navigate to Admin > Interviews & Scheduling > AI Notetaker. Click on the Data Retention tab.
From here, set your retention period and switch on the Enabled? field to enable your rule.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4469f47a275ef5a1891bb0281d8886b6.png)
﻿
_﻿  
_
The retention rule you set for meeting recordings will be evaluated daily. Deleted recordings are not recoverable.
If a candidate is deleted or anonymized, meeting recordings for interviews on their profile will also be automatically deleted along with the profile data. 
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#ai-notetaker-post-interview)AI Notetaker Post-Interview
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#recording-and-ai-in-the-interview-briefing)Recording and AI in the Interview Briefing
Within each interview briefing, interviewers will be able to access the recording of the interview, along with a transcript and summary notes.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#recording-and-transcript)Recording and transcript
The interview recording, transcript and a summary will be under the Recording tab in the interview briefing.
  * The Transcript tab will show the transcript taken from the interview.


  * The Notes tab will show a summary of the interview and include notes and timestamps.


  * The AI Assistant tab will allow you to ask questions about the specific interview. If you have additional access to the candidate’s profile, you’ll be able to ask broader questions about the candidate.


![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/WEkg_rHsqSqa7glM-3JfW_interview-briefing-ariadne-shepard-acent-ashby-2026-03-13-at-34809-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#recording-playback)Recording playback
When it comes to viewing the recording you have the traditional playback options (play, adjusting volume, etc). You will also be able to enter Theater Mode, which will open the recording in full screen with the transcript listed down the right-hand side.
The speakers will be shown underneath the playback controls. You can click Hide Speakers if you’d rather not show this information.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a9d2020848975a64e040c4858a6e78c1.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#transcript)Transcript
The transcript of the meeting has a filter, so you can search for specific keywords or topics to see where they came up. The results will include timestamps, so you can click those to be taken to that specific part of the recording.
The transcript is generated from each participant's audio stream individually, which ensures fully accurate transcript attribution.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0d424c2f8327f3fe4cee98134bff3c49.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a2202363c3c1a45b0f603f5a86089fbf.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#notes-and-summary)Notes and summary
In the Notestab _,_ you’ll see both a summary of the interview and themes with supporting notes. The themes and notes have timestamps so you can jump to that part of the recording to review as needed.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/37ea63871e6d5c0c64351f6eb0a38fad.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#ai-assistant)AI Assistant
The AI Assistant tab will take you to the candidate assistant, where you can ask any questions about the interview or candidate. The information available is based on the user permissions, so if you do have access to the candidate’s profile, you will be able to ask broader questions. More on the AI candidate assistant at [AI Candidate Assistant](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant)﻿.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1be0fc956df65fcb321c2fd981b742ee.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#ai-generated-content-for-feedback-forms)AI-generated content for feedback forms
AI-generated content is not meant to fully complete the task on behalf of the interviewer. Interviewers are still required to do their own evaluation of the candidate and evaluate the candidate’s performance. AI can help summarize the conversation and call out the main topics that were covered and the highlights of the conversation.
If you have long, formattable text fields within a feedback form, interviewers can generate relevant suggestions based on the transcript to add into these fields along with their own comments. Ashby’s AI strives to be objective and fact-based, without trying to evaluate the candidate or expressing opinions about candidates’ performance. AI auto-fill helps interviewers complete feedback forms faster by drafting fact-based summaries from interview conversations. It does not evaluate candidates or make hiring recommendations. Instead, it highlights relevant evidence from the interview so human interviewers can form their own judgments.
**How it works**
  * The system reads the feedback question and scans the transcript for relevant moments, examples, and statements from the conversation.


  * It generates a concise, evidence-based summary aligned to that question.


  * Interviewers can review, edit, or replace the suggestion, and must explicitly choose to insert any AI-generated content before submitting feedback.


**Guardrails for objectivity**
Auto-fill is intentionally limited to factual summarization, and is designed to avoid bias and subjective judgment:
  * It does not rate, judge, interpret candidate performance, or make hiring recommendations.


  * It’s instructed to avoid inferences and ignore personal or irrelevant attributes.


  * Speaker names are removed before processing as an additional precaution.


These safeguards help ensure suggestions remain neutral and evidence-focused, with interviewers responsible for final assessment.
An interviewer can click the Autofill with AI button at the bottom of the feedback form The AI generator will then review the feedback form questions and description and then generate suggestions. The suggestion will include timestamps from within the recording for reference.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c75c956a38e0e35d660e5968d18d5927.png)
﻿
After review, the interviewer can click Append to add the generated content to their own feedback in each field, or discard if they choose not to include it.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/03222a6b69906e43391357b2cad1f236.png)
﻿
There is also the option to add further details or adjustments, then pass these on to the AI generator to then re-generate a suggestion. Once the interviewer has typed further information into the Add details or adjustments field, they can click Refine to regenerate. You can use this option for all kinds of adjustments but common uses include adjusting formatting, calibrating the level of detail, focusing suggested answers on specific topics and providing further details.
If you’d like to complete feedback and view the recording screen on the same page, switch to view your feedback in a column rather than in a separate tab.
You can do this by clicking the cog icon and switching the feedback view to Column _._ You can adjust the size of the column to suit your needs when completing feedback.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6b1cdd9f6bc4c6e2b1f95697b69d9e5c.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#best-practices)Best practices
To get the best results from AI suggestions, below are some recommendations for your feedback forms. For more on feedback forms, check out [Feedback Forms and Interviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews)﻿.
  * Phrase your feedback form questions clearly and distinctly as the AI will use this as a guide for creating a summary answer.


  * Include additional context and/or instructions in each question description to provide further instructions on how the question should be answered, what to look for and include or exclude, how to format the best answer, and more.


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7c6956e4eb4b073a3c4e4f990c862729.png)
﻿
With a little investment upfront, this context can help save many hours down the line by ensuring AI answers are as relevant and useful as possible on the first attempt, and that they can capture what your team truly find most valuable for making hiring decisions. 
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#viewing-recordings-and-permissions)Viewing recordings and permissions
By default, participants in a meeting will have access to their own meeting recording within their interview briefing. Additionally, anyone with Admin Private access to a role will also be able to view others’ recordings.
For any other users, they will require special permission to view others’ recordings. You can create a new access role or update existing access roles that you set up to include access to view recordings at Admin > Organization Setup > Access Roles _._
Can See Meeting Recordings is an access stripe that can be enabled to allow users with that access role to view meeting recordings for the role they’ve been given that access to.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/61bb619029cd2352bac95c12da4141a5.png)
﻿
For more on access roles, check out [Manage Access Roles](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manage-access-roles)﻿ .
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#accessing-the-recording-via-the-candidate-profile)Accessing the recording via the candidate profile
You can click the REC Available recording statuses on active interview activities to access the recording, transcript, notes and candidate assistant. This option will only be clickable if the recording is listed as available.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/HnWsYxZGA1zcHOfZlOS8R_ai-notetaker-updates-archbee-document-2026-02-03-at-92245-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
When a recording is ready, users with access to view the recording can also access it from the candidate profile by going to Activities & Progress tab, then scrolling to the Interview Progress section. Click Recording to open up the interview recording in a popup, along with the transcript and the candidate assistant.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/dexci5xWYGHuUn8zge6rt_michael-michaels-syl-head-of-design-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-22535-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#ai-notetaker-and-recording-consent-reporting)AI Notetaker and Recording Consent Reporting
When it comes to reporting, the AI Notetaker Recordings subject gives you insight into recordings happening across your organization, with the ability to filter, sort, and click through to any recording. 
The following fields are available within the AI Notetaker Recordings subject:  
| Field  | Definition  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Recording mode  | Shows the speaker configuration for each recording (gallery, speaker, audio)  |  
| Has available transcript?  | Whether a transcript has been generated  |  
| Has available video?  | Whether the video is available for the recording  |  
| Recording URL  | A direct link to the recording (for users with access to view it)  |  
Below you can find an example of a report that will pull a list of all recording URLs for a specific department.

**Subject:** AI Notetaker Recordings
**Filters:** AI Notetaker's Job Consideration's Jobs Department
**Columns (or Fields to Show if using the old view):** AI Notetaker Recording's Interviewer AI Notetaker Recording's Job Consideration's Candidate AI Notetaker's Recording's Has Available Transcript? AI Notetaker's Recording's Has Available Video? AI Notetaker's Recording's Recording Mode AI Notetaker's Recording's Recording URL
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/ulyESWLUT9q_Qm6vdK2_N_ai-notetaker-updates-improved-user-management-reporting-and-consent-customization-ashby-2026-01-14-at-112422-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
The Candidate Recording Consent Choices subject allows you to gain insight into candidate consent when it comes to recording interviews. The following fields are available within the Candidate Recording Consent Choices subject:   
| Field  | Definition  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Consent Choice  | The consent choice of the candidate  |  
| Submitted At  | When the consent choice was submitted  |  
| Submitted By  | Who submitted the candidate's recording consent choice  |  
| Is Latest Choice?  | Whether this is the candidate's most recent consent choice  |  
Below you can find an example of a report covering the consent choice, the submission date and time of the consent choice, and whether it's the latest consent choice for a specific job.
