##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#future-improvements)Future Improvements
Here are some additional improvements we’re looking to make to the AI notetaker moving forward.
  * Opt-in policy (affirmative consent) for candidate consent management


  * AI Summary note editing, along with custom notes templates


  * Transcript-only recording (with no video or audio)


  * Custom branding for AI notetaker name and avatar


  * Meeting stats (e.g. talk time percentage)


  * Share individual recordings with specific colleagues


  * Reporting on transcript insights across interviews


  * Phone call recording support


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-i-download-a-recording)**Can I download a recording?**
﻿  

﻿  

﻿  

Yes, just right click on the player and you can download the video file. 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-i-delete-a-single-ai-notetaker-recording-manua)Can I delete a single AI notetaker recording manually?
Please reach out to support@ashbyhq.com for assistance with deleting an individual AI notetaker recording manually.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-i-download-or-copy-the-transcript)Can I download or copy the transcript?
You can, yes. While viewing the recording, you can click the three dots to the right of the Transcript, Notes and AI Assistant tabs to get the options to copy or download the transcript of the recording. You can download the transcript in CSV, TXT and Markdown formats.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/XiSAxUSvmq2LIwPrtuoAX_a-ashby-player-acent-add-transcript-download-copy-post-recres-2-by-teodash-a-pull-request-88647-a-ashbyhqashby-2026-02-02-at-22309-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-i-view-recordings-as-part-of-the-debrief-overv)Can I view recordings as part of the debrief overview?
Yes! Where available (and provided the user has permission to view the recordings), interview recordings can be accessed via the All Feedback tab on the debrief information. Click Interview Recordingon the feedback in question to access the interview recording and transcript.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/OxFQothv1S1UnA9JgkRf-_a-interview-briefing-acent-add-interview-recording-to-all-feedback-tab-by-teodash-a-pull-request-88599-a-ashbyhqashby-2026-02-02-at-23118-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-i-only-generate-content-using-ai-for-one-speci)C**an I only generate content using AI for one specific feedback form question, rather than all long, formatable text fields in the form?**
﻿  

You can - use the AI Genoption in the toolbar for a specific field to generate content if needed.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4386f20f32a3f9a6c692485ebf6f94d8.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-i-ask-the-ai-candidate-assistant-about-the-con)C**an I ask the AI Candidate Assistant about the contents of interviews that have been recorded?**
Yes! Context from interview transcripts will automatically be made available to the AI Candidate Assistant. From a permissions perspective, the AI Candidate Assistant can access the same things that any specific user has access to. Therefore, only transcripts from interviews a user has access to will be available to the AI Candidate Assistant.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-you-send-me-a-notification-when-my-recording-i)Ca**n you send me a notification when my recording is done processing and ready?**
This is not currently available. Recordings and transcripts should generally be processed within a few minutes after a meeting ends. 
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#does-ashby-or-the-ai-vendor-use-these-recordings-t)D**oes Ashby or the AI vendor use these recordings to train their models? Are our calls or notes ever used for training purposes, even in anonymized form?**
No, please refer to our [Terms for AI Features](https://www.ashbyhq.com/resources/terms-ai-features "Terms for AI Features") and other resources in our [Trust Center](https://trust.ashbyhq.com/ "Trust Center") for more information.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#a-candidate-requested-not-to-be-recorded-after-the)A **candidate requested not to be recorded after they joined the meeting. How can I remove the AI Notetaker from my interview?**
﻿  

﻿  

Each video conferencing tool enables you to remove the AI notetaker participant from the call natively. For example, in Zoom, the organizer/host can click the 3 dots on the AI Notetaker’s participant cell and select “Remove” (make sure you do not report the AI notetaker!). In the future, controls to pause or stop recording will be available within Ashby as well.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#are-debriefs-supported-as-well-as-interviews)A**re debriefs supported as well as interviews?**
﻿  

﻿  

Yes! The AI notetaker can be added to debriefs as well as interviews. The process to add the AI notetaker to a debrief is the same as with an interview.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-only-users-with-paid-seats-have-the-ai-notetak)Can **only users with paid seats have the AI notetaker enabled?**
No, the AI notetaker can be enabled for all users in your Ashby accounts, including those with Limited Access. 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#is-it-possible-for-interviewers-to-opt-out-of-the)I**s it possible for interviewers to opt out of the AI Notetaker?**
While you can disable or enable the AI Notetaker for specific employees via their profile if you are an Organization Admin, it’s currently not possible for interviewers to opt out of the AI Notetaker.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#if-ai-notetaker-is-enabled-is-it-automatically-add)If AI Notetaker is enabled, is it automatically added to previously scheduled interviews?
No. Interviews that were already scheduled before AI Notetaker was enabled do not have it added automatically. To include AI Notetaker on those interviews, update them manually by clicking More Actions on the interview activity and selecting Record This Interview.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#which-languages-are-supported-by-the-ai-notetaker)W**hich languages are supported by the AI Notetaker?**
The AI Notetaker can transcribe conversations in over 99 languages. It can automatically detect the language being spoken, so long as there's at least 60-90 seconds of speech in a recording. Transcripts will automatically appear in the language being spoken.
Please note that accuracy may vary based on the language and how popular it is. Generally, the more commonly spoken languages will have higher accuracy and better support for different accents.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#how-are-multiple-languages-in-one-conversation-sup)H**ow are multiple languages in one conversation supported?**
If an interview conversation switches between multiple languages, some of the transcription may get automatically translated and not reflect the language spoken at that moment. For example, if an interview had portions in Italian and English, some portions of the conversation that were spoken in English may actually appear translated into Italian in the transcript. The transcript will be correct, but may just appear in a different language. 
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#can-ai-notetaker-translate-different-languages-whe)C**an AI Notetaker translate different languages when summarizing notes?**
The AI Notetaker will typically summarize conversations in English, regardless of the language that is in the transcription.
  * Summary notes will likely be in English.


  * Feedback form auto-fill suggestions will also typically be in English, but can also be based on the language of the feedback form question itself. A refinement can always be added to a suggestion to ask it to translate or write an answer in a different language.


  * AI Assistant will typically answer in English or the language that a request is sent in. Users can ask the assistant to translate or generally interact in any specific language they prefer.


﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#when-does-the-ai-notetaker-leave-the-interview)When does the AI Notetaker leave the interview?
The AI Notetaker will leave the call when all other non-bot participants leave, which could be later than the end time specified for the interview at the point of scheduling. The only time the bot will leave at the specified interview end time is if the interview is part of a multi-event panel for the candidate. In this case, a new bot would enter the meeting for each event (for example in back-to-back onsite interviews for the same candidate).
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#ive-amended-the-ai-notetaker-recording-mode-settin)I’ve amended the AI Notetaker recording mode settings within my scheduling defaults/within my interview activity. Will this update already scheduled interviews?
Changes made to the Recording Mode on an interview plan activity or within scheduling defaults will only apply to AI Notetakers that are added or scheduled after that change is made. 
If you’d like to update the recording mode settings for an already scheduled interview, we would recommend rescheduling the interview and adjusting the AI Notetaker settings as part of the rescheduling process. Navigate to the AI Notetaker section within the Communications tab to make adjustments as needed prior to confirming the reschedule.
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#im-seeing-a-rec-failed-tag-on-my-interview-what-ha)**I’m seeing a REC failed tag on my interview - what happened?**
You can hover over the REC failed tag in the interview briefing to see why the recording failed.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e103f7a9c2a239ea32c4d75062aa0b51.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#is-there-a-way-for-me-to-view-who-has-the-ai-notet)I**s there a way for me to view who has the AI Notetaker enabled?**
Yes, there is a field (Is AI Notetaker Enabled?) that can be used in reporting to see who has the AI notetaker enabled for them.
An example of a report you can create using this field is below. Please note that custom reports are not available on the Foundations plan.
Employees: AI Notetaker status
**Report Type:** Custom List
**Subject:** Employees
**Filters:** If you’d like to view a specific group of employees, feel free to add filter fields.
**Fields to Show:** Employee’s Name, Employee’s Email, Employee’s Job Title, Has AI Notetaker Enabled?
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/813fb2e9626ba7130d2bc4f5efe144be.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#im-not-the-meeting-host-but-i-want-to-stop-the-ai)I'm not the meeting host but I want to stop the AI Notetaker recording mid-interview - can I do this?
You can, yes. If you head to the interview briefing via your Ashby home page and navigate to the Recording tab of the briefing, you can click Stop Recording. The remainder of the interview will not be recorded after you've confirmed the action.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e8675bc547016c2733f4db87e6ccb4cd.png)
﻿

public-booking-links:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Interviews & Scheduling
Interviews: Advanced Setup
# Public Booking Links
17 min
Copy
﻿
Public booking links are most commonly used for scheduling interviews with leads. Ashby automatically creates the necessary candidate and job consideration, moves them to the correct interview stage, and schedules the interview.
For more information on sending direct booking links or candidate availability links to candidates already in Ashby and in active stages, check out [Direct Booking & Candidate Availability Links](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links)﻿.
During setup, make sure you have set a Meeting Request Organizer and that the schedule template is Direct Booking link compatible.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#overview)Overview
Public booking links give your team more flexibility when scheduling with leads, candidates, and people not yet added to Ashby. Like direct booking links, these links are associated with a specific job and interview stage. If a person isn't in Ashby yet, they are added as a candidate to the appropriate job and stage upon booking.
You might use a public booking link when initially reaching out to gauge a lead's interest in a role — for example, offering to meet with them to discuss the role and their experience via LinkedIn InMail. When they schedule via the public booking link, they are automatically added to Ashby, considered for the role, and moved to the appropriate stage so these actions don't need to be completed manually.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#what-happens-when-a-lead-books-with-a-public-booki)What happens when a lead books with a public booking link?
The table below covers how Ashby responds to a lead booking via a public booking link, based on whether they're already in Ashby and being considered for a role.  
| **Scenario**  | **What happens in Ashby**  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Candidate doesn't exist in Ashby  | - Create the candidate - Create the job consideration - Move candidate to the correct interview stage - Schedule the interview  |  
| No active job consideration  | - Create the job consideration - Move candidate to the correct interview stage - Schedule the interview  |  
| Existing job consideration  | - Move candidate to the correct interview stage - Schedule the interview  |  
If you are seeing duplicate candidates, check out the [Why do I see duplicate job considerations?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#uV6JN)﻿ FAQ for more information.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#configure-public-booking-links)Configure public booking links
  1. Navigate to the **Interview Plan** page on an open job and click Edit on a **Schedule Interview** activity.


![Screenshot of the Interview Plan page with the Edit button highlighted on a Schedule Interview activity.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/7miOLwpxUKJgqHboe_847_untitled.png?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Under the **Direct Booking & Candidate Availability** tab, locate the Enable Public Booking Link setting. Once enabled, a reusable link appears. You can regenerate or disable the link at any time.


![Screenshot of the Direct Booking and Candidate Availability tab showing the Enable Public Booking Link toggle and the generated reusable link.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/OrfCkxoj_ltCSgePgSuDZ_untitled-1.png?format=webp)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#scheduling-on-a-public-booking-link)Scheduling on a public booking link
When someone receives a public booking link, they go through a scheduling flow similar to direct booking.
![Screenshot of the public booking link scheduling flow showing available time slots.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/sl0cS0q-Ylc93HmT__WHa_untitled-2.png?format=webp)
﻿
Once they confirm their time, they are prompted to submit contact information at the end. Note that a phone number field appears if the location is set to **Phone Call** for the interview.
![Screenshot of the contact information form shown after a time slot is confirmed, including an optional phone number field.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/v2xpIyHmWzxv1nI04t2v5_untitled-3.png?format=webp)
﻿
Once this is submitted, Ashby automatically sets up the candidate, job consideration, and interview schedule, and creates calendar events.
![Screenshot of the confirmation screen showing the completed interview setup with calendar events created.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/1hcKFMbQVHRv8d8L-6SHr_untitled-4.png?format=webp)
﻿
  1. A candidate is created or updated once they submit via the public booking link.


  1. A job consideration is created automatically.


  1. The interview is scheduled with invites sent out and calendar events created.


  1. The correct interview stage is assigned based on the public booking link.


Candidates receive a unique meeting URL they can use to cancel or reschedule the interview.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#using-a-public-booking-link-substitution-token-in)Using a public booking link substitution token in a sequence
This section covers how to send out a link to an interviewer's calendar availability in sequences using a public booking link. New to sequences? Read more about getting them set up in [Sequences](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sequences)﻿.
To use a public booking link substitution token in a sequence, first ensure the sequence is linked to a job.
![Screenshot of the sequence settings showing the Job field with a job linked.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/4VOj3KIT3wSWDVoPRav4Z_untitled-5.png?format=webp)
﻿
When editing your sequence templates, search for the Public Booking Link for First Planned Interview substitution token.
![Screenshot of the substitution token search showing the Public Booking Link for First Planned Interview token selected.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/ZlS0g7TcuhUw06x0dKdgP_untitled-6.png?format=webp)
﻿
This substitution token defaults to the first public booking link in an Active Interview stage enabled for your job's interview plan.
In the example below, both (1) and (2) have public booking links enabled. The public booking link token in the sequence defaults to the interview schedule for (1).
![Screenshot of the interview plan showing two interview stages with public booking links enabled, labeled \(1\) and \(2\).](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/xxR3-ltRMxw3nVM7nY3BK_untitled-7.png?format=webp)
﻿
When a recipient schedules themselves via the public booking link, the sequence automatically stops and they are marked as "Recipient Replied" and "Interested."
![Screenshot of the sequence template editor showing the substitution token inserted into the message body.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/4Zp7mB27nEB9CpA0oXD74_untitled-8.png?format=webp)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#faqs)FAQs
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#can-public-booking-links-be-used-in-lead-stages)Can public booking links be used in lead stages?
When using the Public Booking Link for First Planned Interview substitution token in sequences, Ashby pulls in the first public booking link in an **Active Interview** stage.
You can still create public booking links for lead stage interviews, but they are not currently used in sequences.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#where-is-the-best-place-to-access-the-public-booki)Where is the best place to access the public booking link?
Public booking links are currently accessible through the schedule template only.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#how-do-i-know-the-source-of-a-candidate-created-th)How do I know the source of a candidate created through a public booking link?
Source tracking is not currently supported through public booking links. We recommend adding people you send the link to via the Ashby Chrome Extension. Once they book, their existing profiles are updated if there is an email match, or you can merge them as duplicates if the details aren't an exact match.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#why-do-i-see-duplicate-job-considerations)Why do I see duplicate job considerations?
Ashby deduplicates or flags duplicate candidate profiles using a person's LinkedIn URL, name, and email address. A separate profile can be created when you add a candidate via the extension without an email address and then send them a public booking link where they add their email.
In this case, the first profile is created via the Chrome extension using their LinkedIn URL, and the second is created via the booking link using their email address.
You can merge these duplicate candidate profiles as you see them. Alternatively, if you send out the public booking link without adding a person to Ashby first, a candidate profile is created for them in the appropriate stage once they book a time.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#can-i-create-a-public-booking-link-to-be-used-acro)Can I create a public booking link to be used across multiple jobs?
Like direct booking links, public booking links are associated with a specific job and interview stage. It's not possible to create a booking link that can be used across multiple jobs or interview stages.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#can-interviewer-pools-be-used-with-public-booking)Can interviewer pools be used with public booking links?
Yes — if you assign an interviewer pool to an interviewer slot for a schedule interview activity, you still have the option to enable public booking links on that activity. Read more in [Interviewer Pools](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewer-pools)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#how-does-attribution-work-for-the-source-when-usin)How does attribution work for the source when using a public booking link?
If a candidate books via a public booking link, their source is listed as Sourced: Public Booking Link. A user is not assigned to the **Credited To** field automatically, because the user who configured the public booking link may not be the same user who sent it out.
To complete the **Credited To** field, navigate to the **Attribution** section within the **Activities & Progress** section of the candidate profile and/or job consideration. Select the appropriate user from the **Credited To** dropdown.
![Screenshot of the Attribution section on a candidate profile showing the Credited To dropdown.](https://cdn.zappy.app/927e6792659fdf15364468ad5022ac98.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#can-i-create-a-candidate-availability-public-booki)Can I create a candidate availability public booking link?
No, this isn't currently possible.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links#can-a-public-booking-link-be-used-to-schedule-with)Can a public booking link be used to schedule with multiple interviewers?
Yes, when multiple interviewers are assigned to the interview schedule, the public booking link surfaces availability based on the combined availability of all assigned interviewers. This means candidates can book times that work for all interviewers configured in the schedule.

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Emails & Candidate Texting
Emails
# Email Domain Setup
14 min
Copy
This guide outlines the steps to verify a domain for sending newsletter emails or for sending a large volume of no-reply emails via Ashby (over 1,000 emails a day). The setup process involves updating DNS records on a domain owned by your organization, so you’ll likely want to provide these instructions to your IT team or to someone who can configure DNS records for your organization’s domains.
Please note that verifying a domain for sending newsletter or no-reply emails can only be configured on the Enterprise plan.  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ❌  | ❌  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#overview)Overview
To send newsletters using Ashby's Newsletter feature, you'll need to configure at least one domain for email sending. Configuring a domain is also beneficial if you send a high volume of no-reply emails and would prefer to use an email branded to your company, rather than using the default Ashby no-reply email address.
Configuring a domain is necessary because email providers like Google and Microsoft restrict the use of their platforms for bulk emailing and sending newsletters. Google and Microsoft email accounts have daily sending limits, so you can't directly send newsletters or large numbers of emails from these accounts. To work around this restriction, you'll need to grant Ashby permission to send emails from one of your organization's domains on your behalf.
To do this, you’ll set a few DNS records on one of your organization’s domains so that Ashby can verify that you own the domain and so that Ashby has permission to send emails from this domain on your behalf.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#prerequisites)Prerequisites
To follow the steps below, you’ll need to be able to update DNS records associated with the domain you want to use for sending newsletters or no-reply emails. To access the [Email domains admin page](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/domains "Email domains admin page"), you’ll need to be an Ashby organization admin.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#video-walkthrough)Video Walkthrough
A video walkthrough of the email domain setup process is available below.
Note: In the walkthrough, the page is named Newsletters, but it’s since been renamed to Email Domains. The functionality is unchanged.
﻿
  * Log into your Ashby account and navigate to Admin in the top nav bar.


  * Search for ‘Email Domains’ or visit the page directly at [this link](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/domains "this link").


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#steps-to-configure-a-domain)Steps to Configure a Domain
![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/dSfn7uA9HY2FParG1DynK_cleanshot2024-07-24at1023352x.png)
﻿
  * Click on Add Domain in the top right-hand corner of the page. Provide the domain you’d like to use for sending emails and click Add. 


  * Once you click Add, you’ll have 72 hours to update your domain’s DNS records before your domain setup is considered Failed. Once your domain’s setup status is Failed, you’ll need to remove the domain in Ashby and re-add it in order to start the setup process again. For that reason, we recommend waiting to add the domain in Ashby until you’re ready to update the domain’s DNS records.


![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/ZpYEPps00DxULBBJlMvA3_cleanshot2024-07-24at1023572x.png)
﻿
  * After clicking Add, you’ll see a list of three CNAME records, one MX record, and one TXT record. You’ll need to set these DNS records on your domain.


![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/UuXg35bDdZGv6zkULH4sj_cleanshot2024-07-24at1026122x.png)
﻿
  * Depending on where your domain is managed, the instructions for updating your DNS records will vary slightly. Below you can find links to documentation for updating DNS records from a few common providers.


**Cloudflare** See Cloudflare’s guide to managing DNS Records [here](https://developers.cloudflare.com/dns/manage-dns-records/how-to/create-dns-records/#create-dns-records "here")
**Route 53** See Route 53’s guide to managing DNS records [here](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/Route53/latest/DeveloperGuide/resource-record-sets-creating.html "here")
**GoDaddy** See GoDaddy’s guide to managing DNS records [here](https://www.godaddy.com/en-uk/help/manage-dns-records-680 "here")
**Other Providers** If your provider isn’t listed above, you can generally find documentation on updating DNS records by Googling ‘manage {domain name provider} DNS records’ 
A Note on the MX record Depending on your domain registrar, you may need to provide the priority, which is at the start of the MX record's expected value, in a separate input. This refers to the '10' at the beginning of the record. In most cases, you can leave it formatted as it is in Ashby. However, some providers may require you to put the '10' in a separate input or on a different line.
  * Once you’ve configured the DNS records, head back to the Email Domains page in Admin and click on Check DNS Records in the bottom left of the domain’s configuration window. This will run a check to see if the DNS records have been found on your domain. It may take up to 72 hours for the records to be published and for the statuses to update to Verified.


![CleanShot 2024-07-24 at 10.26.40@2x.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/-JGuCnzoP9zobx81SnTPW_cleanshot2024-07-24at1026402x.png?format=webp)
﻿
  * Once your DNS records have all been verified, you can specify the email addresses you want to use. To add an email address, click Add Sender Email Address in the bottom lefthand corner.


![CleanShot 2024-07-24 at 10.27.19@2x.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/q5I4PJJz2zS6_cKt3FdTo_cleanshot2024-07-24at1027192x.png?format=webp)
﻿
  * In the Name field, provide the name you want email recipients to see when they receive emails from this address. In the Email Address field, provide the email address you want to use for sending emails. The email must be a part of the domain you configured. For example, if you configured ‘acmecorp.com’ as your domain, you could provide an email here that ends with ‘@acmecorp.com’. Once both fields are filled out, click Add to add the email address.


![CleanShot 2024-07-24 at 10.28.05@2x.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/sCQk2VLq9s97DtJyOTiuC_cleanshot2024-07-24at1028052x.png?format=webp)
﻿
  * Once an address is added, it will appear beneath the domain, as in the example below. To remove an address, click on the trash icon on the far right. To add more email addresses, click Add Sender Email Address in the bottom left corner and repeat the same steps. You can add as many addresses as you want.


![CleanShot 2024-07-24 at 10.28.42@2x.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/PCEkIt_N4u4avE9MZJ9OP_cleanshot2024-07-24at1028422x.png?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#using-addresses-in-newsletters)Using Addresses in Newsletters
To use the email addresses you’ve configured to send Newsletters, open or create a newsletter and click on Settings on the top right of the page. In the settings menu, you’ll see a ‘From’ field (highlighted below). In this field, you can select the from address you want your newsletter to be sent from. The dropdown here will include all the addresses you’ve configured by following the steps above.
![CleanShot 2024-05-22 at 16.50.19@2x.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/lDYTrXRpz5wxuKTFJfAaE_cleanshot2024-05-22at1650192x.png?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#switching-your-default-no-reply-address-after-sett)Switching your default no-reply address after setting up your new sender address
Once you’ve added your new sender address on the [Email Domains](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/domains "Email Domains") page, navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > [Shared Email Aliases](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/shared-email-aliases "Shared Email Aliases"). Click Manage No-Reply Address.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5a0526c59e99f1be4b34cbac0c54ec01.png)
﻿
From here, you’ll be able to view your current no-reply address and select your newly configured sender address from the New No-Reply Address dropdown. Once you’ve selected your new no-reply address, click Update to confirm. This email address will now be used for all default no-reply emails.
If you’d like to return to the default Ashby no-reply email for future no-reply emails, click Unshare beside the configured no-reply address.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2bcdfb0415d862d7675073fe6012c956.png)
﻿
Please note that if your default no-reply address is not configured to sync emails to Ashby, replies that go to this email address will not appear in Ashby.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#why-does-my-domain-status-still-show-as-verifying)Why does my domain status still show as ‘Verifying’ in Ashby after I’ve set the required DNS records on my domain?
If you’ve set the DNS records on your domain, try clicking on Check DNS Records in Ashby to refetch the domain’s verification status. This ensures the status you see in Ashby is fully up-to-date.
It can take up to 72 hours for records to finish verifying, so if your status still shows as ‘Verifying’, it’s possible the records are still being published.
You should also confirm that the records were copied exactly as they’re displayed in Ashby. Verify that the quotes around the TXT record’s expected value were included in the record you published on your domain. Also verify that the MX record’s priority (the ‘10’ at the beginning of the MX record’s value in Ashby) is entered correctly in the format required by your domain registrar.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#my-domains-verification-status-shows-up-as-failed)My domain’s verification status shows up as ‘Failed’ in Ashby. What should I do now?
Once your domain’s status shows up as failed, you’ll need to delete the domain’s registration in Ashby, remove any DNS records you’ve set on your domain, and restart the verification process. To delete the verification in Ashby, click on Remove Domain in the bottom right corner of the domain’s entry in Ashby.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#when-and-where-can-a-no-reply-email-be-used-or-is)When and where can a no-reply email be used or is used by default in Ashby?
The following tools in Ashby can be configured to or automatically use the default no-reply email address (either no-reply@ashbyhq.com or the default you configure):  
| Tool  | Description  | Notes  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Application confirmation email  | An automated email sent to the candidate if they submit an application via your job board. This will always use the default no-reply email.  | More on configuring this at [Email Template Creation and Management](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-template-creation-and-management#application-confirmation-template)﻿  |  
| Referral confirmation email  | An automated email sent to the referred candidate once they've been referred.   | More on configuring this at [Email Template Creation and Management](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-template-creation-and-management#referral-confirmation-template)﻿  |  
| Auto-Reject emails  | An email sent to the candidate if they've been rejected by auto-reject rules you've configured on job postings. These can be scheduled so they aren't sent immediately on archiving.  | More on this at [Auto-Reject Applications](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/auto-reject-applications)﻿  |  
| Survey automation  | Configure automation to send an email to the candidate containing a link to to a survey or questionnaire.  | Used by default if another email isn’t selected in the automation configuration. More on survey automation options at [Surveys & Questionnaires](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/Rlbg-surveys-and-questionnaires)﻿  |  
| Newsletter  | Send out newsletters to your talent pools to keep them updated.  | More on configuring newsletters at [Newsletters](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/newsletters)﻿  |  
| Event confirmation emails  | If a lead signs up to attend a hiring event, an email confirmation is sent out to them.  | For more on setting up events, check out [Events](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events)﻿﻿  |  
| Initial consent and consent extension requests  | If you have automation configured as part of your consent rules, an email will be sent out to a candidate for their consent or a consent extension.  | Want to know more about configuring consent rules and automation? Check out [Data Privacy and Compliance](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/data-privacy-and-compliance#1pBi2)﻿  |  
| Bulk application review  | Rejection emails can be sent from a no-reply email within the bulk application review view.  | Read more at [Application Review](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/application-review)﻿.  |  
| Interview confirmation emails  | An email sent to the candidate at the point an interview is scheduled (if configured).  | For more on configuring interview activities, check out [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities#dPsRF)﻿  |  
| Candidate activity automations  | If an automated activity is configured to send an email to the candidate, then this can be sent from a no-reply email.  | More information can be found at [Automated Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/automated-activities)﻿  |  
| Alerts and scheduled dashboard notifications  | When alert or scheduled dashboard notifications are sent, these are sent from a no-reply email.   | For further info, check out [Alerts](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/alerts)﻿ and [Scheduled Dashboards](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/scheduled-dashboards)﻿.  |  
| Sending an email to the candidate from their profile  | You can opt to use a no-reply email when reaching out to the candidate via the Email option on the candidate profile.  | Further information can be found at [Candidate Profile](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-profile)﻿.  |  
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#can-you-have-multiple-custom-email-domains-for-new)Can you have multiple custom email domains for Newsletters?
Yes, multiple custom email domains can be configured per organization, but additional configuration is required to allow sending.
Users cannot automatically send from verified domains once the DNS settings have been properly configured. Once DNS settings have been configured, an admin must add specific sender email addresses to each domain. Only those explicitly added addresses will appear in the Newsletter From dropdown and can be used for sending.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#can-verified-domain-email-addresses-be-used-for-bu)C**an verified domain email addresses be used for bulk email sending?**
Yes, with the following requirement: 
  * Email aliases must be shared: Even if the address is verified, the addresses must be shared with users via the shared email alias system. To determine whether the user is allowed to send an email from a given alias, we check that:


  * The email address is verified and available for sending (part of an organization email identity)


  * The user has access to the email address via shared email aliases


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/email-domain-setup#what-are-your-bounce-rate-thresholds)What are your bounce rate thresholds?
One important note for sending emails from custom domains - make sure your email lists (e.g. for Newsletters) are clean and debounced.We’ve instituted the following bounce and complaint rate monitoring for custom domain emails to prevent from having our own sending accounts blocked by our email provider.
Bounce rate thresholds:
  1. Warning: 4% — alerts sent; monitoring closely


  1. Limit: 5% — sending may be restricted


Complaint rate thresholds:
  1. Warning: 0.08% — alerts sent; monitoring closely


  1. Limit: 0.1% — sending may be restricted


How this works**:**
  1. Metrics are checked hourly


  1. If rates exceed the limit for 2 consecutive hours, sending may be automatically disabled to protect domain reputation. 


We recommend keeping bounce rates below 4% and complaint rates below 0.08% to avoid restrictions and maintain deliverability.
﻿

projects:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)

# Projects
22 min
Copy
This guide covers how to set up and use a project to create and track a talent pool you're not actively interviewing
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#projects-overview)Projects Overview
Projects help you keep track of talent that you're not actively considering for any particular role you currently have open. Navigate to [Sourcing→Projects](https://app.ashbyhq.com/projects "Sourcing→Projects") to get started.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#set-up-a-project)Set up a project
To set up a project, head to Sourcing, then [Projects](https://app.ashbyhq.com/projects "Projects").
From there, click the + New button. From there, you’ll be able to title your project and add in a description for users to reference when adding candidates.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/108fb30d68dfb8225334c5065ff3c672.png)
﻿
If you have any project custom fields set up, you’ll also be asked to fill out those fields if required. Click Create to confirm the project details and create it.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/uX_L3Tw2rpE4bFErgdpJh_creating-a-project.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
﻿  

#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#add-candidates-to-a-project)Add candidates to a project
Once you have setup a project, you can add candidates to that project from the Chrome Extension. Click the + icon in the Projects section of the Chrome extension, then select the project from the list. The candidate will then be added to the selected project.
![image \(1\).png](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/LoOe0Y9l3a5sHON4_rrCB_image1.png)
﻿
You can also add a candidate to a project from their candidate profile via the More tab and the Add to Project option.
![Adding a candidate to a project via their candidate profile.](https://cdn.zappy.app/4ca751aca21213daa9b443cec144f61d.png)
﻿
**Adding candidates to a project in bulk**
You can also add candidates to a project in bulk on the Candidate Search page. You can read more about filtering candidates at [Candidate Search](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects "Candidate Search").
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a03a5d9c39ee3236b09638402911b19f.png)
﻿
Find candidates that meet your criteria by setting up filters as needed, then check the checkboxes next to the candidates you’d like to add to your project.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5ae77b64c879756383b44dc3d8b63be3.png)
﻿
Click Add to Project and select the project in question. Click Start to kick off the process of adding candidates to your project.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3d43e38e82069faba30bace6791bd3df.png)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#bulk-candidate-actions-on-projects)Bulk candidate actions on projects
You have options to complete individual and bulk actions for candidates in projects including emailing, enrolling in sequences, and adding them to job considerations. Either check the checkbox next to each candidate or use the Select All option to select all candidates in the project, then use the buttons to take action.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Ol8iRgBFUh53v7gskugm3_project-view.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
**Consider for Job:** Consider all selected candidates in the project for a role.
**Add to Another Project:** Add all selected candidates to another project you’ve configured.
**Remove from Project:** Remove all of the selected candidates from the project.
**Archive:** Archive selected candidates from a job consideration
**Set Tags:** Add tags to selected candidates.
**Email:** Send an email to all selected candidates in the project.
**Enroll in Sequence:** Enroll all selected candidates in a specific sequence.
**Request Review:** Request a candidate review - more on this at [Candidate Reviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-reviews)﻿
**Transfer:** Transfer selected candidate job considerations from one job to another. More on this at [Can I transfer a candidate’s job consideration to another job or interview plan?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/can-i-transfer-a-candidates-job-consideration-to-another-job-or-interview-plan)﻿﻿
**Anonymize:** Anonymize the selected candidates (more on this at [Anonymizing and Deleting Candidates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/anonymizing-and-deleting-candidates)﻿
**Delete:** Delete the selected candidates (more on this at [Anonymizing and Deleting Candidates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/anonymizing-and-deleting-candidates)﻿).
**Mark as Do Not Contact:** Mark the candidate as Do Not Contact (more on this at [Can I mark a candidate as Do Not Contact?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/can-i-mark-a-candidate-as-do-not-contact)﻿
There are also a few additional options available under the More menu.
Once you have determined the candidate records and the action to be taken on them, you will then be taken to the bulk action wizard to confirm the bulk action.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3bbcdf2fae657f2ea5afd0db337b897e.png)
﻿
In the Selection section, you’ll be able to see the criteria you’ve set for this bulk action and the number of records that match this criteria. Be sure to take time to review this information.
If the action is destructive (for example, deleting candidates), you will be asked to confirm that you are aware the action is destructive by checking the I confirm that this action is destructive checkbox.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5f5697a4e267539e5d6ddde28343fcaf.png)
﻿
Once you’ve reviewed the bulk action and the records that the action will be taken on, click the Start X on X records button to continue.
If you are performing a bulk action on a small set of records, you will be asked to confirm the bulk action to be taken, along with the number of records the action is to be taken.
If the action is being taken on a large number of records, you will be prompted to type the action into the specified field before the action across the chosen records can be performed. The number of records impacted will also be listed in the prompt window.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/93f39730978d3180c46005b4422a6ed4.png)
﻿
Once you’ve typed the action into the field, click Perform to perform the bulk action across your specified records.
The bulk action type and the number of records included in the bulk action determines the number of confirmation prompts you’ll receive:
_Deleting or Anonymizing Candidates_ Up to 24 candidates: Inline prompt. 24+ candidates: Confirmation window with typing prompt.
_Archiving, Marking as Do Not Contact or Sending a Survey_ Up to 24 candidates: Inline prompt. 24+ candidates: Confirmation window with typing prompt.
With any other bulk actions, if you are taking the action on 24 candidates or more, you will see the inline prompt to confirm your bulk action before it is performed.
If you opt to close out the bulk action wizard window at the point where the bulk actions are being process, you will be able to see the progress in a minimized version of the wizard.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e56c241e10064ba280b9c69408341d99.png)
﻿
To open the wizard back up, click the Restore bulk action pullout button.
Once the bulk action has been performed, you will be able to view a log of all the changes on the confirmation page. Click Close to close out the bulk action wizard when you’re done.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9074248ae416cc8615e70e829bc20c82.png)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#project-custom-fields)Project Custom Fields
Candidate, Job and Project Custom Fields can be configured on the Legacy Plus, Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
Now you can add custom fields specifically for your projects. You can use these to specify and house information in your project’s _Settings_ page. You can show these custom fields as additional columns when viewing projects or filter by custom fields as needed.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#creating-a-project-custom-field)Creating a Project Custom Field
To create a custom field for your projects, head to [Custom Fields](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/custom-fields/project "Custom Fields") within Admin, from there, click the Projects tab. Click New to create a new custom field.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f4cb4d54c57a653db9ce53d57f7f66c3.png)
﻿
When creating a new custom field, you’ll be asked to add the following;
Title: The name of your field, used for filtering and the header if you add a column for this custom field to your project.
Description: A description that will show internally to clarify the information to be added to this custom field.
Field Type: Specify the format of the information added to this field.
Is Required?: Does this information need to be included?
Show in Project List by Default?: Check this if the custom field should be shown as a column when viewing your project list.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/db16dd1aaa874cd047ce89b1e11a8a1d.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#completing-project-custom-fields)Completing Project Custom Fields
To add information to the custom fields on a project, navigate to Sourcing, then [Projects](https://app.ashbyhq.com/projects "Projects"). Click on the project in question, then click Settings. Your custom fields will be listed under the Basic Info section.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9accece5ab9af6987a521ffe3d880016.png)
﻿
If a custom field is set as required, you’ll see a warning message below an empty field requesting that you select an option or complete the field.
If a required field was previously filled and the information is removed, when navigating to another field, you’ll see a message prompting you to complete the field. If you navigate away from the page leaving the field empty, the field will revert to containing the previously entered information.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2ad466819099ffe5b4c5896d2da11129.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#filtering-by-a-project-custom-field)Filtering by a Project Custom Field
To filter by a project’s custom field, ensure that the Advanced toggle is on for filtering. From there, click Add Field to Match to select the custom field you’d like to filter by.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bab601450ec803dc39718d8177b1afc7.png)
﻿
Once the filter has been selected you can then specify the field information you’d like to use to find specific projects.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e6c0c6fa8489fcc6a42a97f19cef26e5.png)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#confidential-projects)Confidential Projects
Confidential Projects are only available on the Plus, Legacy Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#making-a-project-confidential)Making a project confidential
﻿
You can set a project as confidential either when creating a project, or viewing the list of candidates in a project.
Click New to create a new project and on the following screen, you can set the project as confidential by checking the Is Confidential? checkbox on the creation tab.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0fc0575e07d7fec8d9e3ff5b7c505b33.png)
﻿
When editing a project, you can either click on the Access tab in the left-hand navigation bar, or click More, then Access _._
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1375b756b43e12ab4d84960f8f9eda09.png)
﻿
A pop-up will then give you the option to make the project confidential.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7517f14ca6c3addb8452e430a61010df.png)
﻿
Once the role has been made confidential, you will have the option to allow other users access via the Access List drop-down or set the project back to public via the Make Public button. Please note that only users with _Elevated Access_ and up can be added to a confidential project.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f61d89c31b4c912c06cc49caa52d0ac8.png)
﻿
Users who do not have access to the project will not be able to see it on their list of projects when logging in. They will not see if a candidate has been added to a confidential project either.
Once a new user is given access, you can then provide them with one of two roles: Member or Admin.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4f5e2aca63db0849f6900d7dcb5ca017.png)
﻿
**Member:** This user has full access to the project but can’t manage access permissions.
**Admin:** This user has full access to the project including being able to amend acces permissions.
Only the project creator can switch a confidential project back to public.
You can view the visibility settings for all your projects on the Projects [page](https://app.ashbyhq.com/projects "page"), as an additional Visibility column will appear on the Results table.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5c5ce830604fadabefae18b509f042fa.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#what-permissions-do-i-need-to-access-a-project)What permissions do I need to access a project?
If you have Elevated Access permissions, you will be able to view all shared projects but will only be able to view or add leads to projects if they are considered for a job or jobs you have access to. You will also be able to view or add any leads to the project if they have not been considered for a role yet. You will need Elevated Access and to be added to a confidential project to have access to it. Again, you will only be able to view or add leads to the project if they have been considered for jobs you have access to, or if they haven’t been considered for a job yet.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#if-a-candidate-has-been-added-to-a-confidential-pr)If a candidate has been added to a confidential project and hasn’t been added to any public projects or considered for public jobs, can other users see that candidate?
When a candidate is linked only to a confidential project (and no job considerations), the candidate's profile will not appear or be accessible for other users. This level of privacy ensures that high-profile candidates or candidates linked to sensitive roles are only accessible on a need-to-know basis, which can be achieved by granting access to others for the confidential project.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#can-i-set-an-organization-admin-to-access-all-conf)Can I set an Organization Admin to access all confidential jobs and projects in Ashby?
You can - on the Permissions tab of the user’s profile on the _Employees_ page, there’s a Can See and Manage All Confidential Jobsand Projects field.
Here you can determine whether the Organization Admin has access to all confidential roles and projects or not.
To filter by a project’s custom field, ensure that theAdvanced toggle is on for filtering. From there, click Add Field to Match to select the custom field you’d like to filter by.
Once the filter has been selected you can then specify the field information you’d like to use to find specific projects.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9d4bc975d35bf388c2b379f8883c243e.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/projects#how-is-last-outbound-activity-tracked-in-projects)How is Last Outbound Activity tracked in Projects?
Only outreach sent or logged directly in Ashby counts toward Last Outbound Activity. This includes one-off emails, sequences, and any communication logged as outreach. Synced emails sent outside of Ashby do not count.
﻿
