Surveys & Questionnaires
# Quality of Hire Surveys
26 min
Copy
Once a candidate is hired, you can send out surveys to assess employee success and performance as soon as possible. Create and send out a series of surveys to the newly hired employee’s direct manager, with each step of the series timed by the employee’s start date (set as part of the employee’s offer).
Looking for information on reporting on your Quality of Hire results? Check out [Quality of Hire Reports](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-reports)﻿
Quality of Hire Surveys are available on the Legacy Plus, Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#what-is-quality-of-hire)What is Quality of Hire?
In the most general sense, quality of hire refers to assessing whether your interview and hiring process is identifying candidates who will succeed as employees. Quality of hire differs from standard performance review processes in a few key ways:
  1. Quality of hire is designed to begin assessment of employee success as early as possible


  1. Quality of hire is designed to give your talent team feedback on their recruiting process, primarily to improve interview process and assessment, i.e. early identification of signals that correlate with employees performance below or above expectations.


  1. Quality of hire is designed to be low-overhead and quick to minimize management costs


In Ashby, the quality of hire feature consists of setting up a survey sequence to be delivered to the newly hired employee’s direct manager. The sequence consists of a customized set of steps timed from the employee’s start date, and at each step a survey is delivered to the manager.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/52709c2a319a5a742eff34233e0d9e0f.png)
﻿
﻿  

For example, a fairly common quality of hire process is a 30/60/90 day assessment, in which the hiring manager submits their new employee assessment 30, 60 and 90 days from the employee start date.
In Ashby, the survey sequence steps are customizable, both in number and duration between deliveries, along with the survey form that is delivered at each step of a quality of hire sequence.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#overview)Overview
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#configuring-quality-of-hire-sequences-and-forms)Configuring Quality of Hire Sequences and Forms
Configuring your Quality of Hire surveys consists of two steps; creating your Quality of Hire forms for managers to complete and setting up survey sequences to determine which form is to be sent to the hiring manager and when.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#creating-a-new-survey-form)Creating a new survey form
To create your quality of hire form, head to Admin > Jobs & Applications > [Employee Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/employee-surveys/quality-of-hire "Employee Surveys"). Click + New Form to start building a new survey. You’ll be asked to give your new survey form a title.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0d2cff330dadbc612798c7f493b77b89.png)
﻿
﻿  

The Overall Assessment question asking the manager to rate the employee’s performance from 1 to 5 will be added to the form by default. Although this question can be deleted, we would highly recommend keeping this on all forms as it’s used as the rating in reporting. This question can only be added once per form.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2bf7d6bd1bbe09d04fd543195266ab0f.png)
﻿
  1. Create a copy of the survey.


  1. Archive the survey - the survey cannot be used moving forward but can be restored at any time.


  1. Re-order the sections of the survey.


  1. Delete a question on your survey


  1. Add a new question to your survey or section of your survey.


  1. Delete a section of your survey.


﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#adding-a-new-question)**Adding a new question**
You can add the following question types to your survey form:
Short Answer: A single line of text (unformatted)
Long Unformatted Answer: Allows for multiple lines of unformatted text.
Phone: Only domestic or international phone numbers.
Email: Only valid email addresses
Multiple Choice: Select a single option from the list.
Checkboxes: Allows you to select multiple answers from the list.
Date: Selected via a date picker.
Yes/No: Only yes or no answers, if not required, then no answer can be left.
Number: Only whole numbers of decimals are permitted.
Quality of Hire Rating: This question can only be added once per form and serves as the Quality of Hire rating for reporting.
Linear Rating: Add a value between 1 and 10 - there is also the option to add comments.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#open-this-to-view-some-quality-of-hire-example-que)O**pen this to view some Quality of Hire example questions**
Below are some topics and some examples of Quality of Hire questions you could add to your survey forms.
_Meeting Expectations_
Long Unformatted Answer - What expectations or objectives do you have for this person at this point in their tenure?
Yes/No - Are these expectations being met?
Long Unformatted Answer - Please add in any further comments or feedback here.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6ad95a1b7d902c91c61661952ceed13f.png)
﻿
_Resources_
Yes/No - Are we providing this person with the knowledge and training needed to meet those expectations?
Long Unformatted Answer - Please add more information here if any additional resources are needed or have been requested.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/85bd79e876e7100f48bc24caa8924665.png)
﻿
_Onboarding progress_
Yes/No - Is the employee making satisfactory progress in their onboarding?
Yes/No - Does the employee have a clear understanding of their onboarding targets or goals?
Long Unformatted Answer - Add any details on their onboarding progress to achievements towards targets.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/db20716534c1e9a0750b8fdc75c15d2c.png)
﻿
**﻿  
**
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#creating-a-quality-of-hire-survey-sequence)Creating a Quality of Hire survey sequence
Head to Admin>Jobs & Applications>[Employee Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/employee-surveys/quality-of-hire "Employee Surveys"). Then click + New Sequence to start setting up your sequence.
You’ll be asked to give your sequence a title, determine the cadence (we have some standard defaults and the option to create your own), select your survey form and then confirm your sequence setup.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/cb06c44b73cddae13cc8e5c0c7374f8d.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5738f510bedc22a4e908d8f88f543e73.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

After you create your draft sequence via the setup wizard you’ll land at a configuration review. From this page you will see your sequence details and be able to edit anything as needed.
_Steps_
In the Steps tab, you can add, remove and edit the steps of your survey.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5fb6d02586ce54935a030256fcb3ec42.png)
﻿
  1. Archive the sequence. New hires can’t be enrolled in the sequence when it’s archived. The sequence can be restored at any time.


  1. Save your edits - once saved, the sequence will be available to use. If you save a draft sequence, it will be updated from a draft status to Configured. Your sequences will be listed with their status and a clear indication as to whether automation is enabled or disabled.


  1. Specify the unit used for measuring the employee’s tenure. Can be set to days or months.


  1. Adjust the number of days or months reached for the next step of the sequence to be triggered.


  1. Adjust the survey form sent as part of the survey step.


  1. Delete a step in the survey sequence.


  1. Add a step to the survey sequence. 


_Instructions_
Use this tab to add in any instructions you’d like to show to the hiring manager when completing the survey form. You can also link out to any internal resources you have that will help your hiring manager complete their feedback.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/dfb55a07c3eebea21faacb6746574e62.png)
﻿
_Automation_
Here you can set up automation for your survey sequence. When automation is enabled, Ashby will attempt to automatically enroll hiring managers in sequences for newly hired candidates. Ashby does this by identifying the hiring manager associated with the hired candidate and extracting the start date from the offer letter.
You can set the the automation to auto-enroll all new hires, or set up custom automation rules. Only new hires that match the criteria set will be automatically enrolled in the survey sequence.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bc0fe73a76500c2ec85485b34c768d8f.png)
﻿
  1. Use the Automation Settings drop-down menu to choose whether new hires should be enrolled automatically and if all of them should be, or only those who meet custom conditions.


  1. The Add Field to Match option allows you to add additional conditions that the employee should meet to be auto-enrolled into a sequence (if using custom automation rules)


  1. Option to remove a rule from custom automation rules


  1. Activate Draft Configuration confirms your custom automation rules so they are applied to new hired moving forward.


  1. Discard Draft Configuration will remove the conditions that you’ve set up as part of your custom automation rules.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#enrolling-new-hires)Enrolling New Hires
_Overview for Recruiters_
﻿
If your team has opted not to use automated enrollment, the recruiter will have the choice of enrolling any hired candidate from their candidate profile page. There are three steps:
  1. Click + New Activity on the hired candidate profile


  1. Select Quality of Hire


  1. Review the survey to be sent, the recipient (or manager) and start date provided and click Enroll


After this is complete the hiring manager will be enrolled to receive surveys in the future after the hired candidate joins as an employee.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1dc5d9541bcf0b54905092ca423d98c1.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bb89cb6238d0675b1bb4556f6ff20c10.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#bulk-enrollment)Bulk Enrollment
_Reviewing Recent Hires_
Your recruiters can always review their recent hires from the Reports > [Employee Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/employee-surveys/enrollments/list "Employee Surveys") page, where they can select the [Recent Hires](https://app.ashbyhq.com/employee-surveys/enrollments/recent-hires "Recent Hires") tab to review all hires and their enrollment status.
This is a place to identify any missing or pending enrollments.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/66897be857996f82d4209df1ba7cda45.png)
﻿
﻿  

_Bulk Enrolling Candidates_
When reviewing recent hires you can also take a bulk enrollment action. After selecting any candidates of interest using the checkboxes in the Select All column, click the Bulk Enrollment button. You will then be prompted to select a quality of hire sequence.
Automated enrollment will follow, and any candidates that had missing information will be flagged for manual resolution.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e570a0bb0c9a27a1bde46c43bbd0b0c1.png)
﻿
**﻿  
**
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#survey-submission-notifications)Survey Submission & Notifications
_Overview of Survey submission_
﻿
When a hiring manager is responsible for a survey to be submitted, they will have a task created in Ashby as a reminder. This can be found on their home page.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6a8b60a8289b6f8b1a87d1f9acfe2b6a.png)
﻿
Furthermore, each user can configure their [personal notification settings](https://app.ashbyhq.com/settings/notifications "personal notification settings") for quality of hire surveys to send an email notification, or a Slack request if the integration for Slack is set up. In the case of a Slack request, the user can submit their score and results directly within Slack.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3783f4b5babc53a49237ca32defa737c.png)
﻿
When it comes to notifications, the hiring manager will receive the following:
  1. A notification when the request is created.


  1. After three days, the first reminder is sent.


  1. Reminders are sent daily until the next step starts.


Upon reaching the last step in the survey sequence, reminders will be sent for 30 days. If no response is received by then, the survey is marked as skipped and the process ends.
Reminders for any step prior to the final step will only stop sending reminders when the next step is reached.
For example, if you have a QoH survey sent at 30, 60, and 120 days:
  * Reminders for the 30-day survey will continue until 60 days


  * Reminders for the 60-day survey will continue until 120 days


  * Reminders for the 120-day survey will continue for 30 days only, until 150 days.


﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#reassigning-or-stopping-a-survey)Reassigning or Stopping a Survey
If the survey recipient needs to be changed, or a survey needs to be stopped completely for a new employee, head to Reports, then [Employee Surveys](https://app.ashbyhq.com/employee-surveys/enrollments/list "Employee Surveys").
Click on the enrolled candidate in question and from there, you’ll see the options to Reassign or Stop Survey.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/dfc4eb23889080ecffd0544695ea3ecb.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/839ce6f35e2d13e48b099b38d56111e1.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#providing-access-to-quality-of-hire-surveys-and-fe)Providing Access to Quality of Hire Surveys and Feedback
With Quality of Hire surveys, hiring managers can only see the employees they are responsible for assessing and nothing more. If you’d like to allow other users to access Quality of Hire feedback, this section will cover how to allow that wider access.
﻿
To have broader visibility into quality of hire enrollments and submitted survey results an Ashby organization admin has to grant access on a team-by-team basis with a special Quality of Hire access role.
The Quality of Hire role can be granted to a user for the entire organization, or limited to a specific team or set of teams. 
The Quality of Hire role is not automatically included in Organization Admin permissions, so this permission would also need to be granted separately as an additional access role to these users.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5b069758143c04027eb1ebba1eff8271.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/361f789571964126a834f985c0bbbbbe.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#help-im-seeing-a-missing-information-error-or-tag)Help! I’m seeing a Missing Information error or tag after enrolling a new hire
When automation is enabled Ashby attempts to identify the appropriate hiring manager and the anticipated employee start date. When this information is unavailable, the quality of hire sequence will be generated in a “missing information” state, visible on the candidate’s profile:
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/748591c52aa523bd3e8e8069b8f9ceda.png)
﻿
The recruiter can click the three dots on the Quality of Hire survey activity, then hit View Survey Details to then see where information is missing and add it in.
When viewing the the enrollments page at Reports > Employee Surveys Ashby will clearly identify missing information:
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7204fc11a2e985f551841156cf7034e1.png)
﻿
The recruiter can click the hired candidate’s name to open their enrollment details, wherein they can provide the missing information as required:
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/12cf4d478fe6e82e991fad4a431e3b0e.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#what-happens-if-a-candidate-is-enrolled-after-they)What happens if a candidate is enrolled after they’ve already started?
If the new hire is enrolled at a date after they have already started, sequence steps that have already passed will be marked as Skipped. For example an employee enrolled in a 30/60/90 day sequence on day 45 of their employment would have the 30-day step marked as skipped.
Similarly, if a sequence step never receives a submission it will be marked as Skipped at the time of the next step.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6f9ead40c7f7cdf9b8526447866f1c23.png)
﻿
The manager has the option to review any skipped steps and backfill results should they want or need to.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#who-can-see-quality-of-hire-results)Who can see quality of hire results?
Hiring managers can only see the candidates that they are responsible for assessing and nothing more. If you’d like to provide any user with additional access to view Quality of Hire results, you can read more about providing that access [here](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#providing-access-to-quality-of-hire-surveys-and-fe)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#how-do-i-edit-the-survey-details-who-receives-the)How do I edit the survey details (who receives the survey and the candidate start date)?
If a candidate's start date changes, you can update their Quality of Hire Survey from the candidate's profile. Click on the three horizontal dots to the right of the Quality of Hire Survey activity and choose View Survey Details.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/55853c0dae3af9f49cdc5d45b5cd5144.png)
﻿
From there, you'll see an option Edit Start Date, which will allow you to set the employees new start date and reschedule the survey accordingly. Please note that the option to edit the start date will **not** show once the first step has been completed (submitted or skipped).
Reassign gives you the option to reassign the survey should you want to change the survey recipient. Click Stop Survey to stop the survey from being sent altogether.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9b23110c21945cc00f278b837b6a5858.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#when-will-the-survey-show-up-as-a-survey-task-for)When will the survey show up as a survey task for a user to complete on their home page?
The survey isn’t released for completion until the day it is due. So, if the quality of hire survey was set to be sent out after 30 days, then the user would be prompted to complete the survey 30 days after the employee’s start date.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#what-happens-if-an-employee-leaves-the-company-or)W**hat happens if an employee leaves the company or is terminated within the quality of hire survey period?**
If an employee is terminated within Ashby within the Quality of Hire survey period, then the status of the Quality of Hire survey will be changed to Employee Terminated. Any previous survey submissions will still be accessible.
For more on terminating users in Ashby, review [How do I provision new users in my Ashby account manually?](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-provision-new-users-in-my-ashby-account-manually#gjtW6)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#can-i-resend-quality-of-hire-surveys-that-were-ski)Can I resend quality of hire surveys that were skipped?
A skipped Quality of Hire survey cannot be resent to the assigned Hiring Manager but Hiring Managers can add feedback to any skipped stages in Ashby by navigating to Reports > Employee Surveys and then clicking on the candidate in question.
They can navigate to the skipped stage of the survey and click Add Feedback to complete the survey.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fe0e9cfbbe54427166451eaae1520ccd.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/quality-of-hire-surveys#what-is-the-difference-between-the-enrollment-stat)What is the difference between the Enrollment Status and Step Status for Quality of Hire surveys?
When viewing a specific quality of hire survey, you’ll see both the status of the quality of hire sequence and the status of survey steps.
The enrollment status can be one of the following:
  * Draft


  * Enrolled


  * Finished


  * Cancelled


  * Hiring Manager Deactivated


  * Employee Terminated


For survey step statuses, they can be one of the following:
  * Future Step


  * Feedback Pending


  * Submitted


  * Skipped


Please note that the Skipped status will be applied to survey steps if they were enrolled after the window for the step has passed. So if a candidate is 45 days into their tenure and a survey was due to be sent out on their 30th day, this step will be marked with Skipped.
In this case, the enrollment status is Enrolled and the Survey Steps statuses are Skipped, Skipped and Feedback Pending across the three surveys listed.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c3943269a3822e17663603179edacf41.png)
﻿
﻿

<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)

Surveys & Questionnaires
# Questionnaires
16 min
Copy
Ashby provides a way to send [questionnaires](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/surveys/questionnaire "questionnaires") to your candidates. These can help you collect information during various stages in the application process, rather than asking questions up front in the application form. 
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#questionnaires-overview)Questionnaires overview
Ashby supports the ability to send questionnaires to applicants at any stage of the hiring process. Users can create and customize any number of questionnaires and configure how and when to collect them from candidates. Some use cases for questionnaires include:
  * Asking a candidate about their dietary preferences prior to an onsite lunch


  * Asking a candidate for references prior to the Offer stage


  * Deferring questions asked in the Application Form to later stages of the process to streamline the application process


See the table below for more information on the access roles that have the ability to set up questionnaires in Ashby and who can send questionnaires out to a candidate.  
| Access Role  | Can Configure Surveys?  | Can Send Out Surveys to Candidates?  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Agency Users  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin (Private)  | ❌  | ✅  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#set-up-your-questionnaire)Set up your questionnaire
You can set up candidate experience surveys in the [Admin Section](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/surveys/questionnaire "Admin Section") of the app. Navigate to Admin > Jobs & Applications > Candidate Surveys. Then select the Questionnaires tab. Click + New to create a new questionnaire.
![You can create new questionnaires and edit their questions in the Admin Section of the app.  You can also configure Automation Settings to set up rules to automatically schedule emails with links to the questionnaires.](https://cdn.zappy.app/e4392d4164a7a3a272c19fbcb294ae87.png)
﻿
You’ll be prompted to give your new survey a title prior to being able to add questions to your diversity survey. Click Add Question and select a question type to build out your survey. You can select the following field types:
  * Short Answer


  * Long Unformatted Answer


  * Phone


  * Email


  * Multiple Choice


  * Checkboxes


  * Date


  * Yes/No


  * Number


  * Resume


  * Linear Rating


  * NPS Rating


  * Candidate's Location


  * Other Location


  * URL


  * File


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#send-a-questionnaire)Send a questionnaire
Candidate experience surveys can be sent in two different ways:
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#by-directly-requesting-survey-completion-from-the)By directly requesting survey completion from the candidate profile
You can directly request the candidate to complete a questionnaire by doing the following:
  * On the candidate profile, click the More dropdown 


  * Select Create a Questionnaire Request


  * You will be asked to choose which survey to send and which application it should be associated with. 


  * Create the survey request using the Create button, or optionally also schedule an email with a link to the survey using the Create and Email button.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/34a2bbbc223628f353e86a5aaf054a26.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d1d1b81a927b4f4a48cd3e8dffcaa70a.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#by-setting-up-automation-rules-to-schedule-sending)By setting up automation rules to schedule sending the questionnaire to a candidate when certain conditions are met
You can setup automation rules so that you don’t need to directly request questionnaires from candidates manually. Instead, you can setup a series of conditions that trigger automatically sending a questionnaire to a candidate.
To configure automation settings for your questionnaire:
  * Create a new draft configuration of automation rules by clicking Create a Draft Configuration


  * Specify your conditions by clicking + Add Field to Match, choosing fields and then creating filters based on those


  * Select an email template from the Email Template dropdown that will be used to send out your survey


  * Configure any email delay using the Delay dropdown


  * Specify a sender email address


  * Activate the configuration


  * Toggle on the Enable Survey Automation toggle once the draft has been activated


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fdc63392382d6fa1b7508ba518df9ba3.png)
﻿
The conditions of each rule will get checked whenever a candidate changes stages. Ashby will find the first rule that matches and a questionnaire will be created and an email with a link to the questionnaire will be scheduled.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#setting-up-automation-for-questionnaire-activities)Setting up automation for questionnaire activities on an interview plan
When a candidate lands in a stage with a questionnaire activity, you can set the questionnaire request to be sent out automatically at that point.
﻿
Head to the interview plan for your job, then click + Add Activity, then select the Questionnaire option.
When selecting your questionnaire and email template, check the Automate on Stage Entry? checkbox so the questionnaire is sent when the candidate is moved to the specified stage.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/79e054f205991308ce1299ce8235e45c.png)
﻿
When a candidate is moved to the stage that your automation has been added to, you’ll see a note that the automated activity is being started. You will also have the option to undo this.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/234a5e6c08a706c882fd0a59f9c585ce.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#view-your-results)View your results
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#viewing-individual-results)Viewing individual results
You can view individual results of a completed questionnaire on the Forms tab on the candidate profile.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/85a62f41e8b0ea81dc229f07fc11d076.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#reporting-and-analysis)Reporting and analysis
You can report on the questions in a questionnaire in our standard reports. The fields will be available under Job Consideration → Questionnaire.
﻿  

![Screen Shot 2022-05-23 at 10.14.34 AM.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/kBWje3ocm2fxJLj3HvVd7_screenshot2022-05-23at101434am.png?format=webp)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#reporting-on-questionnaire-responses)Reporting on Questionnaire Responses
Questionnaires are available as a subject to be reported on. Use this to count submitted questionnaires over a period of time, to review answers to specific questions and more!
Here are the fields that can be used for filtering, grouping or displaying information on your report. You will need to select the questionnaire you are reporting on to then access these fields for the specified questionniare. You can also choose questions added to the questionnaire as reporting fields.  
| **Field**  | **Definition**  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Submitted At  | When the questionnaire was completed and submitted.  |  
| Title  | The name of the questionnaire.  |  
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#questionnaire-report-examples)Questionnaire Report Examples
_Pull a list of the answers submitted for a specific job._
Navigate to Reports > Build Report and then Custom List.
**Subject:** Questionnaires
**Filters:** Questionnaire’s Candidate’s Job Consideration’s Job.
**Fields to Show:** Candidate Name and all or any of the questionnaire questions you’d like to have included in your list.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4c2e9928455a4b24da40b376f6d7c12d.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

_View the number of questionnaires completed over the last quarter, split by week and grouped by questionnaire type._
Navigate to Reports > Build Report and then select Count Over Time.
**Subject:** Questionnaires
**Time Field & Interval:** Submitted At to show Last Quarter every Week.
**Group By:** Questionnaire’s Title.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/752f535892ff12cbc446afa478964439.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#are-questionnaire-links-public-or-reusable)Ar**e questionnaire links public or reusable?**
Links to complete questionnaires are candidate-specific. It currently isn’t possible to create a public link for a questionnaire.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#can-i-add-file-upload-questions-to-my-questionnair)Can I add file upload questions to my questionnaire?
You can! Click Add Question and then select the File field option. You can then add in the question and (optionally) a description.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires#can-i-send-questionnaires-to-other-users-like-inte)Can I send questionnaires to other users like interviewers or recruiters?
No, questionnaires can only be configured and sent out to candidates. Consider adding questions to feedback forms or setting up [Hiring Manager Experience Surveys](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/hiring-manager-experience-surveys)﻿
﻿

<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Jobs & Openings
# Compensation
17 min
Copy
With Ashby's compensation features, your team can easily add structured compensation information to your jobs, job postings, and job board.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#permissions-access)Permissions & access
Compensation features are available on all Ashby plans.  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ✅  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
To manage organization-wide compensation default settings, you must have **Org Admin** permissions.
To manage job-level compensation settings, you must have **Elevated Access** with edit permissions on the job or the department tied to the job or job template.
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#pay-transparency-overview)Pay transparency overview
With Ashby's pay transparency features, your team can easily add structured compensation information to the settings page of a job or customize it at the job posting level. Organization Admins can set whether compensation information is required and whether it should appear on job postings and the job board.
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#admin-settings)Admin settings
The **Compensation Settings** page in **Admin** allows Organization Admins to set defaults for displaying compensation across job postings and on the public job board. 
Navigate to **Admin > Job Board > Compensation** to configure. Descriptions of each setting are explained below.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#require-on-job-postings)**Require on job postings**
Decides if any or all job postings in certain locations require compensation. When required, the publish option is disabled on job postings until this information has been added.
  * Not Required


  * Require for all job postings


  * Require for certain locations


![Screenshot of the Require on Job Postings setting in Admin Compensation Settings](https://cdn.zappy.app/3c78ce0fe0752f7477c417319a2cb0db.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#display-options)Display options
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#display-on-job-postings)**Display on job postings?**
If compensation is present on the job or job posting, decides if it should be visible on the posting by default. This option is enforced on jobs and postings where set to required.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#display-on-job-board)**Display on job board?**
If compensation is present on the job or job posting, decides if it should be visible on the job board by default.
![Screenshot of the Display Options settings in Admin Compensation Settings](https://cdn.zappy.app/d9c02a71fe7e5762c8b9a684f23f213e.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#compensation-tier-guide-url)**Compensation Tier Guide URL**
A link to this page is shown on job postings with multiple compensation tiers.
![Screenshot of the Compensation Tier Guide URL field in Admin Compensation Settings](https://cdn.zappy.app/02ed3ec101f7f2d54c9c96d74ce98666.png)
﻿
While you can link to an overall compensation tier guide here, individual compensation bands must be set on the job, job posting, or job template and cannot be set globally.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#compensation-philosophy)**Compensation philosophy**
You can add text to this field that displays below your compensation tiers on your job postings.
Compensation philosophy only shows on your Ashby-hosted job board pages. This information is not pulled to external job boards via XML feed or integration.
![Screenshot of the Compensation Philosophy field in Admin Compensation Settings](https://cdn.zappy.app/9f46dfaf9b7ec495484ec9602f9a9fb4.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#default-currency-and-equity-options)Default currency and equity options
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#default-currency-type)**Default currency type**
The default currency for all job and job posting compensation.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#default-equity-type)**Default equity type**
The default equity type for all job and job posting equity if offered.
![Screenshot of the Default Currency and Equity Options in Admin Compensation Settings](https://cdn.zappy.app/e8185f540d67098dd3c02f391f93ffe3.png)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#job-settings)Job settings
The **Settings** tab on a job or job template has a **Compensation** section, where Organization Admins and Elevated Access users with the ability to edit the job can add compensation information. Compensation information added to the job is also added to all the job's postings. Job posting compensation can also be unlinked and customized individually. 
Navigate to the specific **Job > Settings > Compensation** section to configure the below settings.
![Screenshot of the Compensation section on the Job Settings tab](https://cdn.zappy.app/d1661db1819aadd5213454751dbfd5bf.png)
﻿
  * **Add compensation:** When enabled, settings propagate across all postings on the job but can be customized by editing each individually.


  * **Compensation tiers:** Add compensation tiers to show compensation ranges to applicants on your job board.


  * **Display on job postings?** Decides if candidates see compensation on this job's job postings by default.


  * **Display on job board?** Decides if candidates see compensation summaries on the job board for this job's job postings by default.


  * **Compensation Tier Guide URL:** A link to this page is shown on job postings with multiple compensation tiers.


#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#job-posting-settings)Job posting settings
Job postings inherit the compensation settings applied on the job's settings page by default, but can be customized on each job posting.
![Screenshot of the Compensation section on the Job Posting settings tab](https://cdn.zappy.app/d7c17472e317bc74cf970861d7b57aee.png)
﻿
  * **Compensation tiers:** Add compensation tiers to show compensation ranges to applicants on your job board.


  * **Display on this job posting?** Decides if candidates see compensation on this job posting.


  * **Display on job board?** Decides if candidates see compensation summaries on the job board for this job posting.


  * **Compensation Tier Guide URL:** A link to this page is shown on job postings with multiple compensation tiers.


#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#understanding-compensation-tiers)Understanding compensation tiers
Jobs often have different compensation ranges based on criteria such as the market value of the role in the candidate's location. With compensation tiers, you can detail base compensation, equity, commission, and bonus information for each tier. If you have previously defined compensation tiers for a job, job template, or job posting, you can copy them over to another.
Tier information appears in the order added and currently cannot be re-ordered.
![Screenshot of the Compensation Tiers section showing example tiers](https://cdn.zappy.app/5d7e3fb25946f2205297df919120eb73.png)
﻿
#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#copying-compensation-tiers-to-a-job-job-template-o)Copying compensation tiers to a job, job template, or job posting
You can copy compension tiers to jobs, jobs templates or job postings. To do this:
  1. Navigate to the **Compensation** section of the relevant entity: 


  * **Job:****Jobs > Jobs**, then go to the **Settings** tab of the job and scroll to **Compensation**.


  * **Job template:****Jobs > Jobs** (or **Admin** if you're using the old jobs view), toggle on the **Template** view, select the template, and scroll to the **Compensation** section of its **Settings** tab.


  * **Job posting:****Jobs > Jobs**, click on the job, select **Job Postings** , select the posting, then go to the **Compensation** tab.


  1. Click Copy From... to open the Copy Compensation Tiers wizard.


![Screenshot of the Copy From option in the Job Compensation Settings](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/269y0gxgoEWfVXwN-hY4P_product-marketing-manager-acent-ashby-2026-02-20-at-33658-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Using the wizard, select whether you are copying compensation tiers from an existing job or job posting.


![Screenshot of the Copy Compensation Tiers wizard with the Select a job dropdown](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/LdQ8jWFqaJ1LwYLCx1fVr_product-marketing-manager-acent-ashby-2026-02-20-at-33719-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  1. Select the job or job posting via the Select a job dropdown.


  1. Review the compensation tiers, then click Copy.


#  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#faqs)FAQs
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#will-compensation-data-be-sent-to-third-party-job)Will compensation data be sent to third-party job boards?
Yes! Where supported, this data is included in job postings on third-party job boards.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#can-compensation-data-be-populated-from-openings)Can compensation data be populated from openings?
Compensation from openings cannot be used to populate compensation bands.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/compensation#can-i-report-on-compensation-data)Can I report on compensation data?
This is on the roadmap. Reach out to support@ashbyhq.com for updated information on when this feature will be available.

### Ironclad

Torii is an Automated SaaS Management Platform and automates the discovery, spend optimization, operations and compliance of SaaS. This helps organizations reduce spend, free up IT time from manual tasks and manage SaaS sprawl.

e-signature-documents:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Offers & E-Signatures
# E-Signature Documents
19 min
Copy
This E-Signature feature works similarly to Ashby [E-Signature Offers](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-offers)﻿ , and can be used for documents like Non-disclosure Agreements (NDAs).
Non-offer e-signature documents can be configured on the following plans: Legacy Plus, Plus and Enterprise.  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#e-signature-documents-overview)E-Signature Documents Overview
The E-Signature Documents feature allows your team to request and store signed copies of any document that requires a signature.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#configure-e-signature-documents)Configure E-Signature Documents
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#add-replacement-tokens-to-your-document)Add replacement tokens to your document
To create a valid e-signature document, you’ll need to embed the replacement tokens from Admin > Integrations > [E-Signature Documents](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/esignature-documents/tokens "E-Signature Documents") within your document template.
Click on a token to copy it and then paste it into your document template prior to exporting it.
﻿  

![Copy tokens to your clipboard by clicking on them](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/rWEfvPh2AZpDDVLOxOge__esigtokenselectgif.gif)
﻿
![Paste copied tokens into the appropriate places in the document](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/yT92DmE80ytvf1sM31Qhe_esigaddingtoken.gif)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#export-your-document-in-docx-format)Export your document in .docx format
The document template must be in .docx format when uploaded, so export the completed template to this format before uploading it to Ashby.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ef18615eb129182498e319a477b989f7.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#upload-and-validate-your-document)Upload and validate your document
Once the document is ready, navigate to the [E-Signature Document Templates](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/esignature-documents/templates "E-Signature Document Templates") page, then:
  1. Click + New on the right side of the page.


  1. Give the document a title


  1. Drag and drop or browse to find the file, then upload it. Ashby will check the file:


  * If it’s valid, the indicator will turn green, and you’re done!


  * If it’s invalid, the indicator will remain red and you’ll receive an error message with instructions on how to update the file.


![ESig Document Upload GIF.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/BCvDui1HW2q4F7mB5ai7m_esigdocumentuploadgif.gif)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#set-filters-for-your-e-signature-document-optional)Set filters for your e-signature document (optional)
When uploading and validating your e-signature document template, you'll see the option Only allow using this E-signature Document Template on specific job considerations? Check this checkbox if you'd like the e-signature document to only be an option that's available for specific job considerations.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/596d4e4df7cb8e80bb43a606637fb731.png)
﻿
Once you've checked this checkbox, you can then configure a rule by clicking + Add Field to Matchand adding filters connected to the job consideration like region, interview stage, department, and more. Any job consideration’s meeting this criteria will list this e-signature template as an option when generating an e-signature request.
![In this example, the e-signature document will only show as an option for job considerations for jobs that are a part of the Engineering department.](https://cdn.zappy.app/2950b1b2a99be44c0db8c13cd8bea6ff.png)
In this example, the e-signature document will only show as an option for job considerations for jobs that are a part of the Engineering department.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#manage-your-documents)Manage your documents
If you’d like to archive a document, visit it and click the red Archive button on the right.
You can visit and reactivate archived documents by changing the filter from Active to Archived
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ec5d74168ffe133cd722df21d6105586.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/20192ac7e63435a1a05576fb4c021d23.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#use-e-signature-documents)Use E-Signature Documents
E-Signature Documents can be used in a few different ways; review the different options below. In all cases, e-signature documents aren’t sent out fully automatically. Instead, requests are generated on candidates’ profiles so senders can review and confirm details ahead of sending.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#configure-an-automation-rule)Configure an automation rule
Automation rules are set up in Admin and can be used to trigger activities across all of your jobs. Use this option if you’d like every candidate to receive the documentation request.
Like other automation rules in Ashby, E-Signature rules are triggered based on a condition, which can be set using many reporting options. The most common include:
  * Current interview stage or stage group (e.g., send if the candidate is currently in the Intro Call stage)


  * Candidate outcome (e.g., send if the candidate is marked as Hired)


Once the condition is set, click Activate Draft Configuration to enable the rule. The next time a candidate meets this condition, the rule will be triggered. Once triggered, a request will be generated on the candidate’s profile and will need to be sent out manually (e-signature documents are never sent out 100% automatically).
The automation conditions are evaluated each time a candidate moves stage. If the candidate meets the criteria once they've been moved to the new stage, then the flow will be triggered. For example, if you have your criteria set for the automation to run once the candidate's job consideration is in the Hiring Manager Interview stage, the automation will run at the point of the candidate being moved into that Hiring Manager stage.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f69261337342848b9c4a42f66b3006de.png)
﻿
![NDA creation.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Y_xCMCfBzNHkfiIixHAap_ndacreation.gif)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#add-a-document-as-an-activity)Add a document as an activity
﻿[Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/activities)﻿ are added to the Interview plan for a specific job. Use this option if you’d like every candidate in a specific job to have this request type appear on the candidate’s profile when they move into the associated stage.
Add the E-Signature Document activity to the stage you’d like the request to be generated on. For example, if you’d like an NDA request generated for all candidates that move to the First Round on the Developer Advocate job, add the request there.
Once you select the activity type, select the document that should be associated with the stage.
Activity-type requests won’t automatically be sent. Instead, a request will be generated on the candidates’ profiles and will need to be sent manually.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1393eb8ec27fef58e6de4511091c6518.png)
﻿
![ESig Doc Activity.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/K5HY7Hd05w1LJJjDwwkpS_esigdocactivity.gif)
﻿
![ESig Activity Generation GIF.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/1oIYPI7cgkUTRKKTf6eFv_esigactivitygenerationgif.gif)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#generate-a-one-off-document-request)Generate a one-off document request
One-off requests can be generated on a candidate profile. Use this option for individual candidates that need a request generated outside of the normal workflow.
  1. To generate a one-off request, visit More > Send E-Signature Document on a candidate’s profile. 


  1. Next, select the document you’d like to send from the dropdown menu.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e2d04e7926d4a1d49acba1c85c75fea1.png)
﻿
  1. Once generated, the request details will need to be filled out and sent manually.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#filling-in-e-signature-request-details)Filling in e-signature request details 
When you send an e-signature request, you can either fill in the request details manually, or apply a pre-created e-signature request template that automatically fills in the request fields.
See [Creating and Managing E-Signature Request Templates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/creating-and-managing-e-signature-request-templates)﻿ for more information on creating e-signature request templates.
![Screenshot showing the request details pane with a e-signature request template applied that has filled in all details.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/XPu1wgn1VddGPvlN_A_iY_carolina-zulauf-backend-engineer-acent-ashby-2026-03-12-at-45501-pm.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
The fields to be filled in include:
  * **Title:** This will become the subject of the email to the candidate.


  * **Message:** This will appear in the body text of the email. 


  * **Company signatory:** The internal team member required to sign.


  * **Signing order:** Determine who signs first, or whether anyone can sign at any time.


  * **Expiration:** Select a specific date, or set to never expire.


  * **CC:** Any additional individuals you would like to receive the email.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#signed-e-signature-documents)Signed E-Signature Documents
Once all parties sign a request, a copy of the file will be stored in the Other Files section of the Summary tab on the candidate’s profile.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/cdc6ba009a0e9a61e20b1eece9114fb2.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#does-ashby-have-an-nda-template-we-can-use)Does Ashby have an NDA template we can use?
As an NDA is a legal document, we recommend reaching out to your legal counsel for appropriate NDA language.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#can-i-add-multiple-documents-to-one-e-signature-ac)Can I add multiple documents to one e-signature activity?
Adding multiple distinct documents to one e-signature document activity isn’t supported currently (like it is for e-signature offers). Instead, we recommend either compiling all appropriate documents into one file or adding multiple activities.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#can-i-generate-and-send-an-nda-request-100-automat)Can I generate and send an NDA request 100% automatically?
No. Sending out e-signature documents requires human intervention to ensure details are accurate ahead of sending.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#can-i-set-an-e-signature-request-to-automatically)Can I set an e-signature request to automatically expire?
You can - this is done when sending out the e-signature document to the candidate. Click Send E-Signature Request on the document activity on the candidate’s profile. On the following screen, use the Automatically Expire Request drop-down to set an expiry date and time.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d848e60cf394e10c0ddaa35d99be9f12.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#how-do-custom-fields-work-with-e-signature-documen)How do custom fields work with e-signature document tokens?
You can generate tokens to pull data from custom fields into your e-signature documents or offer letters. If you have multiple choice custom fields in place, you can also customize the text substituted in to your e-signature document based on the value chosen. For more on this, check out [Custom Fields](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/custom-fields)﻿﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#can-i-add-text-input-fields-to-e-signature-documen)Can I add text input fields to e-signature documents?
You can, yes!
E-Signature text input tokens can be used for e-signature documents generated via Dropbox Sign or Docusign.
If you'd like to add text fields into your offer letters so the candidate or the company signatory can fill out additional information within the offer itself, you can copy and paste the following tokens into your template:
{{CANDIDATE_TEXT_INPUT}} This text input field will provide the candidate a field to add in additional text.
{{COMPANY_TEXT_INPUT}} This text input field will provide the company signatory a field to add in additional text.
When clicking the token in the E-Signature Document Tokens tab, you'll be prompted to select the field size, either by selecting a preset size or by setting the width and number of lines. You can also check the Required checkbox to require the signer to complete the field as part of the signing process.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Vdblf0p9HKE999LinHV6L_offers-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-91815-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Once you've determined the text input field size and settings, click the token generated to then copy it. You can then paste this token into your document template. 
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/BU8cdsM2wJWApPF-KIfDO_offers-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-92749-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
We recommend placing this token in it's own line within your document template to prevent layout issues. Here's an example of how the token should be placed and how it will look when an e-signature offer letter has been generated.
![An offer letter template with a company input text token added on a new line.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/Jkh5u64P68HUKY6HYK675_e-signature-text-input-tokens-restricted-early-access-slab-2026-01-29-at-93834-am.jpg?format=webp)
An offer letter template with a company input text token added on a new line.
﻿
![How the company signatory will see the text input field at the point of signing the e-signature offer.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/tjlA_m5-wrGagUHpnHLlJ_e-signature-text-input-tokens-restricted-early-access-slab-2026-01-29-at-93802-am.jpg?format=webp)
How the company signatory will see the text input field at the point of signing the e-signature offer.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents#can-i-adjust-the-formatting-of-numbers-dates-and-c)Can I adjust the formatting of numbers, dates and currencies on my offer letters?
You can choose between U.S-style formatting and European-style formatting for numbers and specify currency formatting for offer letters and e-signature offers and documents. Navigate to Admin > Offers and click on the Settings tab to determine your offer settings. Alternatively, head to Admin > Integrations > E-Signature Documents and click on the Settings tab to configure your e-signature document settings.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/ntpdOKQnAcUA5C3xll8aq-20260306-105723.png?format=webp)
﻿
  1. **Default Number Formatting:** Determine whether you would like numbers displayed in European style or U.S Style.


  1. **Default Currency Formatting:** Determine whether you would like currency to be displayed as a symbol ($) or Country Code (USD).


  1. **Default Date Formatting:** Select your preferred date display format from the drop-down list.


You will also have the option to override the default number and currency settings when generating offer letters.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/50db029cb014378141eadad4c98909ec.png)
﻿
It is not possible to override the date formatting setting in your offer or e-signature settings for a single offer letter.
If you override the number or currency settings when creating an offer, other e-signature documents added to the same packet inherit the same setting. If the default setting was not overridden, the global default is used for e-signature documents.
﻿

Ashby Analytics
Getting Started with Analytics
# How do I enable Advanced filters?
3 min
Copy
This document reviews how to enable and utilize Advanced filtering options in Ashby's report building interface.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-enable-advanced-filters#advanced-filters)Advanced Filters
The Advanced filter interface allows you to select individual and multiple fields while applying logical And, Or, and Not operations. For fields that contain string values, you can apply string matching conditions such as "contains,” "starts with," or "equals". Visit our [Report Catalog - Essentials](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-catalog-essentials)﻿ to see many examples of how Advanced filters can be used.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-enable-advanced-filters#enabling-the-advanced-filters)Enabling the Advanced filters
You can see the “Advanced” filter option on the right-hand side of the Filters section in any Ashby report. By default, the Advanced filter option is checked, and clicking “Add Field to Match” allows you to add filters.
When the “Advanced” filter option is not turned on, the report’s filter options are determined by the report subject.
With Job Considerations set as the report subject, Job, Source, Team, and Location are the available filters. However, when the subject is changed to “Job”, Team and Location are the only available filters.
![Screen Cast 2022-12-16 at 7.56.05 AM.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/w74ZPCLi6YgZK-h9iqQfS_screencast2022-12-16at75605am.gif)
﻿
![With “Job Considerations” set as the report Subject, Job, Source, Team, and Location are the available filters. However, when the Subject is changed to “Job”, Team and Location are the only available filters. ](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/jcvYWREb298S3J5RczRB3_screencast2022-12-16at75833am.gif)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-do-i-enable-advanced-filters#field-selector-and-type-ahead)Field selector and type ahead
When adding fields in advanced Filters (and Group By), the field selector modal will present all available options. The field selector permits type ahead functionality to quickly find the field you need. Typing "recr" will present all the matching "Recruiter" fields.
If you see multiple options, the path above the field name shows where the field comes from. In the below example, the "Recruiter" field is available as the Recruiter on the Application, the Recruiter on the Job, or the Recruiter on the Job associated with the Opening.
![Document image](https://app.archbee.com/api/optimize/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/zdoam6GA9Hq0ujY-_g07W_screenshot2021-12-02at111728am.png)
﻿
﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI Candidate Assistant
6 min
Copy
The Candidate Assistant is a new AI-powered feature that provides a chat interface to help users quickly access and understand candidate information.
You can opt-in to use AI features in the [Opt-In Features](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/early-access "Opt-In Features") section of Admin.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#overview)Overview
﻿
The AI assistant can help with analyzing and summarizing the candidate’s information. Responses are generated referencing the following areas of the candidate profile:
  * Resumes


  * Notes


  * Emails


  * Texts


  * LinkedIn messages (that have been logged in Ashby)


  * Interview feedback


  * Referrals


  * Past and scheduled interviews*


  * Interviews pending scheduling*


  * Submitted candidate availability


  * Candidate and application attribution


  * Transcripts of interviews (from the [AI Notetaker](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker)﻿)*


*Only the interviews that the specific user will be able to see will be referenced.
The AI assistant can also use this information to highlight any pending actions and next steps. The AI assistant will have context about all of the candidate's active applications and will be able to answer questions about them from a single chat. Information about the application you’re currently viewing will be prioritized in the response.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#enabling-and-accessing-the-ai-candidate-assistant)Enabling and accessing the AI Candidate Assistant
To enable the AI Candidate Assistant in your Ashby account, navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > [Opt-In Features](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/early-access "Opt-In Features"). You can then opt-in using the Enable AI Features toggle and check the AI Candidate Assistant checkbox.
Once enabled, you’ll be able to access the AI candidate assistant while viewing a candidate profile. Click on the AI tab within the Feed section to open up a conversation.
You can type your question into the Ask a new question textbox and click Ask. The AI candidate assistant will then process the question and respond accordingly.
Please review results accordingly for accuracy. You can provide feedback on the assistant by clicking Give Feedback. You’ll be able to add a rating along with any comments.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/df9d9d395f1cacf75c220953b0c7dd6e.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/bf8bc09315baf377f74245342c2e1f79.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e93b09ec6e2403aead6e6eba477facad.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#is-there-a-chat-history-option-so-i-can-review-pre)Is there a chat history option so I can review previous conversations with the AI candidate assistant?
Yes, you can click History to view your ten latest chats with the AI candidate assistant.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5a6b8b0ae43a86b40c91bcd9a3a2679c.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#can-the-ai-candidate-assistant-perform-actions-for)Can the AI candidate assistant perform actions for me, like hiring a candidate or scheduling an interview?
No, the AI candidate assistant serves as a source of information and cannot perform actions on your behalf. This includes directly sending emails. The assistant can help with drafting up an email that you can then copy and send manually.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#are-scheduled-interviews-referenced-in-responses-f)Are scheduled interviews referenced in responses from the AI candidate assistant?
At the moment, past and upcoming interviews are not used by the AI candidate assistant to generate answers.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#are-job-descriptions-taken-into-consideration-when)Are job descriptions taken into consideration when the AI candidate assistant generates responses?
Currently job descriptions are not used by the AI candidate assistant as a reference to generate answers. This includes the job descriptions on the roles the candidate has been considered for and job descriptions on roles you may want to consider them for but haven’t yet.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#can-the-ai-candidate-assistant-compare-candidates)Can the AI candidate assistant compare candidates?
This isn’t possible currently.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant#will-private-notes-or-private-feedback-form-fields)Will private notes or private feedback form fields be included in the AI candidate assistant’s responses?
If the user has access to view private notes and fields (if they have Organization Admin or Elevated Access - Admin Private access to the role, location or department), then they will be referenced in the AI candidate assistant’s responses. If the user does not have access to view private notes or private feedback form fields, then they will not be referenced.
﻿
