[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Interviews & Scheduling
Interviews: Initial Setup
# Direct Booking & Candidate Availability Links
28 min
Copy
Direct booking saves time scheduling by allowing candidates to choose a time on their interviewer's calendars.
Candidate availability links can be sent to the candidate so they can determine when they are available for an interview. You can then manually schedule the candidate from their given availability.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#overview)Overview
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#direct-booking)Direct Booking
Direct booking links can be sent to candidates so they can view the panel’s availability. They can then select a suitable date and time and schedule their interview directly.
Direct Booking Links can be sent when the interview activity only has one interview event.
Direct booking links are specific to the candidate, job and interview stage. If you’d like to create direct booking links that can be used across multiple candidates (for example, for sourcing and using sequences), check out [Public Booking Links](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/public-booking-links)﻿. Please note that public booking links must still be linked to a job and interview stage.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#candidate-availability)Candidate Availability
Candidate availability links can be sent to candidates so they can add in their availability. You can then manually schedule their interview based on the time slots they’ve provided.
Candidate availability links are useful for when the interview activity has multiple interview events (for example, an onsite with multiple panels) or interviewers haven’t been assigned yet.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#scheduling-permissions-required-to-schedule-an-int)Scheduling: Permissions required to schedule an interview
See the chart below for more information on who can schedule a candidate in for an interview, either by sending out a direct booking link, or manually scheduling interviews.  
| Access Role  | Has Access?  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Limited Access  | ❌  |  
| Agency User  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - External Recruiter (not linked to an agency)  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Analyst  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Team Member  | ❌  |  
| Elevated Access - Hiring Manager  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin  | ✅  |  
| Elevated Access - Admin Private  | ✅  |  
| Organization Admin  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#create-an-email-template)Create an email template
While not required, as a first step we suggest setting up email templates to use for sending out direct booking links and candidate availability links. You can create an email template in Admin > Organization Setup > [Emails](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/email-templates "Emails"). Click + New to create a new template.
You will need to set up separate templates for your direct booking links and for your candidate availability links.
If you’d like to pre-fill your email to the candidate with the direct booking link, click the T icon in the toolbar when creating your email template. Search for and select the Direct Booking Link substitution token to add it to your template.
If you’d like to pre-fill your email to the candidate with the candidate availability link, click the T icon in the toolbar when creating your email template. Search for and select the Candidate Availability Link substitution token to add it to your template.
Once set up, you'll be able to select the pre-drafted template when emailing a candidate. If you'd prefer, the scheduling link will be available to copy on a candidate's profile and you can write a new email each time.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e148f853fcbaa183acc6ad3ba4957ecc.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2e805a39911d89f8f6a2ba4b8f53e761.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6e93dfb7452cceaefa3c2c07ef65ec75.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/21605978fe7bb99eb15219f383bbc8ac.png)
﻿
There are two routes that you can take to send out direct booking and candidate availability links: configuring schedule interview activities to help automate your process, or generate and sending one-off links from the candidate profile for scheduling.
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#automate-direct-booking-candidate-availability-gen)Automate direct booking & candidate availability generation via schedule interview activities (recommended)
Schedule interview activities help you configure interviews for each of your interview plan stages in advance. Then when a candidate is moved to this stage, all of the details are already set up and you can simply copy and send or email out your direct booking or candidate availability link. For more information on configuring scheduling interview activities, check out [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities)﻿.
We would recommend using schedule activities to streamline your process.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#instant-direct-booking-and-candidate-availability)Instant direct booking and candidate availability links
If you’d like to schedule in a one-off interview for a candidate, you can generate direct booking and candidate availability links directly from their profile.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#direct-booking-links)Direct Booking Links
Instant direct booking links allow you to send a candidate a link where they can select an interview time slot from the interviewer’s availability.
﻿  

﻿
To generate an instant direct booking link for a one-off interview from the candidate’s profile:
  * Click + New Interview


  * Select Create Direct Booking Link


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/436d411106737c8e854fb4b2aaadb25e.png)
﻿
  * Determine the interview details on the Instant Booking Link pop-up, including the interview type, location, interviewers and meeting organizer.


  * Click Create Booking Link


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1116d8320932add182fbb14c36a3f46a.png)
﻿
  * Select your email template from the Email to Candidate dropdown to draft an email with the booking link and hit Send Link… to view your email draft.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d656a2b9a2e5c0f2336428ecd2b52b70.png)
﻿
  * If sending the link via another route, click Copy Link to copy the direct booking link and sent it to the candidate.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/68a7a802fc97f4505b6653c4ac6d7596.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#candidate-availability-links)Candidate Availability Links
Instant candidate availability links allow you to request availability from a candidate for an interview.
﻿  

﻿
To generate an instant candidate availability link from the candidate profile:
  * Click + New Interview


  * Click Schedule New Interview


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a5bcfa4442235a376c9d5d89bfaed54a.png)
﻿
  * Head to the Template tab on the left-hand Schedule menu


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2a52ab11fa226ed927957c71a09a4997.png)
﻿
  * Determine the interview event/interview events with the Add Shared Interview button.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1ca90169035bcc2fe45fdbb4a3154ef1.png)
﻿
  * Assign your interviewers using the Configure Interviewers option (more on assigning interviewers at [Interviewers: Assigning, Rescheduling and Setting Interviewer Limits](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/interviewers-assigning-rescheduling-and-setting-interviewer-limits)﻿).


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c82f0a5c6efa1053524b4678896c624f.png)
﻿
  * Use the other tabs to configure any other settings for this specific interview (by default, the interview will follow your scheduling defaults﻿. More on this at [Scheduling Defaults](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-scheduling-defaults)﻿).


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/42fa2e80a12f78d4828c7bdc78d6c685.png)
﻿
  * Once at least one interview event has been configured in Templates, navigate to Current.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8251d41a27059e9da7b7b87214a598b1.png)
﻿
  * Click Create Candidate Availability Link to generate your candidate availability link.


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/140b443c966a09e19f776425ac741d65.png)
﻿
  * Go back to the candidate profile and hit Schedule.


  * Hover over Request Candidate Availability and either copy or draft an email to send out the availability link.


![Screenshot 2024-09-19 at 10.06.12.png](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/WUMaIKX8zCQXFmPkRHYJx_screenshot2024-09-19at100612.png?format=webp)
﻿
**Edit Availability Window for Candidate Availability**
Please note: If you’d like to amend your own availability for interviews, please check out [Meeting Hours](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/meeting-hours)﻿. This option allows you to amend the window that candidates can add their availability in for.
﻿
As part of the Request Candidate Availability section, you now have the option to specify a window of dates that candidates can submit their availability in. When preparing to send out your candidate availability link, click _Schedule_ on the interview activity on the candidate’s profile, then hover over Request candidate availability. From here, click Edit Availability Window.
Within the Edit Availability Window pop-up, select either Rolling Days or Custom Date Range:
Rolling Days: A dynamic window, starting from the earliest available interview date. This will adjust depending on when the candidate clicks on the link. So if the window is set to be 14 days and the candidate clicks the link on the 1st, they will see suitable availability up until the 15th. If they then opt to go back and add their availability on the 3rd, they will be able to add in availability up until the 17th of the month.
If you see dates greyed out, this may be because it is outside of your minimum notice - you can hover over it to confirm.
Custom Date Range: Set a specific start and end date for availability, or just an end date if you need the candidate to add availability before a specific date. The specified range will remain the same regardless of when the candidate visits the page.
Once you’ve established your scheduling window, you can then finalize your availability window. If you’d like to remove or add dates within the availability window, you can click on them on the Finalize Availability calendar.
Company holidays and weekends will be excluded by default. If you have custom meeting hours set for the interview activity (more on this [here](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/meeting-hours)﻿), any days that don’t have meeting hours set will also be excluded. You can then click Save and Copy Link to confirm the availability window and copy the candidate availability link to send out to the candidate.
If you make changes to your availability window, you will need to click Save and Copy Link in order for the changes to apply to the existing candidate availability link.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/14112b3563df189611795b781ca8a9a4.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/eac84bb18b67cd7110329067a5fc344a.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/336e36ccb6608ebbf48e527ffed8e633.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e8076d2f4784ec4f67d73809712ef621.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b1b9217f70be94f2e061dae44e42be77.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#what-the-candidate-sees)What the Candidate Sees
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#direct-booking-1)Direct Booking
When your candidate clicks on the direct booking link, they'll be taken to a landing page that uses the same brand elements you configured on the [Theme](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/theme "Theme") page in Admin - the avatar of the meeting organizer or the interviewer will be displayed. 
The logic for the avatar displayed is as follows:
**There are multiple potential interviewers, either from a pool being assigned to an interviewer slot or OR logic being used in an interviewer slot:** The meeting organizer will be shown, as the interviewer has not been assigned yet.
**There are multiple interviewers, one specific interviewer assigned to each interviewer slot:** Only one avatar is displayed, so the meeting organizer will be displayed.
**The interview is a 1:1 interview with one interviewer slot with a specific interviewer assigned:** The interviewer's avatar will be shown here. 
Once the candidate selects a time, both the candidate and interviewers will receive calendar invites.
If you’ve selected Phone Call as the location for your interview, then the candidate will also be prompted to enter their phone number.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#candidate-availability-1)Candidate Availability
When your candidate clicks on the candidate availability link, they'll be taken to a landing page that uses the same brand elements you configured on the [Theme](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/theme "Theme") page in Admin - the avatar of the meeting organizer or the interviewer will be displayed. Once they add in their availability, the meeting organizer will be notified so they can manually schedule the interview.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#scheduling-interviews-after-candidates-have-submit)Scheduling interviews after candidates have submitted their availability
If you are sending out calendar availability links, once the candidate has provided their availability, you can then manually schedule in the interview. The candidate's availability can be viewed both on the activity and in the calendar interface when scheduling the candidate. To start the scheduling process, click Start Manual Schedule on the interview activity on the candidate's profile.
You’ll be taken to the calendar interface. To view the candidate’s availability, click on the Interview Date field.
The candidate’s availability is listed at the bottom of the pop-up and dates with availability have a green dot in the bottom-right corner on the calendar view.
You can also use the Candidate Availability dropdown menu to see the candidate’s availability directly alongside your interviewer calendars. You can choose to either view all submitted availability, the availability submitted for this particular interview schedule or to hide submitted availability. This setting will also impact the candidate availability listed in the Interview Date field.
Once a suitable date and time has been found, click Configure Communications to determine your calendar invite and reminder settings.
Once your communication settings are in place, click Schedule to book your interview.
﻿  

![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/yfr0Frfs51GvTM9dHpOH3_shelley-pearce-marketeer-acent-ashby-2026-02-17-at-102202-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ba80bcc4b760ece4106843736386ab38.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e847ce3066719b0bff389c49f9891fdb.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e5e72a4a58d76b65728220cb9ceec97d.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9ac07726c25a352e5e2b151d3ae1a347.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#why-is-direct-booking-unavailable-on-my-job-templa)Why is direct booking unavailable on my job template?
If you hover over the red Direct Booking icon on your interview activity on your job template, you will see the following message:
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/fbe58c96790021117801b49599d5dd39.png)
﻿
This message will disappear on jobs generated from this template. It shows on the template because the template itself is not an active job.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#im-seeing-a-missing-value-for-message-when-pulling)I'**m seeing a Missing Value For message when pulling up an email template. Why?**
This error will show if the value cannot be found. This is particularly common when:
  * You’re trying to send a direct booking link but an interview activity hasn’t been generated and a booking link hasn’t been created for the candidate.


  * You’re trying to send a candidate availability link but an interview activity hasn’t been generated and a candidate availability link hasn’t been created for the candidate.


  * If you’re trying to send out a survey and the survey request and link haven’t been generated yet.


  * If an interview has not been scheduled yet (panel information can only be pulled for interview emails if the interview has already been scheduled).


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/51dac655543e89e6bcb6c50c0518db50.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#how-do-i-reschedule-an-interview)How do I reschedule an interview?
You can read more on rescheduling [here](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/manually-scheduling-interviews#reschedule-interviews)﻿. Candidates can also reschedule via their direct booking link if they scheduled via direct booking by clicking Find a New Time on the interview confirmation page.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a19fa8d72f28e1343afe5bd22a1780be.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#can-i-invalidate-a-direct-booking-link-or-candidat)C**an I invalidate a direct booking link or candidate availability link once I’ve generated it?**
You can indeed! To cancel a direct booking link, click the Schedule option on the activity on the candidate’s profile. From here, you will see the option Cancel Direct Booking Link _._ When you click this option, the activity will remain on the candidate profile but the direct booking link has been invalidated.
To cancel a candidate availability link, click the Actions button, then Cancel Candidate Availability Link. The interview activity will remain on the candidate profile but the candidate availability link will be invalidated.
If you wish to switch to sending out a direct booking link instead of a candidate availability link for an interview or vice versa, you will need to cancel the initially generated link first.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f66723b5f285e31df185a37e2ad09f4f.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#im-getting-an-active-meeting-request-already-exist)I'**m getting an Active Meeting Request already exists error when trying to generate a candidate availability link. What’s going on?**
This is because a direct booking link has already been generated for the interview activity and needs to be removed before a candidate availability link can be generated to send out to the candidate.
Click Schedule on the activity, then click Cancel Direct Booking Link _._ You’ll then be able to generate a candidate availability link.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/60913509ba4167ec74e758fea0a11dff.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#can-i-set-specific-dates-of-availability-for-a-boo)Can I set specific dates of availability for a booking link (for example, only being able to book the interview between 3rd and 12th of the current month)?
No, availability for booking links is pulled from company, personal, or interview activity-specific meeting hours. More on setting these up at [Meeting Hours](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/meeting-hours)﻿.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#can-i-assign-multiple-potential-locations-to-a-dir)Can I assign multiple potential locations to a direct booking link? For example, Zoom or a phone call?
You can only assign one location to a schedule interview activity or direct booking link. It’s not currently possible to assign multiple locations, or set conditional locations.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#do-candidate-availability-links-take-interviewer-c)Do candidate availability links take interviewer calendars into account?
Candidate availability links only ask the candidate to add in the dates and times they are available, they do not display the interviewer’s availability. Candidates will be able to select any days and times they are available and are not limited by company, interviewer or interview-specific meeting hours. They will only be limited by any availability windows set on the activity. The interview is then manually scheduled based on times that are suitable for both the candidate and the interviewer. The candidate will not be able to add in availability over the weekend by default.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#is-it-possible-to-let-the-candidate-choose-the-int)Is it possible to let the candidate choose the interview location when booking an interview (for example, either via Zoom or phone call)?
This currently isn’t possible. The interview location is determined via the Location field when setting up the interview or schedule interview activity so would be determined prior to the booking link being sent.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#can-candidates-resubmit-or-edit-their-availability)Can candidates resubmit or edit their availability once submitted?
Candidates can resubmit their availability if they need to make any changes.
If the interview has yet to be scheduled, they can use the original candidate availability link to navigate back to the confirmation page, then click Edit Availability.
They can then add, remove or edit any added availability. They can then confirm their changes by hitting Submit. If they do not submit their changes, they will not be saved.
If the interview has already been scheduled or completed, then they can navigate to that same confirmation page but will see an Update Availability button instead.
They can then confirm any changes by hitting Submit. If they do not submit their changes, they will not be saved.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/aab2e47b068a659ced4405863cced175.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/8f956be2cb88fed9794d071b0203e3f7.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#can-i-send-a-direct-booking-and-candidate-availabi)Can I send a direct booking and candidate availability link to a candidate in one email?
If you have multiple schedule interview activities for a stage, when you move the candidate to this stage, multiple activities will populate for you to take action on. You can opt to generate a direct booking link for one activity and a candidate availability link for the other.
For more on creating schedule interview activities, check out Setting up Schedule Interview Activities.
To generate the direct booking link for one of your activities: Click the Copy Direct Booking Link option on the generated activity (or Schedule > Send Direct Booking Link > Copy Direct Booking Link).
To generate the candidate availability link for one of your activities: Click the Copy Availability Link option on the generated activity (or Schedule > Request Candidate Availability > Copy Candidate Availability Link).
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ddebeb601015c80b2483a16c19797053.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e1ca21832cb4031492fe73951b5e94f5.png)
﻿
﻿  

Once the links have been generated, draft the email to send out to the candidate - if you have both the Direct Booking Link and Candidate Availability Link substitution tokens included, both should pull the appropriate URLs from the activities.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#how-do-i-set-my-availability-for-direct-booking-li)H**ow do I set my availability for direct booking links?**
Check out [Meeting Hours](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/meeting-hours)﻿ for more information on setting your availability as an interviewer
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#why-does-an-interview-slot-in-my-schedule-template)Why does an interview slot in my schedule template show that the slot is invalid when I add an interviewer into said slot?
﻿  

This error will show if the selected interviewer meets any of the following criteria:
  * Is a service account


  * User account is disabled in Ashby


  * Is globally paused for all interviews


  * Doesn’t have a Google Workspace or Microsoft calendar


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/direct-booking-and-candidate-availability-links#candidates-are-only-seeing-a-limited-amount-of-ava)Candidates are only seeing a limited amount of availability, why?
The availability shown to the candidate does depend on your meeting hours and calendar availability but also on the settings for your scheduling interview activity or your scheduling defaults. Make sure to check the Minimum Scheduling Notice and Rolling Days Available settings to ensure that these are correct. For more on configuring this, check out [Setting up Schedule Interview Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-up-schedule-interview-activities)﻿ and [Setting Scheduling Defaults](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/setting-scheduling-defaults)﻿.
﻿  

﻿

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Offers & E-Signatures
# Adding Multiple Documents to an E-signature Offer
6 min
Copy
You can now add additional documents to E-signature offers sent out for the candidate to sign. You can opt to add more [E-Signature Documents](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents)﻿ or PDFs with additional information for the candidate.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/adding-multiple-documents-to-an-e-signature-offer#overview)Overview
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/adding-multiple-documents-to-an-e-signature-offer#adding-multiple-documents-to-an-e-signature-offer)Adding Multiple Documents to an E-signature Offer
Once you have created your offer and generated your offer letter, you will be able to add additional documents.
To add additional documents to be sent alongside your E-signature offer letter, click Add Documents when viewing the offer. You will then be asked to specify the document type.
PDF: A document included in the E-signature request that doesn’t itself require a signature from the candidates. On selection, you will be asked to upload your file here.
E-Signature Document: A document that the candidate will be asked to sign as part of the E-Signature process. On selection, you can use the drop-down to select your E-signature documents from the templates you’ve already uploaded [here](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/esignature-documents/templates "here"). You can read more about E-signature documents at [E-Signature Documents](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/e-signature-documents)﻿.
Upload or specify your PDF or E-signature document, then click Submit or Generate to confirm. Your specified document will then be added to your offer.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0136c108066c3d6ed9de060e3de1121f.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2cd573311b3f81ba8c7543fb643daa0d.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5393c0be53d5ebf8c8e854463cb5c1fe.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/adding-multiple-documents-to-an-e-signature-offer#amending-the-added-documents)Amending the Added Documents
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/adding-multiple-documents-to-an-e-signature-offer#updating-and-deleting-a-document)Updating and Deleting a Document
To amend a document, click on it within the Offer Packet section of the offer.
You’ll then have the option to either re-upload the file (if a PDF) or switch the template (if using an E-Signature document).
Be sure to click Submit or Generate to ensure the new document is added.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9eba68b5c873a510f3d543bd4e373ced.png)
﻿
To delete a document, click on it within the Offer Packet section of the offer, then hit Delete on the pop-up.
You will be asked to confirm this action as this cannot be undone.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b6d4012ebe56421297dc2fd2324af5cc.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/adding-multiple-documents-to-an-e-signature-offer#adjusting-the-order-documents-are-shown-in)Adjusting the order documents are shown in.
You can set the order of the documents within your offer packet by clicking and dragging the documents in the Offer Packet section when viewing the offer.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/adding-multiple-documents-to-an-e-signature-offer#previewing-and-sending-the-offer-with-documents-as)Previewing and Sending the Offer with Documents as an E-Signature Request
Once you’ve added all documents needed, click Send Offer E-Signature Request.
From there, you’ll be asked to assign a company signatory, confirm the signing order, optionally add a request expiration date and set the message accompanying the request.
Once these fields have been completed, click the Preview option to preview your offer packet prior to sending.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1fad5278526355296360504cb889f7a7.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/6a81867f366c773d811c939c592c0618.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿

ai-features-in-ashby:

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# AI Features in Ashby
19 min
Copy
This guide provides an overview of the AI-powered features in Ashby and the best practices when using them.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#enabling-ai-features-in-ashby)Enabling AI features in Ashby
You can navigate to Admin > Organization Setup > Opt-In Features to opt in and enable some or all of the following AI features in Ashby:
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/NHPWcTzvMmbq1mM3W3m9j_opt-in-features.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
  * ﻿[Ashby Agents](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ashby-agents)﻿


  * ﻿[AI Report Interpretation](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-report-interpretation)﻿


  * ﻿[AI Talent Rediscovery](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-talent-rediscovery)﻿


  * ﻿[AI Content Assistant](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-content-assistant)﻿﻿  



  * ﻿[AI Notetaker](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker)﻿﻿  



  * AI-generated fraud signal summaries as part of the [Candidate Fraud Detection Overview & Admin Settings](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-fraud-detection-overview-and-admin-settings)﻿ tool (enabled separately from the Fraud Detection tool).


  * ﻿[AI Candidate Assistant](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-candidate-assistant)﻿﻿  



  * The [Report Builder & AI-Assisted Report Builder](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder)﻿ within the Report Builder & AI-Assisted Report Builder


  * Substitution tokens that generate sourcing content for [sourcing emails](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-tokens-in-outreach-emails)﻿ and [feedback summaries](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/substitution-tokens#ai-tokens)﻿ for candidate emails.


  * Filter Assistant in [Candidate Search](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-search#ai-assistant-filter-for-candidate-search)﻿﻿


  * ﻿[AI-Assisted Application Review](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-assisted-application-review)﻿﻿  



  * Automatic reply status classification for [Sequences](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/sequences#can-ashby-automatically-classify-a-leads-response)﻿﻿


  * ﻿[AI-Generated Feedback Summaries](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-generated-feedback-summaries)﻿ to provide a feedback summary on the candidates profile.


  * AI-Generated summaries for [Candidate Reviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-reviews#ai-generated-candidate-review-summary)﻿﻿


  * ﻿[Candidate Fraud Detection Overview & Admin Settings](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-fraud-detection-overview-and-admin-settings)﻿﻿  



  * ﻿[Enhanced Resume Parsing](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#enhanced-resume-parsing)﻿﻿  



You can use the toggles beside each AI feature to activate or deactivate the features as needed. Click the links above to be taken to guides with more information on each feature.
If your organization would like to have future AI features enabled by default as they are released, you can switch on the Auto-enable new featuresoption. If your organization would prefer to review then enable new AI features manually, you can switch or leave this option off.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#best-practices)Best Practices
Below are some best practices to bear in mind when using the AI features in Ashby.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#ai-content-assistant)AI Content Assistant
Once your content has been generated, review it fully. If you’re happy to use that content moving forward, click _Looks good. Insert into text box._
Alternatively, you can also ask another question. If you’d like to give feedback on the generated content, click _Give Feedback_. You’ll be able to provide a rating (positive or negative) and also add comments.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ed20d216b2183d072083daf9a301b164.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/a34ee835107411a247c7c8ea5e0afb88.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#ai-notetaker)AI Notetaker
Please note that the AI Notetaker is currently in Beta
  * For more on consent management and data retention, check out [this section](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#consent-management-and-data-retention)﻿ of the AI Notetaker guide.


  * Looking to improve the suggestions generated for feedback form fields? Check out our recommendations [here](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-notetaker#best-practices)﻿.


﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#ai-candidate-assistant)AI Candidate Assistant
Please note that the AI Candidate Assistant is still learning, so please review results when asking questions about candidates to confirm accuracy. You can provide feedback on the assistant by clicking Give Feedback. You’ll be able to add a rating along with any comments.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e93b09ec6e2403aead6e6eba477facad.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#ai-assisted-report-builder)AI-Assisted Report Builder
Both Ashby All-In-One and Ashby Analytics users can opt in to use this feature.
The AI Report Assistant is only available on the Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ❌  | ✅  | ✅  |  
Please review all generated results carefully. If the AI-Assisted Report Builder does not built the report you’re looking for from your prompt, you can click the Give Feedback button to provide a rating and add any comments.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e11edf02535c183965c44eb29a2154ae.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#ai-generated-email-tokens)AI-Generated Email Tokens
When placing an AI-Generated email token in an email template or sequence, the token is context-aware of its placement within the email body. As such, it can be used within a sentence or to generate an entire sentence or paragraph within the email.
When drafting your email, the token will automatically start generating content in the body of the email. Once generation is complete, please review the content and either:
  * Accept and add the generated content to the draft by clicking the checkmark icon


  * Regenerate the content using the regenerate icon


  * Remove the content and the token by clicking the trash can icon


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/81340534ff28a7608b8126c360174d2a.png)
﻿
Once you’ve taken action on the generated content, you will then be able to send the email to the candidate.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#candidate-search-ai-assistant)Candidate Search AI Assistant
Both Ashby All-In-One and Ashby Analytics users can opt in to use this feature.
When adding in a prompt to generate your candidate search filter, follow the description style listed in the examples underneath the Describe your filter… field.
Once your filter has been generated, please review accordingly to ensure the filters provided pull the information requested in your prompt.
You can use the thumbs-up and thumbs-down icons to provide feedback on the results provided. Once you’ve clicked either option, you can click Tell us more… to provide feedback on the generated filter.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/b2ccb9b08865ad83398ae77bc2e72df3.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0c78d69b6160d35cf6614c8a44c6386a.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#ai-assisted-application-review)AI-Assisted Application Review
Click [here](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-assisted-application-review#how-do-i-create-good-criteria)﻿ for more information on setting good job criteria.
Please note, that any application form criteria you configure will only determine whether or not the question was answered and not the quality or accuracy of the answer. Blank or unrelated answers will be flagged as not meeting the criteria.
Please make sure to review the application along with the criteria evaluation to determine the evaluation’s accuracy. If any evaluations are inaccurate, you can flag them by clicking the three dots on the evaluation and then clicking Flag Evaluation.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ba6ae16834bba6af41927882a251e503.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#automated-reply-status)Automated Reply Status
Review any classifications that have been generated via AI to ensure accuracy. All AI-generated classifications will have an icon beside the reply status to indicate that has been classified by the feature.
You have the option to override the auto-classification for up to one week after the classification is made. Click the response drop-down to change the reply status as needed.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/81879f3ae02c988a496a2fb7bf59e344.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#feedback-summaries)Feedback Summaries
When summaries have been generated, be sure to check over all completed feedback forms to ensure the generated summary is an accurate representation of each reviewer’s viewpoint.
If you’d like to generate a new summary, click Regenerate on the feedback summary within the candidate’s profile.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1acc9c9705253d2e7b7981a99eaa96bc.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#candidate-review-summaries)Candidate Review Summaries
When summaries have been generated, be sure to check over all completed reviews to ensure the generated summary is an accurate representation of each reviewer’s viewpoint.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/26f34d7b153017549cef1291f6d159dc.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#candidate-fraud-detection)Candidate Fraud Detection
When reviewing AI-generated summaries, please also make sure to carefully review each signal too. As you review each signal, you can hover over the signal title to get more information on what is being evaluated. Any flagged signals will be listed above the signals checked so you can easily see what needs checking.
Once you’ve reviewed the data provided, you can choose from the following options to confirm the candidate’s fraud status:
Mark Fraud: Flag this as a fraudulent application. This will then trigger the process to archive the candidate with the Rejected by Organization: Fraudulent Candidate archive reason applied.
Not Fraud: Mark the flagging as a false positive and confirm the application is not fraudulent. The candidate will have a Fraud Signals - Cleared label added to their profile.
Unsure: Mark the application as Uncertain - Flagged for Monitoring so it can be re-reviewed later.
If you need to update the fraud signals status on a candidate’s profile, you can click on the Fraud Signals label applied to the candidate’s profile to reopen the Fraud Signals History popover, then select the correct status.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/5da666c20eb98fcfe38bd1023cc8e337.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#ai-report-intepretation-tool)AI Report Intepretation Tool
When generating your interpretation, you can open up each generated insight to get further information on your results. If the insights don't match up or you're seeing an Out of Sync status for the intepretation, click Regenerate to update the intepretation. An interpretation status can show as Out of Sync when the filters or fields shown on a report have been amended.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/u6ApsamJaRJJTz26U5kok_report-builder-acent-ashby-2026-01-29-at-115942-am.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/ai-features-in-ashby#enhanced-resume-parsing)Enhanced Resume Parsing
When enhanced resume parsing is enabled, this tool will extend the range of supported languages for parsing resumes (for example, Korean and Hebrew are now supported). This will also improve parsing for resumes with more complex layouts or formatting.
No further action needs to be taken after enabling this feature, it will be used for parsing resumes added to Ashby moving forward, either via candidates applying to jobs, or by resumes being added by an Ashby user within the platform. For more on adding a candidate directly in Ashby, check out [our guide on candidate profiles](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-profile#vTNNJ)﻿.

Sourcing & Outreach
# Events
22 min
Copy
The Events feature simplifies the organization of hiring events, providing tools for audience management, event detail customization, and registration. It supports both in-person and virtual events and allows for attendee tagging and custom emails.
Events are available on the Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ❌  | ✅  | ✅  |  
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#events-overview)Events overview
Events is a powerful tool designed to streamline the organization and management of your hiring events. From small-scale meetups to large career fairs, this module offers a suite of features to enhance both the organizer's and the candidate's experience.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#accessing-events)Accessing events
Navigate to the Sourcing section and select the**Events** option to view your upcoming and past events dashboard. See event metadata, including the title, audience size, creator, and start time at a glance.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ac058226a62c6831932de0714d4adef8.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#create-a-new-event)Create a new event
Click the New Event button in the top right corner to create a new event.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/07372b5d7cfc34d4364f31c803ae8960.png)
﻿
﻿  

Fill in essential details, including the:
  * Internal Name (this name is not shown publicly and is for your team’s reference)


  * Name


  * Visibility (public or private)


  * Source


  * Date


  * Time


  * Timezone


  * Location Type (physical or virtual)


  * Location


  * Location Description


![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/2825da35d188547773e6bf008adb6939.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7dd9130a5badf277a6a1be167aa04244.png)
﻿
﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#customize-your-event)Customize your event
Each event has a home page where you can access and edit the audience, event details, registration page, and more.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#audience)Audience
On the Audience tab, you can view a list of attendees. You can take individual and bulk action on this page.
More on [managing your audience](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#audience)﻿ below.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/db00e60af9218ac2904d31740b9a8217.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#settings)Settings
**Basic Info & Event Details**
Event details event and registration information can be configured on the Settings page. Modify basic event information and update the URL slug for the event if needed here.
If you’d like to send out an invitation email automatically to candidates when you add them to your event audience (either individually or in bulk from a project), you can select an email template via the Invitation Email Template dropdown. Once an email template has been selected, you will have the option to preview it too.
An event can only have one URL at a time. If you update the URL slug for your event, any links that reference the old slug will no longer work.
You can also specify an email template to send as a confirmation email when attendees register to attend the event. More on this [here](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#can-i-specify-a-confirmation-email-to-send-out-to)﻿.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d9ed7f92d4bb2d89f3c70a3eb86011d2.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/1d7ac3b0c1b1af3bf60a545fd5dea897.png)
﻿
**﻿  
**
**Registration Page Info**
In this section of Settings, you can amend the public name of your event, view the registration form and add a header and footer description.
The description header appears above the title, date, and location on your event's registration page. The footer appears below the title, date, and location.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/7de53cdac15c5e3ebb1bce8971ec62b9.png)
﻿
**﻿  
**
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#forms)Forms
Like other Ashby forms, you can customize the questions that your attendees see when registering. These responses can be found on the Forms tab of their lead/candidate profile and embedded in the registration email using the Hiring Event Audience Member's Registration Form Submission token.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/85673ca46de3d1a5e5d052d01f644331.png)
﻿
When editing the form, you can add the following field types:
  * **Short Answer** Single line of unformatted text. LinkedIn url responses will be auto-populated on the candidate's profile.


  * **Long Unformatted Answer** Multiple lines of unformatted text.


  * **Phone** Only domestic or international phone numbers.


  * **Email** Only valid email addresses.


  * **Multiple Choice** Select a single option.


  * **Checkboxes** Select multiple options.


  * **Date** Only dates that can be selected via a date picker.


  * **Yes/No** Yes, no, or, if not required, no answer.


  * **Number** Only allows whole numbers (e.g. 1) or decimals (e.g. 1.5).


  * **Candidate's location** Set the candidate's location. Can only be added once to a form.


  * **Other location** Allow another location to be added to the referral.


  * **URL** A clickable link to a website.


  * **Candidate's Education History** See the candidate's education history. Can only be added once to the form.


When adding the candidate's education history field to your form, you will be able to specify the information asked for. You can opt to include or exclude the school, degree, field of study, start and end date fields as needed. Check the Allow multiple entries checkbox to allow those completing the form to add multiple qualifications. You can also set a minimum and maximum number of entries using the Min and Max fields.
![Document image](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/f2NAhMfa7xJdZfczD0K___education-history-field-on-a-form.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
Information added to this field will always complete the Education section of the candidate's profile. 
  * **Resume** Upload a single file and set it to the candidate's resume field. Can only be added once to a form.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#time-slots)Time Slots
Configure time slots if you’d like to require candidates to select a specific time when registering. Switch on the Enable Time Slots? option then click + Add Time Slot to add in a new time slot. You can also add a registration limit for each time slot if you have a limited number of spaces.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/e980324d82ad98879b7921cd9317478d.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/411da02dab7159df76ecd718d0bc4a17.png)
﻿
﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#other-options)Other options
  * Preview the registration page by clicking View Registration Page This page is styled using elements from [Theme](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/theme "Theme").


  * Archive past events by clicking the More button.


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9858a47fc825fe1da15883f7b665cdc6.png)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#manage-your-audience)Manage your audience
Click Audience to view and modify the list of registered attendees, their RSVP status, and check-in status.
Take individual and bulk actions on your event list, including:
  * Adding attendees


  * Consider attendees for an existing job


  * Add attendees to an existing project


  * Add tags to attendees’ candidate profiles


  * Removing attendees from the event


  * Email attendees (supports custom and template emails)


If you have an invitation email configured as part of your event settings, use the Send Invitation Email? checkbox to determine whether an invitation email should be sent or not when adding attendees to your audience.
You can click on a specific attendee to access their lead/candidate profile.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/351069d3356299582bbb8d0bb4774772.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d91c19155e6503e85a757d2b889f9615.png)
﻿
![events1.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/koZ4bgYHOUHXv6v5Lm_uK_events1.gif)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/c0de50786c00efcdf0b325fadf935ccb.png)
﻿
![events2.gif](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/6NpoxiXrijSyaRoOZguR__events2.gif)
﻿
﻿  

﻿  

##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#event-best-practices)Event best practices
To get the most out of the Event feature, we recommend a few best practices to create an excellent experience for your attendees. Reach out to your Customer Success contact for more recommendations!
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#reach-out-to-your-audience-ahead-of-the-event)Reach out to your audience ahead of the event
Use the bulk email feature to update your audience ahead of the event. This can be used to send reminders, logistical changes, and to get them excited about what’s upcoming.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#gather-feedback-after-the-event)Gather feedback after the event
After an event ends, we recommend gathering feedback from the attendees. This information is useful for improving future events and gathering quotes for future marketing collateral. Use the [Candidate Experience Surveys](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys)﻿ feature to gather NPS ratings for your events.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#ask-your-audience-if-theyd-like-to-be-added-to-you)Ask your audience if they’d like to be added to your mailing list for future events
Even if you don’t move forward with candidates, you can keep them interested in future events and opportunities through mailing lists. Asking for their permission to be added to such mailing lists upfront via the [Candidate Experience Surveys](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/candidate-experience-surveys)﻿ will help ensure compliance with some regulations (e.g. GDPR requires consent to be opt-in).
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#can-i-host-both-in-person-and-virtual-events)Can I host both in-person and virtual events?
The feature supports in-person and virtual events, allowing you to choose the format that best suits your needs.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#how-can-i-add-custom-fields-to-the-registration-fo)H**ow can I add custom fields to the registration form?**
In the form editor, you can add custom fields by selecting the "Add Field" option and specifying the field type and label.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#whats-the-best-practice-for-adding-the-specific-lo)What’s the best practice for adding the specific location of an event?
Today, we recommend adding specific location details to the confirmation email and registration footer.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#can-i-specify-a-confirmation-email-to-send-out-to)Can I specify a confirmation email to send out to attendees that register via my form?
You can do this on the Settings page for your event. Scroll to the bottom of the page where you will find the confirmation email settings dropdown. Use this to select an email template. If an email template is not selected, attendees who register using your form will not receive a confirmation email.
Within the Confirmation Email Settings section, you can also opt to attach a calendar invite to your confirmation email. Switch on the Attach calendar invite? option and you’ll be able to preview the contents of the .ics file.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/07e19ef458d489560f568432767afb3e.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ded39495e16fb806689f7380cfb34f15.png)
﻿
Please note, if a candidate imports the ics file into their calendar and then clicks Accept or Decline on the event - this will not be synced back to Ashby. If you’d like to give candidates the option to update their RSVP status, add the Hiring Event Audience Member’s RSVP Link substitution token to your confirmation email template for your event. Updates made via the link will sync back to Ashby.
The event description that is shared with candidates in the .ics file cannot be updated once it's been sent to a candidate - if updates are made to the event’s title or header or footer descriptions, only the .ics files sent out moving forward will include the change.
﻿  

﻿  

###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#what-should-i-include-in-an-email-confirmation)What should I include in an email confirmation?
  * Include the details of the event, including the specific location and time.


  * Include their registration details in case they’d like to reach out and update any information directly.


  * Include logistics like how to let you know if they can no longer attend, where to park and who to contact with any questions.


###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#are-there-event-specific-substitution-tokens-i-can)Are there event-specific substitution tokens I can add to my email template to pull event information?
Yes, you can pull the following information using substitution tokens. **Hiring Event Name:** The name of the hiring event. **Hiring Event Location:** The location set in the _Location_ field of your event **Hiring Event Location Description:** The location information set in the _Location Description_ field of your event **Hiring Event Location Type:** The location type as set in the _Location Type_ field of your event **Hiring Event Date:** The date of your hiring event **Hiring Event Time:** The timezone, start time and end time of the hiring event (if set) **Hiring Event Start Time:** The start time of the hiring event **Hiring Event End Time:** The end time of the hiring event **Hiring Event Timezone:** The timezone set in the hiring event details. **Hiring Event Audience Member’s Time Slot:** The time slot the audience member selected when registering for the event (if time slots are enabled for this event). **Hiring Event Audience Member’s Registration Form Submission:** The audience member’s registration form submission. **Hiring Event Audience Member’s RSVP Link:** A link that the email recipient can use to update their RSVP status after they’ve registered. Any amendments to the RSVP status made here will update in Ashby.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#can-i-create-a-qr-code-for-my-event-registration-f)Can I create a QR code for my event registration form?
Yes! If you create a custom slug within the Settings tab of your event, you will then have the option to generate a QR code that you can add to your event marketing materials.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/67c86092091023239b148f8abe50ca80.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#what-does-a-private-event-look-like)What does a private event look like?
If you set an event to private, then only candidates that are invited (via adding to audience within Ashby) are able to register for the event.
When accessing the registration page, users will only be asked to add their email address - this is used to determine if the user has been invited. If the user has not been invited, they will see a message saying that only those invited to the event can register.
If the user has been invited, once they have entered their email they will be able to complete the form and register as attending the event. If the candidate is already registered, they’ll be informed as such after submitting their email address.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0aa54b0ad21fead62ea4f25867a89865.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#how-do-i-check-an-attendee-in-for-the-event)How do I check an attendee in for the event?
Navigate to the Audience tab for your event and find the attendee on the list. In the Checked In? column, select Yes for the user in question. They’ll now be checked in and the timestamp will be recorded in the Checked In At column.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/ef7a3902092ef391cb7d0e1af49e7984.png)
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#how-do-i-export-a-list-of-attendees-andor-rsvps-fo)H**ow do I export a list of attendees and/or RSVPs for my event?**
Create a custom list report containing the attendee information you need for your event. You will then be able to export this list for your records, or set up Alerts if you’d like to receive notifications about attendees.
To create a custom list report, navigate to Reports > Build Report and select the custom list report option. Below you can find the recommended report set up.
Report Type: Custom List
Subject: Event Audience Members
Filters: Event Audience Member’s Hiring Event (filtered to the event in question)
Columns/Fields to Show: Include information from the event’s registration form, along with the RSVP Status.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/f9bed6152f7da6ba5ab27495cda68e3f.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#troubleshooting-common-issues)Troubleshooting common issues
  * **Issue:** Page Not Found


  * **Solution:** Ensure the event is not archived and the URL is correct.


  * **Issue:** Email Confirmations Not Sent


  * **Solution:** Check if the confirmation email feature is enabled and the template is correctly configured. If you can see the purple Enable button the template is currently disabled.


﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/31f23abd4498bfb43f1dea89884d11ad.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3ee7045261a63bf6da2ab3e35ce17756.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/events#upcoming-feature-improvements)Upcoming feature improvements
The following improvements are already on the roadmap for this feature; if you’re interested in something specific, please get in touch with your Customer Success contact or support@ashbyhq.com to express your interest.
  * Bulk-adding candidates to events


  * Event reporting


  * Reminder emails

report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-bu:
<!-- source: https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder -->

[![Website logo](https://archbee-image-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/SIHH4C2peMjgawXW2Y0OC_ashby-docs-logo-light.svg)](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/)
Ashby AI Features
# Report Builder & AI-Assisted Report Builder
8 min
Copy
Our new simplified report builder and template library helps you get to grips with reporting in Ashby quickly, helping to ensure you can get a hold of the data you need. Both Ashby All-In-One and Ashby Analytics users can access the report builder and AI-Assisted Report Builder.
You can also have a conversation with the AI-Assisted Report Builder to get access to your key metrics quickly. Please review all generated content carefully.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder#overview)Overview
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder#enabling-the-report-builder)Enabling the Report Builder
The report builder should now be enabled by default. If you would like to opt out of the report builder, hover over your avatar in the top-right corner, then click Design Preview. You will then be able to disable the report builder view. You can re-enable the report builder to switch back in the Design Preview section as needed.
![The option to disable the new report builder page in Design Preview.](https://images.archbee.com/0p8tQ--ZZOxRtkVp6Qr-e/j--1GzbfLn-JOAQp0ahDq_report-builder-disable-in-design-preview.jpg?format=webp)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder#navigating-the-report-builder)Navigating the Report Builder
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/d7200eecec045f834c06e008ec563707.png)
﻿
  1. Getting Started: Here you can explore templates for reports and alerts (more on alerts at [Alerts](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder "Alerts")) and use them as a base to get the data you need. You can also explore our Analytics Glossary and Analytics Help guides to get acquainted with building reports in Ashby.


  1. Templates: In the left-hand menu, you’ll be able to view a list of the templates available without navigating to Report Templates. Select a topic, then the report type to have it generated. You can also search for a template using the Search templates… field. For more on report templates, check out [Report Catalog: Templates](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder "Report Catalog: Templates")﻿


  1. Custom Report: Looking to build something from scratch? You can access the core report types here. More on these at [Custom Reports](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder "Custom Reports").


  1. Chat with Ashby: Access the [AI-Assisted Report Builder](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder)﻿ to help you build a custom report. Describe what you’re looking to build within a conversation and the assistant will build it for you.


##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder#generating-saving-reports)Generating & Saving Reports
When you select a template or custom report type within the report builder the three key elements for report building will be highlighted above the generated report:
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/0df2ac62119c2d0e6ece20a759b94702.png)
﻿
The subject: The type of record being counted. In the example pictured, jobs are being counted.
The timeframe: The timestamp used and the date range to determine the results that should be included. In the example pictured, the timestamp being used is the date the job was opened and the time range is over the last six quarters, displayed by month.
The field the results are grouped by: How the results are further grouped to determine how they are displayed on the report. In our example, the data is already grouped by month in the Timeframe section but you can click Select a field… to group by an additional field.
﻿  

You can also use the icons down the right-hand side of the report results to make adjustments.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/9829cc1e968792958268f96b9ad27c2b.png)
﻿
Subject: Change the subject of the report (the record being counted).
Visualization: Set your chart style and any goal lines if needed. For count over time reports, you can also amend other visuals like how the count is displayed on the report.
Filters: Filter by additional fields to only pull the most relevant data to you and your team.
Groupings: Amend the fields that the report is grouped by or add additional fields for grouping.
Settings: Adjust the title and timezone on the report and optionally add any notes.
Once you’ve made any adjustments needed to the report, you can click Save Report. Add a title, set whether the report is private or note and add it to any relevant dashboards as needed. You also have the option to add notes if needed. Click Save Report to then add the report to your saved reports. Saved reports can be accessed under Reports > Saved Reports.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/be7421411d57cd7403be298cb11f29a7.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/report-builder-and-ai-assisted-report-builder#ai-assisted-report-builder)AI-Assisted Report Builder
The AI Report Assistant is only available on the Legacy Plus, Plus and Enterprise plans:  
| Foundations  | Legacy Plus  | Plus  | Enterprise  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| ❌  | ✅  | ✅  | ✅  |  
You can opt in to use the AI-Assisted Report Builder in Admin > Organization Setup > [Opt-In Features](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/early-access "Opt-In Features"). Check the AI-Assisted Report Builder checkbox to opt to use this specific feature.
﻿  

![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/65cbd121140d0030a92361eca15bdfc2.png)
﻿
To access the Reporting Assistant, click Let’s Chat! when using the new report builder design.
This will open up a conversation where you can add in your prompt and the reporting assistant can then get to work on generating your report.
Once the report is generated, you can then make adjustments to the report, save it, or return to the chat to prompt the assistant to make other adjustments.
To provide feedback on the generated report, click the Give Feedback button within the conversation. You can give a positive or negative rating and also provide a comment.

# How can I ask for and add reference feedback in Ashby?
8 min
Copy
While we don’t have a specific tool to ask for references in Ashby, here is a guide covering how you can ask for reference information and record reference checks.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-can-i-ask-for-and-add-reference-feedback-in-ashby#using-questionnaires-to-request-reference-informat)Using Questionnaires to request reference information from a candidate
To request reference contact information from a candidate, you can opt to create a [Questionnaire](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/surveys/questionnaire "Questionnaire"). We have more on setting these up at [Questionnaires](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/questionnaires)﻿
Ensure you have an email template in place [here](https://app.ashbyhq.com/admin/organizational-settings/email-templates "here") with a substitution token for Questionnaire Link - otherwise you will not be able to set up the automation options.
You can opt to either add a questionnaire activity to your interview plan to automatically prompt you to send out the questionnaire or set up automation within the questionnaire setup itself.
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-can-i-ask-for-and-add-reference-feedback-in-ashby#add-a-questionnaire-activity-to-your-interview-pla)Add a Questionnaire activity to your interview plan
To add a Questionnaire activity to your interview profile, head into your job, then click Interview Plan on the left-hand sidebar. Find the stage where you plan to check the candidate’s references, then click Add Activity To… then Add Activity and Questionnaire. Select the reference questionnaire and determine the email template you’d like to use to send out the request.
When creating the activity, you will also have the option to add automation, so the questionnaire is sent out as soon as the candidate is moved to the specified stage.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-can-i-ask-for-and-add-reference-feedback-in-ashby#set-up-questionnaire-automation)Set up Questionnaire automation
You can also automate the sending of a questionnaire with our new automation option. This can done on the Automation tab within the reference survey itself. More on automating questionnaires at [Automated Activities](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/automated-activities)﻿.
We would recommend this option if you’d like to send out the questionnaire for any candidate who meets the criteria set, rather than setting it up on each job’s interview plan.
﻿
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-can-i-ask-for-and-add-reference-feedback-in-ashby#sending-a-one-off-reference-request-from-the-candi)Sending a one-off reference request from the candidate profile
To send the questionnaire out to the candidate on a one-off basis, you can do this on the candidate’s profile under More and Create Questionnaire Request _._
You will have the option to just generate a questionnaire request and link, or to generate the link and email it out to the candidate.
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-can-i-ask-for-and-add-reference-feedback-in-ashby#submitted-reference-checks-via-a-feedback-form-wit)Submitted reference checks via a feedback form within Ashby
﻿
Once you’ve received the reference information from the candidate, we recommend scheduling any meetings outside of Ashby.
If you’re asking specific questions or getting specific information from the reference, we recommend setting up a new feedback form specifically for reference checks. You can read more about setting up feedback forms at [Feedback Forms and Interviews](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/feedback-forms-and-interviews)﻿.
To add any information or feedback from the reference, head to the candidate’s profile and click the More button in the top-right corner, then choose Submit Feedback from the drop-down. You can then select your reference-specific feedback form and fill out the fields needed, then submit it.
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/3f9fb6d045f2d74c756f179332c34ec8.png)
﻿
![Document image](https://cdn.zappy.app/4e87e1af7aacdf43581ded0d6864c33b.png)
﻿
##  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-can-i-ask-for-and-add-reference-feedback-in-ashby#faq)FAQ
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-can-i-ask-for-and-add-reference-feedback-in-ashby#can-i-send-a-direct-booking-link-to-a-reference)Can I send a direct booking link to a reference?
No, if you are meeting with a candidate’s reference, the meeting would need to be set up outside of Ashby. Direct booking links are used to schedule interviews with the candidate themselves.
###  [](https://docs.ashbyhq.com/how-can-i-ask-for-and-add-reference-feedback-in-ashby#can-i-ask-for-references-and-follow-this-reference)C**an I ask for references and follow this reference check process if the candidate has already been hired?**
Yes, you can still follow the steps above to ask for references and add reference feedback.
﻿
